descriptionZh:

2010年台灣食品消費調查統計年鑑報導:新東陽肉乾、肉鬆、肉醬等系列商品均為消費者最常選購的品牌第一名，因此有肉品王國的美譽
2011年更獲得台灣百大品牌之殊榮
我們提供多元化的媒體付款服務，包含Apple Pay、Samsung Pay與即時線上支付卡-銀聯卡。

nameEn: Hsing Tung Yang, Shin Kong Mitsukoshi Xinyi Store
addressEn: B2, No. 11, Songshou Road, Xinyi District Taipei City, Taiwan 110
descriptionEn:
The Hsing Tung Yang Shin Kong Mitsukoshi Xinyi Branch is located at Exit 3, Taipei City Hall MRT Station
The store primarily sells a variety of Hsin Tung Yang brand flossy pork, dried meat, pastries, pineapple cakes, casual snacks, and different local specialty products of Taiwan. The store also offers various imported Japanese/Korean products.
The corporate objective of Hsin Tung Yang is to refine Chinese cuisines with the international spirit benchmark. Our local operations adhere to the four key principles of integrity, dependability, activeness, and innovation to create the corporate image of "No. 1 specialty brand in Taiwan for must buy in items and perfect souvenirs to take overseas" and bring high quality shopping experiences to the consumers.
2010 Annual Taiwan Food Consumption Survey Statistics Report: Hsin Tung Yang flossy pork, dried meat, and meat sauce series products are often listed as the No. 1 consumption brand; which gives it the reputation of "meat kingdom."
Won the 2011 Taiwan Top 100 Brands honor
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop, and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

descriptionEn:
Pacific Business Hotel is located in the essential business district of Xinyi District in Taipei City. We have a total of 105 suites and is 5-8 minutes of walking distance from the Taipei 101/World Trade Center Station.

Our hotel facilities include Chinese and Western Ju-Yu Hall, meeting rooms, lounge, gym, and many other facilities; and we provide a combination of travel accommodation, food catering, business office, and meeting space services.

The spacious, modern, and air-conditioned suites feature flat-screen cable TV, warm lighting, private balcony, and personal safe.

The lounge contain magazine area and computer room as well as free coffee or tea, local newspapers, and mineral water.

The Ju-Yu Restaurant serves Chinese and Western delicacies. We provide room service so customers can comfortably enjoy meals in the suite.

Xinyi District is the best choice for culture, delicacies, and shopping.

descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。

descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressEn: B1., No. 45, Shifu Rd., Xinyi Dist., Taipei City 110, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Locate on the B1 floor of Taipei 101 Shopping Mall, the Hsin Tung Yang 101 counter carries an abundant array of products, including various types of meat floss, meat jerkies, pastries, pineapple shortcakes, assorted snacks, a selected collection of local specialties from different regions of Taiwan, and imported goods from countries like Japan and South Korea. As a business, we aim to refine Chinese food and help increase its visibility on the international stage. We have been doing so while adhering to the four fundamental principles underlying our business culture-Integrity, practicality, proactiveness, and innovation. Over the years, we’ve adopted a localized operating approach that assists us in building an image as “the must-buy products when visiting Taiwan, the must-have products when traveling abroad, and the best brand for a genuine taste of Taiwan’s specialties.” All these efforts are meant to create an excellent shopping experience for consumers in general. According to the Almanac of Food Consumption Survey in Taiwan, our meat jerkies, meat floss, and pork paste collections were the most commonly purchased products compared to similar items sold by other brands. Since then, Hsin Tung Yang began to enjoy the reputation as the “meat kingdom” in Taiwan. In 2011, it further received the title as one of the “Top 100 Taiwan Brands.” Here at Hsin Tung Yang, we provide diversified payment options, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, and UnionPay, an online payment method. Customers can also apply for membership at no extra cost, and can use the reward points immediately for a bargain price on specific products. We conduct member-only activities from time to time as well, making it easier for members to collect points while enjoying discounts on premium quality goods. Welcome to Hsin Tung Yang 101 counter and have a look at what we have to offer.

addressZh: 台北市中山區遼寧街177號2F
descriptionZh: 國賓大飯店川菜廳是全國五星級飯店中唯一一間川菜廳，菜色縱貫東西南北與兩岸，掌杓主廚廚齡皆超過20年以上，每年皆會出國考察國外菜系與菜餚並引進餐廳，使賓客享受時時創新的美味，比如主廚在2016年遠赴四川成都考察麻辣菜色，學習到142年的麻婆豆腐製法，以傳統正宗的牛肉末取代臺灣人常吃的豬肉末，讓料理更增添特殊風味，這就是國賓大飯店川菜廳的價值，「秉持正宗，時時創新｣。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 177, Liaoning St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Szechuan Court at The Ambassador Hotel Taipei is the only 5-star restaurant in Taiwan offering Sichuan cuisine. The menu includes dishes from every major culinary region in China, and the master chefs have at least 20 years of experience under their belt. Despite their skill, the chefs will go on an annual sabbatical overseas to study overseas cuisine and introduce relevant techniques to provide guests with creative gastronomic delights. For example, the master chef traveled to the city of Chengdu in Sichuan to study the art of mala (numbing and spicy flavor), and acquiring the techniques to prepare a mapo doufu (spicy tofu) based on a 142-year old recipe, replacing the minced pork that every Taiwanese is used to with minced beef instead, transforming this common dish into a featured attraction of the restaurant. This dedication echoes the spirit authenticity and innovation of Szechuan Court at the Ambassador.

descriptionZh: 喜瑞飯店是由臺灣知名建築大師李瑋珉先生以及夜店教父蘇誠修先生攜手打造，採用前衛、非主流設計概念為創作主軸，由年輕、國際化團隊經營的個性商務旅館。透過金屬、玻璃、大理石材與皮革等主要元素的運用，搭配法國設計師Philippe Starck與義大利設計師Ferruccio Laviani傢俱，整體空間呈現清透俐落的視覺氛圍。全館提供免費無線上網、隨選視聽娛樂系統，客房內更備有進口頂級沐浴用品。集結舒適、功能與時尚的喜瑞飯店是一個品味不凡的住宿選擇。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 64, Sec. 1, Chang’an E. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Ambience Hotel is designed by the renowned Taiwanese architect Wei-min Li and the Godfather of nightclubs, Cheng-hsiu Su. Avant garde and non-mainstream design concepts were adopted as the main theme, and the theme-based business hotel is operated by a young and international team. Metals, glass, marble, leather, and other major elements were utilized together with furnishings from the French designer Philippe Starck and Italian designer Ferruccio Laviani. The overall spatial layout presents a clean and minimalist visual atmosphere. The entire Hotel offers free Wifi and Video on Demand entertainment system. Guest rooms are also furnished with the premium and imported showering equipment. Ambience Hotel offers a tasteful choice of accommodations that feature great comfort, function and elegance.

Hall 8 provides an elevated ceiling with no supporting posts to block the red carpet passing through the entire space, thereby creating the path of sparkling lights and happiness that the bride and groom may walk down together. These four different halls and themes serve as a harmonious symphony and a place where dreamy weddings may be held, providing an unforgettable memory for the newlyweds.

The corporate objective of Hsin Tung Yang is to refine Chinese cuisines with the international spirit benchmark. Our local operations adhere to the four key principles of integrity, dependability, activeness, and innovation to create the corporate image of "No. 1 specialty brand in Taiwan for must buy in items and perfect souvenirs to take overseas" and bring high quality shopping experiences to the consumers.
2010 Annual Taiwan Food Consumption Survey Statistics Report: Hsin Tung Yang flossy pork, dried meat, and meat sauce series products are often listed as the No. 1 consumption brand; which gives it the reputation of "meat kingdom."
Won the 2011 Taiwan Top 100 Brands honor
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop, and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn: WEGO  Boutique Hotel in Dazhi is the largest flagship one after it became Taiwan’s leading boutique hotel brand. Designed by five top companies including those of Demos Chiang, the fourth generation of the Chiang Family, and the British designer, Mark Lintott, known for his designs for night clubs as well as 20 other top designers, this is Taiwan’s first design hotel, based on hedonism, a fun-tel, to realize a luxurious and delicate quality. In this jewelry box like hotel in Dazhi, lighting, romantic music sound, KTV singing, gourmet cuisine, wine, personal care products at pharmacy are available and this is not Taipei 101. It is WEGO FUNTEL, a paradise for two.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區中山北路二段39巷3號3樓
descriptionZh: 位於臺北晶華酒店3樓的Silk House晶華軒，餐廳內融合了中國傳統書法藝術和現代的燈光、玻璃造景，從包廂透明玻璃上可以看到書法，如「醉月雲飄飛，舞蝶賞霞露」，也可以從外看到裡面桌椅全景，結合古典美學與低調奢華的時尚氛圍，古今兼具，非常有美感，為一重裝潢外觀的飲食場所。一道道精緻的正宗川粵料理，從菜名到擺盤都非常講究，在每個小細節中，盡是中式料理的精華!10間包廂可舉辦4~24人的宴會，殷情的服務、極致的品味，使其成為台北社交圈最耀眼的宴飲場所。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 3F., No. 3, Ln. 39, Sec. 2, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Silks House, located on the 3rd Floor of the Regent Hotel and Resort, combines traditional Chinese calligraphy with modern lighting and glass landscaping. From the transparent glass partition, we see calligraphy works as well as interior furniture arrangement mixed with classic aesthetics and low-profile luxurious fashion, a beautiful classic and modern dining site. Authentic Sichuan and Yue-flavored dishes are well prepared from their names to arrangement. Each detail shows the essence of Chinese cuisine. Banquet Hall provides ten private rooms to accommodate parties between 2-24 participants. Sincere service and top quality dining make it one of the most popular dining venues in Taipei.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區一江街3號
descriptionZh: 台北馥華商旅是精品平價飯店，典雅的大方設計，濃厚的異國風情，CP值高的人氣酒店，位於台北市中心，緊鄰南京東路、松江路，距離台北捷運松江南京站步行2分鐘，交通方便，生活機能充足。提供最優質住宿服務、免費無線上網、數位頻道收視系統。使用防燃建材及自動偵煙設備，讓每位住客都能安心享受舒適的住宿環境。大廳提供24小時電腦、網路、郵件收發、傳真，提供便利服務。不管是觀光、洽公、家庭旅遊，皆是台北住宿首選。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 3, Yijiang St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: FORWARD HOTEL, Taipei is an affordable boutique hotel with elegant design and exotic style. It is a popular hotel that provides extra value. Located in downtown Taipei and adjacent to Nanjing East Rd. and Songjiang Rd. It is only two minutes on foot to Taipei MRT Songjiang-Nanjing Station. It provides convenient traffic connection and amenities. High quality accommodation services, free Internet connection and digital TV channels are available. Fire resistant building materials and automatic smoke detectors allow customers to relax and enjoy our elegant and comfortable services. There are 24-hour computer, Internet, mail, fax services available at the lobby for your ease and convenience. This is your best choice in Taipei for those who go on both business and leisure trips.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區遼寧街95號
descriptionZh:
集結家傳四川小麵與眷村美食的蘭芳麵食館，背後是兩個男人相知相惜的兄弟情。日據時代的木門、老木板、打造出眷村風味的老菜櫃、老餐車、店内乾淨溫暖，雅潔舒適。
獨創的高人氣商品花椒麵-蘭芳小麵，以大紅袍、青花椒、乾辣椒等打碎煉製的麻辣油做為基底，浸潤在紅油裡的麵條香氣誘人。加入蒜泥、薑泥、以紹典老|酒炒的肉末等，趁熱拌勻，口中先透出花椒細緻的微苦韻味，入喉麻香多於辣|勁、唇齒留香。
店中有著淡淡地中藥香滷味順喉好吃，搭配特製花椒辣油，必點。若不吃辣，還可嚐嚐紹子麵，麵條拌開香氣襲來，略帶鹹口的澆汁～連小朋友都愛吃呢！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 95, Liaoning St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Lan Fang Noodles is run by two close brothers, fusing Sichuan home cooking and delicacies traditionally found in military dependents' housing compounds (MDHC). The restaurant, clean, warm, comfy and cosy, stands out with its wooden door and old wooden planks passed on from the Japanese occupation era, plus its old food cabinet and dining cart from the MDHC.
　　Lan Fang Noodle's exclusive popular signature dish: Lan Fang noodle with Sichuan pepper. For an enticing aroma, the noddle is cooked with chilli oil that consists of ground Da Hong Pao (a variety of Sichuan pepper), green Sichuan pepper and dried chillies. Then mix in garlic puree, ginger puree and minced meat stir-fried with aged Xiaoxing liquor, straight after the noodle is boiled. This dish has an initial hint of bitterness from the Sichuan peppers, followed by fragrant numbness in the throat, and then the pungent spiciness will kick in with a pleasant aftertaste.
　　Also on the menu are mixed braised dishes that are cooked in and thus smell of Chinese medicinal herbs, smooth on the palate. Enjoyed with the restaurant's signature Sichuan chilli oil, the braised dishes are a must-order. If spicy food doesn't take your fancy, you can try Shaozi Noodle. Once you mix up the noodle with its minced meat sauce, the aroma will immediately win you over. The slightly salty sauce is very popular even with the picky eaters like children.

nameZh: 和逸飯店 台北民生館
addressZh: 臺北市中山區民生東路二段178號
descriptionZh:
交通便捷的四星飯店，賓至如歸的貼心體驗
HOTEL COZZI和逸飯店－台北民生館，位於交通便捷的台北市中山區，步行6分鐘即達捷運行天宮站，直通商業核心地段及熱門旅遊景點，無論是以商務或觀光為目的旅客均能享有最便利的交通地理位置。

和逸飯店在軟硬體規劃上皆以「時時體貼，處處合意」為出發點，以適切的溫度，提供具親和力但不叨擾的服務品質。暖色調的裝潢、大量原木傢俱與石材建築，明亮採光與淡淡香氛營造舒心放鬆空間，洗滌旅客疲憊的身心。

和逸飯店較大型飯店少了一點拘謹，比商務飯店則多了一份溫暖，期望為忙於業務拜訪的商務人士，或是結束一整天城市探索的休閒旅客，提供一個讓旅客卸下心防、鬆脫領帶與高跟鞋的自在空間。讓您彷彿身處都會鬧區中的綠洲，在服務、客房、餐飲、環境、交通上都合您心意。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.178, Sec. 2, Minsheng E. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Convenient four-star hotel with homey, thoughtful accommodation experience
HOTEL COZZI MINSHENG TAIPEI is conveniently located in Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City, within 6 minutes walking distance from MRT Xingtian Temple Station. Offering direct access to the CBD and popular tourist destinations, the hotel’s strategic location provides business or pleasure travelers with the advantage of convenient transport.

HOTEL COZZI’s software and hardware design are both inspired by the concept of “Attentive Service to Meet Your Every Need” to provide guests with warm, friendly, and hassle-free service quality. The warm interior colors, wooden furniture and stone architectural materials are complemented by bright lighting and mild fragrance to create a cozy, relaxing space that will pamper guests and alleviate their exhaustion.

HOTEL COZZI does away with the formalities of large hotels and offers more friendliness compared to business hotels, hoping to offer business travelers conducting sales visits or tourists who have just finished exploring the city for the whole day with a comfortable place to kick back, unwind and rest. Like an oasis in the bustling concrete jungle, you will be pleased with the hotel’s service, guest rooms, food services, environment, and transportation.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區松江路76號1樓
descriptionZh: 漉，字義上是「完封精華」之意。將大海珍貴的美味完整封存，送達您口中，是我們唯一的初衷，更是不容妥協的堅持。從嚴選最新鮮的生猛海味以及蔬菜，到透過獨特蒸氣烹煮方式，呈現食材最誘人的原始風味，讓您的每一口體驗，都飽滿鮮美。松江店內部裝潢明亮舒適，而且緊鄰松江南京捷運站，交通十分方便，絕對是親朋好友聚餐的唯一選擇！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No.76, Songjiang Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: The word “lu” bears the meaning of “sealing in the essence”. The marvelous flavors of the ocean are sealed-in to tantalize your taste buds. This is our only and uncompromising goal. From selection of the freshest seafood and vegetables to the exclusive steampot cooking method, we strive to present the most enchanting original flavors of food so that each bite you take will be a refreshing, mesmerizing experience. Interior of the Songjiang store is bright and comfortable, and its location adjacent to the MRT Songjiang-Nanjing Station makes a convenient spot for enjoying a meal with friends or family!

addressZh: 臺北市中山區林森北路282號1樓
descriptionZh:
座落在長春路與林森北路交叉口，本店是臺灣銀行指定外幣收兌處及「旅行購物保障」認證，並榮獲經濟部認可OTOP案商家，推行一鄉一特產，販賣台灣全省特色特產，台灣手工藝品、現場烘烤鳳梨酥及MIT商品，販售商品種類多樣化，都是觀光客指定購買的人氣商品，並備有提供免費打箱打包服務，滿足所有顧客需求，是觀光客最佳選擇地標，除了提供舒適、滿足一次購足的購物空間外，流利的英、日文服務是我們全體夥伴給外國觀光客留下最美好回憶的責任。
門市主要販售新東陽各式肉鬆、肉乾、糕點、鳳梨酥、各式休閒零嘴、以及精選台灣各地的土特、與進口的日/韓等地商品，商品豐富應有盡有。
新東陽以推動中華美食精緻化，國際化的精神標竿為企業目標，堅守著誠信、踏實、積極、創新的四大理念在地化經營，打造“來台必買出國必帶，台灣特產第一品牌”的企業形象，帶給消費者優質購物體驗。
2010年台灣食品消費調查統計年鑑報導：新東陽肉乾、肉鬆、肉醬等系列商品均為消費者最常選購的品牌第一名，因此有肉品王國的美譽2011年更獲得台灣百大品牌之殊榮。
我們提供多元化的媒體付款服務，包含Apple Pay、Samsung Pay與即時線上支付卡-銀聯卡。
同時，也可免費申辦加入新東陽會員，立即享有紅利點數回饋商品，還有專屬會員的活動，讓您輕鬆集點，購物享優惠，更多的優質商品，歡迎您蒞臨門市參觀選購。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Hsin Tung Yang Lin Sen Store
addressEn: 1F., No.282, Linsen N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Hsin Tung Yang Linsen Store is the only 24-hour store in Taiwan. Located at the intersection of Changchun Rd. and Linsen N. Rd., the store is also a money exchanger authorized by the Bank of Taiwan and it is a Travel Shopping Assurance and an MOEA OTOP accredited establishment, promoting one town, one product, including specialty products, handicrafts from throughout Taiwan, as well as freshly baked pineapple cake and MIT merchandises. The varied product categories are highly popular among tourists. Free packing and packaging services are available to cater to the customers’ needs, making it a shopping landmark for tourists. Besides being a comfortable, one-stop shopping space, our staff also provide fluent English and Japanese services creating the most memorable shopping experiences for foreign tourists.
The store offers mainly assorted Hsin Tung Yang fried pork fibers, dried cured pork, pastries, pineapple cakes, snacks, as well as extensive selection of specialty products from Taiwan, Japan, and Korea etc.
Hsin Tung Yang strives to promote the refinement and internationalization of Chinese delicacies by upholding the spirits of integrity, dependability, enthusiasm, and innovation. The aim is to create a corporate image of “Premier souvenir brand in Taiwan offering essential Taiwanese products”, thereby bringing a superb shopping experience for consumers.
According to the 2010 Almanac of Food Consumption Survey in Taiwan, Hsin Tung Yang dried cured pork, fried pork fibers, and pork paste products were ranked number one among the consumers’ most frequently purchased brands. As a result, Hsin Tung Yang has been awarded the laudatory title of Meat Kingdom and it was selected as one of the Top 100 Taiwan Brands in 2011.
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區民生東路三段8號1樓
descriptionZh: 晶宴會館為台灣第一婚宴品牌，北台灣擁有多間分館，自2004成立至今服務超過四萬對新人，累積百萬消費人次，同時秉持「玩婚主義」的品牌精神，讓新人擁有不一樣的完美婚禮，實現新人們一生中最幸福的時刻。民生館擁有雙樓層，共計2個宴會劇場，廳內無柱挑高空間，呈現大氣雍容的雅緻氛圍，同時擁有一座戶外證婚台，滿足新人對婚禮的無限憧憬。無論喜慶婚宴、企業餐敘、或尾牙春酒等，都是您的最佳首選。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No.8, Sec. 3, Minsheng E. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Amazing Hall is the No. 1 wedding brand in Taiwan. We have numerous branches at Northern Taiwan, provided services to more than 40 thousand newlywed couples since 2004, and served over a million consumers. We also adhere to the “Fun Wedding” brand spirit to ensure a unique and perfect wedding for each newlywed couple so they can enjoy the happiest moments of their lives. The Minsheng Hall has 2 floors and a 2 banquet theaters. The pillarless high-ceiling spaces showcases a graceful and elegant atmosphere. There is also an outdoor wedding platform to satisfy the ultimate wedding needs. We are the best choice for wedding banquets, corporate gatherings, end-of-year celebrations, or spring festivals.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區雙城街3巷2號1樓
descriptionZh:
本店於2010年12月1日起轉型為全面素食供餐 ！

純素豬油拌飯醬，宅配12瓶以上，可享免運費服務！！！請多加選用！！！

豐味亭堅持著自然的烹調技藝，不論是異國素食料理或台灣傳統美食，都是僅靠著食材的原汁、原味，去畫出味道的感覺，並引發出人們對於美味食物的感動~那是人們逐漸遺忘的原味。 
本店追求品質與鮮度，採用部份有機食材、嚴選健康自然的時令蔬菜、益全香米、料理無味精、自然放牧蛋、葵花油、100％特級冷壓橄欖油。 

豐味亭餐廳的裝潢，有著浪漫的異國風情，卻只要平易近人的售價，其目地就是要讓每個階層的人，都能享受到美食的饗宴。本店消費無收服務費亦無供水，另有提供合菜服務，請洽詢！

豐味亭每道蔬食均明確標示出：各類素別 (均無五辛)，若有宗教因素亦可安心食用！
希望本店對食物天然烹調的堅持和經營理念，能獲得您的認同與支持！竭誠歡迎您的蒞臨！

誰說素食不好吃、
沒事幹嘛要吃素？

走一趟豐味亭便會顛覆你的想法
原來素食也可以這麼好吃！

~豐味亭豐富您的美食生活~
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 2, Ln. 3, Shuangcheng St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
The store now serves only vegetarian foods since December 1, 2010.

Vegetarian rice mix paste can be now delivered to your home without shipment costs for those who purchase more than 12 jars!!! Please take advantage of this offer!!!

Feng Wei Ting insists on natural cooking crafts. Both exotic vegetarian cuisine and Taiwanese traditional gourmet foods are prepared to present authentic tastes of foods and to touch heart of consumers, the gradually forgotten original taste. 

In pursuit of quality and freshness, the sestaurant uses some organic food ingredients such as strictly selected healthy and natural seasonal vegetables, Yihchuan Aromatic Rice, free-range eggs, sunflower oil, and 100% extra virgin cold pressed olive oil. The restaurant does not use MSG in its dishes

Feng Wei Ting is decorated with romantic exotic style and customers can enjoy gourmet foods with affordable prices. Our objective is to offer tasty foods for every diner to our restaurant. The restaurant does not collect a service charge and offers waterr. Group dining services are available and please contact us!

Each vegetarian dish in Feng Wei Ting is clearly marked with a label showing its type (without use of chilly spices) for peace of mind of religious diners!

We hope that our insistence and managerial concept of natural food cooking can gain your recognition and support! We sincerely welcome your arrival!

Who said that vegetarian foods are not tasty & Why do we eat need to eat vegetarian foods?

Come to Feng Wei Ting and you will change your mind and find the delicious taste of vegetarian foods!

addressZh: 臺北市中山區農安街19號B1
descriptionZh: Escapeholics【逃托上癮者】、是Escape【逃托】+Holics【上癮者】的結合字，想要透過遊戲讓每位玩家都玩到上癮!

descriptionEn:
After taking all challenges, 10 boys who love escape games decide to set up Escapeholics (EPIC). 
Escapeholics stands for Escape+Holics with an aim to let players fully enjoy themselves. At Escapeholics, exciting adventures await you!

addressZh: 臺北市中山區樂群二路55號
descriptionZh: 台北美福大飯店為2016年台灣自創品牌的五星級國際飯店，並分別於2016及2017年獲得世界奢華酒店及世界旅遊酒店組織的獎項肯定，2018年更榮獲米其林餐廳及住宿推薦。坐落於大直地區，鄰近捷運文湖線劍南路站，至松山機場僅需車程10分鐘，桃園機場35分鐘，讓旅客輕鬆遊走台北。飯店規劃146間頂級客房、5間特色餐廳、1間池畔酒吧及1間烘焙坊，設有挑高七公尺的無柱氣派宴會廳，以及戶外恆溫泳池與三溫暖等休閒設施。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 55, Lequn 2nd Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Palette Buffet Restaurant is like a fresh food theme park. We prepare the delicious food ingredients each day, including the meat products that the Mayfull Group is proud of and vegetables from different areas. We offer Chinese and Western soups, Western Cuisine, Chinese Cuisine, Japanese Cuisine, Exotic Cuisine, oven pizza, barbecue area, as well as dessert and drink bar to transform the good taste of nature into the joyous vitility of life.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區林森北路133巷8號
descriptionZh: 雋永玫瑰 為旅程迎來一刻綻放 皇家玫瑰林森館，以幻化多變的玫瑰色澤為設計理念，巧妙運用的色彩主題，為每間客房都創造了各自獨特的風格，也給予了旅客極致繽紛的住宿體驗。 享盡繁華熱鬧 未完待續的經典 坐落於巷弄一隅的林森館，中正紀念堂、當代藝術館、國際藝術村、華山大草原等等，繁華的中山捷運站商圈、堪稱美食殿堂的寧夏夜市，都與林森館近在咫尺，讓旅客隨時都可以深入認識台北傳統與現代的文化精髓。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8, Ln. 133, Linsen N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Linsen Store of the Rose Boutique Hotel is designed with color changeable roses. Skillfully incorporates color themes, each room is created with a unique style that provides exceptional experience for customers like a rose in bloom. The Linsen Store of the Rose Boutique Hotel is in a small street next to Chiang Kei-Shek Memorial Hall, Museum of Modern Art, International Art Village, Huashan Grassland, the busy business district of MRT Zhongshan Station, and the gourmet headquarters of the Ningxia Night Market. Our customers are able to explore the essence of Taipei’s traditional and modern culture.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區雙城街28巷8號
descriptionZh: 柔和玫瑰 感受家的溫暖氣息 深灰色的混凝土外牆、個性十足的建築外觀，搭上為冷色調增添一分暖意的木質大門，打造讓人彷彿回到家中的親切感。 鬧中取靜，美食無所不在 皇家玫瑰雙城館，距離中山國小捷運站僅需7分鐘的步行路程，緊鄰在一旁的24小時美食街，讓您在漫漫長夜中，一樣可以滿足嘴饞的慾望。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8, Ln. 28, Shuangcheng St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: With its dark grey concrete exterior wall, characteristic appearance of the architecture, and warm color of wood gate, this hotel greets its customers with the warm feeling that one may have when returning home. The Shuangcheng Store of the Rose Boutique Hotel is a paradise in a busy city. It takes only seven minutes to walk to MRT Zhongshan Elementary School Station and is adjacent to a 24-hour operating gourmet street. You can always find something of your liking even late at night.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區中山北路二段39巷3號2樓
descriptionZh: ROBIN'S Grill首創 Casual Fine Dining，企圖營造出「自在又奢華」的用餐氛圍。消費者對於在自在的環境下、不受拘束的品味美食，有越來越高的偏好度，然而，享用時尚氛圍、精緻擺盤以及頂級美食這種稍稍款待自己的奢華需求，也是消費者佈時會出現的慾望；這正是為什麼Robin's要在Fine Dining(華麗、高尚、講究)的用餐環境中，導入Casual(自在、輕鬆、隨意)的概念，領導時尚趨勢的同時，也滿足主流消費者的需求。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 3F., No. 3, Ln. 39, Sec. 2, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Silks House, located on the 3rd Floor of the Regent Hotel and Resort, combines traditional Chinese calligraphy with modern lighting and glass landscaping. From the transparent glass partition, we see calligraphy works as well as interior furniture arrangement mixed with classic aesthetics and low-profile luxurious fashion, a beautiful classic and modern dining site. Authentic Sichuan and Yue-flavored dishes are well prepared from their names to arrangement. Each detail shows the essence of Chinese cuisine. Banquet Hall provides ten private rooms to accommodate parties between 2-24 participants. Sincere service and top quality dining make it one of the most popular dining venues in Taipei.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區北安路631號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 631, Beian Road, Zhongshan District, Taipei City, Taiwan 104
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, "Beard Zhang Lu Pork Rice" is the original intention of "traditional food, the pursuit of happiness", starting from the roadside stalls, carrying forward the Taiwanese food culture as a job, constantly doing middle school, with quality, taste and service. Based on hygiene, the restaurant offers safe and delicious products, a neat and intimate dining environment and atmosphere. The management philosophy of "Practice", "Pursuing Excellence", "Customer Satisfaction" and "Sustainable Growth" is based on the management principle of "people-oriented", "talent cultivation", "recognition and punishment" and "results sharing". We are committed to the corporate vision of "selling the meat and meat to the whole world."

addressEn: No. 220, Jilin Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區中山北路三段53-7號
descriptionZh: 老爺木桶店以製作實用，耐看的台灣檜木桶，浴桶起家，歷經數十年的時光，秉持一貫誠懇與實在的態度，用心設計每件產品，不只站在顧客的角度，更為顧客尋找問題，解決問題。老爺木桶店，自民國80年初開始生產，批發橢圓形（有鋼圈）台灣檜木桶，由於精良的木桶製作技術，在木桶界打了良好的基礎，第，(一)家門市，在民國87年，成立於天母士東市場旁（忠誠路二段）期間將檜木桶的鋼圈改良，(、)不斷研發新的工法，好口碑顧客源源不絕，(。)近幾年，老爺木桶店堅持實在的設計和用料，由早期的橢圓形檜木桶，進化為方形檜木桶（無鋼圈，(、)無煩惱），(、)躺式檜木桶，(、)崁入式方形檜木桶，(、)規格品方形檜木桶(、)客製化方形檜木桶(、)泡腳桶，浴用木椅以及最新的大理石腳座等多種設計(，)真正體貼客戶的心，並獲得多項新樣式專利以及新型專利(。)
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.53-7, Sec. 3, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Laoyeh Wooden Barrel Store specializes in practical and aesthetically pleasing Hinoki tubs and bathtubs. Over the last several decades, the owner has upheld his sincere and down to earth attitude to design every product. He not only puts himself in his customers’ shoes but also tries to discover and resolve problems for them.  Since early 1991, Laoyeh Wooden Tub Store has produced and sold oval-shaped (with steel hoops) Taiwanese Hinoki wooden tubs in bulk. Thanks to its sophisticated production technique, Laoyeh has established a reputable name in the wooden tub industry. The first store was opened next to the Shidong Market in Tianmu (Sec. 2 of Zhongcheng Rd.) in 1998. Since then, the steel hoops on the wooden tub were improved, and new production techniques are constantly being developed to maintain an outstanding reputation, in turn attracting more customers. In recent years, Laoyeh Wooden Tub Store has evolved the early oval-shaped design of wooden tubs into rectangle-shaped ones (hoop-less, hassle-free design), rectangular freestanding wooden tub, alcove rectangular wooden tub, standardized rectangular wooden tub, customized rectangular wooden tub, foot bath barrel, wooden chair for bathrooms, and the latest marble pedestal design etc. The store’s user-friendly designs have been awarded numerous design patents and utility patents. )

descriptionZh:
維多麗亞酒店坐落於台北市中山區大直美麗華購物商圈，鄰近捷運文湖線劍南路站，以十九世紀英國盛世維多麗亞王朝的建築風格元素、英式貴族鐘樓、層次漸變的LED燈光、英式風情戶外花園及泳池畔花園，創造出時尚、古典的多樣風貌。

酒店內設有96間寬敞舒適客房及套房，3間主題餐廳包括N°168 PRIME牛排館、la FESTA義大利餐廳、雙囍中餐廳、以及會議室、宴會廳、健身房、游泳池、戶外花園等休閒設施，提供國內、外旅客最佳的住宿環境。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn:
Grand Victoria Hotel is located inside the Miramar shopping district in Dazhi, Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City, near MRT Wenhu Line’s Jiannan Rd. Station. The 19th-century Victorian architectural elements, clock tower, changing LED lighting, English outdoor garden, and poolside garden come together to create its chic, elegant facade.

There are 96 well appointed, comfortable guest rooms and suites in the hotel, as well as 3 themed restaurants (N°168 PRIME Steakhouse, la FESTA Italian restaurant and Xi Garden Chinese restaurant. In addition, the conference room, banquet hall, and recreational facilities such as fitness center, swimming pool, and outdoor garden provide domestic and foreign travelers with the best accommodation environment.

descriptionZh: la FESTA是極少數經義大利官方組織Ospitalita' Italian 認證為「全球正統義大利餐廳」，強調食材新鮮、高品質與手工現做料理，為結合義大利料理融入生活美學的展現，以最能凸顯食材原汁原味的地中海烹調方式，大量選用海鮮、蔬菜、水果、五穀雜糧和橄欖油為食材，不以重鹹的醬汁或鹽巴，採用天然食材原料調味方式將食材本身的鮮美全面提升，保有義大利料理傳統精神與原創性，以獨特手法顛覆傳統創造革新，成就當代義大利美食料理。

addressZh: 臺北市中山區長安東路二段86號
descriptionZh:
黑橋牌食品於1957年成立，因率先將舊時台灣市面上乾鹹的廣式臘腸，改良為現今甜潤多汁的台灣風味，獨創的香腸滋味在台灣炮而紅，成立至今已超過六十年，每逢年節皆可看見店舖大排長龍的搶購盛況，不僅開創台灣香腸的美食傳奇，更奠定現今台灣香腸第一品牌的口碑。
店內除了販售十多種款式的香腸，更提供多種口味的豬肉乾、牛肉乾、手炒肉酥等美味肉品，全部都是來台必買的美食。近年推出的脆片肉乾、條子肉乾、肉酥餅乾等廣受年輕顧客喜愛，也成為黑橋牌暢銷人氣商品。
黑橋牌門市多次接獲海內外媒體採訪，香港美食家蔡瀾也曾率團到店選購，黑豬肉香腸、黑豬肉乾、香腸肉包是招牌推薦品，店內並提供鳳梨酥、綠豆糕等各式台灣特產，是來台必訪的特產名店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.86, Sec. 2, Changan E. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Founded in 1957, Black Bridge was the first company to refine the traditional dry, salty Cantonese sausage sold on the market in Taiwan into the succulent, tender Taiwanese delicacy of today. The unique flavors of the sausage became an instant hit in Taiwan over 6 decades ago. Now, people are seen queuing outside stores during Chinese New Year waiting to purchase their products. Black Bridge sausages have not only become a legend of gastronomy in the country but also the premier brand of contemporary Taiwanese sausages.
Besides a selection of over a dozen sausages in the store, there is also a plethora of delicious meat products such as pork/beef jerky and fried pork fibers. These are all quintessential Taiwanese delicacies. Recently launched new products, including crisp pork jerky, grilled pork jerky, and fried pork fiber biscuits are proving to be extremely popular among younger customers, and they have become Black Bridge’s hottest sellers.
Black Bridge stores have received domestic and foreign media interviews on several occasions, and Hong Kong food critic Chua Lam and his travel companions have also made purchases in the store. Signature products include Taiwanese black hog sausage, Taiwanese black hog pork jerky, and sausage buns. Other Taiwanese specialties in the store include pineapple cake and bean paste cake etc. are all quintessential Taiwanese snacks.

シンジュンコウ
addressZh: 臺北市中山區中山北路一段105巷13-1號1樓
descriptionZh: 新純香茶行自1981年1月1日創立，目前由第二代王昭瓔經營，因為他秉持著母親留下來的誠懇與善心用心經營並用奉茶的精神來款待每個顧客。有著現代與傳統的結合。選茶烘茶獨具匠心，又具新式經營思考，可謂傳統茶心與現代精神的兼容並蓄。顧客們每次上門品茗，都能享受忙中偷閒輕鬆自在並讓路過進來的每位顧客都猶如回家中，找到心安頓之所。正因為這種溫馨懇切的待客風格，使得許多顧客再度光臨，有時還帶來日本當地的名產相贈，其亦客亦友的互動關係，足令店中的來客羡慕不已。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No.13-1, Ln. 105, Sec. 1, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Taiwan Good Tea was founded on January 1, 1981, and it is now in the hands of the second generation owner Chao-ying Wang, who has upheld the sincere and dedicated attitude of his mother to manage the business and entertain each customer with the warmest hospitality that is inspired by the spirit of serving tea. Fusion of modern and traditional elements. The meticulous, unique tea selecting and roasting process is combined with an innovative management approach, integrating the traditional essence of tea and modern spirit. Every time the customers visit the store to appreciate tea, they are able to take time off their busy schedule and make themselves at home in a peaceful environment. It is precisely because of such hospitality that many patrons have come back to the store repeatedly, sometimes even bringing souvenirs from Japan for the store owner, much to the envy of other shoppers. The special bond created between them transcends customer relations, making them more like friends.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區北安路598號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 598, Bei’an Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

descriptionZh:
紅記珠寶於1987年成立，在地經營至今32年，於104年重新登記為現在的名字，最主要的理念是希冀展現出女性不凡的氣度與貴氣。

紅記珠寶高貴不貴，除了高價位的產品項目之外，也有符合年輕族群需求，平價又親民的珠寶，讓更多人了解珠寶的美好。

紅記珠寶的商標於視覺上以鳳凰來儀的姿態，結合紅寶石般的底蘊色彩與行隸體的《紅》字，創造出優雅的線條與莊嚴的美感。

Jewelry at Hongji is elegant but inexpensive. Besides items at higher prices, the store also offers choices that can meet the demands of young people. With jewelry at affordable prices, the store leads more people to understand the wonder of jewelry.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區長春路199號
descriptionZh:
堅持手作，秉持傳統工法

位於台北市中山區長春路199號1樓，秉持傳統手工製作，不斷創新研發，採用植物性奶油，低油低糖、甜而不膩、符合健康標準，卻不失食物的風味，更是素食者的最佳點心。

台北御珍成立於96年，楊師傅秉持師傅的教誨，製作產品前、我們都會先想過這個食物我們自己是否願意食用，同理顧客的感受，對待每一位客人都是當作自己家的人一樣，是我們對於產品的堅持，謹守傳統工法，以健康為訴求，不添加化學添加物，用心製作傳統點心，讓屬於食材最真實的味道呈現出來，因此堅持手工製作，還原最真實的味道。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 199, Changchun Rd, Zhongshan District Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Insist on making food by hand, the traditional approach
Located on 1F, No. 199, Changchun Road, Zhongshan District, Taipei City, Taipei Yuzhen insists on making its food by hand; engaging in continuous innovations and R&D; using plant-based butter; and offering healthful (e.g., low-oil and low-sugar) products that maintain their unique taste and are sweet but not too sweet, making Taipei Yuzhen snacks the perfect snacks for vegetarians.
Established in Taipei in 2007, Master Yang of Taipei Yuzhen upholds the teachings of his teacher, constantly asking himself whether he would consume the products he makes prior to offering them to customers. The idea is to treat customers like family. Accordingly, Taipei Yuzhen staff insists on following traditional food preparation methods (e.g., making food by hand), using healthful ingredients and no chemical additives, and carefully making traditional snacks, preserving the natural taste of food ingredients.

addressZh: 臺北市中山區南京東路二段36號
descriptionZh: 第一化粧品承襲第一化工五十年的專業原料知識，創立口碑第一的「de第一化粧品」。從傳統臺北大稻埕商圈的天水路發跡，歷經千辛打造優質適價台灣品牌之路，堅持將「自然‧簡單‧無負擔」的品牌精神落實發揚─「原料自然‧配方簡單‧產品親肌無負擔」；以化粧品原料專家為基礎，堅持台灣自產自銷，並輔以環保可回收包材及舒適無壓的購物環境，所以客戶都能親身體驗專業優質產品與服務所帶來的平價奢華享受。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 36, Sec. 2, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: de Cosmetics has inherited First Chemical Works' 50 years of experience in material science and used this knowledge to create the "de Cosmetic" brand. Started on Tianshui Road in Taipei's traditional Dadaocheng business area, de Cosmetic has gone through many hardships to create a high-quality and economical Taiwan brand. de Cosmetics' brand philosophy is based on "natural, simple, and burden-free." This brand philosophy is realized through the use of natural materials, simple formulas, and products that are good for the body. Developed by cosmetic raw material experts, the brand insists on producing and selling in Taiwan. The brand also promotes the use of environmentally friendly recyclable packaging material and a no-stress purchasing environment so that customers can personally experience the luxury and enjoyment provided by quality products and services.

descriptionZh: 城市綠洲與您共享山林歲月秉持著希望能夠建立起【城市裡的綠洲，解都會生活的渴】帶領大家走向戶外為經營理念而創立。綠洲店內綜合各項戶外活動用品，包括登山、露營、自行車、 水上用品…

addressZh: 臺北市中山區長春路89號
descriptionZh:
東方書畫紙專門店～～質地上乘，宜書宜畫（紙中之王）（紙壽千年），從地靈人傑，山明水秀的《埔里》誕生出宣紙的世家，梳理ㄧ木ㄧ枝的千絲萬縷。蒸、煮、沖、曬、漂、漿。造就出特種精良紙張，供毛筆書畫的手工紙，平滑柔韌，細膩勻薄洁白耐久，吸墨性強之特性。
白紙高洁素雅、色紙斑斕清奇，書寫作畫、裱褙包裝，紙幅卷出無限想像。一日一張，靈思婆娑歲月綿長。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Fu Lung Cotton Paper Co., Ltd.
addressEn: No. 89, Changchun Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Fu Lung Cotton Paper specializes in Eastern-style paper. The texture and thickness of the paper are suitable for calligraphy and painting (kind of paper) (lasting for ages). Born from a paper-making family in beautiful Puli, the paper is created with care. Steaming, cooking, spraying, drying, bleaching, and pulping produce a variety of specialty paper for calligraphers and painters to choose from (smooth and strong, thin and delicate, long lasting, and strong absorbency). 

The classy white paper with intriguing markings provides unlimited imagination for calligraphy, painting, packaging, and scrolls, enlightening thoughts for ages.

nameZh: MY 幾圈 甜甜圈專賣店
addressZh: 臺北市中山區雙城街10巷11號
descriptionZh:
小時候總愛偷拿阿公書桌抽屜裡面的糖果，散發淡淡木頭香味總是讓人難以忘懷，
甜甜圈古早的好滋味是小時候放學最愛吃的點心，於是將回憶的兩種味道結合成思念MY老家的味道。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 11, Ln. 10, Shuangcheng St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: The owner always loved to eat the candy in his/her grandfather's desk. The light woody scent is unforgettable. The great nostalgic taste of doughnuts is a favorite after school snacks. So the owner combined the two memorable flavors to create the MY family flavor.

addressZh: 104台北市中山區樂群三路303號3樓
descriptionZh: 採用手工料理，以新鮮當季、自有農場栽培的食材入菜，將料理本質中的美味，變成一道道精緻的料理呈現。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn: Chiou Hwa has inherited the legacy of traditional Cantonese cuisine and has adopted the creative spirit of authentic Cantonese culinary style and Hong Kong Dim Sum. The chefs are led by National Master Hung-cheng Wu skilled in preparing the luxurious banquet dishes of abalone, sea cucumber, shark’s fin, and hog maw. Every dish is prepared exquisitely to make fine foods an enjoyable adventure of taste, fragrances, and color.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區南京東路五段399號5樓
descriptionZh: 打造一間像是「家」的空間，期望在一個舒服、放鬆的空間可以引發人與人之間的情感交流，也等待著每一位造訪的旅客，留下更多故事。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn: NK Hostel believes that traveling is a natural extension of life and philosophical approach through which people experience the world. NK Hostel is therefore committed to providing accommodations that make the guests feel right at home. We hope to provide a cozy and relaxing space to encourage interpersonal emotional exchange and hope that every visitor can leave with a wonderful story to tell.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區民權東路三段181號
descriptionZh: 專營戶外用品、登山、休閒出國旅遊配備，提供舒適精采的高品質休閒生活用品，引進歐洲知名品牌。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 181, Sec. 3, Minquan E. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Outdoor Buy is a specialized purveyor of equipment and gear for the outdoors, mountaineering, recreational overseas tours, camping, rock climbing, and river tracing. Our principle is to provide our guests with a comfortable environment to shop for exciting and high quality recreational equipment, and introduces extensive product series and functional gear from renowned European brands. Outdoor lovers who enter Outdoor Buy will notice the high quality functional clothing, attractive hats, and comfortable shoes. This is the place to grab your ORTLIEB multi-functional and waterproof rucksack and EuroSCHIRM storm-proof umbrella. Seeing is believing. Make a personal visit to Outdoor Buy today!

addressZh: 臺北市松山區南京東路四段180號
descriptionZh:
一首籤詩，六個聖筊，在媽祖的祝福下，糕餅門外漢陳基振開啟了「裕珍馨」與「奶油酥餅」的傳奇。 
走過半個世紀，裕珍馨，奶油酥餅的創始者，始終秉持著最初的用心與傳統工藝，隨著時代進步，加入更多的創新概念，嚴選更優質的健康素材，以細緻的製餅工藝，揉出奶油酥餅每一口的香酥濃郁，更揉入了深深的關心與祝福。 
製餅是使命，也是文化的傳承，裕珍馨把對所有愛護者的感念，化成堅持與用心，以誠信、負責、惜福的心，繼續延續最道地的好滋味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 180, Sec. 4, Nanjing E. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Under the blessing from Mazu, shown by a divination poem and six positive results from casting moon blocks, the pastry layman Chen Chi-Chen founded the shop Yu Jan Shin, where the legend of “crispy butter cake” originated.
Yu Jan Shin is the inventor of crispy butter cake. Its owner has never compromised his commitment, nor has he abandoned traditional techniques over the past fifty years. On the other hand, the shop also evolves over time by incorporating creative ideas and selecting high-quality healthful ingredients. With sophisticated pastry-making skills, it is able to produce crispy butter cakes with fine texture and rich flavor, in which love and blessings from the shop are also blended.
Pastry production is as much a mission as the inheritance of culture. Yu Jan Shin’s gratitude to its patrons propels it to provide services with perseverance and great care, serving customers with honesty, responsibility, and a grateful heart, in order to pass down the fine local treat.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區饒河街189號
descriptionZh:
一首籤詩，六個聖筊，在媽祖的祝福下，糕餅門外漢陳基振開啟了「裕珍馨」與「奶油酥餅」的傳奇。 
走過半個世紀，裕珍馨，奶油酥餅的創始者，始終秉持著最初的用心與傳統工藝，隨著時代進步，加入更多的創新概念，嚴選更優質的健康素材，以細緻的製餅工藝，揉出奶油酥餅每一口的香酥濃郁，更揉入了深深的關心與祝福。 
製餅是使命，也是文化的傳承，裕珍馨把對所有愛護者的感念，化成堅持與用心，以誠信、負責、惜福的心，繼續延續最道地的好滋味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 189, Raohe St., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Under the blessing from Mazu, shown by a divination poem and six positive results from casting moon blocks, the pastry layman Chen Chi-Chen founded the shop Yu Jan Shin, where the legend of “crispy butter cake” originated.

Yu Jan Shin is the inventor of crispy butter cake. Its owner has never compromised his commitment, nor has he abandoned traditional techniques over the past fifty years. On the other hand, the shop also evolves over time by incorporating creative ideas and selecting high-quality healthful ingredients. With sophisticated pastry-making skills, it is able to produce crispy butter cakes with fine texture and rich flavor, in which love and blessings from the shop are also blended.

Pastry production is as much a mission as the inheritance of culture. Yu Jan Shin’s gratitude to its patrons propels it to provide services with perseverance and great care, serving customers with honesty, responsibility, and a grateful heart, in order to pass down the fine local treat.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區敦化北路340-9號
descriptionZh: 新東陽以推動中華美食精緻化，國際化的精神標竿為企業目標，打造”來台必買、出國必帶、台灣特產第一品牌”的企業形象，帶給消費者優質的購物體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Hsin Tung Yang Songshan Airport Store
addressEn: No. 340-9, Dunhua N. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Hsin Tung Yang Songshan Airport Store is located in the Songshan Airport Field. You can reach us at MRT Songshan Airport Station (Wenhu Line)
The store primarily sells a variety of Hsin Tung Yang brand flossy pork, dried meat, pastries, pineapple cakes, casual snacks, and different local specialty products of Taiwan. The store also offers various imported Japanese/Korean products.
The corporate objective of Hsin Tung Yang is to refine Chinese cuisines with the international spirit benchmark. Our local operations adhere to the four key principles of integrity, dependability, activeness, and innovation to create the corporate image of "No. 1 specialty brand in Taiwan for must buy in items and perfect souvenirs to take overseas" and bring high quality shopping experiences to the consumers.
2010 Annual Taiwan Food Consumption Survey Statistics Report: Hsin Tung Yang flossy pork, dried meat, and meat sauce series products are often listed as the No. 1 consumption brand; which gives it the reputation of "meat kingdom."
Won the 2011 Taiwan Top 100 Brands honor
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop, and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區八德路三段124號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 124, Sec. 3, Bade Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

nameZh: 小春日和動物雜貨珈琲
addressZh: 臺北市松山區延壽街361號
descriptionZh:
小春日和是一家兼具寵物美容與咖啡輕食的寵物咖啡店，提供舒適優美的環境，能讓主人與美容師有更好的溝通互動，也能與寵物共享休閒時光
我們不僅建立起一個喜歡動物和寵物飼主的交流空間，並教育客人正確的飼養觀念/知識，用愛護的方式理解寵物不是消費品，在日常中就學習如何照顧，達到寵物友善空間的落實。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.361, Yanshou St., Songshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Spring Day Pet Shop Café is a coffee shop offering coffee, light meals, and pet grooming services. The cozy, pleasant environment allows pet owners to communicate with the groomers and share a wonderful time with their fur babies. We not only provide a venue where animal lovers and pet owners can interact but also educate the guest's correct mindset and knowledge of owning pets, in that they should be loved and not treated as merely a shopping item. Learning how to take care of pets in everyday life will facilitate the creation of pet-friendly spaces.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區八德路三段118號
descriptionZh: 印章，本店至今仍遵照古法製作印章，手工刻印，並嚴格控管印章品質。為了和市場區隔，將傳統技法結合現代藝術，讓一度成為夕陽的印章，重新展現千年智慧。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 118, Sec. 3, Bade Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Seals. As of today, we still follow traditional ways to make seals by manual engraving and conduct rigorous quality control of them. For market segmentation, we have combined traditional craftsmanship with modern art to revive the once sunset seal industry for a replay of a thousand years of wisdom.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區八德路三段150號
descriptionZh: 提供有機天然食品飲料，健康安心肉品、天 然保健食品與時尚機能服飾。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 150, Sec. 3, Bade Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
★ Operation items
_Organic Vegetable Sprouts, Whole Grain Seeds, as well as Organic & Natural Foods and Drinks
_Functional Baked Bread, No Additive Care Products, Environmental Friendly Cleaning Products, Vitality Diet Courses
_Healthy and Worry-free Meat Products, Natural Health Foods, Energy Saving Kitchen Appliances, and Stylish Fashion Clothing

addressZh: 臺北市松山區 復興南路一段39號GF (微風廣場)
descriptionZh:
將50年代記憶中，台灣菜原始樸實手藝，也是酒家菜文化的原型
加入宜蘭獨有風味特產，結合現代簡約裝潢與溫暖細膩的服務
對傳統料理傾注真誠亦真實的情感與心意
讓我們用台灣在地食材與演繹傳統的手法
一起品嘗道地台灣料理
感受屬於台灣最真實、最純粹、最美好的本質
就像我們對家人般的溫暖真心
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: GF., No. 39, Sec. 1, Fuxing S. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.) (BREEZE CENTER)
descriptionEn:
The original and humble cooking skills for Taiwanese cuisine, the cultural prototype of the Banquet Dish, take us down the memory lane of the 1960s.

In combination with flavorful specialties exclusive to Yilan, decor of modern simplicity as well as warm and delicate service,

we infuse the conventional cuisine with genuine and true affection.

Let us exploit Taiwan's local ingredients with traditional methods,

and invite you to savor authentic Taiwanese delicacies. 

Feel the truest, purest and most wonderful essence of Taiwan

as the heartfelt warmth we have for our family.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區八德路二段410巷16弄8號
descriptionZh: 位於林森北路巷弄內的VEGETEJIYA菜豚屋林森店，是一間日韓混血的烤肉店，如果搭乘大眾交通工具可以在中山站或是松江南京站出站，步行5~8分鐘即可到達。以日式韓味的風格打出名號， 特色就是用新鮮生菜包燒肉一起吃， 所以生菜的大小跟乾淨衛生是很重要的， 也讓「吃肉」變得不油不膩，更健康！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8, Aly. 16, Ln. 410, Sec. 2, Bade Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Sitting in the ally of Linsen North Road, VEGETEJIYA Linsen Branch is a Japanese-Korean style barbecue restaurant five to eight minutes by foot from MRT Zhongshan Station or Songjiang Nanjing Station. The restaurant is renowned for its Japanese-Korean style barbecue characterized by eating barbecue wrapped in fresh vegetables. This is why choosing the right vegetable size and maintaining hygiene is important. The restaurant also makes “eating meat” a refreshing and healthier option for customers.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區富錦街463號
descriptionZh:
本著「將台灣的美好介紹給世界」的初衷，小茶裁堂於2006年創立於台北，堅持100%台灣產自然栽培茶，無農藥、無化肥的純淨好茶，甫榮獲2020「世界品質評鑑大賞」金獎肯定，搭配獲獎無數的設計實力，打造由裡而外的經典品味。
「以茶為圓心，烘焙為半徑，畫生活為圓，品味幸福的圓滿。」
以茶入味，是我們茶食的特色，堅持自然原味無添加，結合西式甜點與純正台灣茶葉，在市場上以中高價、客製化的精品禮盒榮獲客户肯定。
創始店位於大安區，致力為大眾提供最精繳的品茶體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 463, Fujin St. Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Zenique was founded in 2006 in Taipei with an initial aspiration to “introduce Taiwan’s wonders to the world.” Thanks to its insistence on using 100% Taiwan-made teas that are pesticide-free and chemical fertilizer-free, the shop received the Golden Award of the Monde Selection 2020. With its award-winning designing techniques, the shop created a classic brand whose values are reflected by its products.
“With tea as the center and tea baking as the radius, we draw the circle of life, whereby we taste the roundness of happiness.” 
Allowing teas to bring out their flavors is the characteristic of tea-time snacks made by Zenique. We combine western desserts with pure Taiwanese teas, and insist on preserving the original flavor without using additives, winning trust from customers with our exquisite customized gift sets that are sold at intermediate prices.
The first store of Zenique was set up in Daan District. It is devoted to providing the general public with the finest tea-drinking experience.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區民生東路五段69巷17號
descriptionZh: 馬札羅咖啡是一家專營優質精品的咖啡豆商,可以在店內喝咖啡,也可以購買每個星期新鮮烘焙咖啡豆,甚至我們講求新鮮的理念都貫徹到隨身掛耳包都是現做的,確保所有的咖啡新鮮好喝,更讓您喝的健康!當然我們自許為一家溫馨帶有溫度的社區咖啡館,讓我們在這陪伴著居民的每一天!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 17, Ln. 69, Sec. 5, Minsheng E. Rd. Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Manjaro Coffee is a coffee bean shop specializing in specialty coffees. Customers can drink coffee here or buy coffee beans freshly baked every week. Our insistence on freshness is even applied to our drip bag coffee, so as to ensure that all the coffee our customers enjoy is fresh, delicious, and healthful. We aspire to become a homey and friendly community café, accompanying residents here throughout their everyday lives.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區民生東路五段69巷7號一樓
descriptionZh:
“好時光披薩”成立於2013年，提供手工窯烤披薩、豹紋口袋麵包、主廚私房午餐(平日供應)、小食料理、季節沙拉、燉湯、家常甜點。
承襲義大利傳統拿坡里窯烤披薩手工基礎規制，使用義大利00麵粉(義大利披薩協會指定)、海鹽、Mutti番茄泥、頂級初榨橄欖油、Mozzarella乳酪等，食材嚴選手工製作，以長時間低溫慢活發酵，醞釀出麵皮豐富層次的風味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 105, Taipei City, Songshan District, Lane 69, Section 5, Minsheng E Rd, NO.7,1F
descriptionEn:
ALOLA PIZZA was founded in 2013; it provides homemade kiln-baked pizza, leopard-pattern pita bread, lunch specials (available during weekdays), light foods, seasonal salads, soups, and homemade desserts.
The store follows the basic rules for making traditional Italian Napoli kiln-baked pizza, using Italian 00 flour (designated by the Associazione Verace Pizza Napoletana), sea salt, Mutti tomato paste, top-class first pressed olive oil, and Mozzarella cheese. Besides strictly selected ingredients, the pizza dough is also made via long-time fermentation under low temperature, which gives the dough rich and layered flavors.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區新中街41號
descriptionZh: 在民生社區深耕多年的朋廚，今年搖身一變，漆上明亮活力的色澤，並重新回歸早午餐的行列，寬敞開放的空間，在綠意與麥香的圍繞之下，走進店裡彷彿一切都慢了下來，生活總是東奔西忙，但有一聲「Bonjour！」的問候，就是元氣與愜意的開始！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 41, Xinzhong St, Songshan District, Taipei City, 105
descriptionEn: Bonjour has been operating in Minsheng Community for many years. This year, it underwent a transformation. Painted with a bright and vivid color, the restaurant returned to the brunch business. Upon entering the open and spacious space filled with plants and the aroma of wheat, customers might feel that everything has slowed down. Although life is always busy, with Bonjour, you can have an energetic start at your desired pace.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區敦化北路222巷29號1樓
descriptionZh:
猴頑咖啡敦北民生店
咖啡、披薩、鬆餅，用最真的食物期待您的光臨，也歡迎疫情期間外帶回家～
也是專業的葡萄瓶裝酒專賣，歡迎參觀選購！
《未滿十八歲請勿飲酒》
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: Dunhua N Rd, 29 , Lane 222, Songshan District,Taipei City
descriptionEn:
HoWine & Café (Dunhua North Road–Minsheng East Road Branch)
HoWine & Café offers the most basic food such as coffee, pizzas, and pancakes to its customers, and welcomes everyone to order takeout during the epidemic.
Additionally, HoWine & Café offers bottled wine. Come visit HoWine & Café today!
(Drinking is prohibited for those under the age of 18)

nameZh:
香茅廚泰式餐廳
(復興店)
addressZh: 臺北市松山區復興南路一段39號G樓
descriptionZh:
泰式料理的精髓在於香料的多樣化，舉凡南薑、紅蔥頭、檸檬葉、香茅、薑黃、、等，其中又以『香茅』最廣範的被運用入菜。無論料理、醬料或飲品，都是泰菜中不可或缺的元素。 因此『香茅廚』一名，油然而生，取其大量運用香茅入菜，變化出精緻美味泰國料理的廚房，亦即代表『香茅廚』餐廳在泰國料理中佔有一席之地。 
香茅廚秉持著泰菜魂並致力於將泰國東北傳統料理飲食文化精髓融入台灣，以『創新』的料理技術與視覺藝術上的『變革』，呈現料理豐富多變的特色，給予顧客時尚新體驗。 
其中唯一不變的就是對料理的執著與堅持，堅持給予顧客最好的，期待所有饕客都能有賓至如歸的感受，讓在台灣的你不用飛往泰國也能品嚐泰北雙城獨有的傳統料理。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

The original and humble cooking skills for Taiwanese cuisine, the cultural prototype of the Banquet Dish, take us down the memory lane of the 1960s.

addressZh: 台北市松山區富錦街508號
descriptionZh:
心家守護你健康的品牌，家的廚房，全球後疫情時代來臨喚醒人對食物與健康的重新思考，不時不食後疫情時代新文明新生活選對了，人與環境健康淨化升級，人文飲食 健康事業 源起2007年6月5日陳健宏先生由葷轉素創辦陽明春天蔬食創作料理，起心動念不做葷食料理不在做殺業的善念開啟了蔬食原食材創作料理走健康養生的經營理念，2019年新冠肺炎疫情傳播全球喚醒了人類對於生命的無常成為全人類的命運共同體，大家應該更要意識到尊重生命平等更加需要一份敬畏的心重新思考吃對的食物與健康的關係，2020年陽明春天延續天然健康純淨素理念推廣新品牌，心家麻辣燙快速營養均衡滿足一般年輕大眾市場需求從新思考食物與健康的關係，從吃每一餐開始舖墊出健康快樂新生活運動，
用心思考我們與食物的關係文明新生活尊重生命和諧飲食，食材選對了吃出健康，
純淨素、升級我們生命的每一天，人文健康事業是陽明春天始終如一的精神。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

nameZh: 一滴滴 EDD 漢方甜點工作室
addressZh: 臺北市松山區復興北路427巷20號1樓
descriptionZh:
一滴滴琢磨 一口口舒活──一滴滴 EDD

木屑蛋糕、花草茶與咖啡，來自老中藥舖的專屬氣味。老爸炮製40餘載歲月，信源蔘藥行積累無數客戶口碑。
遵循四季節氣，王家女兒中西融慧。中藥老手選製藥材，適性調配，甜點師鑽研食材風味，講究科學，潛心琢磨，每一口都是原方獨味。
春天的桂花黃耆，炎夏的洛神紅麴，涼秋的百合雪燕，冷冬的首烏人蔘，不熬水、不磨粉，化作甜點適季養生。尋來枸杞杜仲作陪，生乳捲此生必追。來中藥房吃甜點，再佐一杯人蔘拿鐵，身心皆療癒，滴滴珍貴甜入心扉！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

Polishing drop by drop, comfort mouthful by mouthful - EDD
Wood shaving cake, herbal tea and coffee, flavors from vintage Chinese medicine shops. Father spends over 40 years making Chinese medicine and creating the reputation of Xinyuan Chinese Medicine Shop for countless customers. 
This old Chinese medicine pharmacist selects the most appropriate formulas while the patissier focuses on the flavor of the foods. The emphasis is on the science and potential for improvement. Each bite is a unique flavor.

addressZh: 臺北市松山區南京東路三段303巷24號
descriptionZh:
海派泰式創意料理
椰以道地泰式椰子冰淇淋起家,自東南亞引進正宗泰式料理,有別於過往以桌菜為主流的泰式料理餐廳,主打一個人也能享用的泰式定食及南洋鍋物獨創之打拋豬冰花煎餃,將泰式經典口味包入日系/中式煎餃,讓人耳目一新!品牌定位「海派泰式創意料理」,以「海派」一詞傳達椰兄欲傳達之品牌個性,也延續Coco h的命名緣起-不論東南亞還是台灣,朋友間稱兄道弟之親切熱情。同時隱含海洋之聯想,呼應店內營造之海邊椰林風情。品牌定位另求「創意料理」,強化特色及差異性,豎立創意泰式餐點鮮明旗幟。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

Generous and creative Thai-style cuisine

No matter whether in Southeast Asia or Taiwan, close friends call each other brothers. The brand's position of "creative cuisine"  emphasizes different flavor combinations and differentiation to set itself apart with creative Thai dishes.

descriptionZh: 茄子洋廚La Maison du Aubergine，由老闆旅居日本期間請益於日本正統歐風洋食料理主廚，自日本帶回正統的洋食做法，堅持花時間訓練專業廚師在臺灣的每一家分店，以較傳統耗工費時的手工方式，用心為每一位顧客精心製作每一份料理。如同藝術工匠，為了將作品表現得淋漓盡致、苛求作品完美的心態一般。也就是茄子的企業精神「究極」與「匠心」的意義。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 9F,Building c, No. 369, Sec. 7, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Nangang Dist., Taipei City 115, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The owner of La Maison du Aubergine, while traveling and living in Japan, was able to study from an official western food chef in Japan. Having perfected the art, the owner returned with Japanese-style western food and insists upon enforcing extended training for his professional chefs in every branch store in Taiwan. The store uses a traditional and time-consuming manual preparation process to provide patrons with an intricately prepared meal. The chefs work like artisans, putting together each course as an artist prepares an artwork. Such dedication exemplifies the corporate spirit of Aubergine - extreme dedication and artisanship.

With elegant design and exotic style, it brings romantic atmosphere to Nangang Business Park. All hotel rooms are equipped with 32-inch LCD panel TVs, free Internet connection, and Japanese satellite TV channels to offer you real-time business information. Fire resistant building materials and automatic smoke detectors allow customers to relax and enjoy our elegant and comfortable services. There are 24-hour computer, Internet, mail, fax services available at the lobby for your ease and convenience.

descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 422, Sec. 6, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Nangang Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市南港區昆陽街154號
descriptionZh:
宝其咖啡，由一杯咖啡延伸出無限寬廣的世界。 

人生下半場，就是要活出有質感的第二人生！宝其咖啡兩位女老闆，將人生上半場淬煉成平凡踏實的幸福呈現給大家。 
從選豆、烘豆、沖煮、最後完成美味咖啡之終極解析。在生活步調快的台北，用悠閒和綠意，療癒身心。從裡到外每個角落都佈置得精心別緻，來這裏，你可以擁有一整個下午的寧靜，享受精緻平凡的幸福。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 154, Kunyang St., Nangang Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Baoqi Coffee is where a cup of coffee creates an endlessly expanding world.
The second half of your life should be of high quality. The two female owners of Baoqi Coffee refine challenges they faced in the first half of their lives into simple but tangible happiness, and present it to people through their coffee.
From selecting and baking coffee beans to making coffee, this café provides an ultimate solution. The relaxing environment and greens in the café heal people’s minds and bodies from the hustle and bustle of Taipei. Every corner is highly decorated here to enable customers to enjoy a tranquil afternoon and savor the happiness brought by quotidian but exquisite experiences.

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

Tumaz uses our most professional attitude and treats each customer with care. The hope is for Tumaz to become a secret base that provides warmth to everyone, so people can come here to enjoy a cup of good coffee when they are tired. Tumaz not only sells coffee, but also has excellent food. At night, the shop sells great tasty hotpots. Customers will never get bored at Tumaz, and they can get a different experience every time they come here.

nameZh: YAYOI彌生軒 南港車站店
addressZh: 台北市南港區忠孝東路七段371號B1樓
descriptionZh:
一飯、一湯，加上主菜和副菜的組合，在日本稱為定食。
從家庭飲食而生，長久以來匯融著不同國家飲食精髓，與日常生活一同演變，發展至今。
我們認為定食，正是日本「真正的飲食」：剛出鍋的熱騰騰白飯、搭配各類菜餚，自然而然地達到營養均衡；使用當季食材、感受不同時節的美味。


一道道料理皆用心以對，充滿日本特有的細緻堅持──歡迎來到定食的世界，YAYOI彌生軒。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: B1F., No. 371, Sec. 7, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Nangang Dist., Taipei City 115 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: A bowl of rice, a bowl of soup, a main course, and a side dish combined is considered a set meal in Japan. Each dish is prepared with care and full of Japanese character. Welcome to the world of YAYOI set meals.

nameZh: 日勝生加賀屋國際溫泉飯店股份有限公司
addressZh: 臺北市北投區光明路236號
descriptionZh: 全館以日本建築技法雕琢，以日本能登三大工藝品-九谷燒、輪島塗、金箔，呈現日式典雅之美，讓所有賓客感受前所未有的和風體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 236, Guangming Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Radium Group has introduced the Japanese Kagaya experience in its originality to Beitou, the most famous hot spring region of Taiwan. Kagaya is right next to the first Japanese hot spring hotel Tengu-on. Kagaya is wholly constructed using Japanese architecture decorated with 3 of the most famous traditional Japanese design features of kutaniyaki (Kutani porcelain), wajima-nuri (lacquerware from Wajima), and kinpaku (gold leaf decor) that perfectly recreates the beauty of classical Japan, providing guests with an unmatched Japanese experience.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區光明路224號
descriptionZh: 水美溫泉會館座落在北投公園旁，為新概念身心靈溫泉SPA空間；坐擁扶疏草木入懷，白磺暖泉拂去您一身疲憊
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 224, Guangming Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: SweetMe Hotspring Resort is a next-gen physical and spiritual hot spring SPA located next to Beitou Park. SweetMe offers elegantly designed guest rooms with wooden furnishings to dispel the travelers’ exhaustion. The establishment is nestled in the trees and grasses, providing a milky white sulfur hot spring bath to ease away stress and tiredness as well as a famous banquet menu that dates back to the heyday of Beitou hot springs. A stay with SweetMe is to have a dialog with the natural world while taking a much-needed break from one’s busy schedule. SweetMe is the perfect place to appreciate the intricate beauty of Beitou.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區光明路283號
descriptionZh: 水都溫泉會館獨特調配超濃優質硫磺泉，屬偏酸性的特殊泉質，富含多種微量元素，宛如死海般的礦物保養，提供最極致的美體享受。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 283, Guangming Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Spa Spring Resort concocts its exclusively premium highly-concentrated sulfur spring water. The slightly acidic water contains a vareity of micronutrients and mineral skincare like the Dead Sea, providing you with the best skin-care experience. We also provides the only fantasy bubble pool among all spring areas, combining that with fashionable rooms of many styles, providing guests with an unparalleled experience.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區中和街2號
descriptionZh: 緊鄰陽明山國家公園及關渡自然生態園區，擁有遠離塵囂的靜謐與優雅環境，離塵不離城的地理位置，為旅人的假期增添豐富多樣的可能。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Zhonghe St., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Hotel Royal Beitou is situated in Beitou, a lush landscape and hot spring park teeming with culture in norther Taiwan. Hotel Royal is located next to Yangmingshan National Park and Guandu Nature Park, providing a serene and elegant environment isolated from the boisterous urban environments while being located in a geographical locale not too far away from the city, providing yet another wonderful option for a holiday getaway for many travelers.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區幽雅路30號
descriptionZh: 北投麗禧溫泉酒店，通過「友善穆斯林」國際認證的旅店，從餐點住宿全面提供符合穆斯林標準的服務，提供國際旅客最友善服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 30, Youya Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Grand View Resort Beitou (GVRB) is one of the very few Muslim-friendly hotels in Taiwan. Every service offered by GVRB from foods to accommodations are certified to the standards of Islamic traditions to provide overseas guests with the friendliest services possible. GVRB is the brainchild of CY Lee, the master architect behind Taipei 101. Natural timber and stone are used as the main construction materials, while chrome-plated titanium and natural vegetation are used for support, integrating Taiwan’s treasured natural ecologies and landscapes as part of the architectural concepts. The purpose of such innovations is to allow every patron and traveler to appreciate the beauteous harmonies of Beitou and Taiwan.

nameZh: 倆人旅店(立德北投溫泉飯店)
addressZh: 臺北市北投區幽雅路11號
descriptionZh: 強調以鮮明色彩帶動品味、簡約中流露浪漫氛圍，盡情感受每一層樓色彩美學的神奇力量，全然享受「倆人世界」的幸福天地。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.11, Youya Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Hotel Double One is located at No. 11 of Youya Road, a secluded corner within Beitou. Since the number 11 looks like two individuals, we therefore took the name of Double One. Master architect Wei-min Li contributed his genius to transform the establishment into a minimalist Design Hotel where taste is emphasized through bright colors. The minimalist settings provide a romantic atmosphere where guests can enjoy the mythical energies of color aesthetics at every floor while immersing in a world of joy designed for two.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區光明路230號
descriptionZh: 提供舒適且具有時尚感的休閒渡假空間，讓每位路過的旅人都想流連駐足！ 舒適的空間讓人忘卻一切的疲憊，享受身心的舒緩。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 230, Guangming Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: JBG Hot Spring Resort has a long and illustrious history, and is located at Beitou, the birthplace of Taiwan’s hot spring resort. JBG Hot Spring Resort has been in business for 70 years since it was first founded in the early days after the retrocession of Taiwan. The establishment started as a number of buildings erected during Japanese Rule which were then renovated and rebuilt on multiple occasions to create the modern-day hot spring resort. Unlike other hotels, JBG Hot Spring Resort  offers a one-of-a-kind experience that feature a comfortable, chic, and relaxing experience that entices even travelers walking past its doors. Our comfortable spaces help guests set aside their stress and worries and eases their exhaustion, providing them with a physical and spiritual spa.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路一段39巷100號
descriptionZh: 提供民眾運動場所，並以北投區花櫻花樹為概念，塑造一個公共藝術造型，期盼成為民眾的許願樹，豐富的文化意涵。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 100, Ln. 39, Sec. 1, Shipai Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The entrance of Beitou Sports Center is based upon the cherry trees of Beitou Area to create a public artwork that can eventually become the public wishing tree. The service desk is constructed using local stones from Qilian of Beitou to convey the rich cultural heritage of the Beitou area. The spatial atmosphere is based upon flowers, allowing every floor to integrate various activity and spatial characteristics that give rise to the color changes in different areas.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區中山路3號
descriptionZh:
北投南豐天玥泉溫泉會館，座落於台北市近郊的新北投溫泉區，距離捷運新北投站僅需要三分鐘的步行距離。
會館與濃密綠蔭的百年北投公園優雅相對望，悠閒漫步其中自然芬多精環繞四周，大口深呼吸徹底釋放壓力。以自然原味貫穿全館空間怡然自得，置身其中猶見光影交錯的品味之景，全新雅緻的客房，寬敞豪氣的百坪大眾池及隱秘舒適的雙人湯屋讓身心靈得到完全的解放。
悠閒享受泡湯之餘，在舒適的用餐空間享用由菁英廚師團隊獻上的各式創意料理，或搭配天玥泉手作坊每日限量出爐的精緻法式糕點和歐風麵包，一場視覺與味覺的雙重饗宴隆重登場。
為了提供貴賓全方位的服務，會館耗資數千萬打造影音俱全宴會廳，多功能會議廳及專屬用餐包廂，適合各式宴席與會議。
您絕對不可錯過視，聽，觸，嗅，味的五感體驗，讓五感的滿足換來一場非凡的悠閒之旅
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 3, Zhongshan Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Located in Beitou hot spring area, from Beitou Hot Spring Resort, it is only a three-minute walk. 

The Resort is at the opposite side of the dense trees at Beitou Park with a history longer than 100 years. Walking in the park and taking a deep breath help you to completely release your stress. 
Designed in a natural style, the new premium guest rooms, spacious public bath pool, and comfortable bath houses for two persons allow you to relax your body and mind.
After enjoying your hot spring, our elite chef team presents you creative cuisine in comfortable and spacious dining space or you can have some cakes and breads from Le Presse. You are invited to a visual and gustatory enjoyment. 

In order to provide comprehensive services, the Resort spent dozens of millions of Taiwan dollars to build its banquet hall, multifunctional meeting room, and VIP dining booths for banquets and meetings at all sizes.

You cannot miss the sensual experiences offered by the Resort and you will definitely be satisfied with your unique stay at the Resort.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路二段201號
descriptionZh: 皇家傳承位於板橋已有二十年的歷史，食材選用台灣本地新鮮牛肉，紐澳嚴選牛肉，新鮮帶骨現炸豬排以及新鮮足八兩重現炸雞腿，讓平民小吃—牛肉麵、排骨麵（飯）、雞腿麵（飯），也能有不同的享受，不僅取材新鮮，湯頭更是古法熬製，並講求健康，不添加味精及人工香料，每一道看似平凡的大眾化小吃，也能在火侯、調味、時間掌控上下足功夫，在經營上更是本著客人至上的原則，把愛心、耐心、細心融入每一道料理，也堅持新鮮健康無味精無負擔，讓每一位饕客體會到家的溫暖，有如自家餐廳般的自在享受。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.201, Sec. 2, Shipai Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Situated in Banqiao, Royal House has a history of 20 years. Using local fresh beef in Taiwan and premium beef from New Zealand and Australia, as well as made to order deep-fried pork chops and chicken drumsticks weighing at least 300g, the restaurant has endowed common foods such as beef noodles, pork chop noodles (rice), and chicken drumstick noodles (rice) with different enjoyments. Besides utilizing only the freshest ingredients, the broth is stewed using an ancient recipe. The health-oriented recipe does not involve adding any MSG or artificial spices. Each seemingly ordinary dish is the culmination of skillful control of flame, seasoning, and time. The customer-oriented management philosophy of the restaurant means that abundant love, patience, and attention to detail is infused into the cuisine. The owner’s persistence in freshness, health, and MSG-free, burden-free cooking allows each patron to appreciate the warm hospitality as if they are dining at home.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路二段201號
descriptionZh:
義美食品公司創立於1934年(日治時代，蔣渭水醫生於太平町創立大安醫院舊址，即為義美食品公司創業所在地)，目前義美食品公司總部位於台北市信義路二段88號。

義美從日治時代台北市太平町一家小糕餅店，迄今為國際知名的食品企業。多年來，以實實在在的態度，真材實料的把食品做好，得到顧客的迴響，產品遍布世界各地，陪著台灣人度過人生中重要的里程。
義美食品公司從創立以來，即堅持「產品品質與安全」的重要性，堅持五大把關原則「查核原料來源」、「審視原料價格」、「參考客戶名單」「深化檢驗能力」、「用心落實驗收」，並對原物料之檢核使用、產品製程管制、成品出廠及配送各層面，確實為消費者健康層層把關。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.201, Sec. 2, Shipai Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Situated in Banqiao, Royal House has a history of 20 years. Using local fresh beef in Taiwan and premium beef from New Zealand and Australia, as well as made to order deep-fried pork chops and chicken drumsticks weighing at least 300g, the restaurant has endowed common foods such as beef noodles, pork chop noodles (rice), and chicken drumstick noodles (rice) with different enjoyments. Besides utilizing only the freshest ingredients, the broth is stewed using an ancient recipe. The health-oriented recipe does not involve adding any MSG or artificial spices. Each seemingly ordinary dish is the culmination of skillful control of flame, seasoning, and time. The customer-oriented management philosophy of the restaurant means that abundant love, patience, and attention to detail is infused into the cuisine. The owner’s persistence in freshness, health, and MSG-free, burden-free cooking allows each patron to appreciate the warm hospitality as if they are dining at home.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路二段201號
descriptionZh:
COMEBUY創立於2002年，企業版圖橫跨全球四大洲11個國家，秉持用心、專心、開心與貼心的態度現做每一杯飲品，連續數年獲得台灣觀光局指定代表台灣於海外推廣觀光，並於每年屢屢獲得獎項與肯定。
COMEBUY 不斷超越自己，持續突破創新，領先使用義式粹茶機，萃取原葉茶湯，傳遞新鮮品質，開發與提供與眾不同的選擇與驚喜。並於2016年開創COMEBUYTEA旗艦門市，創新的獨家混搖飲品顛覆人們對於手搖杯茶飲的印象，受到中外消費者的廣大迴響。
COMEBUY堅持茶飲專業，是台灣第一家認養有機茶園，並與台灣最專業茶葉師傅合作，每一杯飲品皆是堅持現做，不預先大量沖泡，讓消費者感受茶葉完美風味。
COMEBUY嚴格把關食品安全，飲品與包材皆通過SGS與杜夫萊茵檢測，是全球第一家設立安全實驗室之手搖杯飲品牌；從原料供應到產品製程，落實自主檢測，食安規格高於其他餐飲上市公司。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路二段201號
descriptionZh: 小南門傳統豆花創立於民國85年，目前多於百貨公司及醫院之美食賣場以專櫃型態經營，100年並開始經營獨立店面，多年來堅持循古法純手工精製，口感獨特，入口即化之傳統豆花，在各大賣場屢創高營業額之佳績，現除維持豆花之傳統外，另91年起陸續推出「小南門傳統美食，「小南門點心世界」二品牌因口味傳統道地，皆深獲消費者好評。

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路二段201號
descriptionZh: 1971年星巴克創立於美國西雅圖派克市場，1987年霍華‧舒茲（星巴克主席、總裁暨行政總裁）在當地投資者的協助下買下星巴克，同年在加拿大溫哥華開拓門市，為首次進軍國際市場。今日星巴克門市遍佈全球，已是全世界最主要的咖啡烘焙與零售業者，霍華·蕭茲先生經營咖啡事業著重在人文特質與品質堅持，強調尊重顧客與員工，並堅持採購全球最好的咖啡豆烘焙製作，提供消費者最佳的咖啡産品與最舒適的消費場所，經營Starbucks Coffee成為當今全球精品咖啡領導品牌，備受國際學者專家推崇，譽為「咖啡王國傳奇」。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
