addressZh: 臺北市北投區光明路210號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 210, Guangming Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路二段25號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 25, Sec. 2, Shipai Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區大同街202-3號
descriptionZh: 提供北投在地特色紀念品與伴手小物，令人印象深刻，產品皆由弱勢族群創作，讓弱勢學員能讓弱勢學員能夠找到發光舞台。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 202-3, Datong St., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Hot Spring Store is a creative and cultural art workshop founded and operated by Beitou natives. The Store focuses on creating local memorabilia and unique souvenirs that impart a lasting impression of Beitou. Every product is made by the students in the Beitou Tri-service General Hospital Sheltered Workshop, providing an opportunity for underprivileged students to find a place where they can shine.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區幽雅路34號
descriptionZh: 台北北投張學良幽禁舊居，少帥禪園建於1920年代，原名「新高旅社」在北投溫泉區頗有盛名，曾被日軍當做神風特攻隊出戰前夕的慰安處所，1960年代，東北少帥張學良和其夫人趙一荻曾被幽居住於此。少帥禪園隱身在北投山腳邊的林蔭間，可以遠眺觀音山，關渡平原就像在眼前，來少帥禪園可以享美食、泡好湯、品好茶，會發現離台北的繁華不遠，但是可以擁抱的意與境是如此的近。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 34, Youya Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: There are moving stories once embedded in the footprint of history. Marshal Zen Garden was built in the Japanese-colonized period of 1920's. It was known for its hot spring and was once used as an entertainment hub for the Japanese Kamikaze pilots during the end of World War II. In the 1960's, Marshal Zhang Xue-Liang and wife Zhao Di were confined here by General Chiang Kai-Sheik.

nameZh: 春天酒店 Spring City Resort
addressZh: 臺北市北投區幽雅路18號
descriptionZh:
浸浴白磺幸福湯
春天酒店藏身北投幽雅小徑，彷彿城市外的桃花源，特有的天然白磺原湯，泉質滋潤，其色
澤呈現乳白色，更有牛奶湯、美人湯的美稱，在汩汩的湯泉之中，恣意的感受身體的輕鬆自在!!
幽雅空間享寧靜
春天酒店米白色系調和出溫馨舒適氣息的客房，簡單雅緻設計，創造寧靜空間感，客房內觀
音石浴池，讓房客輕鬆享受白磺原湯。房客除住宿外，更可使用露天風呂、會員俱樂部、戶
外泳池、健身房、SPA、中西/日式餐廳等設施服務，實為城市裡的奢侈享受，更是遠離塵囂拜訪北投渡假的首選!!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.18 Youya Rd. Beitou Dist. Taipei City 11243 Taiwan(R.O.C)
descriptionEn:
Immerse yourself in the white sulfur spring of happiness.

Hidden alongside a quiet elegant pathway in Beitou , Spring City Resort is the Xanadu outside the city. The resort features white sulfur spring, also known as the Milky Spring or the Beauty Spring for its nourishing spring quality and milky white color. Without restraint, feel relaxed and carefree soaking in the bubbling hot spring!!

Enjoy serenity in the quiet and elegant getaway.

The creamy white room decor in Spring City Resort creates cozy and comfortable atmosphere. Simply and elegantly designed, each room is filled with serenity and equipped with a bathtub made of Guanyin stone that relaxes resort guests with a white sulfur spring experience. In addition to accommodation, resort guests can enjoy facilities and services such as open-air hot spring, the members-only club, outdoor swimming pools, SPAs and Chinese-, Western- or Japanese-style restaurants. Staying in Spring City Resort is a luxury in the city and the optimal choice for a holiday stay in Beitou away from hustle and bustle!!

addressZh: 臺北市北投區新市街71號
descriptionZh: 北投齊雞的雞肉一律採用放山式的養殖，選擇較無污染，且水質及空氣好的花蓮及台東一帶，經由指定的品種與飼養方式，再由指定飼養雞場，加以嚴格執行及把關，使北投齊雞的雞肉，其肉質與鮮嫩度，都與市售的雞，截然不同，這是北投齊雞的特色，更是北投齊雞成功的要素之一。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 71, Xinshi St., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The chicken used in Beitou Chicken are all free range raised in areas of Hualien and Taitung where there is less pollution and better water and air quality. Designated breeds and raising methods by designated chicken farms as well as rigorous execution and quality control all make the meat quality and tenderness of Beitou Chicken stand out from others on the market. These are characteristics of Beitou Chicken and one of the reasons for its success.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區光明路220號
descriptionZh: 泉都溫泉會館位於新北投捷運站旁，步行只需3分鐘..全館歐式裝潢精緻雅麗，附設各式住宿溫泉客房、歐式新穎餐廳、多功能資訊中心及自助洗衣設備，提供優質的住宿、泡湯環境。溫泉客房內附有岩片泡湯浴池和北投特有白磺溫泉，無論住宿或泡湯消費皆可享有私人泡湯空間。全館免費無線上網及觀賞VOD影音頻道，讓您完全體會浪漫、舒適台北湯泉之旅。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 220, Guangming Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City 112, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
Chyuan Du Hot Springs Resort is located next by the MRT Xinbeitou Station in the Beitou District of Taipei City. Location across from Beitou Park ,and in Yangming-Mountain yamashita .

It is away only 5 minute to walk to the Hot Springs Museum ,and Beitou Green Library, and the the geothermal Valley. Chyuan Du Hot Springs Resort was the new decorated completed in May of 2013. The guest-rooms had being redesigned and become relax and cozy. The resort is european style decorating and most modern hotels in the Beitou.

Offer more than 10 kinds of cozy European styles and Japanese styles elegant rooms to choose , every guestroom is unique and offer white sulfur hot springs with different styles tubs in each room. Wish each one can enjoy a natural,peaceful, private setting.

Each room is equipped with a clean, comfortable beds group, imported curtains, fire-retardant carpet, sofa, an LCD screen television, free VOD channels, and brand name amenities.

Beitou's unique white sulfur hot springs are the best quality in all of Taiwan. Because of the springs pale white color it is also aptly named "milk springs." With a pH balance of 3.5 ~ 5.5 and temperatures of the springs range from 39-42 degrees Celsius it is perfect for radiant skin.

Every guestroom is fully equipped with access to the sulfur springs but a guest can also enjoy our different spa packages. Spa choices include marble bucket tubs, the whirl bath tub, the back-to-nature cypress, individual saunas, and other facilities. Not only do we meet the needs of a private hot springs environment, but we also are happy to adapt to each guest's individual pleasures.

The whole resort is equipped with free WIFI. Access to computers , washing machine and tumble dryer are available at the second floor E-center. Free VOD chan-nels are available in each room so that guests can watch the latest movies on demand. There are Wii players available and gratis for use upon request. It is our aim to make sure your mini vacation is the most enjoyable.

Art walkway, beautiful space

Walking in any corner of the Resort, you can stop and enjoy the artwork.

Whether it is jade, logs, metal carvings or famous printmaking.

These beautiful elements enrich the color of your journey.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區大度路三段304號

The old hotel at Guandu that boasts five decades of history has undergone renovation in 2020, aiming to provide customers with a comfortable environment at an affordable price, which makes the hotel an ideal option for business trips or travel. It is also a popular choice among cyclists due to its adjacency to the bike lane at Golden Anchor.

addressZh: 臺北市北投區石牌路二段201號
descriptionZh:
用科技思維建構Health Care大健康產業，結合集團優勢，將健康生產、健康服務，以產銷一條龍模式，打造「安永鮮物」高品質健康超市。
匯集全國最優質安心農畜產、國家級檢驗保證之頂級水產，及嚴選烹飪所需天然食材。落實全魚利用、食品無添加精神，持續開發自有品牌商品如養生藥膳、鱸魚精、湯品、魚鬆，引進健康餐食，貫徹『安心、鮮美、便利』服務宗旨。不論是成長中孩童、樂齡族、亞健康族的預防保健，讓全家人都能擁有健康、快樂的每一天。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.201, Sec. 2, Shipai Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Situated in Banqiao, Royal House has a history of 20 years. Using local fresh beef in Taiwan and premium beef from New Zealand and Australia, as well as made to order deep-fried pork chops and chicken drumsticks weighing at least 300g, the restaurant has endowed common foods such as beef noodles, pork chop noodles (rice), and chicken drumstick noodles (rice) with different enjoyments. Besides utilizing only the freshest ingredients, the broth is stewed using an ancient recipe. The health-oriented recipe does not involve adding any MSG or artificial spices. Each seemingly ordinary dish is the culmination of skillful control of flame, seasoning, and time. The customer-oriented management philosophy of the restaurant means that abundant love, patience, and attention to detail is infused into the cuisine. The owner’s persistence in freshness, health, and MSG-free, burden-free cooking allows each patron to appreciate the warm hospitality as if they are dining at home.

nameZh: 途中.台北國際青年旅舍
addressZh: 臺北市北投區光明路82號
descriptionZh:
< 途中台北 > 是由一群熱愛旅行的背包客所建立，我們提供2人，4人，6人，8人等房型，房間乾淨、明亮、舒適，且旅舍的 3樓 為女生專屬樓層，提供女性住客安全、自在的住宿環境。
1F及B1為公共空間，享受沙發慵懶放鬆，提供各式書籍可閱覽，不定時電影欣賞，文化交流，歡迎您在我們的沙發分享您的旅行故事。頂樓的空間為旅舍另一個特色，在空中的小花園，我們準備了躺椅、啤酒桌、以及戶外的桌椅組，在好天氣的下午，泡杯咖啡優閒的坐在頂樓更是一大享受；另外，我們也是觀光局的『自行車友善旅館』，室內停放腳踏車的區域更是提高了您單車旅行的便利性。

< 途中台北 > 距離捷運北投站僅 200公尺，步行 10分鐘即可抵達新北投溫泉區，在半小時內您可前往 淡水/關渡、陽明山國家公園、士林/故宮、台北車站 . . 等地點，是您休憩與差旅的最佳選擇。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 82, Guangming Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: On My Way was founded by a group of backpackers who love traveling. The rooms are clean and comfortable, and the third floor is a female-only floor where ladies can stay in safety. The 1F and B1 are public spaces where guests can lay on the sofa and relax, and share their stories. In addition, we are a "bicycle friendly" hostel designated by the Tourism Bureau. Bicycles can be stored indoors for your bicycle traveling convenience.

descriptionEn:
Hsin Tung Yang Neihu Store is approximately 5 minutes of walking distance away from the MRT Neihu Station, or guest can reach us by getting off from the Huguang Market bus station.
The store primarily sells a variety of Hsin Tung Yang brand flossy pork, dried meat, pastries, pineapple cakes, casual snacks, and different local specialty products of Taiwan. The store also offers various imported Japanese/Korean products.
The corporate objective of Hsin Tung Yang is to refine Chinese cuisines with the international spirit benchmark. Our local operations adhere to the four key principles of integrity, dependability, activeness, and innovation to create the corporate image of "No. 1 specialty brand in Taiwan for must buy in items and perfect souvenirs to take overseas" and bring high quality shopping experiences to the consumers.
2010 Annual Taiwan Food Consumption Survey Statistics Report: Hsin Tung Yang flossy pork, dried meat, and meat sauce series products are often listed as the No. 1 consumption brand; which gives it the reputation of "meat kingdom."
Won the 2011 Taiwan Top 100 Brands honor
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop, and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

Fu Hui Gen provides comprehensive, effective, and pure nutrients. The goal is to let the healthy body maintain health forever, which is also the primary objective and value of Fu Hui Gen.

addressZh: 臺北市內湖區瑞湖街178巷15號
descriptionZh: 亞尼克內湖旗艦店，秉持「不偷工、不減料、新鮮製作、新鮮販售」的理念，博得消費者的信任及喜愛。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 15, Lane 178, Ruihu Street, Neihu District Taipei City, Taiwan 114
descriptionEn: The president of Yannick, Wu Tsung-en, founded the brand, which he named after his French name "Yannick”. In 2000, he started his career as a dessert manufacturer. Then in 2002, he returned to his hometown, Wanli, to open up a shop. The small cake shop in Wanli, a remote place, attracted queues of people, and even became a subject of media coverage. He ventured into Neihu District, Taipei City in 2004, and his shops were still full of customers, creating a miracle in the Taiwanese cake industry. With the brand spirit of "sharing, and making hearts melt", Yannick upholds the philosophy of its business, which is to never take shortcuts, never stint ingredients, make food fresh and sell them fresh. Yannick hopes to bring people closer to each other through desserts, cultivate reciprocal relationships from the heart, and create joyful times.

addressZh: 臺北市內湖區民權東路六段469號1樓
descriptionZh:
「Jolly Brewery + Restaurant」
是目前國內唯一將「泰食」與「手工釀啤酒 (Craft beer)」二者完美結合的餐廳，裝潢設計採取後現代主義的精神，呈現出簡約的設計風格，讓消費者能在寬敞、溫馨、舒適的環境用餐，輔以柔和的燈光、時尚的音樂，為嶄新的新概念型態餐廳。
Jolly在「泰食」方面針對「酸」與「辣」及「東南亞貫用的辛香料」特性做了重新的詮釋，將傳統味覺與創新手法相容並濟，開創新口感。例如檸檬清蒸魚採去頭去尾的做法及JOLLY蝦餅與一般傳統蝦餅造型不同，採切長條入鍋炸，炸出來就像薯條一樣，更是少見。
Jolly在「手工釀啤酒 (Craft beer)」方面，特別斥資將歐、美風行的啤酒釀造工藝技術引進台灣，並有國外専業認証的釀酒師釀製，堅持Craft beer精神-真正自然健康，只用100%麥芽釀製，不添加任何化學物質，也不經過過濾、熱處理等程序，故保有豐富的啤酒酵母、礦物質、維他命、蛋白質。原始與傳統的極緻表現，讓啤酒不再只是單純可以搭配各國佳餚的液體麵包，更是餐桌上一道色、香、味具全的個性佳餚 。
當酸辣美味的「泰食」遇上口感細膩的「手工釀啤酒」，讓這一熱一冷的交織作用帶你進入細膩與獨特的Jolly世界。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 469, Sec. 6, Minquan E. Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Jolly Brewery + Restaurant is the only restaurant in Taiwan that brings Thai cuisine and craft beer perfectly together featuring a post-modern minimalistic decor, plus soft lighting and trendy music, so that diners can enjoy their meals in a spacious, cosy, comfy environment. Jolly's is an embodiment of a brand new restaurant concept.
　Jolly's takes what makes Thai cuisine special (sour and spicy) and puts a new spin on it, adding spices that are commonly used in Southeast Asia. Approach traditional dishes with innovation, and you get brand new flavors, for instance, fish steamed with lemon grass without the head or the tail, and prawn crackers fried in slices like french fries, different from the traditional prawn crackers, rarely seen elsewhere.
For its craft beer, Jolly's has spent a fortune introducing to Taiwan the beer brewing techniques popular in the US and Europe. Its internationally certified brewer upholds the ethos of craft beer: natural and healthy, using only 100% malt with no chemical additives bypassing sieving and heat treatment procedures so as to retain the rich nutrients, e.g. beer yeast, minerals, minerals and protein. Jolly's craft beer has pushed the primitive and the traditional to a new height in that beer is no longer merely the liquid bread only to accompany ethnic delicacies but also a dish in its own right pleasing to all senses.
　Come and enjoy the sour and spicy Thai cuisine together with our craft beer. This refined, unique culinary experience at Jolly's is out of this world.

addressZh: 臺北市內湖區江南街91號
descriptionZh: 店內裝潢以復古風加上學生課桌椅，很有學生時代上課的氛圍。主牆上及吧檯用粉筆書寫著店內熱門餐點以及食材來源，店員親切服務熱忱，並提供鄰近外送服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 91, Jiangnan St., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: “T&F Breakfast and Toast-Neihu Jiangnan Store” is decorated in a retro classroom setting of the old days. Recommended dishes and food ingredients are written with chalk on the main wall and around the bar area (such as those strictly selected from KD milk and Lin Mao-Sen Tea) for the peace of mind of consumers. Because it is located in Neihu, on the opposite wall, a cute little girl is there to introduce us to the Neihu District, a feature of Jiangnan Store. The President would like to offer the most tasty brunch dishes and build the most comfortable dining environment in Neihu. Additionally, staff provides warm services and deliveries to neighborhood area.

addressZh: 臺北市內湖區成功路三段177號一樓
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 177, Sec. 3, Chenggong Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市成功路4段182巷6弄1號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 1, Aly. 6, Ln. 182, Sec. 4, Chenggong Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

addressZh: 臺北市內湖區環山路一段9巷7號
descriptionZh: 達人麵館，專業經營北方麵食：刀削麵，手工拉麵的店家，曾多次榮獲台北國際牛肉麵節傳統組冠軍，淸燉組冠軍，創意米食冠軍等⋯⋯歡迎親身體驗！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7, Ln. 9, Sec. 1, Huanshan Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: We specialize in Northern Chinese pasta dishes such as knife-cut noodles. As a restaurant featureing home-made ramen noodles, we have won multiple top prizes at Taipei International Beef Noodle Festival for Best Noodles in Traditional Soup, Best Noodles in Clear Soup, Best Creative Rice Dish, and so on. Welcome to our store and have a taste at our awarding-winning soup.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區艋舺大道128號
descriptionZh: 提供最有效率的歌唱聲音教學系統，以具體、科學、人性化的方法協助美化音色，拓展音域與改善聲音疲勞問題。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 128, BangKa Blvd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Mr. Voice provides a most efficient and effective vocal singing training system that features figurative, scientific, and student-centered method to beautify the voice, expand the vocal range, and address the issue of voice fatigue. In addition to basic practices that enhance the strength of the vocal muscles and cords, students will transform their ideas about singing and adopting new concepts when they use their voice, adjusting their bodies to unleash finely-tuned notes as easily as they speak.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區西園路一段165號1樓
descriptionZh: 生產以牛仔布料為主的款式，銷售日、韓、歐美時尚單寧款式。提供批發、零售與客製化訂單，款式多樣化，週週有新款。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 165, Sec. 1, Xiyuan Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: This branded apparel store started in Taipei by producing mainly denim apparel. In addition to the local market, efforts were made to expand and secure new markets overseas. Later on, the store transformed its wholesale model and switched to retail, opening its first storefront at Wufenpu. Currently, there are 5 wholesale locations in northern, central, and southern Taiwan selling fashionable denim styles from Japan, Korea, Europe, and the US. We also offer wholesale, retail, and customized orders, plenty of styles, and new releases every week.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區內江街168號1樓
descriptionZh: 三寶神明用品，展現傳統宗教文化之美，以明亮整潔的環境展示神桌、神像、神衣、神帽、銅器、繡品訂製等產品，吸引各方人士駐足。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 168, Neijiang St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Sanbao Temple Goods has thrown off the stereotypical view of temple shops and focus instead on the beauty of traditional Taiwanese folk belief and religions. Our store is brightly lit to display shrine tables, statuettes, statuette dresses, statuette hats, bronze and brass ceremonial items, and embroideries that can be made and customized by order. Many curious visitors will stop by the location in order to study the exhibits.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區華西街3號
descriptionZh: 堅持古法烹煮，製作料好實在的甜湯，不但是老艋舺人的共同喜愛，更是遊客們的一大享受。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 3, Huaxi St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Grandma A-Tsai is the name of the owner as well as the store. The store was first established in 1965, and A-Tsai has been selling sweet porridge and syrups for nearly 50 years at Huaxi Street, using only traditional methods and quality materials to create the favorite snack of local Bangka residents that is quickly catching on with the tourists.

nameZh: Crystal Rose Ribbon Store 緞帶專賣
addressZh: 臺北市萬華區艋舺大道188號
descriptionZh: CRYSTAL ROSE，全國唯一精緻緞帶專賣店，有著和⽔晶般剔透的精緻細緻感。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 188, BangKa Blvd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: CRYSTAL ROSE is Taiwan’s only luxury ribbon specialist dealer. We offer crystal-like clarity and richness as well as multi-faceted textures like the petals of a rose. We have the experiences and techniques, and adopt the latest fashionable trends from Europe to create innovative patterns that go beyond traditional knitting methods to achieve creative possibilities that were never thought of before.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區昆明街316號
descriptionZh:
擁抱每一段相遇。 座落於老台北萬華，擺脫緊湊的生活節奏，放慢腳步，走入古色古香的城市。
提供實惠的長短期住宿&多功能空間出租
歡迎喜好流浪的背包客&各類團體洽詢!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 316, Kunming St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: MeetingMates Hostel believes that travelers travel to go home, and thus provide a place filled with warmth to make travelers feel right at home. We offer a passionate and relaxing environment for guests from faraway places as well as spacious and cozy recreation rooms so that travelers can share stories, food, and good times with each other.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區大理街45號
descriptionZh: 提供款式多元且各種場合的服裝，熱情的服務態度與多樣的選擇，平實近人的價格，適合各式不同的族群。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 45, Dali St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Yimei Apparel Store is a specialized purveyor of women's clothing and is located in the heart of Moga Taipei Clothes Shopping District. In addition to fashionable youth wear and casual dresses, Yimei also provides semi-formal, banquet, and rich dress options for various events. Yimei offers plenty of fashionable items and styles to choose from and combine, making the store a favorite destination for all demographics seeking classical yet fashionable apparel.

nameZh: 西園29服飾創作基地 Fashion Institute of Taipei
addressZh: 臺北市萬華區西園路二段9號
descriptionZh: 積極開發功能性佳、舒適又簡潔輕便的高機能服飾，在奈米材料、紗線研發方面投入多年心血，從原料研發到產品販售一條龍。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 9, Sec. 2, Xiyuan Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Fashion Institute of Taipei was founded in 2003 in Taiwan and aims to promote Taiwanese functional clothing designs throughout the entire world. LISEPO is a committed designer and developer of functional clothing that offer excellent functional performance, wearer comfort, and ease of cleaning. We have invested a significant amount of resources into nanomaterials and yarns, generating a vertically integrated supply chain to better ensure the quality of our products. We have recently released many functional products that include titanium-germanium healthcare series, activated carbon deodorizing system, anti-UV / anti-sunburn / sweat wicking series, cool anti-UV series, and other features. Come to LISEPO and take your pick today!

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區開封街二段62-5號
descriptionZh: 以「報平安」之諧音，傳達棲居一隅的祈願。伴隨著美味小點與茶香，邀請你進入陶藝創作的行列。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 62-5, Sec. 2, Kaifeng St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Yingge is not the only place to study porcelain craft. Versammeln is a pottery workshop tucked in a quiet corner in the otherwise bustling Ximending area in the heart of Taipei City. Versammeln provides a peaceful and serene setting designed after a personal study of traditional literati elites to recreate a simple and unassuming lifestyle aesthetic. Delicious snacks and aromatic tea bid you welcome to the world of pottery art. The charms of pottery can be derived from the rustic yet refined textures and material. Pottery craft requires makers to feel and form the material with their hands, using their tactile senses and body movements to instantaneously mold and shape the clay. The process of fooling around in mud turns out to be the basis of potter’s hands.

nameZh: 阿寶師咖哩餃(阿寶師福州精緻點心)
addressZh: 臺北市萬華區德昌街100號
descriptionZh: 承襲了家族三代的手藝，提供色香味俱全的咖哩餃，從外而內擋不住的咖哩香氣，令人迫不及待要大快朵頤一番。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.100, Dechang St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Master A-Bao is a third-generation practitioner of the culinary art and has stayed true to the course of offering intricate snacks from Fuzhou. Master A-Bao has continued to offer curry dumplings and various desserts that could hardly be found in Taiwan, providing every customer with an unforgettable gastronomic experience.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區廣州街187號
descriptionZh: 百年老店，追求自然養生健康的食材，提供四季養生茶包，提供簡便、健康、養生的茶飲。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: S.C.T natural and healthful herbal tea.
addressEn: No. 187, Guangzhou St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: S.C.T is located at Qingcao Lane of Longshan Temple in Wanhua. We use the most natural herbs and biotech processes to provide customers with the best Four Season Wholesome Tea Bag that offer a most professional, healthy, and convenient solution to improve your health. We also offer the most natural and wholesome tea-based beverages such as our thick and aromatic mesona tea, the sour and sweet roselle tea, and traditional wintermelon tea. We also offer old ginger tea and longan tea for winter, making us a must-go destination for herbal tea lovers. If you happen to be offering prayers at Longshan Temple, don’t forget to visit the store and experience our uniquely flavored mesona tea.

descriptionEn:

nameZh: 台北堂餅行 - 摩那卡餅本舖
addressZh: 臺北市萬華區艋舺大道52號
descriptionZh: 是一間製作日式甜點的九十多年老店，也是台灣唯一依循古法，純手工製造日式最中餅(MONAKA)的傳統老店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 52, BangKa Blvd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Taipei Tang MonaKa Cake Shop is a traditional Japanese dessert shop located on BangKa Boulevard of Taipei City with over 9 decades of experiences. It is also the only traditional shop in Taiwan that produces pure hand-made Japanese style ___ MONAKA cakes. The store was founded during the Japanese Occupation Era in 1920 by irs founder Mr. De-Mei Lee. As an apprentice of the Guangzhou Street Harada, the MONAKA making technique was passed-on to Mr. De-Mei Lee.

When Emperor Hirohito visited Taiwan while he was a prince, he usually picks MONAKA and MONAKA ice cream as his dessert and fruit, they were also the special dessert served only to the government officials and royal nobility and generally not sold to the public, and became available only after the war was dover. The store has been inherited by the third generation now. Each generation has insisted on hand-made in order to retain the traditional unique flavor of this Japanese dessert.

The most representative item of this enduring store is the ___ MONAKA cake (a hand made rice fruit snack stuffed in a special shell). The shell is made using glutinous rice flour by first steaming it into mochi and then baked under low heat. The stuffing comprised the unique oil-less red bean paste recipe. The entire dessert combination has a unique and memorable taste. The other popular item is the rainbow shell ______ ICE MONAKA, whereby the MNAKA shell and the rich ice cream are combined to form the Japanese style ice cream. The dessert can also be made into a Mid-Autumn Festival ice cream moon cake. The shop also provide wholesale of shelled multi-layer steamed bread and numerous other Japanese style MONAKA cakes.

We follow the traditional methods to produce the herbal incenses that not only can give you a peace of mind, but can also rejuvenate the soul and ease the spirit as well.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區西昌街84號1樓
descriptionZh: 艋舺囝仔出生龍山寺旁青草巷，從小走遍田野河邊山間，採草尋芳。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 84, Xichang St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

The child from Mengjia was born in the alley beside Longshan Temple, where the grass grew. From a young age, he wandered through fields, by rivers, and in the mountains, gathering grasses to seek their fragrances. Chameleon plant, shepherd’s needles, dandelion, and ox knee... Learning the ways of a hundred unique plants and herbs to inquire about their medicinal properties. With a southern sickle, a grinding stone, and a camphor wood cutting board, he was tirelessly busy. For decades, he blended and simmered, caring for the well-being of his customers. Providing relief from heat, soothing the heart, invigorating the spirit, and improving respiration... Whether you’re ailing or not, the mysteries of herbal tea are more than you might imagine. Within the old teapot lies a universe, transforming into a cup of rejuvenating youth. It brims with countless essences. Come and have a cup of healing green herbal tea!

【Key points of transformation】

Breaking Free from the Traditional Herbal Tea Model: Transforming an Old Warehouse into a Healing Tea Bar

The herbal tea expert moved away from the lively streets of Mengjia’s Herbal Alley, settling in a former warehouse storefront. The space was modest, and the product packaging lacked sophistication, relying heavily on knowledgeable regulars. In this transformation, the owner’s vast knowledge of herbal health is linked to the brand’s new positioning as a “Healing Style Herbal Tea Bar.” This concept blends Eastern herbal traditions with a Western-style bar, offering tea tastings and consultations. It also introduces a range of hot-brewed handcrafted teas, custom-blended herbal teas, and wellness tea packages. This transformation breaks away from the traditional herbal tea cart format.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區西園路一段194號
descriptionZh: 脆韌有勁、搭配獨家醬料的好味道 以魷魚羹崛起的「兩喜號魷魚羹」老字號，已有84年的歷史，現已成為聞名全省的艋舺小吃。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 194, Sec. 1, Xiyuan Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Since 1921
　　The original founder, Liang Xi Chen, started as a shoulder pole carrier during the Japanese Occupation Era next to the fire brigade at the Longshan Temple in Monga (currently the Monga Park fountain). The business was subsequently passed down to Mr. QingShui Chen when he was 23. This restaurant was named Liang Xi Hao to commemorate the ancestors who laid the foundation for this family business.

　　Liang Xi Hao is currently ran by the third generation husband and wife team. However, its original address at the temporary Longshan Temple (Currently next to the MRT Longshan Temple Station) has been demolished, so we can only operate at someone else's property at Xiyuan Road arcade. The third generation couple team has shouldered the mission, and never taken a day off regardless of wind or rain. The efforts and hard work were aimed to allow each guest to taste the "Liang Xi Hao Squid Soup."

　　The results of hard work are always wonderful. Visiting guests often mentioned, "I came all the way here to cherish the authentic good tastes and to visit the hardworking couple." Because of the customer's satisfaction and encouragement, the third generation couple is committed to run the ancestral family business no matter the hardship. Their efforts make the present glory of "Liang Xi Hao" possible.

Businesses are difficult to start up and hard to maintain.

　Liang Xi Hao won the "Taipei Century Old Shop" honor issued by the Taipei City Government in February of 1998.
In honor of the continued efforts to serve and old and the new, may Monga's "Liang Xi Hao Squid Soup"

be renowned and passed on forever.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區貴陽街二段196號1樓
descriptionZh: 邀請來訪的旅人都能喝上一杯溫潤的熱茶稍坐歇憩，欣賞中華茶文化之美。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 196, Sec. 2, Guiyang St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

In the bustling days of Taipei’s first street, the fragrance of tea began to waft.

Cai Han, a physician from Tong’an, Fujian, resigned from his official post and returned to his hometown, where he began a life of growing tea and practicing medicine. In 1845, he and his family migrated and settled in the old streets of Mengjia, crossing the sea to their new home. Their seal still bears the traces of his ancestors’ entrepreneurial spirit, now over 180 years old. As a compassionate physician skilled in tea-making, he used tea as a form of medicine, and his tea-drinking habits were part of his health regimen. Supported by local tea farmers who practiced natural farming methods, they coexisted with insects in the morning dew. Following ancient tea-making traditions and carrying on the compassionate spirit of his ancestors, the family’s six generations of tea experts share the classic wisdom of aged tea. Visitors come from near and far to enjoy Taiwan high-mountain oolong, lightly roasted for a gentle brew that doesn’t harm the stomach, offering a refreshing and sweet taste. Wuyi rock tea, Anxi Tie Guan Yin, and re-roasted old teas bring forth a rich and mellow warmth without any hint of bitterness. Yunnan pu’er, naturally aged in storage, exudes a long-lasting aroma. The first whiff of tea smoke in old Mengjia, the blessing of prosperity, carries on its fragrant legacy, scattering good fortune among people.

【Key points of transformation】

A century-old tea brand in Mengjia, showcasing a new identity through vintage items.

Founded during the Qing Dynasty, this tea brand has a history spanning 180 years. They collaborate with natural farming tea plantations and specialize in the unique roasting techniques passed down for a century. A focus on aged teas gives their shop a distinctive character while also developing a philosophy of well-being.

Located on Guiyang Street in the old Mengjia city district, both the store and its interior decorations are overly traditional, making it challenging to attract younger demographics and tourists. This transformation focuses on their century-old history, deepening the humanistic qualities and emphasizing their tea-making expertise.

The brand’s slogan is “The First Whiff of Tea Smoke in Old Mengjia,” providing a heartfelt narrative of the deep local roots of Mengjia’s century-old tea. They emphasize their expertise in tea roasting and aged teas, using the slogan “New Roasting, Old Roasting, Centuries of Hidden Red” to highlight the rare value and cultural significance of their tea products.

The store space utilizes vintage items to convey a new perspective, conveying the precious value of a century-old tea culture. Their goal is to appeal to younger demographics and foreign tourists, creating a tea culture showcase shop with historical depth and approachability.

descriptionEn: [Fusheng Pajamas is the preferred MIT bathrobe brand by hotels in Taiwan.] The first generation founder of Fusheng Pajamas came from Changhua to Monga to launch his business. Similar to most family-style garment factories in Monga at the time, one member of the couple would watch over the factory and the other would handle the business sales, and that's how they support the family. Even though family-style factory has become a rarity in Monga due to environmental changes, there are even fewer old stores left as the times pass by. The historical Fusheng is the only remaining old store left to witness history. In addition to the traditional colors, "Fusheng" is one of the few stores in Taipei that focuses on the sales of pajamas and bathrobes. After it has been inherited by the second generation owner, the owner expanded the business into hot spring operations and SPA massages. If any hot spring and SPA massage operators need to buy pajamas or bathrobes, please visit "Fusheng" for the best selection~

descriptionZh: 【奶茶界的LV】iHERE tea & cafe 採用進口琺瑯鍋現煮三百年歷史的TWININGS英國皇室御用茶製作鍋煮鮮奶茶。

descriptionEn: iHERE Tea & Cafe is the original store of LV of the milk tea world. We make our cooked milk tea using imported enamel pots and TWININGS, the tea choice of the British Royal Queen for 3 centuries. Our exclusive Truffle Milk Tea" contains top-grade white truffles imported from Italy. Our world famous and exclusive "Truffle Milk Tea" is the taste of gods that everyone must try as least once in a life time.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區漢口街二段9號
descriptionZh:
黑橋牌食品於1957年成立，因率先將舊時台灣市面上乾鹹的廣式臘腸，改良為現今甜潤多汁的台灣風味，獨創的香腸滋味在台灣炮而紅，成立至今已超過六十年，每逢年節皆可看見店舖大排長龍的搶購盛況，不僅開創台灣香腸的美食傳奇，更奠定現今台灣香腸第一品牌的口碑。
店內除了販售十多種款式的香腸，更提供多種口味的豬肉乾、牛肉乾、手炒肉酥等美味肉品，全部都是來台必買的美食。近年推出的脆片肉乾、條子肉乾、肉酥餅乾等廣受年輕顧客喜愛，也成為黑橋牌暢銷人氣商品。
黑橋牌門市多次接獲海內外媒體採訪，香港美食家蔡瀾也曾率團到店選購，黑豬肉香腸、黑豬肉乾、香腸肉包是招牌推薦品，店內並提供鳳梨酥、綠豆糕等各式台灣特產，是來台必訪的特產名店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.9, Sec. 2, Hankou St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: "Founded in 1957, Black Bridge was the first company to refine the traditional dry, salty Cantonese sausage sold on the market in Taiwan into the succulent, tender Taiwanese delicacy of today. The unique flavors of the sausage became an instant hit in Taiwan over 6 decades ago. Now, people are seen queuing outside stores during Chinese New Year waiting to purchase their products. Black Bridge sausages have not only become a legend of gastronomy in the country but also the premier brand of contemporary Taiwanese sausages. Besides a selection of over a dozen sausages in the store, there is also a plethora of delicious meat products such as pork/beef jerky and fried pork fibers. These are all quintessential Taiwanese delicacies. Recently launched new products, including crisp pork jerky, grilled pork jerky, and fried pork fiber biscuits are proving to be extremely popular among younger customers, and they have become Black Bridge’s hottest sellers. Black Bridge stores have received domestic and foreign media interviews on several occasions, and Hong Kong food critic Chua Lam and his travel companions have also made purchases in the store. Signature products include Taiwanese black hog sausage, Taiwanese black hog pork jerky, and sausage buns. Other Taiwanese specialties in the store include pineapple cake and bean paste cake etc. are all quintessential Taiwanese snacks."

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區長泰街7號
descriptionZh: 三代傳承的家鄉味食堂位於台北市萬華區。將近半世紀以來，從在地信仰中心—廣照宮旁的小吃攤，發展為融合日式料亭設計的全新店面，堅持選用新鮮食材製作滷肉飯、滷白菜、炸豆腐等招牌，以款待家人的心來服務。家鄉味喜獲2017及2018臺灣滷肉飯節殊榮，顧客口碑更是我們的最高榮譽。家鄉味—回家永遠飯飄香。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.7, Changtai St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Jiaxiangway, now in the hands of the third generation owner, is located in Wanhua Dist., Taipei City. Over the last half century, the humble roadside snack stall next to the local religious center--Guangzhao Temple--has evolved into a brand new storefront blending in design cues of a classy Japanese dining establishment. Jiaxiangway insists on using the freshest ingredients to prepare its signature dishes including braised pork rice, braised Chinese cabbage, and deep-fried tofu. The warm hospitality makes guests feel at home.  Jiaxiangway received top honors at the 2017 and 2018 Taiwan Braised Pork on Rice Festival, and it has also highly praised by patrons.  Jiaxiangway - The taste of home.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區東園街68-1號
descriptionZh:
一間溫暖的日式居酒屋
有各式各樣的酒種 串燒 海鮮等等
不管開心或悲傷只要來到喜舍吃到我們溫暖的料理 都能感受到快樂

descriptionEn:
A heart-warming Japanese pub.

It has many kinds of alcohol, skewer kebabs, seafood, etc.

Whether you are happy or sad, the warm dishes at Ikki Izakaya can always make you feel joy.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區東園街38號
descriptionZh:
時光回到1960年代。每天一大早，「布田」第一代陳雲呈先騎著孔明車去附近柑仔店鋪貨，快中午回到家，再把花生糖用沙拉油桶一桶一桶綁起來疊在拖板車上，拖到萬華火車站寄到外縣市去。 很多人不知曉，大約五十年前，艋舺可是花生糖生產重鎮，全盛時期有一、二十家製糖商，供應全台各地的柑仔店，滿足大人小孩的甜食慾望。

當年老艋舺的店家，習慣清早用木屑粉升爐熬糖，爐灶在中午過後便要添加木屑粉，而為掌控火候大小，得靠人力踩踏平整。「布田」第二代陳錦村陳爸憶起少年時的爐灶時光： 「添粉時灶中餘溫仍高，每次腳一踏上去，就忍不住像在跳山地舞，部過即便很燙還是要忍耐，不能偷懶，把燃料踩結實，就能保持熱度，糖煮透了自然更香。」這便是所謂的「踏實」吧！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 38, Dongyuan St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Back in the 1960s, everyday in the early morning, Chen Yun-cheng, the first-generation owner of Bootien, went to the nearby grocery store on a bicycle to get supplies. He came home at close to noon, then he put the peanut brittles in tubs, tied them up, and stacked them one after another on a pallet truck. He then dragged them to Wanhua Railway Station to send them to other counties. Not many people know that, about fifty years ago, Mengjia was where most peanut brittle productions took place. In its heyday, ten to twenty peanut brittle production companies provided supplies to grocery stores all around Taiwan, and they satisfied the sweet tooth of adults and children.

 

The shops of the old Mengjia at the time would heat up stoves with wood shavings  in early mornings to boil sugar. More wood shavings needed to be added into the stoves after noon, and to control the intensity of the fire, a person would need to step on them to flatten them. Chen Chin-tsun (Father Chen), the second-generation owner of Bootien, recalls the days of stoves back in his teenage years: "The residual heat would still be high when new wood shavings were being added. Every time I stepped on it, I couldn't help but do an indigenous dance. I had to tolerate it even though it was very hot. I couldn't slack off. Making the wood shavings dense by stepping on them could maintain the heat, which would allow the sugar to boil thoroughly and be even more fragrant". Maybe this is what "keeping your feet on the ground" means!

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區東園街68-9號
descriptionZh:
CURA PIZZA的 「CURA」 是義大利文關懷照顧之意
張師傅深信這是當年其祖父在創業時的初心這也同時符合 張師傅信仰中的信念，店舖因此命名 .
在富有人情味的老街區吃著最古老傳統的南義窯烤Pizza，別有一番情調與滋味.若有經過萬華 , 不妨停下腳步試試 .這從南義接軌南萬華的溫馨小店喲！

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區開封街二段12號
descriptionZh: 店址位於熱鬧西門商圈，緊臨福星國小旁，提供消費者舒適自在的購物空間。店內除全系列DOUBLE 束胸產品，潮流T恤、彩虹精品，引進各式流行配件未來將增加各式屬於MIT製作優質產品，希望能提供更多元的商品給消費者。歡迎大家來DOUBLE HOUSE 參觀選購喔!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 12, Sec. 2, Kaifeng St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The store is located next to Fuxing Elementary School, in the lively Ximending commercial district. It provides customers with a comfortable and relaxing shopping space. In addition to the chest binder product series by Double, trendy T-shirts, and fashionable "rainbow" quality goods, Double House also sells various kinds of fashion accessories from outside sources. There will be more quality MIT products of various kinds in the future as the shop hopes to provide a wider range of products to customers. Everyone is welcome to come and have a look at Double House!

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區成都路78號1樓
descriptionZh: 世運食品成立於1950年由創辦人吳定標先生所創立，因創辦人帶領台灣柔道選手參與世界奧林匹克運動會，因創辦人嚮往奧林匹克公正、忍耐、真誠運動職人之精神，希望把這精神帶入世運品牌，所以取名「世運」。運動家精神的Logo Design，也有著"努力不懈，追求卓越"之意涵，理念上也承襲著中華傳統文化。"天行健，君子以自強不息""地勢坤，君子以德載物"
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 78, Chengdu Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Olympia Foods was founded by Mr. Ding-biao Wu, who used to lead Taiwanese judo players to participate in the Olympic Games in 1950. The name “Olympia” came from his aspiration for the Olympic spirit of justice, perseverance and sincerity, which he hopes to bring in to the brand. The logo design symbolizes sportsmanship and the belief of hard work in the pursuit of excellence. It also inherits the ideology of traditional Chinese culture. “As heaven maintains vigor through movements, a gentleman should constantly strive for self-perfection; as earth's condition is receptive devotion, a gentleman should hold the outer world with broad mind.”

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區忠孝西路二段38號
descriptionZh:
我們快樂，世界在囍門同樂。
退休旅人經營的旅途落腳處，交通位置優越，距離北門捷運站僅屋分鐘步行距離，機場捷運站僅10分鐘步行，作為旅途的起點與終點最為合適。 櫃台每一位服務人員都曾是旅人，有些甚至有20年的導遊經驗，對於台灣該怎麼玩別錯過什麼，我們將盡全力為您解答。
房型有上下雙人床以及上下單人床，走廊與公共空間皆是老闆親自手繪萬華區景色，留一張照片不佔多少記憶體，但一定豐富回憶。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 38, Sec. 2, Zhongxiao W. Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
We offer enjoyment, everyone has fun at DB Apartment.

Operated by retired travelers, this is a place for travelers to stop by. Its location allows excellent transportation access. It is only a 5-minutes walk from Beimen MRT Station, a 10-minute walk from Airport MRT Station, and the most suitable starting point and end point for your journey. Every staff at the front desk was once a traveler. Some even have 20 years of experience in being a tour guide. We will do our best to answer your questions about how to enjoy Taiwan and what you shouldn't miss.

There are room types with double bunk beds or single bunk beds. The corridors and public space are filled with hand-drawn paintings of Wanhua District’s views. Taking a picture does not  occupy too much of your memory card, but will sure enrich your memory.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區長沙街二段11號10樓
descriptionZh:
老旅店新生，保留歷史感的全新旅店。囍閱文旅位於台北市萬華區，地理位置優越，距離剝皮寮老街不到 1 公里，距離總統府步行 10 分鐘，距離台北中山堂不到 1 公里。旅館設有 24 小時接待櫃台、觀光旅遊櫃台及全館免費 WiFi。館內禁止吸菸，距離西門紅樓 600 公尺。

客房均配有空調、平面有線電視、冰箱、熱水壺、淋浴、吹風機和書桌。客房設有附浴缸和免費盥洗用品的私人衛浴，亦享有市景。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 10F., No. 11, Sec. 2, Changsha St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
The rebirth of an old hotel; a brand-new hotel that preserves a sense of history. Located in Wanhua District, Taipei City, Hotel Attic has excellent locational advantages. It's within 1 kilometer from Bopiliao historic street, a 10-minute walk from Office of the President, and within 1 kilometer from the Taipei Zhongshan Hall. The hotel features a 24-hour reception desk, a sightseeing tour desk, and free WiFi throughout the hotel. Smoking is prohibited inside the hotel. It is also 600 meters from Ximen Red House.

All guest rooms are equipped with air conditioning, a flat-screen cable TV, a refrigerator, a kettle, shower, a hairdryer, and a desk. The room features a private bathroom with a bathtub and free toiletries, as well as a city view to enjoy.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區貴陽街二段1號
descriptionZh:
不會煮就谷一下，谷不出來就問老師傅。
簡單的豆花、冰冰的紅茶，應該夠路人撐過夏天。
熱熱的仙草、暖暖的甜湯，也許夠街坊暖活冬天。
春天、秋天...很難備料...想到什麼煮什麼。
產品
月均溫30度C以上:冰豆花、冰紅茶、仙草冰
月均溫20度C以下:冷熱豆花、紅豆圓仔湯、燒仙草
月均溫21~29度C之間: 這季節店主只能看著辦。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 1, Sec. 2, Guiyang St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Google it if you don’t know how to make it; ask the old master if Google can't tell you.

Simple tofu pudding and cold black tea should be enough to help people survive summer.

Hot grass jelly and warm sweet soup should be enough to warm up the neighborhood.

It's difficult to prepare ingredients for spring and fall, so we make whatever we feel like.

Menu:

When average temperature of the month is above 30°: cold tofu pudding, cold black tea, grass jelly with ice.

When average temperature of the month is below 20°: cold and hot tofu pudding, red bean soup with glutinous rice balls, hot grass jelly.

When average temperature of the month is between 21° and 29°: The owner can only improvise in seasons like this.

descriptionZh:
位在西門町的丹居青旅，1樓有販賣咖啡，步行2分鐘可抵達西門紅樓、3分鐘到達熱鬧的西門町商圈，是外來旅客的最佳選擇。

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 154, Hanzhong St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Located in Ximending, there is a coffee vendor on the first floor of Dan Hostel. it takes a 2-minute walk to reach Ximen Red House and 3 minutes to the bustling Ximending commercial district. Dan Hostel is the best choice for foreign travelers.

Ximen MRT Station exit 1 can be reached within a 2-minute walk.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區華西街17之4號
descriptionZh: 於1975年創立的小王煮瓜(原:小王清湯瓜仔肉)，位在華西街夜市，是艋舺在地人從小吃到大的家常美食，2019年更獲米其林必比登推薦。來到這裡絕對不能錯過招牌「清湯瓜仔肉湯」，以豬後腿肉打魚漿，現捏現煮，並特選老牌花瓜熬煮大骨湯，甘甜湯頭煮出醬瓜的古味新吃法。還有以獨門醬汁、每日熬煮六至八小時的「黑金滷肉飯」。庶民的酒家菜，也是艋舺小王的手路菜，歡迎品嚐！。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 17-4, Huaxi St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

Grandpa, the master of the kitchen, made “melon and chicken soup,” and Dad turned it into “melon and pork soup!” The long-established winter melon pork bone soup, simmered with large bones, offers a delightful sweetness and a fragrant aroma. Pork hind leg meat is mixed with fish paste, freshly made and cooked to satisfy the palate.

One mouthful of gourd soup with meat paste, followed by a bowl of savory braised pork rice, and Wang’s Broth brings out the ancient flavor in a new way, earning praise from all who taste it. These street snacks at Huaxi Street Night Market have ascended to the Michelin guide, which serves the dishes of the common people, the home-cooked dishes of the Wang family in old Mengjia.

Two generations of Little Wangs join forces to welcome food enthusiasts to come and dine!

【Key points of transformation】

Elevating Huaxi Street’s Food Scene with an Upgraded Michelin-Recommended Snack Spot

Formerly known as “Wang’s Melon and Pork Clear Soup,” a 40-year-old establishment on Huaxi Street was renowned for its unique melon pork soup and earned Michelin’s recommendation in 2019. The old store faced issues with aging and water leakage. The second-generation owners, a husband and wife, aspired to enhance the brand’s image and revive the former glory of Huaxi Street.

The original name was too lengthy, and it has been revitalized and given a new name, “Wang’s Broth” along with the slogan “loved by those who have tasted it.” This transformation includes a new brand identity, spatial design, and stall decor that highlights the essence of the cuisine, the historical significance of the neighborhood, and its vibrant street life.

Following this transformation, the restaurant has become a must-visit spot for photography enthusiasts and food lovers on Huaxi Street, and it has encouraged other businesses in the area to follow suit.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區西寧南路101號
descriptionZh: 瑞格華-大海刀品自1997年以來，秉持著專業與誠信，以最合理的價格提供各式新穎優質的商品，並持續地網羅全世界不同類型的專業廠牌和高品質商品以供適合實用及合法收藏刀具。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 101, Xining S. Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Since its establishment in 1997, Ray Gue Hua has prided itself on its professionalism and integrity. Providing customers with the newest, highest-quality goods at reasonable prices, the store continually scours the globe looking for different professional brands and quality products for collectors and connoisseurs of knifeware.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區昆明街146號
descriptionZh:
八海國際長年鑽研餐飲，決定以「火鍋」讓客人自己調整食用風味。
用創意找出食材的新定律，在已知裡尋找未知，在平凡中創造感動，
透過實驗家精神來展現對食材的重視，鍋物的高溫來傳遞對食材的狂熱。期待能將每天都須吃飯這樣的必然，昇華成為心靈的滿足；在店內的空間設計上，也藏有小巧思，無論是一人隻身前往或與親朋好友聚餐，都能享有小確幸
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 146, Kunming St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan
descriptionEn: After many years of culinary research, Hakkai Shabu Shabu was founded on the premise of using "hot pot" as a medium for allowing guests to customize their meals. Innovating new concepts using food, finding the unknown in the known, and creating excitement from the ordinary, our spirit of experimentation emphasizes our focus on ingredients. The high temperatures of the hot pot conduct our passion into our food, and we hope that we can transform the mundane necessity of eating into satisfaction of the soul. Hidden throughout our interior decor are small intricacies; no matter whether you come alone or with friends and family, you are sure to be amused.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區昆明街113號
descriptionZh:
是由兩位堅持本業的職人，烘豆師王詩如（LuLuWang)以及
咖啡師侯珍微(WeiWeiHou)兩人合作創立。
時間與空間的軸線上，我們總是在探詢故事裡初衷，
如固咖啡的故事是從最初的種子而開始，
最後放進有溫度的杯子內，誘出飲者味覺裡的各種回憶，
成就一杯專屬的美。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 113, Kunming St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan
descriptionEn: This store was established by two craftspeople, roast master LuLuWang, and professional barista WeiWeiHou. Be it time or space, we always start from the beginning. If coffee were a story that starts with a seed, then it would end as a warm cup raised to the lips, bringing memories to the tip of one's tongue, and creating an allure only found in that cup.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區昆明街119號1-7樓
descriptionZh:
用記憶，留下回憶。
信，是最有溫度的文字。郵戳，是傳送思念的起點。

descriptionEn: Make a memory to be reminisced about. Trust; the word with the most warmth. A postmark; the starting point for saying "I miss you". Bypassing language, we use post parcels as a blueprint for conveying warmth to travelers the moment they walk in through our doors. What we want to express is not just words between people, but the genuine sincerity felt when sending and receiving, conveying to travelers the utmost warmth of remembrance.

descriptionEn:
Travellers always image the city before arrival.
Whether the streets of the night are gorgeous? If the markets are still crowed in rainy days? Is the first sunshine in foreign land warm and pleasant?

Caesar Metro is going to fulfill travelers’ imagination——
To explore the different view of the city that might not be found in the travel books or maps.

Caesar Metro, the place for travelers, come and start your journey from here.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區萬大路454號
descriptionZh:
老藥舖秘方良食，吃巧也吃補！
小麥發芽，糯米蒸炊，慢火熬出天然甜；
麥芽膏再加麥門冬與枇杷葉，燉梨最優選。
萬華在地三十年中藥行，益德堂兩代同心，
丹膏丸散代客煎製，取材天然中藥護持。
老藥舖的獨門智慧，化為生活的秘方良食，
堂德易讓你吃巧也吃補，輕鬆養身不吃苦。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 454, Wanda Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Tender Easy is an over three-decade-old Chinese herbal medicine shop in Wanhua District. Now run by the second generation, Tender Easy specializes not only in Chinese herbs, but also foods with medicinal properties. One example is maltose. The owner boils sprouted wheat and steamed glutinous rice over low heat to slowly bring out the natural sweetness of maltose. Added with dwarf lilyturf and loquat leaves, the maltose is the best ingredient for making tasty steamed pears.
The shop sells Chinese herbal medicine in the forms of pellet, paste, and powder. It also boils Chinese herbal medicine for customers, making boosting health with Chinese herbal medicine a breeze for customers.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區成都路65號2樓
descriptionZh:
不斷傳遞著「Live What you dream」生活信仰的貳拾陸巷，起初只是藝術家《張凡旋》想找個空間分享自己的作品，後來也邀請其他藝術家們參與展覽，每年參與台北藝穗節，讓舞台劇、現場劇或相聲、現代舞等表演藝術有更多機會可以接近民眾，《貳拾陸巷│Somebody Café》也會邀請戲劇、舞蹈或音樂創作者在這小小的舞台裡一起找到大夢想，就是希望每個人的夢想都可以成為生活的一部分，帶著夢想快樂生活。
在這裡，我們可以發現貳拾陸巷主人《張凡旋》風格鮮明的手稿畫作外，還有一系列傳達著童趣夢想的裝置和作品，《張凡旋》於2007年創作的作品超大學生桌椅、2008年不睡覺的貓頭鷹、2009年創作的白日夢搖搖雞、2010的蘑菇森林…等等，進入《貳拾陸巷│Somebody Café》你將發現，自己就像再次回到小孩子的視線去看世界，找回那份孩子般地勇敢作夢、容易滿足、容易開心的赤子之心。
一個由藝術家，用黑白線條意外延展出來的夢想花園，不只默默地展示自己播種、植栽的夢想，也希望，更多人可以在這裡找創意生活與開心夢想的種子、沃土，《貳拾陸巷│Somebody Café》想做的不只是創意生活的美好實踐，更想做的是「夢想的園丁」。
2015年搬遷至台北市成都路新址後，受限營業空間縮小，重新定位為插畫家分享自己生活創作的咖啡廳，除了小型作品展覽外，藝文同好分享創作。自2007年至今，已是不少文青觀光客造訪台北西門町的歇腳處。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 65, Chengdu Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Preaching the creed of “live what you dream,” Somebody Café started as a venue where artist Francis Chang shared her artworks with visitors. Later, she began to invite fellow artists to exhibit their creations here and participate in the Taipei Fringe Festival every year to bring performance art, such as stage play, crosstalk and modern dance, closer to the public. She also invited dramatists, dancers and composers to pursue big dreams in the small venue of Somebody Café, hoping that everyone could make their dreams a part of their life and live happily.
At Somebody Café, visitors will see the distinctive manual drawings and playful artworks created by Francis Chang, including a set of huge school desk and chair created in 2007, a night owl in 2008, a daydreaming rocking rooster in 2009, and the mushroom forest in 2010. At Somebody Café, visitors will find themselves once again able to see the world from the perspective of children who are brave to dream and easy to satisfy and please.
Somebody Café is a garden of dreams created by chance by an artist, who has not only sowed and grown her dreams, but also encouraged more people to plant the seeds of creative life and pleasant dreams in the fertile soil of art here. In addition to living a creative life through Somebody Café, Francis Chang aspires to be “a gardener of dreams.”
After it was moved to the current location on Chengdu Road, Taipei City, in 2015, Somebody Café is smaller in space and has therefore been redefined as a café where illustrators share their creations and small-scale exhibitions are held. Even so, since its establishment in Ximending in 2007, Somebody Café has become an attraction to countless young literature and art buffs.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區三水街62號
descriptionZh:
豐湃手作甲味鮮
─ 艋甲大豐 Da Fond Fishball

大船入港，送來大海的豐饒，
北漂的一家人，早年在基隆落腳，
阿公帶著13歲阿爸，旗魚丸一粒粒打出名號。
多年後，阿爸在萬華東三水市場安身起灶，
新鮮魚肉打漿捏丸，炸物厚工備料，
雙手從小練出握力，隨時出入零下20度C。
歷經悠悠歲月，鄭家三代職人精神傳接，
選料做工謹守阿公原汁原味，創新也不停歇。
萬華老味道甲味鮮，豐湃好丸，賞味趁鮮！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 62, Sanshui St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

As the big ship entered the harbor, it brought the abundance of the

sea. A family from the north, who had settled in Keelung in their early years, embarked on this journey. The grandfather, accompanied by his 13-year-old son, made a name for themselves by crafting every piece of fish ball with dedication. Years later, in the Dong San Shui Market of Wanhua, Taipei, the son found his place and started his own business. He ground fresh fish into a paste and meticulously prepared the ingredients for deep-fried treats, developing strong hands from a young age and braving the chilling sub-zero temperatures. Through the passing years, the spirit of craftsmanship was passed down through three generations of the Zheng family. They remain faithful to their grandfather’s original recipes while constantly innovating. The old flavors of Wanhua, fresh and abundant fish balls, are a true delight. Enjoy them while they’re fresh!

【Key points of transformation】

The market’s old fish ball stall transforms into a culinary and tourist highlight in Mengjia.

Formerly known as “Da Feng Fish Ball,” this 60-year-old establishment is situated in the East San Shui Street Market of Wanhua. The owner, also a member of the local vendors’ association, aspired to lead fellow market vendors through his own achievements. Due to the similarity of their trademark with that of other businesses and the lack of trademark usage rights, their brand expansion faced challenges.

Through a transformation, the brand has been repositioned as “Mengjia’s old skilled artisan fish ball shop,” emphasizing quality products and artisanal craftsmanship. They have embraced a new name, “The Fond Fishball,” along with the slogan, “Handcrafted Excellence.” Their stall, with its Japanese-style seafood shop theme, has been revamped to exude a warm ambiance. Combined with a dine-in area and hands-on experience opportunities, this transformation has turned the East San Shui Street Market into a culinary and tourist attraction in Mengjia.

nameZh: 川業肉圓( 原萬華新竹肉圓)
addressZh: 臺北市萬華區廣州街165號
descriptionZh:
西元1910年在新竹城隍廟旁(現新竹國雲停車場)開始掮挑扁擔創業販賣肉圓.貢丸湯.肉羹湯發跡營生，因當時艋舺發展正興盛，因而在北上深耕落腳
承業挑擔起家，兒子雲龍.雲輝龍山商場接棒
1984年，由三代明源接棒
1993年，龍山商場拆遷，暫時於三水街販售
2005年，新竹肉圓終於有了自己的店面，持續經營努力
2016年，第四代勁宏投入一同經營
2021年，傳承111年的老店轉型，賦予新的名字【川圓】
四代傳承，永保初心
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 165, Guangzhou St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108015, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

In 1910, next to the Hsinchu Chenghuang Temple, our ancestor Chen Chengye started his business by shouldering the burden and selling meatballs. Later, under the guidance of the Ling’an Zunwang of Hsinchu’s Qingshan Temple, our ancestors, along with our grandfather, moved the entire family to Mengjia. Here, they continued to receive the protection of Qingshan Temple’s divine presence.

The name “Hsinchu Meatballs” was chosen to honor their place of origin. They marinated fresh pork hind legs in red yeast sauce for a day and a night. Handcrafted and kneaded for flavor, the meatballs were rich and fragrant. They used sweet potato starch and five-grain rice to hand-make the chewy meatball skin. Adding Puli shiitake mushrooms and Chiayi bamboo shoots enhanced the texture and aroma. Deep-fried in medium heat, traditional red yeast sauce is drizzled over them.

From generation to generation, the Chen family has continued to make meatballs by hand every day.

Starting in Hsinchu and establishing roots in Mengjia, both places have been blessed by the Qingshan Wang. In 2021, we took one character from our ancestor’s name and renamed our business to “Chuan Ye Meatballs,” with the hope that our family’s century-old legacy will remain forever, and our delicious meatballs will continue to be enjoyed for generations to come.

【Key points of transformation】

The old meatball store deepens its heritage, and the green hills of both places have protected it for a hundred years.

Established in Hsinchu, a century-old brand of meatballs, owes its origins to the inspiration from the local Qing Shan (Green Hill) Temple. Generations before, the family moved to Wanhua. Last year (2021), the Hsinchu meatball store was renamed “Chuan Ye Meatballs,” and the store was renovated. This light transformation refines the brand’s core, positioning it as “Centennial Traditional Red Fermented Meatball” and using the slogan “Green Hills Remain, Deliciousness Flows Like a River” to focus on the connection between the brand and the Qing Shan Temple in Hsinchu and Mengjia (Wanhua). It includes adjusting the large wall paintings of the Mengjia Qing Shan King Festival inside the store and decorating the storefront and arcade to strengthen the memory and historical foundation of the hundred-year-old store.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區廣州街213號
descriptionZh:
中萬華第一間咖啡店，由一個老鎖匠斜槓看咖啡店而來，至今傳承兩代。自選自烘的精品咖啡，職人精神十六年未變。
我們致力用最平實的價格推廣真正好喝的精品咖啡，外帶也可以這麼精品！
讓咖啡成為你我美好的日常吧！
＊金杯獎最佳義式咖啡
＊全國杯測師挑戰賽季軍
＊SCAE認證烘豆師
＊SCA認證咖啡師、烘豆師
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 213, Guangzhou St. Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

Many years ago, in an era when coffee was not yet widespread, there was a locksmith in Wanhua who had a deep love for coffee. Frustrated by not being able to find the taste he desired after exploring Taipei, he decided to open a tiny 0.7 ping shop next to his key-cutting stand. There, he could make and sell the coffee he loved while also cutting keys for his customers.

For his coffee, he insisted on using high-quality beans. One cup at a time, the people in his neighborhood began to fall in love with this unique flavor. They frequented his shop daily, which led to the creation of an exclusive blend known as the “Alberto Blend.” Across from Longshan Temple, on Guangzhou Street’s Tingzaijiao, in 2005, the first coffee shop in the heart of Wanhua was established.

Later, the old locksmith wanted to retire, and his son and daughter-in-law took over. They, even more than their father, paid great attention to detail and studied under coffee masters, insisting on roasting their beans themselves. After nine days of careful calculation, they achieved the perfect and most exquisite coffee beans.

Nine Days Coffee expanded beyond Wanhua but retained its corner as a locksmith. The furniture for cutting keys is still there, and the beloved special blend, the “Alberto Blend,” remains rich and flavorful. There are more new flavors waiting for coffee enthusiasts to unlock and enjoy!

【Key points of transformation】

Nestled in Wanhua, the Coffee Nook of the Old Locksmith Takes Shape

Located under the colonnades of Guangzhou Street in Wanhua, Nine Days Coffee was founded by an old locksmith and has now been passed down to the second generation. Their in-house roasted coffee beans have garnered immense support from local customers. The original shop primarily focused on takeout, and in front of the store, they retained their key-cutting operation, creating a somewhat cluttered environment visually.

Through this transformation, the brand was positioned as “The Coffee Nook of the Old Locksmith,” with the slogan “Nine Days of Bean Cultivation, the Ultimate Flavor Lock.” This realigned the store, creating a coffee nook with a blend of urban charm and artistic sophistication that echoes the brand’s history and specialty in coffee bean roasting.

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區西藏路197之1號
descriptionZh:
慢研種製焙 細品真善美
── 八鼎匠茶Budding CraftsTea
寶島之南幽靜深山，茶園裡，沃土生機勃發，
海拔2千多公尺溪水灌溉孕養，
百年原生片岩古茶樹，浸染天地風華，萌芽吐芳。
燉茶手法以水蒸氣去除雜味，菁存純凈茶湯韻味。
獨門金屬炭焙爐高溫聚熱，龍眼木炭細火慢焙，
百年龍窯火燒製的原礦土茶壺，注水茶香迸飛。
極致完美的道地台灣好茶，需得用時間上下求索。
老茶人李兆杰窮盡畢生埋首鑽研，種茶製茶焙茶講茶，
從一間茶行，走進一座茶山，
土水木金火相生相偕，開創一條龍五行極茶新境界。
一頁台灣茶的活歷史，一口真善美的甘冽，
八鼎匠茶的純青爐火熊熊不歇~
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 197-1, Xizang Rd. Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Slow cultivation leads to refined taste 
- Budding CraftsTea

In the quiet and serene Taiwan mountains, the rich soil produces life in the tea plantation
At 2000 meter elevation, the river streams irrigate and cultivate. 
Century old indigenous tea trees absorb the essences of nature and sprouts. 
Our steam methods remove unwanted flavor from the tea, leaving only pure-tasting tea behind. 
The unique metal oven uses logan coal for the slow roasting. 
The tea pot produced from the century old snake kiln concentrates the tea fragrance. 
This is the perfect Taiwan tea that needs time to appreciate. 
The old tea master Li Chao-Chieh focuses on the cultivation, production, and appreciation of tea. 
From a tea shop to a tea mountain, 
All the elements come together to produce an all-in-one tea realm. 
A living history of Taiwan's tea and a mouthful of sweetness and fragrance. 
The fire at Budding Crafts Tea will never go out...

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區東園街68-4號
descriptionZh:
我們白天辦展覽、講座和工作坊，晚上才開門賣酒。
家吶子開在萬華老城區—加蚋仔的東園街上，「加蚋仔」位於臺北市萬華區西南側新店溪畔至南機場一帶 。「加蚋仔」由凱達格蘭族語gara音譯而來，意為沼澤地，店名即為音譯而來。因為從小在這裡長大，所以我們選擇回到家鄉開店。
家吶子串連很多當地店家，我們除了賣烤物、炸物外，也賣當地年輕人的滷味及闆娘國小同學家的甘蔗汁。食材取自在地，每晚上打烊後我們都會到鄰近的中央市場購買食材，飲品除了台灣的酒外，還有來至艋舺青草巷的青草茶。所有食物、飲品、酒品皆出至台灣，我們不賣清酒只賣台灣釀製的甜酒釀、生啤和梅酒，餐點也都以台灣口味為主。我們深愛著自己成長的土地，想利用在地酒食告訴大家「我們以台灣的土地為傲。」
家吶子屬於是社區型的居酒屋，我們樂於在社區裡和大家玩在一起，也希望可以繼續在自己的家好好的活下去。
我們也深信「唯有回家，才能真正幫助到自己生長的地方。」
無論你從哪裡來，歡迎你隨時回家喝一杯。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區內江街142號
descriptionZh:
古法精熬四季溫補 ── 惠安四神湯Favor Tonic Soup

萬華內江街上，一碗實惠安康的四神湯，藥膳的香氣從1965年飄散至今，遙記著創辦人的故鄉，以及張家三代相傳的情義肚腸。

三代相傳的疼惜顧念：
傳承了三代，惠安四神湯已由孫子張仕璟接手。這家店從阿公傳給爸爸再傳給他，充滿著仕璟的兒時回憶。惠安的四神湯，至今跟當年一樣，價格平實、料多大碗，而滋補身體的當歸及四神藥材，份量比例及熬煮製程，仍遵照著當年阿公的獨門配方。四神湯的配料食材，也是經專人專業收購本地電宰豬隻，絕非坊間進口內臟。仕璟從不忘阿公傳給爸爸的叮囑：要讓做出粗活的人吃得飽！店裡另一個招牌是以老麵發酵的古早肉包，多年來未漲價，仍是一個10元，客人們總是一碗四神湯，配上一個肉包，吃飽也吃巧。

2021年，一起投入「台北造起來」店家再造計畫，隨著店址搬遷，同步整裝文青風新店面。門口有張斑駁的大紅桌很是醒目，這可是阿公時代就有的，顧問建議保留，成為代代傳承的見證。而店裡，仍是那股撲鼻的藥膳香氣，連結著阿公的時空，以及三代不忘、對勞動者的疼惜之心，如同牆上的標語 ─ 情義肚腸，實惠安康。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 142, Neijiang St. Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Favor Tonic Soup, a shop found along Neijiang Street, Wanhua District, has been preparing hearty, medical herb aroma-filled Sishen soup since 1965. Located in the hometown of its founder, the shop has operated based on the same philosophy for three generations.

A shop spanning three generations:
Run by Shih-ching Chang, Favor Tonic Soup has been operating for three generations. A shop that was passed down by Chang’s father and grandfather, Favor Tonic Soup is a major part of Chang’s childhood memory. Just like when it first started, Favor Tonic Soup offers hearty, nourishing, reasonably priced Sishen soup containing dong quai and Sishen medicinal materials cooked using the unique recipe, methods, and ingredient ratios developed by Chang’s grandfather. The soup is made using electrically stunned and slaughtered local pigs (instead of imported pork) purchased professionally. Chang has not forgotten the words of his grandfather: make sure to fill the stomach of blue-collar workers! Also available at Favor Tonic Soup is sourdough-made baozi priced at NT$10, a price that has stayed the same since 1965. Customers regularly order a Sishen soup and a baozi for a satisfying and filling meal.

In support of the “Taipei Store Reengineering Project” in 2021, Favor Tonic Soup relocated to a new location and refurbished its storefront, evoking a hipster-like ambiance. A large motley red table that has been around since the time of Chang’s grandfather was kept at the suggestion of a consultant to serve as a proof of the shop’s long history. The aroma of medicinal herbs and appreciation for blue-collar workers remain to this day, as exemplified by the slogan on the shop wall: warm and hearty meals for all.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區西園路一段240號
descriptionZh:
「老地方新菜香，品咖啡烹夢想」 
生化實驗室的的女孩放下燒杯、脫下白袍， 
要為母親緣一個開咖啡廳的願望。
咖啡精挑莊園豆，餐點現點現做， 
一開18年的簡餐咖啡廳，換了味道。 
咖啡檯與小廚房充滿講究精確的實驗魂， 
只是拒用料理包，謝絕她比誰都懂的化學調料。 
牛肉紅燒，小火慢燉，鮮蔬就是提味配角。
鹹豬肉以中藥胡椒醃製特調， 細細煎烤，
鹹香鮮美是唯一的味道， 
全魚料理每日新鮮報道， 
破布子、檸檬、油炸？多變不怕客人嘴刁。
 主廚家珍的熱情與手藝，牆上的古董與畫作， 
老地方、老位子、新菜色，等著藝文同好與老饕。 
一杯”燒燒”的咖啡端上，家的珍味正香， 
要不試試咖啡DIY?來場咖啡藝廚的創意狂想！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 240, Sec. 1, Xiyuan Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
"Old place, new store; savor coffee while brewing up a dream"

The owner is a biolab girl who has put down her beaker and taken off her white robe to fulfill her mom's dream of opening a coffee shop. Specially selected plantation beans and freshly made dishes, a simple coffee shop that have been around for 18 years has now changed flavors. The coffee bar and kitchen are now filled with precise experimental spirit. The cafe does not use any read-to-eat packages or chemical flavoring that she knows so well... The braised beef is slowly cooked over low heat, and the only accompaniments are fresh vegetables. The salty pork is marinated with Chinese herbs and black pepper, then carefully fried, and the only flavor is its salty savoriness. The fish is brought in fresh daily.  Cordia dichotoma, lemons, deep fried? The varied menu gives customers a wide range of choices. The chef is enthusiastic and skilled, and the walls are filled with paintings and antiques. Old place, new seats, and new dishes, just waiting for those who enjoy art and good food. Have a cup of "hot" coffee and taste the flavor of home. Want to try some coffee DIY? Come and try some crazy coffee and kitchen innovation!

descriptionZh:
關於玉如阿姨
玉如阿姨：「看見客人穿上適合內衣時的喜悅，是我最大的快樂與鼓勵。」
玉如阿姨投入內衣事業至今已經超過２０年，秉持著對待客戶如同家人般，以最親切、熱情的態度服務每一位到來的客戶。玉如阿姨內衣堅持ＭＩＴ台灣製造，我們擁有不輸專櫃的優秀品質與專業剪裁，了解並傾聽客戶需求，以２０年的內衣經驗，推出兼具機能以及美觀的新一代調整型內衣。

addressZh: 臺北市萬華區康定路172巷2號
descriptionZh:
【七十餘年的堅持】
協興蛋業創立於民國38年，是全台灣最老字號的蛋業公司。我們經營七十餘年以來，以最專業的經驗與態度挑選全台灣北中南各地特色雞(鴨)場，精選品質最佳之各式雞蛋、鴨蛋，使消費者吃的美味、吃的安心。

創始老闆常常說：『開店最重要是良心與誠信，今天你的產品料好實在，客人自然會聞名而來。』
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Ln. 172, Kangding Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

In 1949, in Taipei’s Wanhua Jixing Market, my grandfather ran a business selling eggs in a Japanese-style wooden house at the end of the alley. During the nights, he would sleep in a small attic, and the faint light of day would filter in through the small wooden windows. In a time of scarcity, eggs were the most precious source of nutrition. The first time experiencing the satisfaction and joy of eating eggs, my grandfather always cherished and remembered that moment, wanting to share it with everyone.

High-quality eggs were carefully selected from chicken farms all over Taiwan, a lifelong dedication. Many years later, their grandson, raised by my grandparents, returned home armed with a background in chemistry, dedicated himself to safeguarding and expanding the family business. They pioneered the practice of testing and established a traceable product history. They collaborated with local farms on chicken breeding and feed selection.

Red-yolk eggs, eggs from silky chickens, salted eggs, and century eggs, each eggshell and yolk depicting the natural colors of chicken eggs. Each egg is carefully packed in thick paper bags from my grandfather’s era. The tradition passed down from generation to generation, with the family diligently selecting and hatching, ensuring that the eggs shine brightly every day!

【Key points of transformation】

The old egg store hatches a new beginning, experiencing the vibrant joy of egg life.

Originally known as “Xie Xing Egg Store,” it has stood for over 70 years in the Jixing Market of Wanhua. The store cooperates with chicken farms across Taiwan to select and sell fresh egg products. Through a minor makeover and a name change to “Xie Xing Egg House - Sure Thing,” they have elevated their brand positioning to “Hatching Good Eggs for Seventy Years,” reinforcing their dedication to the traditional egg business. The slogan, “Feel the Joy of Egg Life Every Day!” warmly beckons consumers.

They have also introduced the exclusive keyword “The Study of Egg Colors” to educate consumers about the professionalism and dedication behind natural egg colors. They have reorganized their store based on this concept, where nostalgia meets vibrancy, attracting a younger generation of customers.

addressZh: 108台北市萬華區廣州街77號
descriptionZh:
蔴油木子（原 蔴油李 康定路麻油雞）去燥煨香，解饞滋養

招牌商品：黑羽麻油雞、清燉雪蓮子豬腳、當歸豬腳。不同於其他店家爆炒逼出香氣。蔴油木子以歷經慢煮、冰鎮的黑羽土雞肉，放入麻油雞高湯慢煨出香氣，麻油香和著酒香，氣味溫和不躁進，美味的老式台味，不僅解饞更養生。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 77, Guangzhou St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn:
Lee's Dishes (originally called Mayouli's Kangding Road sesame chicken) provides both great flavor and nourishment without being overwhelming.

Signature dishes: chicken braised with sesame oil, pig's feet braised with lotus seeds, and pig's feet braised with angelica. Different from other shops where ingredients are sautéed to produce fragrance, Lee's Dishes uses slow cooked and iced chicken with sesame chicken stock to produce our signature dish that is flavorful but not overwhelming. The delicious classic not only fills you up, but is also good for you.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區中華路一段144-1號
descriptionZh:
現採現醃，天然酸甘鹹樹頭，楊桃正鮮，艷陽下的屏東果園，顆顆碩大豐美。
果子完好新鮮是美味關鍵，契作果農小心以手採收，不用機器搖果，現場洗淨入甕，歷時3個月醃漬入味。

鄭家兩代人的堅持與心血，化成西門町最沁心的懷念。
古法醃製的楊桃、鳳梨與李塩，和著酸鹹甜湯，清涼颯爽齒間！
從成都路到中華路，西門町一甲子的酸甘鹹，封存老台北青春歲月，一口回到少年~
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 144-1, Sec. 1, Zhonghua Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Freshly picked and pickled to produce the natural sweet, sour, and salty taste. Right now is the season for star fruit, and the beautiful and large fruits are shining under the Pingtung sun. 


The key to great taste is fresh, undamaged fruit. The contract farmers carefully hand-pick the fruits without machinery. The fruits are then cleaned on-site and placed in containers to be pickled for three months. 
Two generations of hard work by the Cheng family has transformed the shop into something remembered by customers in Ximending.
Star fruit, pineapple, and plums pickled with traditional methods, as well as the sour, sweet, and salty soup, create a refreshing taste! 
From Chengdu Rd. to Zhonghua Rd., 60 years of sweet, sour, and salty taste in Ximending takes you back to your youth and when Taipei was young~

descriptionEn: Astoria was founded in 1949 by Mr. Archiybold Chien and five Russian immigrants who fled to Taiwan and offer a nostalgic European setting. In its earlier times, Astoria offered Russian cuisine and coffee, offering an exotic taste that attracted many patrons from Taipei. Cafe Astoria later became a literary salon for near modern Taiwan. Renowned writers and cultural personalities such as Sanmao, Pai Hsien-yung, Huang Chunming, Lin Hwai-min, and Chen Yingzhen also became famous patrons, and could muse about various subjects over a cup of coffee for an entire day. Astoria is where many moving literary works and stars are born. The borscht offered by Astoria is a popular favorite for many patrons. Astoria also offers Russian soft candy and walnut cakes, reputedly the favorite choice of Mdm. Faina Chiang Fang-liang, that should not be missed.
