addressZh: 臺北市中正區衡陽路60號1樓
descriptionZh:
「Jolly Brewery + Restaurant」
是目前國內唯一將「泰食」與「手工釀啤酒 (Craft beer)」二者完美結合的餐廳，裝潢設計採取後現代主義的精神，呈現出簡約的設計風格，讓消費者能在寬敞、溫馨、舒適的環境用餐，輔以柔和的燈光、時尚的音樂，為嶄新的新概念型態餐廳。
Jolly在「泰食」方面針對「酸」與「辣」及「東南亞貫用的辛香料」特性做了重新的詮釋，將傳統味覺與創新手法相容並濟，開創新口感。例如檸檬清蒸魚採去頭去尾的做法及JOLLY蝦餅與一般傳統蝦餅造型不同，採切長條入鍋炸，炸出來就像薯條一樣，更是少見。
Jolly在「手工釀啤酒 (Craft beer)」方面，特別斥資將歐、美風行的啤酒釀造工藝技術引進台灣，並有國外専業認証的釀酒師釀製，堅持Craft beer精神-真正自然健康，只用100%麥芽釀製，不添加任何化學物質，也不經過過濾、熱處理等程序，故保有豐富的啤酒酵母、礦物質、維他命、蛋白質。原始與傳統的極緻表現，讓啤酒不再只是單純可以搭配各國佳餚的液體麵包，更是餐桌上一道色、香、味具全的個性佳餚 。
當酸辣美味的「泰食」遇上口感細膩的「手工釀啤酒」，讓這一熱一冷的交織作用帶你進入細膩與獨特的Jolly世界。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 60, Hengyang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Jolly Brewery + Restaurant is the only restaurant in Taiwan that brings Thai cuisine and craft beer perfectly together featuring a post-modern minimalistic decor, plus soft lighting and trendy music, so that diners can enjoy their meals in a spacious, cosy, comfy environment. Jolly's is an embodiment of a brand new restaurant concept.
　Jolly's takes what makes Thai cuisine special (sour and spicy) and puts a new spin on it, adding spices that are commonly used in Southeast Asia. Approach traditional dishes with innovation, and you get brand new flavors, for instance, fish steamed with lemon grass without the head or the tail, and prawn crackers fried in slices like french fries, different from the traditional prawn crackers, rarely seen elsewhere.
For its craft beer, Jolly's has spent a fortune introducing to Taiwan the beer brewing techniques popular in the US and Europe. Its internationally certified brewer upholds the ethos of craft beer: natural and healthy, using only 100% malt with no chemical additives bypassing sieving and heat treatment procedures so as to retain the rich nutrients, e.g. beer yeast, minerals, minerals and protein. Jolly's craft beer has pushed the primitive and the traditional to a new height in that beer is no longer merely the liquid bread only to accompany ethnic delicacies but also a dish in its own right pleasing to all senses.
　Come and enjoy the sour and spicy Thai cuisine together with our craft beer. This refined, unique culinary experience at Jolly's is out of this world.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區南昌路二段67號
descriptionZh:
居家面目，隨心擺佈 ─ 我舍方Selfurnishing

不靠設計師，為自己佈置一個家
擺脫各種風格的框架，不被系統櫃綁架
日式屏風可不可以搭配北歐沙發？
金屬與木頭怎樣組合才不浮誇？
小小角落想要來個光影游移的下午茶？
晨光早餐、挑燈夜戰、親友小聚、練字吃飯…，
一套桌椅如何實現各種願望？
出自木匠世家的我舍方不止賣家具，更賣你要的居家。
空間是硬的，生活是軟的，傢俱是活的。
量身諮詢、配搭細膩，風格就是你自己。
想要甚麼樣的坐臥起居，讓我舍方助你一輩之力！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.67, Sec. 2, Nanchang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Let your heart decide the look of your home. Selfurnishing does not rely on designers. Decorate your own home and break through the boxes set up by various styles; don't be restricted by system furniture. Can Japanese folding screens match Nordic sofas? How can metal and wood be combined in a way that isn't overly ostentatious? How about an afternoon tea at the little corner with flitting lights and shadows? Breakfast in the morning sunlight; working late at night; small gatherings with friends and family; writing practice; eating. How can a set of table and chairs make various wishes come true? Established by a family of carpenters, Selfurnishing does not just sell furniture, it sells the furniture you desire. A space is fixed; life is malleable; and furniture is alive. Consultations are personalized and matchings are done with attention to detail. The "style" is the household lifestyle you want. Let Selfurnishing lend you a hand!

nameZh: 和逸飯店 台北忠孝館
addressZh: 臺北市中正區忠孝東路一段31號
descriptionZh:
和逸飯店．台北忠孝館，距離捷運善導寺站6號出口僅1分鐘，位處台北車站商圈精華地段，四周呈現新舊交織的都會風貌。飯店與時尚星巴克典藏門市為鄰，對面則是人潮絡繹不絕的半百老字號「阜杭豆漿」，沿著忠孝東路漫步即達充滿藝文氣息的「華山1914文化創意產業園區」和台北的秋葉原「光華數位新天地」，適合喜愛深度旅遊的旅客探索。
和逸飯店在軟硬體規劃上皆以「時時體貼，處處合意」為出發點，以適切的溫度，提供具親和力但不叨擾的服務品質。暖色調的裝潢、大量原木傢俱與石材建築，明亮採光與淡淡香氛營造舒心放鬆的空間，洗滌旅客疲憊的身心。
和逸飯店較大型飯店少了一點拘謹，比商務飯店則多了一份溫暖，期望為忙於業務拜訪的商務人士，或是結束一整天城市探索的休閒旅客，提供一個讓旅客卸下心防、鬆脫領帶與高跟鞋的自在空間。讓您彷彿身處都會鬧區中的綠洲，在服務、客房、餐飲環境、交通上都合您心意。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.31, Sec. 1, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
HOTEL COZZI, Zhongxiao TAIPEI is merely one minute away from exit no. 6 of MRT Shandao Temple Station. Located in prime Taipei Station shopping district, the hotel is surrounded by an urban landscape where old meets new. Situated adjacent to the chic Starbucks Reserve store, across the road from the bustling half-century old store “Fu Hang Soy Milk”, the hotel is merely a stroll away from the cradle of culture and arts “Huashan 1914 Creative Park” and “Guanghua Digital Plaza”--Taipei’s Akihabara along Zhongxiao E. Rd., perfect for tourists looking for a more in-depth travel experience.
HOTEL COZZI’s software and hardware design are both inspired by the concept of “Attentive Service to Meet Your Every Need” to provide guests with warm, friendly, and hassle-free service quality. The warm interior colors, wooden furniture and stone architectural materials are complemented by bright lighting and mild fragrance to create a cozy, relaxing space that will pamper the guests and alleviate their exhaustion.
HOTEL COZZI does away with the formalities of large hotels and offers more friendliness compared to business hotels, hoping to offer business travelers conducting sales visits or tourists who have just finished exploring the city for the whole day with a comfortable place to kick back, unwind and rest. Like an oasis in the bustling concrete jungle, you will be pleased with the hotel’s service, guest rooms, food services, environment, and transportation.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區忠孝東路一段150號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 150, Sec. 1, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區南昌路一段70號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

nameZh: 黑橋牌-微風台北車站專櫃
addressZh:
臺北市中正區北平西路3號B1
(微風廣場臺北車站B1西區)
descriptionZh:
黑橋牌食品於1957年成立，因率先將舊時台灣市面上乾鹹的廣式臘腸，改良為現今甜潤多汁的台灣風味，獨創的香腸滋味在台灣炮而紅，成立至今已超過六十年，每逢年節皆可看見店舖大排長龍的搶購盛況，不僅開創台灣香腸的美食傳奇，更奠定現今台灣香腸第一品牌的口碑。
店內除了販售十多種款式的香腸，更提供多種口味的豬肉乾、牛肉乾、手炒肉酥等美味肉品，全部都是來台必買的美食。近年推出的脆片肉乾、條子肉乾、肉酥餅乾等廣受年輕顧客喜愛，也成為黑橋牌暢銷人氣商品。
黑橋牌門市多次接獲海內外媒體採訪，香港美食家蔡瀾也曾率團到店選購，黑豬肉香腸、黑豬肉乾、香腸肉包是招牌推薦品，店內並提供鳳梨酥、綠豆糕等各式台灣特產，是來台必訪的特產名店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 3, Beiping W. Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Innovative local "good taste" passed on for a century!
"Yun" means me and us in Taiwanese,
and meat curd is the traditional delicacy that is representative of Taiwan.
Zhongzheng Meat Shop has carefully operated the dried meat production process
to "refine" the tradition delicacy,
and to deliver Taiwan's traditional meat curd into everyone's hearts
to become the best local brand in Taiwan.
That is why our name is "Yunye Meat Curd!"
At Yunye Meat Curd, we use creativity to inspire determination and possibilities,
and produces meat curd with a different attitude
to enhance the richness of the taste!

addressZh: 臺北市中正區市民大道三段2號B2
descriptionZh: 百八魚場緣起2009年，誓言顛覆傳統日本料理的刻板印象，秉持親民價格仍能享有美味料理的理念而創立，價格高貴但不貴，名為「百八魚場」，以其傳遞理念不變的心意。而新改裝完成的三創店以素雅質樸的米色調打造，充滿濃濃的日式風格讓顧客能在優雅的環境中用餐，賓至如歸享受高CP值的美味料理。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 6F., No. 2, Sec. 3, Civic Blvd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: SYNTREND GBT is a distributor and agent for Japanese and imported toys, railway modeling, gifts, and other merchandise. We have direct sales storefronts at various SOGO department stores and use various channels to provide consumers with the latest Japanese toys for toy lovers of all age ranges.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區懷寧街92-2號
descriptionZh:
座落在二二八和平公園旁邊，距離捷運臺大醫院站步行三分鐘。
房型有別於一般青年旅店，擁有完全的個人空間：
獨特的上下舖床型，每間房內附有衛浴設備。

一樓大廳公共區域
工業斑駁設計，搭配手繪塗鴉黑板牆，有著獨特的現代感卻又不失活潑的風格。
附有家用廚房設備、自助洗衣機、烘衣機，
餐桌提供免費取用的小點心、咖啡、茶包等；
一樓吧檯桌前設置一面未來信箱花牆，
不只幫各國旅客們寄出明信片，也可以指定月份寄給未來的自己；
此外旅遊最不可或缺的就是伴手禮!
台北天晴旅店集結在地商家，在每間房內提供一盒迎賓小禮，
除了鳳梨酥、果乾、梅糖、茶包等伴手禮，還有當地店家及餐廳的體驗優惠券! 
不只讓旅客們品嚐台灣最道地伴手禮的美味，更能體驗在地文化!

台灣最美麗的風景是-人，
台北天晴旅店最注重的是-情，
讓旅客們懷念難忘的是台灣美食的-味!
歡迎大家走進台灣、停歇台北、入住天晴!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.92-2, Huaining St., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
It is located beside the 228 Peace Park and a three-minute walk from the MRT National Taiwan University Hospital Station. The room is different from the general youth hotel, which has complete private personal space with bathroom in it.

The lobby design with Industrial mottled style, hand-painted graffiti blackboard wall, unique modern style. It also comes with kitchen, self-service washing machine, dryer. The table provides free snacks, coffee, tea bags, etc.

On the first floor it has a future letter box wall in front of the bar, you can send postcards to yourself, or send them in the designated month.

Taipei Sunny Hostel offers a free welcome pack of Taiwan Local Cultural products in each room, such as pineapple cakes, dried fruit, plum sugar, tea bags and coupons for local stores and restaurants. Hope you can taste the delicious Taiwan products, and experience the local culture.

The most beautiful things here in Taiwan is people, Taipei Sunny Hostel concerned about customers’ feeling, and your unforgettable taste of Taiwanese cuisine! Welcome to Taiwan, Stay in Taipei and Taipei Sunny Hostel!

addressZh: 臺北市中正區南昌路一段33號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 33, Sec. 1, Nanchang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區漢口街一段86號
descriptionZh: 峰圃茶莊創立於1883年，是台北第七家茶葉店。峰圃茶莊堅持峰圃家訓【貨真價實、童叟無欺】的經營理念及誠懇的態度招待每一位來訪的客戶，讓許多來自海內外的客人印象深刻，不但持續來店購買茶葉，還介紹給其他朋友，讓老店的名號享譽海外，並在台北城內永續經營、屹立不搖。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 86, Sec. 1, Hankou St., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Established in 1883, Feng Pu Tea Shop is the 7th tea shop in Taipei. Adhering to its business philosophy "to offer genuine products that does not deceive the old nor the young", Feng Pu Tea House treats every customer who visits the shop with a sincere attitude. This leaves a deep impression on customers from Taiwan and overseas. They not only continue to come to the tea shop to buy tea leaves, but also introduce the shop to their friends, spreading the reputation of the old shop to overseas. Strongly and steadily, the shop operates sustainably in Taipei City.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區衡陽路58號
descriptionZh:
1949年，時任第九茶區廠長的全祥第二代傳人 林火樹先生 建立了台北‧【全祥茶莊股份有限公司】，是【最早】經營兩岸茶葉貿易的茶莊。作為台灣製茶界的標竿，台北‧全祥茶莊的香片、龍井以及高山烏龍茶是台灣各個時期政要的心頭好，也是作為台灣的一張名片.餽贈給各國友人的首選茶。蔣氏家族就是全祥茶的愛好者，蔣宋美齡女士還在台灣時最喜歡的茶便是台北‧全祥茶莊的御品香片，她當時使用過的以木片製作的全祥茶罐現今仍收藏在婦工會的文物資料館裡。
時著時代的變遷，台北‧【全祥茶莊仍保持著高品質產地及傳統的製茶工藝】，向世界各地的消費者提供最台灣的產品，最道地的味道。並以新經營的精神，致力於產品創新、通路創新及組織創新，除了將商品以茶為核心向各類型食品發展。茶是天然、和平的飲料。創造健康的社會將是台北‧全祥永遠追求的目標。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 58, Hengyang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
In 1949, the second-generation successor Huo-Shu Lin, then Director of the ninth tea area, founded Taipei [Chuan Hsiang Export Co., Ltd.], the [first] tea shop to have ever conducted cross-strait tea trade. As the benchmark of the tea industry, Taipei Chuan Hsiang's scented tea, Longjing green tea and high-mountain oolong tea have been favored by political leaders of various periods as the name card for Taiwan, and as the top selections of tea for international friends as gifts. The Chiang family loved Chuan Hsiang's tea. Madame Chiang Kai-shek's favorite was the top-class scented tea of Taipei Chuan Hsiang when she was in Taiwan. The tea can that she used, which was made of wood chips, at that time is still well preserved in the Cultural Artifacts Exhibition Hall of the Women's Working Committee.

As time changes, Taipei [Chuan Hsiang has maintained its high quality traditional tea-making craft and places of origin] to provide customers worldwide with the most authentic Taiwanese products. With a new business spirit, Chuan Hsiang is dedicated to innovating products, creating new sales channels as well as organizations, and using tea as the core to develop a variety of food products. Tea is a natural and peaceful drink. To create a healthy society will always be the goal of Taipei Chuan Hsiang.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區博愛路90號
descriptionZh:
提到西服，最具代表性的莫過於成立百年的「湯姆西服」。上海師傅的手藝受到台灣歷任總統的喜愛，於是「歷任總統西服設計名店」的美名不逕而走。
TOM不僅時時關注西服樣式潮流的發展，也常設計出時尚年輕的款式，令新世代眼睛為之一亮，費用也很平民化。 不少年輕人的第一套西裝都找上TOM 量身訂做，不論身材如何，老師傅的手藝，都能縫製出尊貴不失流行的西服，穿上它即能展現品味風範。 走一趟台北市博愛路的湯姆西服店，為你的形象儀表加分。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 90, Bo’ai Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
When it comes to suits, no tailor’s shop is more iconic than the century-old Tom Tailor. As exquisite craftsmanship of master tailors from Shanghai.has been loved by successive presidents of Taiwan, Tom Tailor is also known as “the Designer Suit Shop for Successive Presidents.”

Constantly keeping an eye on the latest fashion style and trend of suits, Tom Tailor often creates young and chic designs that catch the eyes of new generations and that are reasonably-priced for the general public. Quite a few young people have their first suit tailor-made in Tom Tailor. Regardless of shapes and sizes, the skillful master tailors are able sew prestigious and trendy suits for you to wear with taste and style. Visit Tom Tailor on Bo'ai Rd., Taipei City, and have your image enhanced!

addressZh: 臺北市中正區武昌街一段65號2樓
descriptionZh: 本店自1947年成立以來，秉持天然完美，研發各式冰淇淋以滿足顧客，現有73種獨家口味，包括鹹的、酒做的、茶的冰淇淋等。敬請蒞臨指教！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 65, Sec. 1, Wuchang St., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Since its establishment in 1947, Snow King Ice Cream has been developing different kinds of ice cream with natural ingredients and reaching perfection. It now boasts 73 distinctive flavors, including salty, wine, and tea flavors. We sincerely welcome your patronage.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區開封街一段71號
descriptionZh:
交通便利、購物可購物可享1小時免費停車

四十年老店

提供相機 攝影機及周邊器材販售

傳統底片沖洗 沖印及掃描
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 71, Sec. 1, Kaifeng St., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
Easy access to the store; one-hour free parking for those who have shopped in the store
An old shop with four decades of history, it sells cameras, video cameras and other accessories, while providing services such as developing traditional film, printing, and scanning photos.

nameZh:
萬佳國際有限公司
萬佳國際攝影器材
addressZh: 臺北市中正區漢口街一段85號之3
descriptionZh: 我們是CANON跟NIKON特約經銷商，專門販售CANON、NIKON的原廠相機跟鏡頭，同時也販售單眼相機的周邊配件；SIGMA專業鏡頭；B+W、MARUMI的專業鏡片；Manfrotto大廠牌的腳架跟相機包，提供特惠的價格與完整的服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 85-2, Sec. 1, Hankou St., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan
descriptionEn: We are the contracted dealer of CANON and NIKON that mainly sell cameras and lenses from CANON and NIKON. We also provide complete services and products at discount prices, including accessories for single-lens reflex cameras, professional lenses from SIGMA, professional lens filters from B+W and MARUMI, tripods and camera bags from Manfrotto and other major brands.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區中華路一段3號
descriptionZh:
世民酒店以「價格合理的奢華旅宿體驗」為理念，並歡迎目光敏銳、

尋找嶄新飯店體驗的新世代國際旅客入住。

位於核心地帶的我們期望提供時下旅客奢華享受、時尚設計、先進的智能設備、以及柔軟舒適的枕頭，並以合理的價格獲得舒適的入住體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.3, Sec. 1, Zhonghua Rd. Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100005 Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: With 267 smart, luxury-filled rooms overlooking the historical North Gate or River with Fireworks, this central, well-connected Taipei hotel is the new best friend of savvy shoppers, cultural hoppers, and business rockers.

nameZh: 正陽照相器材有限公司
addressZh: 臺北市中正區漢口街一段92號
descriptionZh:
價格公道、服務親切、專業知識、

物品齊全。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 92, Sec. 1, Hankou St., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan
descriptionEn: The shop offers reasonable prices, friendly services, expertise, and a complete selection of goods.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區林森北路1號1樓

We sell men’s and women’s suits and offer customization of shirts. In light of the quality of our handmade products, which are made of imported fabrics of the highest quality and tailored with perfect precision, and our comprehensive post-sales services, we are confident to say that we can serve as your trust-worthy fashion counselor!

 客人從台北車站步行至瘋台北青旅僅需10分鐘，而台北車站四通八建，可由此轉乘台北捷運、桃園機場捷運、客運、火車及高鐵。青旅距離臺松山機場20分鐘車程，距離臺灣桃園機場則為40分鐘車程。青旅設有女性專屬宿舍房。每個床位均提供床單、寢具、置物櫃和個人床簾。
 房内設有共用衛浴和廁所。設有共用廚房和共用休息室。櫃台提供行李寄存服務。亦設有飲料自動販賣機和洗衣間。
 鄰近區城更有豐富多樣的道地餐飲可供選揮。

addressEn: 2F, No. 21, Yanping S. Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100001, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Fun Inn Taipei is not only a hostel for you to stay for nights but also a place that you can create sweet memories. Where you’ve been to, what sightseeing you’ve done is not the only important thing while traveling, who you meet and what happens are even more priceless and precious. 

Our lounge is a great place for you to enjoy yourselves or interact with other travelers, share your own traveling stories and listen to others’. You can find a kitchen, dining area, cozy sofas, big-screen TV, board games, and etc. (Find more facilities: http://www.funinn.com.tw/album_d.php?lang=en&tb=1&id=10) 

Located in the heart of Taipei, super convenient transportation. 5-13 minutes away from Ximen MRT station, Taipei Main Station and Taoyuan Airport Metro Station ON FOOT! Trains, buses, MRT, High Speed Railway are all reachable. 

3 minutes away from Ximending (shopping area & night market), close to Taipei Old North Gate and Ximen Red House historic sites. Comfortable walking distance to Bopiliao Ancient Street and other sightseeing spots in Taipei. 

Feel free to contact us cause our staffs are friendly and lovely!

nameEn: XIAO YIN TEA HOUSE - Dongmen Store
addressEn: No. 12-1, Lane 143, Section 1, Hangzhou S Rd, Zhongzheng District Taipei City
descriptionEn:
The reflection of a pot reveals the mountains from which tea leaves are collected.
Xiao Yin Tea House is located in cities but gathers resources from nature.
Urban residents are saved from the constant changes of the four seasons. 
Xiao Yin Tea House uses tea as a medium to transmit ideas, enabling urban residents to experience the beauty of mountains and forests, and tea fragrance to fill all the corners of a city.
Xiao Yin Tea House travels deep into mountains and forests to carefully select the best tea varieties, using their fragrance to distract people from their worries and enable them to return to their true selves. Such "magic" imbues the tea varieties with a sense of warmth.
Xiao Yin Tea House also upholds the aforementioned "magic," where it uses tea as a mirror to reflect its heart, and allows the mind, body, and spirit to be one with the natural qualities of tea.

nameZh: 立川黃金鍋 衡陽店
addressZh: 臺北市中正區衡陽路88、90號
descriptionZh:
花蓮壽豐地層含有豐富20種以上微量礦物元素如硒、鉻、鍺、鈣、鎂、磷和鋅等，全球黃金蜆唯一生產原廠立川便座落於此；因得天獨厚的自然環境，成為世界唯一大規模生產黃金蜆的養殖區。並於1989年由立川將其命名為『黃金蜆』。 
鑒於現代人對於舌尖上的挑剔，立川更重視食材的品質，結合集團內五星級的無毒養殖、六星級產業的有機食材與立川三寶，於2018年創立別具特色風味，不但能滿足口舌味蕾，更是健康無負擔的『立川黃金鍋』餐飲品牌。 從傳統養殖小農到世界唯一的榮耀，農漁養殖隨著生物科技不斷突破升級，立川集團秉持「如魚得水」永續經營理念，要讓每位時刻都能安心享用高品質食材與服務。 
立川集團證明台灣農漁業的黃金奇蹟，除了讓更多民眾認識台灣養殖業的過去、現在與未來，更因美食讓我們感動於這片肥沃的福爾摩沙，創造出舌尖上回味無窮的美味風貌。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Li Chuan Golden Hotpot - Hengyang store
addressEn: No. 88, 90 , Hengyang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Hualien's Shoufeng geology contains over 20 varieties of trace mineral elements, such as selenium, chromium, germanium, calcium, magnesium, phosphorus, and zinc. That is why Li Chuan, the world's only golden clam grower is located here. The unique natural environment makes the world's only large-scale golden clam cultivation possible. In 1989, Li Chuan named this clam species the "golden clam."

To meet the needs of modern people with picky tastes,  Li Chuan has placed great importance on food quality. In 2018, the group combined five-star non-toxic cultivation with the six-star organic food industry and Li Chuan Shanbao to create unique flavors. The Li Chuan Golden Hotpot not only can satisfy your taste buds, but is also a healthy and burden-free food brand. Going from a small traditional aquaculture farmer to the one and only in the world, we have continued to break through biotechnology limits and made improvements. With "fish in water" sustainable management concept, the Li Chuan Group wants to provide everyone with safe and high-quality food service at all times.

The Li Chuan Group proved that Taiwan's aquaculture can achieve miracles. We not only have shown the people the past, present, and future of aquaculture, but also created incredibly rich tastes inspired by our land, Formosa.

descriptionEn: Woo's Frog eggs, founded in 1978, is the first Frog Spawn Pearl Milk Tea in Taiwan and has lived up to its 38-year reputation. The most popular offerings of Woo's Frog Spawn are: brown sugar pearls and milk, aiyu (fig) jelly lemon, freshly squeezed juice, and papaya milk. Our brown sugar is prepared using Taiwan’s unique health-positive produce, and provides an exceptionally smooth and delicious drink when combined with our unique pearl blend recipe. Aiyu is a jelly prepared using a wild fig variety that is local to Taiwan. The seeds are washed so that its pectins infiltrate the water to create a jelly. Aiyu jelly is extremely helpful for maintaining a healthy skin and complexion.

The Hsin Tung Yang Dayeh-Takashimaya Branch is located on B1F in the Daye-Takashimaya mall, at the intersection of Zhongchen Road and Shidong Road in Tianmu. Daye-Takashimaya has the first aquarium inside a shopping mall in Taiwan. The aquarium is located on B1F, and periodically fed. There are also two spiral escalators rarely seen in Taiwan.
The store primarily sells a variety of Hsin Tung Yang brand flossy pork, dried meat, pastries, pineapple cakes, casual snacks, and different local specialty products of Taiwan. The store also offers various imported Japanese/Korean products.
The corporate objective of Hsin Tung Yang is to refine Chinese cuisines with the international spirit benchmark. Our local operations adhere to the four key principles of integrity, dependability, activeness, and innovation to create the corporate image of "No. 1 specialty brand in Taiwan for must buy in items and perfect souvenirs to take overseas" and bring high quality shopping experiences to the consumers.
2010 Annual Taiwan Food Consumption Survey Statistics Report: Hsin Tung Yang flossy pork, dried meat, and meat sauce series products are often listed as the No. 1 consumption brand; which gives it the reputation of "meat kingdom."
Won the 2011 Taiwan Top 100 Brands honor
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop, and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

descriptionZh: 轉進仰德大道旁的小巷裡，映入眼簾的是巷陌的濃蔭樹木，靜瑟、隱密，前身為美軍宿舍洋溢著50年代美國南方建築的獨特韻味，讓人感覺置身異國國度。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.3, Ln. 6, Changchun St., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 11193, Taiwan
descriptionEn: "Yannick Yangmingshang Store" is located in the alleyway next to the Yangde Boulevard, Yangming Mountain. The building is a historic site which used to be an US military dormitory in the 1950s. Through a fortuitous encounter with the Old House cultural initiative, President Wu turned the building into a village of American desserts. During the period of US Aid, US military dependents often made pies at home when they lived in Taiwan. This was how many pie and cookie recipes spread in Taiwan. Because of this, Yannick particularly uses the exclusive selling of pies and tarts to suit the style of Southern American houses, with the hopes of making dessert-inspired innovations while preserving the original culture. We look forward to you joining us in the search for the happy experiences we dream of.

descriptionEn: The founder of the Restaurant, Mr. Liu, is Vietnamese Chinese. In 1975, Mr. Liu emigrated to Paris and operated a Vietnamese restaurant, “Xianglan” and in 1990, he returned to Taiwan to set up “Wei Fu Lo Restaurant.” With an interest in and passion for hospitality business as well as Vietnamese cuisine, in 2007, Mr. Liu established “Yueh Xiang Lan Delicate Cuisine Restaurant” as well as a Vietnamese baguette store to offer customers healthy, natural, nutritious, and tasty exotic cuisine.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區文林路577號
descriptionZh:
提供專業單車環島旅遊服務，包含:單車出租、單車保養、單車買賣、單車維修、單車旅遊規劃、網路行銷等服務。台大機械相關碩士畢業的馬修(老闆)，熱愛騎單車當下的舒壓快感，而立之年決然辭掉高薪工程師工作，投入興趣與所學。
2016年與一貓一狗一女友合夥，在士林開了一間懷舊單車店。

因單車保養起家，致力追求單車高品質，根據客人回饋，創造騎車1個月0破胎紀錄！
環島回來細心檢查單車每一零件，我們希望客人跟我們租車，能夠安全並盡情享受沿途風景！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 577, Wenlin Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Professional “around the island” biking services are available including bike rental, maintenance, sales, repairing, trip planning and Internet marketing. Mathew (the owner) graduated from mechanical engineering related graduate school of NTU and is fond of the relaxing feeling when riding on a bike. When he turned 30, he quit his high paying engineering job and began something that he really likes. 
In 2016, he open his first authentic bike store with a cat, a dog, and a wife. 
Due to the provision of bike maintenance, he has been devoted to services of high quality bikes. His customer say there are never flat tires on his bikes! 
After touring around the Island, we will carefully check every part of the bikes. We hope that after renting a bike from us, our customers can safely and happily enjoy bike riding.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區福國路54號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 54, Fuguo Road, Shilin District, Taipei City, Taiwan 111
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, "Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness". With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: "Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: "people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward & punishment and shared results", Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區中正路330號
descriptionZh:
黑橋牌食品於1957年成立，因率先將舊時台灣市面上乾鹹的廣式臘腸，改良為現今甜潤多汁的台灣風味，獨創的香腸滋味在台灣炮而紅，成立至今已超過六十年，每逢年節皆可看見店舖大排長龍的搶購盛況，不僅開創台灣香腸的美食傳奇，更奠定現今台灣香腸第一品牌的口碑。
店內除了販售十多種款式的香腸，更提供多種口味的豬肉乾、牛肉乾、手炒肉酥等美味肉品，全部都是來台必買的美食。近年推出的脆片肉乾、條子肉乾、肉酥餅乾等廣受年輕顧客喜愛，也成為黑橋牌暢銷人氣商品。
黑橋牌門市多次接獲海內外媒體採訪，香港美食家蔡瀾也曾率團到店選購，黑豬肉香腸、黑豬肉乾、香腸肉包是招牌推薦品，店內並提供鳳梨酥、綠豆糕等各式台灣特產，是來台必訪的特產名店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.330, Zhongzheng Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Founded in 1957, Black Bridge was the first company to refine the traditional dry, salty Cantonese sausage sold on the market in Taiwan into the succulent, tender Taiwanese delicacy of today. The unique flavors of the sausage became an instant hit in Taiwan over 6 decades ago. Now, people are seen queuing outside stores during Chinese New Year waiting to purchase their products. Black Bridge sausages have not only become a legend of gastronomy in the country but also the premier brand of contemporary Taiwanese sausages. 
Besides a selection of over a dozen sausages in the store, there is also a plethora of delicious meat products such as pork/beef jerky and fried pork fibers. These are all quintessential Taiwanese delicacies. Recently launched new products, including crisp pork jerky, grilled pork jerky, and fried pork fiber biscuits are proving to be extremely popular among younger customers, and they have become Black Bridge’s hottest sellers. 
Black Bridge stores have received domestic and foreign media interviews on several occasions, and Hong Kong food critic Chua Lam and his travel companions have also made purchases in the store. Signature products include Taiwanese black hog sausage, Taiwanese black hog pork jerky, and sausage buns. Other Taiwanese specialties in the store include pineapple cake and bean paste cake etc. are all quintessential Taiwanese snacks.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區中山北路六段235號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 235, Sec. 6, Zhongshan N. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區中山北路七段84號
descriptionZh: 喬治皮鞋成立於1950年以製作高品質及舒適的鞋款為基準，曾榮獲『中華民國消費者協會』評鑑為消費精品獎及管理雜誌評選為國人受歡迎之鞋類品牌，不做過多的品牌行銷與產品包裝，堅持以平實的價格與精緻品質為要求，成為國人耳熟能詳的鞋業品牌。目前，除專營自有品牌外並代理歐洲進口商品男女鞋及配件銷售。 『履適足以健行』為喬治皮鞋對品質及服務的承諾，用心製作每一件商品，更以提供「舒適」與「流行」為目標，期望能以對御用品質的要求來滿足消費者的需要。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 84, Sec. 7, Zhongshan N. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: George Shoes has been established 69 years since 1950,   is the well-known brand which has won the favor of consumers with its excellent product quality and perfect pre-sales and after-sales service in Taiwan. It  has also  won  Consumer Excellence Award by the “Taiwan Consumers Association”and Management Magazine. The brand is also the best choice for political and business celebrities. George shoes create the good quality leather shoes and accessories.

addressZh: 111台北市士林區天母東路65號
descriptionZh:
香料屋印度料理是傳統的印度美食，餐廳於2002年在台北天母開業，供應傳統的印度美食精緻的香料和風味，餐廳保持其創新和創造新食譜的根源，並以獨特的菜單呈現當代風格，體驗北印度美食最令人難忘的美食之旅。

2008臺北餐館評鑑Taipei Top Restaurants (一顆星 ) 
2010北臺灣餐館評鑑Northern Taiwan Top Restaurants (一顆星 )
2012餐館評鑑 Taiwan’s Top Restaurants (一顆星 )
2017臺北美食環遊世界五大菜系店家名單 Taste the Best of the World in Taipei
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 65, Tianmu E. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Opening in Tianmu, Taipei in 2002, the Spice Shop Indian Cuisine, like its name suggests, features traditional Indian dishes with exquisite spices and flavors. The restaurant keeps an innovative spirit at its core when creating new recipes, and manages to reflect the contemporary style with unique items on its menu. Why not pay a visit and start the most unforgettable journey that allows you to fully enjoy gourmet North Indian cuisine.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區中山北路六段77號
descriptionZh: 遠東SOGO天母店為全台第一家榮獲環保署「碳標籤」與「減碳標籤」的百貨公司，以「打造世界第一綠色百貨」為目標，除了販售綠色商品之外，更透過活動傳遞環境永續意識，將百貨公司化身為環境教育的場域，並透過太陽能集光系統與雨水回收系統，貫徹節能。遠東SOGO百貨現為台灣獲得最多環保類榮耀與肯定的百貨公司，以「做社會最好的企業、做對社會最好的企業」為目標，力行企業永續，打造「購者安心」的百貨，嚴格把關商品品質與餐飲衛生，成為百貨業界典範；並全面拒用美耐皿餐具，守護顧客健康之餘，也減少對環境的傷害，與地球共好，創造幸福永續的百貨公司。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: B1, No. 77, Section 6, Zhongshan North Road, Shilin District Taipei City, Taiwan 111
descriptionEn:
The Hsin Tung Yang Tianmu Store is located at B1F, No. 77, Sec. 6., Zhongshan North Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City, inside the Sogo Tien-Mu Store. The famous food shop Ding Tai Fung is located right next to us, attracting visitors from afar. It is located near the Zhishan MRT Station, and very easy to get to. Hsin Tung Yang is known for its classic souvenirs, including pineapple pastries, meat floss, meat jerkies, and sausages. Additionally, in order to provide both foreign and domestic consumers with a more convenient shopping environment, we added different local merchandises from all over Taiwan to our selection, as well as the precious and popular black roe. We continue the authenticate Taiwanese taste in delicious experiences, and pass down the local food culture. The store primarily sells a variety of Hsin Tung Yang brand flossy pork, dried meat, pastries, pineapple cakes, casual snacks, and different local specialty products of Taiwan. The store also offers various imported Japanese/Korean products.
The corporate objective of Hsin Tung Yang is to refine Chinese cuisines with the international spirit benchmark. Our local operations adhere to the four key principles of integrity, dependability, activeness, and innovation to create the corporate image of "No. 1 specialty brand in Taiwan for must buy in items and perfect souvenirs to take overseas" and bring high quality shopping experiences to the consumers.
2010 Annual Taiwan Food Consumption Survey Statistics Report: Hsin Tung Yang flossy pork, dried meat, and meat sauce series products are often listed as the No. 1 consumption brand; which gives it the reputation of "meat kingdom."
Won the 2011 Taiwan Top 100 Brands honor
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop, and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區文林路422號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 422, Wenlin Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區天母西路41巷1弄2號
descriptionZh:
位於天母西路巷弄內將近二十年的老店,
塑造出濃濃的日式風情,
灰磚青瓦的純東洋風格食肆「八藤家」。
由日本師傅傳承的獨家在地風味,除了嚴選新鮮食材,
主廚以嫻熟的手藝與到位的火候為顧客獻上噴香美味,
販售平價又份量十足的日式料理。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Aly. 1, Ln. 41, Tianmu W. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Located in the alley of Tianmu West Road, the nearly 20-year old store is styled with rich Japanese ambience. Gray bricks and blue tiles suggest an unadulterated oriental-style adopted by the restaurant Yatoka.

With exclusive and authentic flavors passed on by Japanese masters as well as carefully selected fresh ingredients, the chef offers aromatic, delicious, and large-portion Japanese dishes at reasonable price through adept cooking skills and his ability to apply and control fire.

Drink a good cup of tea or have a nice cup of coffee.
Enjoy a date with tea and coffee.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區天母東路16號
descriptionZh: 座落在天母的傳奇糕點舖，老闆由日本大阪辻製菓學校習得的甜點技術～ 這是老闆為太太而開的甜點舖，每個糕點都完整的傳遞了製菓者的心意
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn: Sitting in Tianmu, Sweet 16 Patisserie is a legendary dessert shop founded by the owner for his wife. The owner acquired his dessert-making skills from the Tsuji Culinary Institute in Osaka, Japan. Every dessert by his hand fully conveys his beliefs to his customers.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區中山北路七段127號
descriptionZh:
由全臺灣302家農會與40家漁會所共同支持成立，
孕育以農漁會為主題風格的旅店。
我們願意肩負農漁會文化的創新，勾勒臺灣地區風土時尚的樣貌，
創造一畝心靈田園與旅客共享，讓遊子們感受臺灣農漁業真心誠意的感動。
讓城市子民體驗農漁生活，讓創意人才在農漁產業中尋索題材。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 127, Sec. 7, Zhongshan N. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Mellow Fields is a hotel jointly supported and founded by 302 farmers' associations and 40 fishermen's associations in Taiwan.

We are willing to take on the innovations of farmers' and fishermen's associations to depict the local fashionable sentiments of Taiwan, to create an acre of spiritual farmland to share with the travelers and to allow travelers to experience the genuine and sincere heart-warming emotions from the agricultural and fishing industries in Taiwan.
Mellow Fields provides a stage for Taiwanese elites in the agriculture and fishing industries to realize their dreams.
It is a turning point where the past meets the future.
All of the ideas are put into practice here.
Mellow Fields will be a base where a new life style begins here in Tianmu.
Urban residents will be able to experience the life of a farmer or a fisherman while the creative industry can acquire new inspiration.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區德行東路194號1樓
descriptionZh:
來吃餃子呀，就當自己家！
─ 餃當家Go Dumpling

1949年後，高雄大寮干城七村，
木格門、老樹下、竹籬笆，
過年時爺爺包豬肉餃子，飽足了五口之家，
還有隔壁鄰居們湊熱鬧閒磕牙。
歲月飛逝，小孫子開始當家，
和爸爸一起，讓南台灣眷村的好味繞樑。
有家鄉味交饗，還有古典樂飄揚，
餃子、拌麵、滋補雞湯，歡迎隨時來嚐嚐～
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 194, Dexing E. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Make yourself at home and enjoy the dumplings at Go Dumpling!
Like many military dependents’ villages built after the government’s relocation to Taiwan in 1949, Gancheng Seventh Village in Daliao District of Kaohsiung is characterized by wooden grill doors, bamboo fences, ancient trees, and traditional foods like dumplings. It has been a tradition for residents in these villages to eat dumplings during the Chinese New Year. Inspired by his grandfather’s homemade pork dumplings, the owner sells dumplings, noodles and chicken soup with his father, so that the wonderful taste of hometown cuisine continues to live on in this eatery immersed in classical music.

nameZh: 勝口味大腸蚵仔麵線-天母店
addressZh: 臺北市士林區中山北路七段183號
descriptionZh:
勝口味大腸蚵仔麵線經營至今已跨越二十五個年頭，從原本在天母圓環的小店面經營，靠著真材實料對產品的品質要求，獲得眾多朋友的肯定和支持。
在2017年的夏季店面重新裝潢，對於用餐環境的提升可以邊吃著小吃邊聽著輕音樂，享受窗外的優閒時光，何嘗不是一種享受呢!
夜色暗起~天母圓環最閃耀的那個招牌就屬「勝口味」，顧客對於我們的評價最「潮」的麵線店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 183, Sec. 7, Zhongshan N. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Established more than 25 years ago at the Tianmu Circle, the Sheng Kou Wei Oyster and Pork Intestine Vermicelli is a shop that has won the approval and support of its customers because of its authentic ingredients and dedication to maintaining product quality.
In the summer of 2017, the originally small shop was redecorated to enable its customers to enjoy light music and pleasant window views while dining.
When the sun sets, the Sheng Kou Wei  Oyster and Pork Intestine Vermicelli shop sign is a bright spot of the Tianmu Circle. Come visit the shop rated by customers as the most "fashionable."

addressZh: 臺北市士林區天母東路8巷21-4號1樓
descriptionZh:
四重奏藝式甜點 

── ISM主義甜時 
南方的田野，天光喚醒鳳梨的沉睡
盛夏飄雪，艷黃芒果沁出了鮮甜
大提琴家陳世霖以家鄉為世界巡演的終點
攪拌棒為琴弦，奏起味蕾上的室內樂
是浪漫的詩，也是嚴謹的職人儀式*
誰說藝術一定要拘泥於表現的形式 
巡禮四季，譜寫島嶼的風土故事
化為一枚枚輕盈酥軟的達克瓦茲
客座主廚攜手甜點師傅，交響主義甜時
故事定調、創意思巧、食材精挑、美味發表
一場藝式甜點的四重奏，靜候賞味聆聽
開場囉~每一口都有動人的弦外之音
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 21-4, Lane 8, Tianmu E Rd, Shilin District, Taipei City, 111
descriptionEn:
Artistic-style Desserts in the Form of a Quartet

── Patisserie ISM 
The sunlight wakes up pineapples planted in the field in the south.
Yellow mangoes in the summer are fresh and sweet.
Cellist Chen Shih-lin completes his world tour with his hometown as the final destination.
Using mixing rods as strings, Chen plays chamber music that will turn into delicious desserts to satisfy your taste buds.
Making desserts resembles a love poem; it is also a strict ritual for professionals.*
Who says that art has a certain form of presentation?
Customs and stories of the Taiwan Island told throughout the four seasons can be turned into light, soft dacquoise cakes.
Guest chefs work together with dessert masters at Patisserie ISM
to make artistic-style desserts in the form of a quartet:
set the tone for the story, creative ingenuity, careful selection of ingredients, and presentation of desserts.
The feast is ready! Savor your every bite.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區美德街16巷8號
descriptionZh:
|品牌故事|
慢燉細熬的家廚味道 ── 牛有廖Beefull
漫步在甜點夢的道路上，
把五星酒店點心坊當練功房，
研讀一家家法廚菜單尋找靈感。
熱愛鑽研甜點的廖家女兒，
在海外求學之後，夢想之路意外轉彎，
與父母一起以牛肉麵實踐烹調信仰，
並相信著，耐心等待是讓食物味美的魔杖。

湯頭慢熬，等待精華釋放，從清味轉金黃，
牛肉細燉，等待質地漸軟，柔韌有腴香。
以湯養湯，熬出回甘的芬芳。
清燉，以廣皮點綴，柑橘清爽提香，
紅燒，自製紅燒醬料，兌煮湯頭，燒出濃郁香辣。
麻香滷，藥材10種、花椒數樣，辣得溫順酣暢。

《純真派牛肉麵 × 麻香滷》，廖家的廚房就是你家廚房。
牛有廖，慢燉細熬的味道，飽滿有料！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8, Ln. 16, Meide St. Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Brand Story
Beefull, the taste of home-cooked meals
Beefull is run by a family whose daughter originally pursued a career in dessert-making. She honed her skills by reading French menus and desserts, studying abroad, and working at the dessert department of a five-star restaurant. However, her dream took an expected turn as she found herself taking a different path and cooking beef noodles with her parents. Nevertheless, she continues to strive for culinary excellence. To her, patience is the key to mouthwatering cuisine.

Beef noodle soup is boiled for an extended period of time to transform its color from colorless to golden brown. The soup is then combined with chewy, tender beef filled with aroma. A percentage of the soup is reserved for future use to provide a rich taste.
Enjoy clear broth-stewed beef noodles embellished with chenpi and citrus fruits, red-braised beef noodles with a rich, spicy flavor, and spicy braised seasoning featuring 10 medicinal materials and several Sichuan pepper.

Beef noodles × braised seasoning. The Beefull kitchen is your family kitchen. 
Beefull, the taste of home-cooked meals!

addressZh: 臺北市士林區中正路235巷32號
descriptionZh:
平實風義式田園餐桌
── 歐品鄉廚European FarmTable
橄欖樹、葡萄藤與鼠尾草在艷陽下嬉鬧，
羊隊與牛群在靠海的托斯卡尼山谷啃著嫩草…
在地新鮮食材伴隨來自南歐田園的天然作料，
小卷干貝鮮蝦在火上吱吱作響，散發誘人炙香；
熱鍋裡，油香攪和著奶香四溢，蔥蒜香草上場。
蕈菇家族引味，與各色青蔬博彩滿堂，
紅番茄綠羅勒加白色馬茲瑞拉起司，
卡布里島清晨的花園清新艷亮。

歐品鄉廚把義式田園搬上了餐桌。
進口橄欖油新鮮初榨，麵條鮮奶油歐洲原裝，
用料捨得、價格平實，烹調講究一如家人親嚐。
當窗邊灑下燦爛晴光，香草吹送鄉野的芬芳，
願你料足麵飽，吃得開懷又健康！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 32, Ln. 235, Zhongzheng Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
European FarmTable, a natural Italian-style garden
Inspired by olive trees, grapevines, and East Asian sage glistening under the sun and sheep and cows nibbling tender grass in Tuscany valleys, European FarmTable uses fresh local ingredients and natural seasonings from southern European countryside. Enjoy the sound and pleasant smell of calamari, scallops, and fresh shrimp sizzling in woks; the aroma of oil and milk in hot pots; the union of mushrooms and green vegetables; tomatoes, basils, and mozzarella cheese coming together; and a morning Capri garden-like environment.

European FarmTable brings Italian-style gardens onto the dining table, using fresh, imported olive oil; noodles and creams from Europe; and high-quality ingredients to offer its customers home-cooked meal-like cuisine at affordable prices. Enjoy our refreshing food and environment for a lovely, healthy dining experience!

addressZh: 111台北市士林區延平北路七段18-2號
descriptionZh: 蝴蝶蘭專售的園藝花店，店內打造專業溫室，保持各類蘭花新鮮品質，另外提供各式植栽花禮的組盆服務，除了蘭花花禮，包含多肉、觀葉、空鳳等都能客製化組盆，無論年節送禮、居家擺飾或是公司氣氛營造，都歡迎參觀挑選，也能預先電洽諮詢唷。

addressZh: 台北市士林區文林路527號1樓
descriptionZh:
小聚人火鍋店夥伴來自於罕見疾病基金會的小朋友；

They have accepted help from others so that they can learn to be better, have the ability to help more people, and to give back to society. The goal is to provide physically or mentally challenged people with stable work and work skills.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區天母東路50巷20之9號1樓
descriptionZh: 用食材紀錄最簡單的美味～

descriptionZh: 賦樂旅居由名建築設計師陳瑞憲設計，位於臺北東區最精華市中心，房間內傢俱擺設有不同的風格

descriptionZh: 古典美服飾，堅持販售中國風服飾，保留傳統服飾文化精粹，以中國風手染、蠟染、手繪、棉衣、旗袍等服飾。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn: Classicism  provides Chinese-style apparel and the essential features of traditional fashion and culture. Cotton blouses and qipao (mandarin gown) featuring hand-dyeing, wax dyeing, and manually applied decorative elements are extremely popular, providing a subsumed and comfortable attire with simple lines and minimalist aesthetics that offer an outworldly elegance.

descriptionZh: 以「煮茶論藝‧創心生活」為經營理念，提供臺灣嚴選好茶，並有多元精采的臺灣陶藝家創作之陶藝。

The store decor features unique red-clay floors and straw cement walls to recreate rustic living quarters in rural Taiwanese villages and to provide a warm and cozy atmosphere.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區金山南路二段31巷37號
descriptionZh: 以美味擄獲臺北人的味蕾，從當地人才知道的私房小館，一路成為人氣名店，也吸引許多外國朋友到此一嚐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 37, Ln. 31, Sec. 2, Jinshan S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Dongmen Dumplings used to be a family specialty from a clan in Northern China. After settling in Taiwan for 60 years, various new elements were incorporated to captivate the Taiwanese palate. From a secretive locale known only to the most demanding gourmands, Dongmen Dumplings has become a famous store and a destination for food lovers from around the world.

nameZh:
陽明春天讀蔬會 
大安店
addressZh: 臺北市大安區大安路一段231號1樓(德安里)
descriptionZh: 素食餐廳，創意美味，環境空間氣氛佳，提倡素食精神與理念。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn: To protect our earth, achieve environmental protection, and promote a uniquely Taiwanese cuisine and lifestyle, Yangming Spring - Zhongxiao Branch has created an establishment based upon natural, healthy, green and animal-friendly principles. We also introduced elements of tea appreciation and art, elevating local vegetarianism of food choice into featured local culture.

descriptionZh: 堅持使用傳統製茶法，提供無添加、無調味的好茶，擁有自家烘焙場，致力於打造年輕人也喜愛的100%臺灣茶。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 150, Sec. 2, Xinyi Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: SHING HWA TEA SHOP has been operating for over 70 years and remains committed to traditional tea brewing techniques, offering fine brews with zero additives and condiments. SHING HWA also has their own tea roasting facilities to come up with 100% MIT Tea that the young can readily appreciate.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區延吉街131巷26號
descriptionZh: 堅持古法製作，絕無添加調料，純手工繁複製作。 豆花的綿密與水果的鮮甜滋味完美融合，成為最念念不忘的傳統美味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 26, Ln. 131, Yanji St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Sao Dou Hua has inherited the 50-year art of douhua (tofu jelly) making. Traditional processes with zero additives are used. The douhua maker must brave high temperatures and maintain constant attention over the flames. The process is complicated and many steps demand experience and hands-on practice to attain perfection. All these features help provide the key elements of Sao Dou Hua. The fine douhua jelly and refreshing fruits complement each other perfectly, providing a most unforgettable traditional flavor.

The store is now a must-go destination for overseas visitors looking for intricate and interesting Taiwanese souvenirs and gifts for their friends. We love red beans and provide creative twists that go beyond the traditional offerings. Popular examples include Chenpi Red Bean Soup (flavored with dried tangerine skin), Guihua Red Bean Soup (with osmanthus flowers), and Coconut Milk and Red Bean Soup. Another popular favorite is the Japanese Red Bean Baked Mochi. Thick Japanese mochi is baked to create a crispy, caramelized crust and a hot, soft interior that perfectly complements the red bean soup.

Taiwan Yipin Shanxi Knife Noodle House" located at Yongkang Street has won the best beef noodle honor from the U.S. CNN report. In addition to being the must try cuisine for foreign tourists at Yongkang Street, the crowd in the restaurant demonstrates its popularity. The menu were made in Chinese, Korean, English, and Japanese languages to facilitate ordering. The restaurant environment is clean and bright, and even provides thoughtful holding baskets for its customers.
This restaurant is famous for its affordable price and authentic ingredients, and it has won the unwavering-support of the customers for decades. In addition to noodles, we also offer stir-fried dishes. If you are a gourmet food lover, don't miss your chance to try the best beef noodle in Taipei!

Our main objective is to promote the novel artists in Taiwan. We currently exhibit products from porcelain artists and purse designers. The exquisite feel and the soft glaze lines of the porcelain pieces made by porcelain artist who have returned from the foreign studies in France are the qualities that artists insist on. We also exhibit colorful purses and tote bags in different styles made using dyed leather imported from Italy. At Padpanadscha Art Center, quality always come first. The Eastin Taipei Hotel is located in Taipei's lively Eastern District - Section 4 of Zhongxiao East Road at the intersection of the MRT Wenhu Line and Bannan Line. In addition to the convenient MRT transportation, the please is also filled with restaurants, hotels, and malls such as the SOGO Fuxing Exit 1/Dunhua Malls, Breeze Center/Zhongxiao store are within 2-10 minutes in walking distance.
Our decor is simple and incorporates the building and street elements of the Taipei Metropolis in hopes to promote Taipei's popular outings. We also use reputable brand products (such as Simmons mattresses, TOTO bathroom fixtures, and L'Occitane toiletries) in our suites. We hope to bring economic price and comfortable accommodation experiences to business travelers or to free travel tourists visiting Taipei for just a short while, and leave the friendliest impression for Taipei City.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區仁愛路四段296號1樓(敦煌里)
descriptionZh:
隱身於商辦大樓大廳的舒適明亮空間
專為都會商務菁英打造的輕食咖啡吧一Cozzi Café
Cozzi Cafe將咖啡館「社區概念化」的理念延伸至商辦大樓，讓上班族不需捨近求遠，上班前可以先到 Cozzi Café 買杯咖啡，午休時只要下樓就能享受現做餐點，CozziCafé就是您隨時補充活力的最佳後援部隊。

秉持HOTEL COZZI和逸飯店一貫堅持的高品質標準，Cozzi Café選用日本UCC專業烘焙咖啡豆及崇尚自然和環保的英國Teapigs花草葉，還有鮮榨果汁等，用嚴選原料豐富您的味蕾，為充實的一天注入滿滿元氣。

店內餐點採用在地食材新鮮現做，包括三明治、瑪芬、蛋糕甜點等。此外，Cozzi Café也推出外送訂餐以及輕食外燴服務，讓著重效率與生活品味的現代人，在繁忙之餘也能兼顧健康與美味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No.296, Sec. 4, Renai Rd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Cozy, brightly lit space nestled within the lobby of an office building
Cozzi Café-Light Food Cafe designed for urban business leaders
Cozzi Café has extended the concept of “community cafe” to the office building, so that office workers can grab a cup of their favorite joe before work. Cozzi Café also serves made-to-order meals at lunchtime, making it the best supply depot for replenishing your energy anytime.

Upholding the consistent, high-quality standards as HOTEL COZZI, Cozzi Café utilizes professionally roasted UCC coffee beans and Teapigs herbal tea-a natural and eco-friendly label from the UK, as well as freshly squeezed orange juice and the finest ingredients to tantalize your palate and fuel your body for the entire day.

The cafe’s meals including sandwiches, muffins, cakes, and desserts are made-to-order using locally sourced fresh ingredients. In addition, Cozzi Cafe also launched meal delivery service and light meal catering service, providing busy modern people emphasizing efficiency and taste with healthy meals.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區敦化南路一段331號(敦安里)
descriptionZh:
在台北市中心擁有一個靜謐安心的空間

慕軒飯店成立於2014年，共有124間的客房與套房。坐擁台北市優越的黃金地段，倚著台北最美的欒樹林蔭大道，慕軒飯店是水泥叢林中的城市綠洲，提供每位來到慕軒飯店的旅客24小時優質的服務，享有低調的靜心之處。慕軒飯店自開幕以來，國內外屢獲Hotels.com全球十大最受歡迎商務飯店、World Luxury Hotel Awards奢華城市飯店、台北米其林指南推薦飯店等多項大獎，得到相關產業評審與旅客高度肯定，慕軒飯店感謝各大媒體平台上的評論與肯定，因能夠為旅客創造永生難忘的回憶而感動、自豪。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.331, Sec. 1, Dunhua S. Rd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Enjoying a peaceful, comfortable space in downtown Taipei

MADISON TAIPEI HOTEL was founded in 2014 with 124 guest rooms and suites. Located in prime real estate in Taipei City, MADISON TAIPEI HOTEL is an urban oasis in the concrete jungle adjacent to the most beautiful Leshu Boulevard, providing each guest outstanding service around the clock, so that they may take refuge in a tranquil, discreet retreat. Since opening, MADISON TAIPEI HOTEL has received numerous major domestic and international awards, including top 10 most popular business hotel in the world (Hotels.com), World Luxury Hotel Awards Luxury City Hotel Award, and Michelin Guide Taipei recommended hotel. In addition to recognition from industry critics and travelers, the hotel has also received positive reviews from major media outlets, because it prides itself in creating touching, memorable memories for travelers that will last a lifetime.

nameZh: 慕軒飯店 URBAN331 威士忌酒吧
addressZh: 臺北市大安區敦化南路一段331號1樓(敦安里)
descriptionZh:
位於慕軒飯店一樓以供應全球最受歡迎的威士忌佳釀、特調雞尾酒、美味下午茶與小點著稱，細膩沉穩的室內氛圍，讓您惬意坐享於優雅皮製沙發，細細品味富層次的醇酒風味，瞬間拋開塵囂的繁忙沉悶，適合喜愛低調、品味雋永的商務人士最佳聚會場所。

以MADISON TAIPEI HOTEL慕軒飯店的門牌號碼331為名，結合象徵摩登都會風格的詞彙URBAN，其溫潤靜謐的空間、雋永的現代經典家具與滿佈各個角落的藝術裝潢巧思，營造紐約上東城不凡的氣度與奢華氛圍。酒吧珍藏來自各國的頂級麥芽威士忌與供應各式經典酒款、繽紛調酒及多款異國開胃小點，在喧囂的城市中，拋開繁忙沉悶，優雅品味美酒佳餚，享受輕鬆怡人的私密片刻。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.331, Sec. 1, Dunhua S. Rd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Enjoying a peaceful, comfortable space in downtown Taipei

MADISON TAIPEI HOTEL was founded in 2014 with 124 guest rooms and suites. Located in prime real estate in Taipei City, MADISON TAIPEI HOTEL is an urban oasis in the concrete jungle adjacent to the most beautiful Leshu Boulevard, providing each guest outstanding service around the clock, so that they may take refuge in a tranquil, discreet retreat. Since opening, MADISON TAIPEI HOTEL has received numerous major domestic and international awards, including top 10 most popular business hotel in the world (Hotels.com), World Luxury Hotel Awards Luxury City Hotel Award, and Michelin Guide Taipei recommended hotel. In addition to recognition from industry critics and travelers, the hotel has also received positive reviews from major media outlets, because it prides itself in creating touching, memorable memories for travelers that will last a lifetime.

nameZh: 慕軒 GUSTOSO 義大利料理
addressZh: 臺北市大安區敦化南路一段331號2樓(敦安里)
descriptionZh:
位於慕軒飯店二樓的GUSTOSO義大利餐廳，以義大利當地代表性蔬果—熟成飽滿的橄欖樹的象徵圖像作為圖騰，提供義大利經典南義家鄉菜的質樸美味，不用過多的烹調方式影響食材的鮮美，而從優質食材的選擇及調味品中下功夫，帶出GOSTOSO義大利餐廳對於呈現義大利菜系的尊重與傳承的初衷。命名” GUSTOSO“，意即義大利文中「好吃、美味」的註解，延伸出GUSTOSO義大利餐廳希望呈現出義大利人在地餐食況味的精髓之意。

嚴選新鮮的季節食材，GUSTOS0主推傳統南義家鄉菜，將義大利手工麵、燉飯、披薩及各式精選主菜融合義大利豐富的飲食文化，結合創意方式展現，讓消費者享受兼具美味與趣味的用餐體驗。

有別於一般傳統的義大利餐廳，餐廳採用低調沉穩的色調搭配高質感原木色傢俱，窗外緊鄰敦南綠蔭景色，營造舒適的用餐空間，而多樣化的菜色選擇則與餐廳的「分享」概念相呼應，是和親朋好友分享美食的最佳聚會場所。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.331, Sec. 1, Dunhua S. Rd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:

nameZh: 雅緻人生中國古典服飾店
addressZh: 臺北市大安區金華街243巷15號(福住里)
descriptionZh: 以中國古典元素為創作特色，與現代文化結合，製作成具有現代中國風的服飾作品並展售清末民初骨董中國服飾(骨董衣)
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 15, Lane 243, Jinhua Street, Daan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Combining classic Chinese elements and a modern style in clothing certain contemporary Chinese characters as well as demonstrating and providing costumes and accessories of the late Qing Dynasty and early modern China.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區忠孝東路四段104號2樓
descriptionZh: 40年歷史，至今仍歷久彌新，是老饕們讚不絕口的國民美食。親切的服務人員加上對於食材的講究與要求，造就了今日的好口碑，不論主餐或是精美沙拉/甜點吧，都是擁有品質保證的好滋味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 104, Sec. 4, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Located next to Taipei MRT Fuxing-Zhongxiao Station, Viceroy Restaurant has been operating for 40 years and is highly praised by many gourmet lovers for its local delicacies. Thanks to its good service plus strictly selected fresh ingredients, Viceroy Restaurant built its good reputation known today. Good taste can be found in both the main courses and the salad/dessert bar.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區新生南路一段103巷37號(民輝里)
descriptionZh: 溫馨玫瑰 猶如家的歸處 別於一般飯店的空間思維，在設計上特地保留建築外觀，維持原始住家的格局，注入全新「家」的概念，特意營造的舒適寬敞，讓旅客感受不一樣的住宿空間。 巷弄內尋閒 巷弄外滿足 藏於巷弄內的新生館，與周邊的靜謐住宅融為一體，展現自在踏實的寧靜。靜巷之外又是一番世外桃花源，四通八達的交通中樞紐點，讓旅客可便於安排一日的城市之旅。僅有5分鐘步行路程的華山文化園區，提供豐富的設計饗宴，感受台北創意之都的文化精髓。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 37, Ln. 103, Sec. 1, Xinsheng S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Unlike conventional spatial thinking for hotel room arrangement, this Hotel preserves the appearance of the original architecture and instills the arrangement style of a residential house to introduce a new hotel concept. We especially create the comfortable and spacious image to impress our guests who experience different accommodation settings. Hidden in an alley, Xinsheng Store mixes with its serene neighborhood area and presents its quietness. It is like a paradise in the alley but with its convenient traffic connections, customers can easily plan for their one-day city tour. It is only about five-minute walk to Huashan Cultural Park and with the hotel's beautiful design, customers are able to appreciate cultural essence of Taipei City, a creative city.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區金華街140-1號(錦安里)
descriptionZh:
大來小館
冠軍魯肉飯
位於永康商圈的大來小館從事餐飲數十年，秉持著新鮮、自然、美味、健康食材四大堅持，採用來自全國各地的食材，以傳統創新將台灣料理發揚光大。
例如將近失傳的「雞仔豬肚鱉」「古早味什錦羹」「八寶丸」…不勝枚舉，尤其台灣庶民美食用料簡單實在，連獲台北市政府舉辦（96年、101年）兩屆冠軍，大家都叫我「冠軍滷肉飯」。
大來小館不但「滷肉飯」有名，台灣傳統料理更因用料實在、口味好，深受國內外的媒體好評，例如遠在英國BBC、日本朝日電視台專程來採訪報導，美食做得好也無形中為了國家做了「國民外交」尤其「Say Goodbye」之時聽每位客人說「Good! 喔依係~好吃」深感安慰。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 140-1, Jinhua St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Dalai Food 
Champion Minced Pork Rice 
Located in Yongkang Business District, Dalai Food has been operating for more than several decades. In pursuit of freshness, nature, good taste, and healthy ingredients, Dalai uses food ingredients coming all over Taiwan to introduce Taiwanese cuisine. 
Almost lost lost dishes including “chicken piglet belly,” “authentic assorted thickened soup,” “assorted meat ball” can be found here. Especially with simple food ingredients, minced meat rice here received two champion prizes from Taipei City (2007 and 2012) and it is called Champion Minced Meat Rice. 
Not only known for its “minced meat rice,” Dalai has been highly recommended by domestic and international media due to its use of good ingredients and good taste. For example, BBC and Asahi TV in Japan have featured Dalai and it demonstrates the best “national diplomacy.” It is touching to hear customers saying “good” and “yummy” when leaving our restaurant.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區永康街7巷2號(福住里)
descriptionZh: 本店位於美食天堂「永康商圈」交通便利，用食材嚴謹，秉持古早及創意並陳，深獲世界各地媒體採訪報導。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Ln. 7, Yongkang St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The store is located in “Yongkang Business District” with convenient traffic connections. With the use of strictly selected food ingredients and creativity to mix old and new ideas, this store is frequently interviewed by world media.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區信義路四段24號(住安里)
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 24, Sec. 4, Xinyi Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, "Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness". With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: "Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: "people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward & punishment and shared results", Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區義安里安和路二段74巷6號
descriptionZh: 彭園餐飲集團創辦人彭長貴，希望人人在平常生活中就可以品嘗美味，於2013年推出新品牌「湘８老」，以「湘特色、心料理、零距離、溫馨感」再創料理新風格與模式，讓吃飯聚餐、品味美食成為生活中的小確幸，是一種隨手可得的平凡幸福。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 6, Ln. 74, Sec. 2, Anhe Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Peng Park Catering Group founder Peng, hope everyone in the ordinary life can taste delicious, in 2013 launched a new brand "Xiang 8 old", "Xiang characteristics, heart cuisine, 0 distance, warm feeling" to create new style and mode of cuisine, so that dinner, taste of food to become a small certainty in life, is a readily available ordinary happiness.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區仁愛路四段38號
descriptionZh:
黑橋牌食品於1957年成立，因率先將舊時台灣市面上乾鹹的廣式臘腸，改良為現今甜潤多汁的台灣風味，獨創的香腸滋味在台灣炮而紅，成立至今已超過六十年，每逢年節皆可看見店舖大排長龍的搶購盛況，不僅開創台灣香腸的美食傳奇，更奠定現今台灣香腸第一品牌的口碑。
店內除了販售十多種款式的香腸，更提供多種口味的豬肉乾、牛肉乾、手炒肉酥等美味肉品，全部都是來台必買的美食。近年推出的脆片肉乾、條子肉乾、肉酥餅乾等廣受年輕顧客喜愛，也成為黑橋牌暢銷人氣商品。
黑橋牌門市多次接獲海內外媒體採訪，香港美食家蔡瀾也曾率團到店選購，黑豬肉香腸、黑豬肉乾、香腸肉包是招牌推薦品，店內並提供鳳梨酥、綠豆糕等各式台灣特產，是來台必訪的特產名店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.38, Sec. 4, Renai Rd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Founded in 1957, Black Bridge was the first company to refine the traditional dry, salty Cantonese sausage sold on the market in Taiwan into the succulent, tender Taiwanese delicacy of today. The unique flavors of the sausage became an instant hit in Taiwan over 6 decades ago. Now, people are seen queuing outside stores during Chinese New Year waiting to purchase their products. Black Bridge sausages have not only become a legend of gastronomy in the country but also the premier brand of contemporary Taiwanese sausages. 
Besides a selection of over a dozen sausages in the store, there is also a plethora of delicious meat products such as pork/beef jerky and fried pork fibers. These are all quintessential Taiwanese delicacies. Recently launched new products, including crisp pork jerky, grilled pork jerky, and fried pork fiber biscuits are proving to be extremely popular among younger customers, and they have become Black Bridge’s hottest sellers. 
Black Bridge stores have received domestic and foreign media interviews on several occasions, and Hong Kong food critic Chua Lam and his travel companions have also made purchases in the store. Signature products include Taiwanese black hog sausage, Taiwanese black hog pork jerky, and sausage buns. Other Taiwanese specialties in the store include pineapple cake and bean paste cake etc. are all quintessential Taiwanese snacks.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區市民大道四段48巷1號(光武里)
descriptionZh: TAJ泰姬印度餐廳，由巴基斯坦的拉納阿敏所經營，打造的印度料理天地。所有餐食皆為HALAL，是印度商務人士，穆斯林團體來台時，尋找家的味道的好地方。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.1, Ln. 48, Sec. 4, Civic Blvd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: TAJ Indian Restaurant is an Indian culinary establishment run by Rana Amin, a Muslim writer from Pakistan, and Asrah. All the meals are Halal-certified, making it the perfect place for Indian businesspeople and Muslim groups seeking the flavors of home when they are in Taiwan

addressZh: 臺北市大安區信義路二段198巷7-3號(福助里)
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.7-3, Ln. 198, Sec. 2, Xinyi Rd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: After a decade in Taiwan, the leading craft beer label in the country Lebledor has launched its sister brand petit doux! Its unique dessert WAPA pancake embodies innovative culinary concept for women! Inspired by the culinary concept of great taste, peckishness, dessert stomach, tipsiness, and combined with French elegance, refinement, and local culture, this is an astonishing gastronomic paradise designed exclusively for young/mature women!

addressZh: 臺北市大安區敦化南路二段218號號1樓(虎嘯里)
descriptionZh:
隱身於商辦大樓大廳的舒適明亮空間
專為都會商務菁英打造的輕食咖啡吧一Cozzi Café
Cozzi Cafe將咖啡館「社區概念化」的理念延伸至商辦大樓，讓上班族不需捨近求遠，上班前可以先到 Cozzi Café 買杯咖啡，午休時只要下樓就能享受現做餐點，CozziCafé就是您隨時補充活力的最佳後援部隊。

秉持HOTEL COZZI和逸飯店一貫堅持的高品質標準，Cozzi Café選用日本UCC專業烘焙咖啡豆及崇尚自然和環保的英國Teapigs花草葉，還有鮮榨果汁等，用嚴選原料豐富您的味蕾，為充實的一天注入滿滿元氣。

店內餐點採用在地食材新鮮現做，包括三明治、瑪芬、蛋糕甜點等。此外，Cozzi Café也推出外送訂餐以及輕食外燴服務，讓著重效率與生活品味的現代人，在繁忙之餘也能兼顧健康與美味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 218, Sec. 2, Dunhua S. Rd. Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Cozy, brightly lit space nestled within the lobby of an office building Cozzi Café-Light Food Cafe designed for urban business leaders Cozzi Café has extended the concept of “community cafe” to the office building, so that office workers can grab a cup of their favorite joe before work. Cozzi Café also serves made-to-order meals at lunchtime, making it the best supply depot for replenishing your energy anytime. Upholding the consistent, high-quality standards as HOTEL COZZI, Cozzi Café utilizes professionally roasted UCC coffee beans and Teapigs herbal tea-a natural and eco-friendly label from the UK, as well as freshly squeezed orange juice and the finest ingredients to tantalize your palate and fuel your body for the entire day. The cafe’s meals including sandwiches, muffins, cakes, and desserts are made-to-order using locally sourced fresh ingredients. In addition, Cozzi Cafe also launched meal delivery service and light meal catering service, providing busy modern people emphasizing efficiency and taste with healthy meals.

addressZh:
臺北市大安區敦化南路一段246號7樓
(SOGO敦化館7F)(仁愛里)
descriptionZh: 位於敦化SOGO百貨七樓，整層涵蓋廚房等設施占地約300坪，全新ART DECO裝飾藝術設計，米其林規格的開放式「夢幻廚房」以及澳洲引進的Beech Ovens夢幻烤爐，充分讓每位顧客品嚐牛排頂級口感。敦化店另設有牛肉熟成室，每一塊牛肉皆是主廚團隊親自挑選，經過專業知識研判精準掌握每塊牛排最佳熟成風味後再服務給客人。「專業而鮮嫩多汁的牛排僅是我們秉持的堅持，我們更想做的是提供給每位顧客令人難忘的餐飲體驗」！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 7F., No.246, Sec. 1, Dunhua S. Rd., Daan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Located on 7F of SOGO Dunhua Store, the overall area including the kitchen stretches roughly 992m2. With Art Deco-inspired decoration, Michelin-standard open “dream kitchen” and Beech Ovens imported from Australia, the establishment serves premium steaks for the most discerning palates.  Dunhua store is also equipped with a beef dry-aging room, where each chunk of beef is handpicked by the chef team, aged in a precise, scientific manner before it is served to the customer. “Professionally aged, tender, and succulent steak is our ultimate goal because we want to provide each patron with an unforgettable dining experience!”

addressZh: 臺北市大安區忠孝東路三段217巷2弄16號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 16, Alley 2, Lane 217, Section 3, Zhongxiao E Rd, Da’an District, Taipei City, 10654
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區四維路76巷19號1樓(德安里)
descriptionZh:
〖多肉植物與設計盆器搭配的禮品店〗
以多肉植物為主題，邀請盆器設計品牌進駐，將多肉植物的多變姿態及樣貌，與觸動人心的品牌設計結合，賦予多肉植物新的住所。

-植物品牌獵人-
植物讓我們忘記喧擾，回歸最純粹的生命型態，對他的內斂生長感到神秘，為他的恣意樣態覺得驚奇。
品牌給我們思考激盪，夾帶獨特性的理念交換，源自於過去生活的體驗，建構著將來生活的想望。
抓出品牌美好的一面，努力用各種形式將它呈現綻放，是我們一直在做的事。

-園藝手作課程第一品牌-
首創以多肉植物為核心，與業界各園藝領域的講師合作，開立最多種類的園藝手作課程，希望透過參與的過程，讓學員同時獲得心靈的滿足，及帶走滿滿的知識技能，目前已開立超過 20 種以上園藝系列手作課程，吸引超過 4,000 位學員參與。

有肉想把多肉植物各種形式的美好分享給大家，就像好友之間訴說著彼此的種植經驗、以及對於美好生活的想像。經歷過工作與生活的衝撞，多肉植物讓兩者產生平衡，透過養護植物，也時時提醒著看照自己的心情，慢下腳步感受情緒，活力有朝氣的過每一天。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 19, Ln. 76, Siwei Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
A gift shop that combines succulents with designer pots
With succulents as the theme, we invite pot design brands to enter, combining the diverse postures and appearances of succulents with touching brand designs, giving succulents a new home.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區敦化南路一段270巷6號(仁愛里)
descriptionZh:
佳餚 x 美酒 x 一群好友 
好米亞的由來： 取台語好東西的諧音，就是想要跟好朋友分享我們的所堅持的美味，也代表了一種台灣在地精神。 好米亞的成立： 兩個從高雄上來圓夢的大男孩，放棄了原本的穩定工作，憑藉著一股熱情和對餐點的執著，希望能以最高的品質帶給大家美味的體驗。 美味的派更堅持使用法國進口麵粉、進口的依思尼發酵奶油以及天然香草棒等各式高品質食材。 
為什麼要來好米亞? 好米亞所擁有的不是華麗的裝潢、奢華的高級餐點，而是一個溫馨、舒適還有各式味美餐點的好地方，不管是與三兩朋友的相聚，或是和情人甜蜜約會，亦或是想要一個人悠閒看個書、喝個茶不知道該去哪? 都歡迎來好米亞坐坐。
只有來過才能體會，我們的熱情，東西的好吃，還有一種像回到家的那種溫馨感覺。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 6, Ln. 270, Sec. 1, Dunhua S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Gourmet food X intoxicating wine X good buddies 

How our name “Goodies” came from: We named the restaurant after the Taiwanese homophone of goodies because we want to share the delicious flavors that we have always insisted upon. It also stands for a local Taiwanese spirit. How we started up Goodies Cuisine: Two young men from Kaohsiung gave up their previous steady jobs to pursue their dreams. With passion and obsession for food, they hope to satisfy everyone’s palate with the top quality eating experience. They insist on using various high quality ingredients such as the flour and Isigny cultured butter imported from France, and natural vanilla beans.

Why should you choose Goodies Cuisine? More than sumptuous decorations or luxurious high-end dishes, what we have is a cozy place that offers a variety of delicacies and where friends can hang out, lovers can date or one can just read at leisure or enjoy a cup of tea. Welcome to Goodies Cuisine! Our passion can only be felt and our delicious food can only be tasted upon your own arrival. Just make yourself at home.

descriptionZh: 名牌皮包、鞋子維修保養的整形師

descriptionEn: The cosmetic surgeon that maintains designer bags and shoes.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區忠孝東路四段101巷31號
descriptionZh: 韓國出生 目前居住在台北的老闆娘 在東區開了間應有盡有的小小韓國雜貨店 。 讓大家不用去韓國 來店裡就可以彷彿置身在韓國ㄧ般的便利。2019 7月開始在店裡開始作起預約制韓式私廚料理 煮些家常味的韓式料理 讓喜歡韓式料理的朋友來東區就能吃到小老闆娘的料理。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 31, Ln. 101, Sec. 4, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The store owner was born in Korea and she currently lives in Taipei. At the Eastern District, she opened up a small Korean grocery store that offers everything you can expect. The store lets everyone have the convenience one would have in Korea, without having to go to Korea. In July, 2019, the store started taking pre-orders for homemade Korean dishes. She cooks home-style Korean dishes; people who like Korean food can have a taste of the young store owner's cooking when they come to the Eastern District.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區潮州街149號
descriptionZh: 傳統手工老餅舖，在地深耕70年，有空來坐坐！

addressZh: 臺北市大安區忠孝東路四段45號(光武里)
descriptionZh: 遠東SOGO百貨目前在台灣共有8個據點，其中以台北忠孝館歷史最為悠久；自1987年成立迄今，屹立忠孝商圈30餘年，一直都是最受消費者信賴的百貨品牌，提供民眾日常食、衣、住、行、育、樂之各項商品所需與精緻服務，引領時尚大世代。遠東SOGO百貨以「做社會最好的企業、做對社會最好的企業」為目標，力行企業永續，打造「購者安心」的百貨，嚴格把關商品品質與餐飲衛生，成為百貨業界典範；並全面拒用美耐皿餐具，守護顧客健康之餘，也減少對環境的傷害，與地球共好，創造幸福永續的百貨公司。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Far Eastern SOGO Department Store-Taipei Zhongxiao Store
addressEn: No. 45, Sec. 4, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Far Eastern SOGO Department Store currently owns 8 branch stores in Taiwan, among which Taipei Zhongxiao Store has the longest history. It has been the most trusted department store brand since 1987, which provides consumers with all kinds of products and service in their daily life. The Far Eastern SOGO Department Store aims to be“the best CSR in the society”. It will continue to control the quality of products and food safety strictly, and completely reject using the melamine tableware. Far Eastern SOGO Department Store will protect the health of customers and reducing the harm to the environment. The retailing environment has become more diversified and complex, while e-commerce and mobile shopping have become mainstream. Therefore, to adapt to the changing needs of our customers, developing “digital marketing” and an “omni-channel retail platform” has become our main operating goals.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區忠孝東路三段300號(義村里)
descriptionZh: 遠東SOGO台北復興館為全台第一家捷運共構的百貨公司，館內國際精品與潮牌林立，同步接軌國際時尚。2006年開幕以來，以最受消費者信賴的百貨品牌，屹立忠孝復興商圈，提供民眾日常食、衣、住、行、育、樂之各項商品所需與精緻服務，引領時尚大世代。遠東SOGO百貨以「做社會最好的企業、做對社會最好的企業」為目標，力行企業永續，打造「購者安心」的百貨，嚴格把關商品品質與餐飲衛生，成為百貨業界典範；並全面拒用美耐皿餐具，守護顧客健康之餘，也減少對環境的傷害，與地球共好，創造幸福永續的百貨公司。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Hsin Tung Yang Far Eastern Sogo Fuxing Store
addressEn: B2F., No. 300, Sec. 3, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Hsin Tung Yang Far Eastern Sogo Fuxing Store is located at floor B2 of Far Eastern Sogo Fuxing Mall. Customers can directly take the MRT Bannan Line or Wenhu Line and get off at the Zhongxial Fuxing Station, exit from Exit No. 2, and walk for 2 minutes to reach us.
The store primarily sells a variety of Hsin Tung Yang brand flossy pork, dried meat, pastries, pineapple cakes, casual snacks, and different local specialty products of Taiwan. The store also offers various imported Japanese/Korean products.
The corporate objective of Hsin Tung Yang is to refine Chinese cuisines with the international spirit benchmark. Our local operations adhere to the four key principles of integrity, dependability, activeness, and innovation to create the corporate image of "No. 1 specialty brand in Taiwan for must buy in items and perfect souvenirs to take overseas" and bring high quality shopping experiences to the consumers.
2010 Annual Taiwan Food Consumption Survey Statistics Report: Hsin Tung Yang flossy pork, dried meat, and meat sauce series products are often listed as the No. 1 consumption brand; which gives it the reputation of "meat kingdom."
Won the 2011 Taiwan Top 100 Brands honor
We provide diversified media payment services, including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, Instant Online Payment Card, and UnionPay Card.
Meanwhile, consumers can also join the Hsin Tung Yang membership for free and immediately participate in the bonus points feedback rewards. There are also exclusive member events that enable members to easily accumulate points, shop, and enjoy concession prices for good-quality products. You are most welcome to visit and shop in our store.

descriptionZh: 素有「東區珠寶盒」之稱的遠東SOGO台北敦化館；為全台第一家精品百貨，在台北繁華東區，陪伴了大家走過20多年的風華歲月，全館以「精品生活」為主軸，引進國際精品、餐飲、家飾、紓壓SPA、頂級保養、設計師品牌等時尚精品生活品牌。遠東SOGO百貨以「做社會最好的企業、做對社會最好的企業」為目標，力行企業永續，打造「購者安心」的百貨，嚴格把關商品品質與餐飲衛生，成為百貨業界典範；並全面拒用美耐皿餐具，守護顧客健康之餘，也減少對環境的傷害，與地球共好，創造幸福永續的百貨公司。

addressZh: 臺北市大安區信義路四段337號7樓
descriptionZh: 共煮生活實驗室，以大家一起動手料理、分享菜餚為起點，邀請大家一同進入這間隱藏在都市中的廚房，本著共享的精神，探索出更新穎且永續的生活方式。在實驗廚房中，什麼都可有能發生!

descriptionEn: Inspired by the idea of cooking and sharing dishes together, the Co-cooking Lab invites all to this hidden kitchen in the city. With the willingness to share, it aims to realize a novel and sustainable lifestyle. Anything can happen in this cooking lab!

addressZh: 臺北市大安區新生南路三段6-1號
descriptionZh:
不只「喝」咖啡，還要「品」咖啡
精品咖啡，讓人可以品嚐到更多咖啡不同的層次，似茶非茶，這是接近咖啡果實本身純粹的風味。跳舞山羊為了還原咖啡最原始的味道，提供不只是一杯咖啡，而是健康/天然/簡單的精品咖啡，讓快步調的生活放緩腳步，享受工作與生活的美好。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 6-1, Sec. 3, Xinsheng S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Coffee not only for "drinking", but for "savoring". Dancing Goats Coffee gives customers the chance to experience a different complexity to coffee; akin to tea yet not, a flavor close to the pure taste of the coffee fruits. What Dancing Goats provides is not just a plain cup of coffee, but a wholesome, natural, and simple boutique coffee that relieves a hectic lifestyle, and helps you savor the goodness in life.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區安和路一段78巷16號
descriptionZh:
成立於1996年，是全國唯一的全方位海報專賣店, 也是國內最大的海報店。物美價廉, 公開標價, 老少無欺。服務項目包括：
● 真跡名畫與裝飾畫 - 代售名家收藏書畫與現代藝術創作
● 複製畫 - 歐美進口，與高貴畫廊同步，相同來源。不用講價，一律按牌價6折，比設計師到一般畫廊還要便宜，超划算。可以現場或網路代客訂畫。網路經銷各種授權複製畫。
● 海報 - 歐美進口的各種海報，種類齊全，電影海報、藝術海報、流行海報、教學海報、運動海報、嬰兒海報、以及各式海報(動植物、音樂、舞蹈、人文、地理、自然、科學、車船飛機、影視歌星、名人、食物、)、收藏品...
● 影視相關收藏品 - 海報、劇照、明信片、鑰匙圈、小胸章...
● 專業配框裱框 - 鏡框、畫框、木框、鋁框、相框、證照框，框條款式超過800種。
● 明鏡 - 超過800種框樣任選。訂製鏡子，比百貨公司的便宜，比大賣場的漂亮！
● 印刷 - 海報、彩色名片、傳單、型錄、卡片、明信片、喜帖、貼紙、手提袋、信封信紙、聯單、貴賓卡、胸章、徽章、廣告面紙、廣告尺、墊板、扇子、資料夾、軟性磁鐵、筷套、人字拖鞋、...等各種個性商品，少量或大量皆歡迎。
● 大圖輸出及相關配件展架 - 材質與款式眾多，又快又好
● 專業平面設計、電腦完稿
