nameZh:
陶作坊
台北永康形象概念店
addressZh: 臺北市大安區永康街6巷8號
descriptionZh:
陶作坊，1983年成立於臺灣，致力於成為華人地區知名茶器具創作品牌。
2004年獲選文化創意知名品牌；2010年受邀上海世博會台灣館茶藝展演；也曾店家介紹敘述榮獲第24屆國家磐石獎肯定,為首獲此獎之文創工藝企業。
從第一把小壶開始，經過不斷的精進與試驗，創造無數經典作品。以原料材質可區分為三大類別：傳統溫潤的陶、瓷質清雅的懷汝、天然岩礦調配的老岩泥，外觀功能各具特色，滿足各種茶席情境與需求。 
運用三十多載的經驗與技法，陶作坊提出「以器引茶，合器生好茶」的概念，提倡使用不同材質、導熱性的器具，對應不同茶品，再搭配「品茗五要訣：茶量、器具、溫度、時間、水質」讓泡茶也能按照SOP流程，簡單泡出美好茶滋味。 
除了器具，陶作坊還有多款嚴選台灣茶品，擁有473 項茶葉 SGS 檢驗報告，並投保3370萬產品責任險，讓消費者喝的安心又安全。 
陶作坊強調「以藝術的情懷，專業的素養，實用的考量，創造每一件作品，整合研發、設計、生產、銷售通路於一體，期許傳遞中華茶文化之美，向國際推廣嶄新的東方茶品茗體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8, Ln. 6, Yongkang St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan
descriptionEn: At the Taipei World Design Expo 2011, Lin's Ceramics Studio proposed the idea of the “Tea Party,” which is valued highly by the literary and art circle. Established in 1983, Lin's Ceramic Studio has been engaged in the development and production of ceramic tea sets, winning high acclaim. For decades, Lin's has regarded tea, which is culturally profound and expansive, as the theme for its brand name, growing hand in hand with Taiwan's tea art. Starting from a small tea pot, it has crafted many classics, such as the “kettle sets.” Now, it is a renowned brand name in tea craft in Chinese communities all over the world. In addition, Lin's Ceramic Studio was one of the sponsors of the Taiwan Pavilion in EXPO 2010 Shanghai China. With more than 30 years of experience in designing tea sets, it proposed the idea of vessels as aesthetics in everyday life. Planning to “introduce tea into daily life with design,” it aspires to become a pioneer and innovator in the promotion of tea culture.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區永康街75巷14-2號(龍安里)
descriptionZh:
［品牌介紹］

Saturn LandingTurkish Coffee 登陸土星土耳其咖啡座落於大安區永康街80年代老宅，販售土耳其咖啡與自家烘焙土耳其甜點。

我們立志增添東亞咖啡文化多樣性，前往土耳其深度考察，呈現以古法敲製土耳其厚銅壺 Cezve 萃煮道地傳統土耳其咖啡、水果炸彈般酸香厚實的精品土耳其咖啡，以及果香飽滿的壺萃過濾咖啡，呈現壺萃咖啡文藝復興。

有了土耳其咖啡一定要搭配土耳其甜點呀！我們研發適合亞洲品飲美學的土耳其甜鹹點，包含招牌甜點果仁酥baklava、薄果仁酥katmer 、金絲蜜酥kadayıf 、庫內費künefe 、牛肉千層捲börek 等等。

店內亦提供土耳其紅茶çay 、蘭莖肉桂奶salep 、鹹酸奶ayran 等土耳其特色飲品，

品牌亦舉辦土耳其壺萃咖啡課程、實驗性藝術活動、音樂表演、以及文化旅遊講座。

https://www.facebook.com/saturnlandingturkishcoffee/
https://www.facebook.com/saturnlandingyongkang/

#台北美食 #台北甜點 #永康街美食 #永康街咖啡 #永康街咖啡 #土耳其咖啡 #精品土耳其咖啡 #大安區咖啡#大安區美食 #大安區甜點
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 14-2, Ln. 75, Yongkang St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Saturn Landing Turkish Coffee is a Brand of Contemporary Aladdin Aesthetic Coffee House that spread the light and energy. We use Soy Türkiye handmade thick copper cezve to brew coffee/ drinks, to serve different tradition flavor of Turkish Coffee, and we also use specialty beans to serve specialty turkish coffee and cezve filter coffee, trying to present East-Asia Coffee diversity, to create the Renaissance of Cezve/Ibrik Coffee. 
We also serve traditional Turkish drinks including Turkish tea, salep and ayran. 
About food, we serve Asian flavor Turkish dessert, including reducing-sugar baklava, kadayif, kunefe, sutluc, borek, India curry, sometimes also hummus. 
This is also a place for experimental art project, like window dances, drama. And of course we also open workshop and course of Cezve coffee culture and brewing.

nameZh: 小茶栽堂 - 永康旗艦店
addressZh: 臺北市大安區永康街7-1號
descriptionZh:
本著「將台灣的美好介紹給世界」的初衷，小茶裁堂於2006年創立於台北，堅持100%台灣產自然栽培茶，無農藥、無化肥的純淨好茶，甫榮獲2020「世界品質評鑑大賞」金獎肯定，搭配獲獎無數的設計實力，打造由裡而外的經典品味。
「以茶為圓心，烘焙為半徑，畫生活為圓，品味幸福的圓滿。」
以茶入味，是我們茶食的特色，堅持自然原味無添加，結合西式甜點與純正台灣茶葉，在市場上以中高價、客製化的精品禮盒榮獲客户肯定。
深耕永康商圈已久，在臨近東門捷運出口的位置，成立旗艦店，致力為大眾提供最精緻的品茶體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7-1, Yongkang St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Zenique was founded in 2006 in Taipei with an initial aspiration to “introduce Taiwan’s wonders to the world.” Thanks to its insistence on using 100% Taiwan-made teas that are pesticide-free and chemical fertilizer-free, the shop received the Golden Award of the Monde Selection 2020. With its award-winning designing techniques, the shop created a classic brand whose values are reflected by its products.
“With tea as the center and tea baking as the radius, we draw the circle of life, whereby we taste the roundness of happiness.”
Allowing teas to bring out their flavors is the characteristic of tea-time snacks made by Zenique. We combine western desserts with pure Taiwanese teas, and insist on preserving the original flavor without using additives, winning trust from customers with our exquisite customized gift sets that are sold at intermediate prices.
Zenique has established its presence in Yong Kang Shopping District for quite a while; it decided to set up a flagship store near the exit of MRT Dongmen Station; it is dedicated to providing the general public with the finest tea-drinking experience.

nameZh: Loving Hut 愛家國際餐飲 台北和平店
addressZh: 臺北市大安區和平東路二段175巷7號
descriptionZh: Loving Hut 愛家國際連鎖餐飲-台北光復店是一間有特色的素食店，提供全植物性餐點，兼顧健康及美味，用餐環境溫馨舒適，靠近國父紀念館捷運站，交通便利。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7, Ln. 175, Sec. 2, Heping E. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Loving Hut Taiwan’s Taipei Guangfu Branch is a unique vegetarian restaurant offering healthful and delicious dishes that are completely plant-based. The eatery features a nice comfy dining environment and can be easily accessed through public transportation, as it is close to the MRT Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall Station.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區復興南路一段66號
descriptionZh: 飄香台北東區20年，創立於1999年，老闆為了感恩妻子與他共度人生谷底，給予他創業上的鼓勵，特別將店名取為「同心圓」，象徵夫妻同心，圓滿如意之意。同心圓製餅秉持百分百純鮮奶製作，不加一滴水，保留最經典好吃的天然美味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 66, Sec. 1, Fuxing S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1999, Crystal Pancake (同心圓) has been in operation in Taipei’s Eastern District for two decades. To thank his wife for accompanying him through hard times and supporting him throughout his career, the owner named the shop 同心圓 (concentric circles), which also symbolizes their harmonious relationships and dedication to each other. The couple insists on making the batter with milk instead of water to preserve classic pancakes’ natural flavor.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區信義路四段199巷7號
descriptionZh:
2020世界巧克力大賽金牌得主，職人精神的巧克力主題甜點店。
2019為台灣首度在國際比賽全球總決賽，拿下「全球最佳白巧克力霸」獎項。 創辦人-主廚葵妮，因對巧克力的狂愛，專程到歐洲比利時的巧克力學院研習，親訪歐洲專業規模的可可豆研磨廠，並花兩年時間精選高品質的巧克力原料，從蛋糕、餅乾、飲品到各式手工巧克力，皆訴求單一產區可可豆與稀有可可豆品種。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7, Ln. 199, Sec. 4, Xinyi Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
As a shop of chocolate and sweets, Q Sweet won a gold medal in the 2020 International Chocolate Awards and a bronze medal in the category of white chocolate bars, with inclusions or pieces in the same awards in 2019.
Enthusiastic about chocolate, Queenie, the founder of Q Sweet, flew to Europe to study in the Chocolate Academy in Belgium. During her stay there, she visited professional-scale cocoa processing factories across Europe and spent two years in looking for premium-quality raw materials for chocolate making. She uses only single-origin and rare cocoa to make a variety of products from cakes and cookies to drinks and handmade chocolate.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區忠孝東路三段196號
descriptionZh:
泉發蜂蜜行創立於西元1919年自日治時期即於今台北縣蘆洲地區始從事養蜂業並生產、製造、批發零售、內外銷各式蜜蜂產品，是台灣少數自產自製自銷的蜂蜜家族今已傳承數代，品質有百年光陰作為保證，現共有9家分店及百貨專櫃。

堅持「自然、健康、無糖」的信念，除了各式蜂蜜產品，還有蜂蜜、蜂王乳製成的保養品以及外帶的飲料吧台。飲料吧台的最大特色，就是使用100%純蜂蜜來代替糖。此外，所有的果汁也選用新鮮的水果美味鮮榨，更有蜂王乳活力養顏飲、花粉養顏健康飲等健康飲品，喝了健康無負擔。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 196, Sec. 3, Zhongxiao E. Rd. Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Chyuan Fa Honey was founded in 1919 and has been in the beekeeping, honey manufacturing, and bee product retailing and wholesale business in Luzhou since the Japanese colonial period. It is one of the few family beekeeping businesses in Taiwan that manufactures and sells its own products and that has been passed down through the generations. Over a century of experience helps guarantee its product quality. The shop now has nine branches and department store counters. 
Upholding the belief in "natural, healthful, sugar-free products," Chyuan Fa Honey not only sells honey and bee products, but also body care products made from honey and royal jelly; it also has a drink bar. The most unique feature of the drink bar is that it uses 100% pure honey instead of sugar. In addition, fresh fruits are used to make all its delicious juices. Healthy beverages, such as energy collagen drink with royal jelly and collagen drink with bee pollen, are beneficial to your health.

descriptionZh: 以重現在法國體驗法式甜點的美好經驗為初衷，修業回台後致力於創作代表自我風格的甜點，主廚Lai用精細的手藝，將法式甜點融入台灣在地食材，擅長搭配獨具風格的台灣茶，當季水果，將東方元素融入法式甜點工藝，碰撞出味覺的新滋味，傳遞個人法式風格美學。

descriptionEn: Inspired by a wonderful experience in tasting French desserts in France,  Chef Lai commits herself to making her own style of desserts after she returned to Taiwan from her studies in France. Armed with her outstanding skills, she made French desserts with local Taiwan ingredients. Chef Lai excels at matching unique Taiwanese tea with in-season fruits and incorporating these oriental elements into the techniques of making French desserts. By giving something new to your taste buds, Chef Lai is able to convey her take on French aesthetic.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區羅斯福路三段333巷9號B1
descriptionZh:
唐山出版社為社長陳隆昊先生創立於1982年，成立宗旨在出版發行左派、非主流、為弱勢發聲維權的書刊，至今即將邁入40年。1984年，延續出版社的方向與精神，成立了唐山書店。多年下來，以人文社會科學專業書店的風格，成為島內進步的象徵，思想前衛的學生必訪之處。

唐山書店雖搬過三次家，但為節省租金一直都在地下室，因而唐山書店用一個很貼切的「店標」來說明自己──「在地下室幽暗的微光中，為您張羅知識之海」
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: B1F., No. 9, Ln. 333, Sec. 3, Roosevelt Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Tonson Publications Inc. was founded 40 years ago by Mr. Chen Lung-hao in 1982, with the purpose of publishing leftist, non-mainstream books that give a voice to the disadvantaged and to protect their rights. In 1984, Tonson Bookstore was established to continue to work in the same direction/spirit as the publishing house. As a bookstore specializing in selling humanities and social sciences books,  it has become symbolic of the progress Taiwan has made over the years. Students with a forward-thinking mindset must visit the bookstore.
Tonson Bookstore has moved three times. However, to save on rent, it has always been in the basement. Thus, it describes itself in a label attached to the store as follows: We create a sea of knowledge in the dim light of the basement for you to dive into.

addressZh: 臺北市大安區和平東路三段352號
descriptionZh:
位於大安區的複合式復古概念選品店，搜集日本昭和物，歐美選物，代理日本Future Funk 手錶，英國Meters 藍牙降噪耳機。OLD & NEW， FUN & COOL是我們的經營理念，復古中帶著時尚的生活美學，Apothecary的老藥房風格Style，一眼望去，新與舊物品雜陳，饒富生活趣味。我們希望重現美好年代的簡單生活，引進國外許多復古生活用品、復古概念禮品、雜貨、餐具等。

獨家代理日本Future Funk 直立迴轉錶、英國GR琺瑯馬克杯、英國Ｍeters 發光VU表無線藍牙耳機。2021年開發以斯帖皇后飾品系列，以施華洛世奇水晶、日本伊勢志摩珍珠作為產品亮點，結合復古造型打造出『凡看見以斯帖的都喜悅她』這樣的飾品。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 352, Sec. 3, Heping E. Rd. Da’an Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Urban Apothecory is a nostalgic shop located in Daan district that specializes in Showa-period Japanese and European/American items. The company is also an agent for Japan's Future Funk watch and England's Meters bluetooth noise-reducing headphones. Old & new,  fun & cool is our management concept. Apothecary's old pharmacy style has a bit of nostalgia and a bit of fashion. The store has a mixture of old and new things that brings a bit of fun to life. We hope to bring back the simple life of a bygone era by introducing many old everyday items from overseas, including gifts, dining ware, and miscellaneous items. 

We are the exclusive agent for Japan's Future Funk watch, England's GR enamel mugs, and Ｍeters glowing VU bluetooth headphones. In 2021 we began to introduce the Queen Esther accessory series with Swarovski crystals and Ise-Shima pearls. These nostalgic accessories are based on the idea that "all who sees Esther all loves her."

addressZh: 臺北市大安區忠孝東路四段60-2號
descriptionZh:
明亮廚房是泛著奶油甜香的故事之境，
行列成隊的手工餅如小精靈，
填滿了外婆和媽咪的金黃歲月。
沒有機器制式製程的冷冰冰，
她們篩粉揉麵的身影是媽咪里啦最美麗的風景。
嚴選優質進口奶油與食材，再搭配各類配料素材，
新鮮水果、核桃、雜糧、花茶葉…，匠心巧手。
繁複工序造就數十款獨家風味，圓滿了各種場景。
自用、伴手、慶生、喜餅，五星級指定下午茶點心…。
從市場臨時攤起家打拼到專業化經營，一步一腳印，
三代傳承不改初心，每一片都是溫馨叮嚀。
會說話的餅乾添柴加火，祝福、加油、搞怪或傳情，
裹滿厚厚心意一口咬下，所嚐即所想，美味又動聽。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 60-2, Sec. 4, Zhongxiao E. Rd. Da’an Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
The bright kitchen filled with the fragrance of butter is out of a storybook. 
The handmade cakes lined up in a row look like little elves that are 
filled with grandma and mom's love and care. 
There is no cold feeling of machinery. 
The image of them kneading dough is the most beautiful sight at Mom's Patisserie. 
We use specially selected butter and ingredients, which are matched with a great variety of 
fresh fruit, walnuts, grains, floral tea leaves, and other items. 
A complicated process is used to create dozens of unique flavors that fit all types of needs, 
from self-consumption to gifts, birthday celebrations, wedding gifts, and for five-star hotel afternoon tea. 
We began with a humble stall at the market. Working as a family, we worked hard to get to where we are today. 
Three generations of experience and constantly reminding each other. 
These pastries add fun, blessing, encouragement, naughtiness, and love to a conversation. 
Each rich bite brings back memories and feelings.

addressZh: 台北市大安區羅斯福路2段75號2樓
descriptionZh:
e書漫 漫畫雜誌愛心空間

提供工作給喜憨兒/設立一間獨立貓屋做小浪貓中途/共享工作室/雜誌, 漫畫, 報紙, 網路,正版DVD/睡眠咖啡廳/按摩椅/行動辦公室/餐飲/背包客/安靜互尊重的空間

店內全場360度全景環境連結

https://goo.gl/maps/xDmswCTwMdLBE3316

為維持安靜及客人隱私 現場恕不開放參觀

提供現今社會大眾一個清淨舒適【安靜】的空間，

提供 漫畫 雜誌 報紙 文書電腦上網、wifi、DVD、VR設備、按摩椅、共享辦公室(列印 傳真 掃描 影印 電源插座)、美味現做餐飲料

《e書漫》 開幕於1999.08

2002.05.18因e書漫西門店創立故由漫畫王羅斯福店 改名為 ~ e書漫羅斯福店 ~(西門店後期因被新房東惡意收購去經營不善而收掉 )

2018年小店長從原股東老闆那邊頂下本店後開始規劃改變店內未來經營方向

2019雇用AI機器人帶位送餐並提供職缺給喜憨兒、心路、伊甸基金會。

2020年設立書屋區促進紙本漫畫流通於民眾手上並跟動保會合作設立貓咪認養貓屋<喵寶閣> 支持以認養代替購買

2021 正名為 《e書漫》漫畫雜誌愛心空間

新增QQ跟零重力按摩椅/線上會員/掃碼LINE點餐、預約

#《e書漫》漫畫雜誌愛心空間 為 獨立管理服務團隊,無企業及總店分店關係!!故台北市其他類似店名的店家環境.消費方式.折扣活動.服務方式都不同。

#附設淋浴設備讓上班族午休想沖個澡讓精神好一點

業務族在外面流滿身汗後想沖澡清爽一點

背包客到處逛流滿身汗也想沖個澡舒服一下

提供按摩椅服務讓您隨時可放心享受按摩

每個位置都提供插頭給自行攜帶筆記型電腦的您~

讓商務族群可當辦公室~

也是讓工作忙碌的你(妳)有個安靜休息充電的好去處喔
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 75, Sec. 2, Roosevelt Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
E-comics     A great comic and magazine space
Providing work to Down syndrome patients/designing an independent cat house to be used as a midway care center for stray cats/shared studio/magazines, comics, newspapers, Internet, licensed DVDs/sleep coffee shop/massage chairs/mobile office/food and drinks/hostel/a quiet and mutually respectful space
360 degree full-view environment link
https://goo.gl/maps/xDmswCTwMdLBE3316 
To keep quiet and protect the privacy of customers, Soothman is not open for visitation. 
Providing the modern public with a quiet and comfortable space
Provide comics, magazines, newspapers, books, computer Internet access, Wi-Fi, DVDs, VR equipment, massage chairs, shared office (printing, faxing, scanning, photocopying, power sockets), and delicious freshly prepared meals and beverages
Soothman opened in August 1999.
May 18, 2002 - Soothman was originally the Man Hua Wang (Roosevelt store), which changed its name to Soothman (Roosevelt store) (the Ximen store was later hostilely acquired by the landlord, then closed due to poor management).
2018 - The store manager began to plan and change the store's future management direction after taking over the store from the original owner. 
2019 - Began using AI robots to seat customers and deliver meals. Provided jobs to Down syndrome patients, the Syin-Lu Foundation, and the Eden Foundation. 
2020 - Set up a book house area to promote the exchange of paperback comics among the public. Cooperated with the Animal Protection Office to set up a cat adoption office "Meow Treasure House" to support adopting instead of purchasing cats. 
2021 - Changed the name to Soothman Comic and Magazine Care Space. 
Added QQ and zero-gravity massage chair/online member/LINE scan meal ordering and reservation 
Soothman Comic and Magazine Care Space is an independently managed service team with no corporate or headquarters/branch office relationship!! Thus, we have a store environment, a spending method, discount activities, and services that differ from other stores in Taipei with a similar name. 
#Shower facilities allow office workers to take a shower during their lunch break so they can feel more energetic. 
Sales people working and sweating outside can also feel clean after a shower. 
Backpackers that have been exploring and sweating may also want to shower and feel refreshed. 
Massage chairs provide you with enjoyable massages at any time. 
Every location has a power socket for your laptop computer~
So that business people can use Soothman as an office~
But also provide a busy you with a quiet place to recharge and rest.

nameZh: 雷諾瓦拼圖文化坊(師大店)
addressZh: 台北市大安區泰順街44巷27號
descriptionZh:
1990年一幅印象派大師雷諾瓦作品『葛樂蒂磨坊』，成為堆砌雷諾瓦拼圖文化坊的第一塊磚，以師大總店作為分享拼圖嗜好的起點，秉持著「拼圖，不只是拼圖」的初衷，期許透過拼圖帶給坊友多元豐富的藝術饗宴，堅持提供品質優良的拼圖與裱框服務，呈現極簡藝術的生活美學。透過拼圖的活動成為個人與家庭，在休閒生活與幸福相聚的重要時刻，拉近人與人之間的溫度與距離，透過拼圖，認識並豐富美好的每一刻。

美好的藝術，從「心」出發─

美好的事物都值得用心感受，有人在追求極致精細中獲得享受，有人在肆意玩樂中獲得藝術本身給人自由暢想的美好。透過拼圖，一塊放鬆、一塊分享、一塊挑戰，共享心藝術心生活。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionZh:
兩位創辦人一位為彰藝園掌中劇團第三代傳人，1989年創立彰藝坊古典戲偶工作室，專精於戲偶的製作與創新；一位修習美術，走訪台灣鄉間一間間老布店，蒐羅一塊塊被單花布。2002年，偶相與花樣工作室成立，結合兩人專長，設計銷售台灣花布文創品及傳統布袋戲偶。

品牌定位建議「台灣花布的生活偶遇」融合店內兩大特色元素─花布與戲偶，主力焦點聚焦台灣花布，以現代手法重新演繹傳統，將台灣人文融入生活日常。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 27, Ln. 47, Yongkang St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
One of the two founders is a third-generation Changyiyuan Hand Puppet Troupe performer. He/she founded the Changyifang Classic Hand Puppet Workshop in 1989 to focus on the creation and innovation of hand puppet shows. The other founder majored in art and travels around Taiwan in search of old cloth shops and cloth. In 2002 they founded a workshop that combined their expertise in hand puppets and cloth with the goal of designing and selling Taiwanese printed cloth items and traditional cloth hand puppets. 

The brand integrated the two main elements of the store: printed cloth and hand puppets. Bu Diao focuses on Taiwan printed cloth and uses modern methods to reinterpret and express tradition, thereby bringing Taiwanese culture into daily life.

The store owner values health. She carefully selects quality goods without putting the attractiveness of product appearance as top priority for consideration. She also passes on the concept of healthy eating and cooking methods to consumers, keeping her customers healthy. "A kind owner’s grocery store that offers delicious products. Quality over presentability!" Come and pick up great products at Hai Wei. They are guaranteed to be harmless to health!

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段329號

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 329, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Enjoy Taiwanese Rice from the Rice Shop That Lasts a Century
The renowned rice shop in Dadaocheng is now operated by the fifth-generation owner. In the Western-style red brick building that dated back to over 100 years ago, the rice-themed restaurant makes the rice-grinding family business shine again. Each bowl of rice, freshly ground and cooked, is served with sincerity."Tainong 71 (Yihchuan Aromatic Rice)" Freshly ground. Freshly cooked. Sweet smell of taro lingers all around. All the ingredients come from the local market and merchants, and each dish is enriched with a local essence. 

Back in the days, their ancestors shipped all the delicate rice from around Taiwan to this rice shop. And now, Rice & Shine takes it from there. We humbly worked on the 100-year-old grain-sunning grounds. From a grain of rice to a bowl of rice, we relish the old time of Dadaocheng.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段75號
descriptionZh: 一面行醫、一面製藥，藥有深究，醫術精敏，名傳鄉里，生意日進，遠近顧客集中交易，財源廣進，擴張物資，成為縣城中一流名商。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Liu An Tang Chinese Medicine Co.
addressEn: No. 75, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

In the year 1913, Liu An Tang was founded in Huian, Fujian. The two brothers, Yang Jingru and Yang Chengfa, practiced medicine and pharmacy, offering remedies to help the community. They became renowned in their hometown.

In 1949, they moved to Taiwan, and the tradition of alchemical medicine and herbal remedies has been passed down through three generations. The passion for their craft burns brightly. They carefully select natural ingredients and use their expertise and sincerity to process and prepare herbs, plants, insects, and fish into secret formulas and pills. They use low heat, precise decoction, and slow cooking to create herbal cuisine that provides care and nourishment for every season.

Just as their ancestors taught them, they believe that proper balance in the body requires the use of herbs and minerals. When the body is healthy, the spirit thrives—never forgetting the guidance of their forebears. Liu An Tang, a century-old herbal store, stands on a foundation of a century-old building, dedicated to sincerely safeguarding the health of their customers.

【Key points of transformation】

Integrating a century-old herbal medicine shop into historical heritage, radiating the light of benevolence for the well-being of all.

By delving into the historical assets of the brand, we present a brand-new slogan, “Six Meridians Steady, Centennial Sincerity,” to expound upon the humanistic qualities and framework of the century-old herbal medicine shop. The store’s space features a story corridor that traces the historical paths of the old house and the old shop. At the storefront, we arrange the brand image and seasonal theme products, discarding the heavy impression of the old store’s name.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段96號
descriptionZh: 可愛的童趣插畫鐵盒與獨特細緻口感。零添加，唯有嚴選食材用心烘焙，每一片才值得精心品味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn: Monkey Mars landed on Earth in 2013 and introduced the Monkey Mars Cookies. The uniquely delicious cookies comes in cute children illustration metal containers. Our cookies have become an instant hit with the customers during its debut. The founder was a worker who developed the unique and novel cookie flavors and different trip series products by incorporating his foreign tourism cultural experiences and diet habits of different nations. We insist on zero additives. Only by careful bakery and strictly selecting the best ingredients can we make each cookie worthwhile. Because trips need no additives, and only the natural flavors are intriguing.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區重慶北路二段172號
descriptionZh: 外觀為古典巴洛克式建築，飯店客房氛圍成熟與內斂，巧妙的空間設計理念，以貼心真誠、以客為尊的優質感受給休閒渡假的客人真正的體驗溫馨住宿。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 172, Sec. 2, Chongqing N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The first to third floors are preserved as a historical monument, and were originally the old residence of Jin-Tu Ye (known as the pineapple king of Taiwan). The Ye residence was built in 1926 and completed in 1929. The first to third floors of the building looks like a classical baroque style monument with red bricks and washed stone structure. The fourth floor and higher is brand new structure made with gray granite. The new and the old look like two conflicting elements that are totally unique. The hotel room atmosphere is mature and restrained without loosing the passion in its clever space design concept. We offer intimate, sincere, and customer-first high quality services to ensure the most relaxing and heartfelt accommodations for our guests.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段161號
descriptionZh: 以竹編類和木製的生活用品為主 但是隨著時代的改變 產品走向，也以天然無毒環保為取向 木竹製的碗筷托盤餐具 砧板 牙刷 鬃刷 竹編提籃為主流。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 161, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

Grandma’s kitchen stove and cabinets are my treasure troves. The woven bag carries not just vegetables but memories of strolling around town, showing off.

Steamers, bamboo baskets, and rice buckets take on entirely new roles. We playfully reenact old traditions. When the City God’s birthday arrived, the tables along the street stretched on and on.

Today, basic ingredients are still here. Now, they’re joined by the colors of music, chess, books, and art. Preparing a table rich with flavors, we adorn everyday life with a sense of nostalgia.

Everyone’s a maker, showcasing their skills, and unleashing their creativity. As Di Hua Street enters its seventh generation, Da Hua Store magically transforms into a wooden coffee shop!

【Key points of transformation】

Transforming from a general store into a grandma’s treasure trove kitchen, specializing in traditional bamboo and wooden kitchenware such as woven bags and steamers. Da Hua Store repositions itself with a fresh perspective as a “Coffee Shop from Bamboo and Wood” and a slogan “Grandma’s Kitchen Transformed.” Embracing the maker culture, it revives traditional daily items with a modern twist and creates a setting that breaks free from the conventional general store image. The result is a brand space that offers both comfort and the joy of treasure hunting, attracting a diverse crowd, including creative individuals and art enthusiasts.

nameZh: 新驛旅店 - 台北車站三館

It is at the transportation hub of Taipei City and is convenient for any meal, refreshment, playing, and entertainment activities. The first floor lobby of the hotel is comfortable and bright. The clerks at the first floor are energetic and professional, and provides 24 hour customer services. Each floor of the hotel has a theme design. nameZh: 樂芙莉 LOVELY 手工貼身內著
addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段186號
descriptionZh: 提供特為台灣人體形立體剪裁的手工貼身內著、內褲、家居服，以蕾絲布疋商的專業基礎，在台灣本地買紗、織布、染色，並在大稻埕店頭設計、製作完成。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 186, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

In 1998, a young man from Tainan, Taiwan, embarked on a journey to the north with just a suitcase and a dream of starting a business. He began his entrepreneurial journey with lace fabrics, which not only connected him to the world but also established his presence in the global market. Mastering the characteristics of lace fabrics, he expanded his business, becoming a supplier to major brands like Victoria’s Secret and serving the European and American markets.

In 2017, this visionary entrepreneur, together with his spouse, founded LOVELY, breathing new life into old houses in Dadaocheng. They created a fresh lingerie experience, meticulously presenting every thread of fabric in the intricate details of intimate wear. From the front of the store to the back workshop, the exquisite craftsmanship of Taiwanese artisans is showcased, tailored to the three-dimensional contours of the human body, harmonizing with one’s figure.

At 18, crowned with a sense of elegance, or at 80, wrapped in a dreamy aura of youth, a woman’s charm is not defined by her age. It emanates from inner confidence, radiating from within to the outside. By wearing LOVELY, you can dress yourself in a place where others may not see but where you can truly be yourself. Let your inner beauty shine, aligning with the most beautiful version of yourself. How LOVELY You Are!

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段92號
descriptionZh: 店內除了人蔘、當歸、杜仲、何首烏..等上百種傳統中藥材，還有整套藥膳食補系列與幾十種來自世界各國的花草茶包。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 92, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

Time spent leisurely immersed in a bowl of ancient herbal concoctions…

A cup of soothing herbal tea to relax and relieve the mind’s tension…

A sachet of pure aromatic powder for body and spirit’s rejuvenation...

Angelica sinesis, eucommia ulmoides, tuber fleeceflower; jasmine, pot marigold, rosemary...

This long-standing herbal shop on Dihua Street gathers hundreds of precious herbs and flowers.

When Western floral scents meet Eastern traditional medicine, each plant blends ancient wisdom to create a unique taste.

The fragrances grown from the earth soothe our weary bodies, for relaxation, for romance, and most importantly, for our well-being!

【Key points of transformation】

The blending of Western floral scents and Eastern traditional Chinese medicine conveys the fragrant path of healing and wellness.

With an expanded product line, the original name “United Chinese Medicine” was no longer suitable and not conducive to online searches. After the rebranding, the focus shifted to the combination of Eastern traditional Chinese medicine and Western flowers and herbs, under the new name “United Han Fang,” creating a softer brand style that breaks away from the traditional impression of a Dihua Street Chinese medicine shop. The store space was designed with the concept of a Chinese medicine and herbal museum, featuring herb plants and an experiential area at the entrance, creating a sensory and healing atmosphere.

The shop has incorporated the Kaohsiung Bunun Tribe and Xiaolin Pingpu Tribe traditional crafts in its designs, and is filled with panoramic wood carving arts. Visitors can come enjoy the handicrafts and taste the delicious plum products. The restaurant space exhibits diversity and promotes the "win-win spirit!"

descriptionEn: Established in Shanghai in 1936, "Little Garden" came to Taiwan in 1949 and was first opened in Ximending, and it gradually moved into the footwear market in Taiwan to let the beautiful embroidered flowers bloom on the shoes of women in Taiwan. In 2016, Little Garden moved to Dadaocheng where the new and the old collide, and continued to carry on this culturally and historically significant shoe brand forward. Since its establishment until today, Little Garden Sheau Hua Yuan still views its embroidery art and shoe making craft skills as a personal pride and obligation. After three quarters of a century has passed by, we still insist on producing our shoes manually and locally.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段203號
descriptionZh: 堅持販售野生烏魚子，於雲林專業曬場使用古法日曬技術製作，嚴格把關品質及口味，讓每一片都充滿濃郁海味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 203, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

In the winter, they arrive, embracing their eggs and following the currents, while the schools of fish return to the south. Employing ancient methods, the mullet roes are sun-dried with care, soaking in the treasures of the island’s sea breeze and warm sunshine. Wild mullet roe, translucent and glistening, bursts with freshness when savored.

This is the most authentic and rare seafood found on Dihua Street. For 30 years, they have exclusively partnered with a sun-drying field in Yunlin, benefiting from the perfect timing and location. The home of wild mullet roe has been passed down through three generations of dried goods traders.

It all began with the traditional wholesale business started by the grandfather, and now the mother’s homemade sauces grace the table. Generation after generation, each day surpasses the last. Try a slice of roasted mullet roe, drizzled with a spoonful of scallop XO sauce over a plate of rice, and let the family’s exquisite and delicious taste dance on your taste buds, mixing with the sunshine for you to enjoy!

【Key points of transformation】

A Revived Image of a Dihua Street Old Shop, Vividly Showcasing Wild Mullet Roe Specialization

For 30 years, they’ve followed the ancient method of sun-drying to produce dried wild mullet roe. However, their unique specialty had not been clearly presented, and the original interior design had a modern feel that didn’t match the atmosphere of the old buildings on Dihua Street or the warm character of the team. In this transformation, the brand’s Corporate Identity (CI) was redesigned, and elements such as the flooring, display cabinets, and signage were revamped.

The theme “Sea’s Ultimate Freshness, Returning to Your Palate” was introduced, along with installations like island displays and suspended mullet roe wall decals, vividly showcasing the characteristics of wild mullet roe and the traditional sun-drying method.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區南京西路149號
descriptionZh: 成立於民國五年，三代傳承，百年滷味店，精於滷製品，約有四十種，以自然健康為理念。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 149, Nanjing West Road, Datong District, Taipei City, Taiwan 103
descriptionEn: Established in 1916, this store with more than 100 years now is operated by its third generation. It specializes in braised foods, about 40 types, based on natural and healthy concept.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段220號
descriptionZh: 富自山中迄今開業３０年，重新裝潢後以質感日系雜貨舖的全新面貌與大家見面。店內最高人氣的是台灣水果乾，天然無添加、每一口都能嘗到水果的鮮甜滋味，特色產品為嘉義高山手工製作的黑糖，您也能在這找到時下最流行的健康或生酮飲食材料，如藜麥、奇亞籽、有機麥片等等，歡迎來富自山行挖寶喔！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 220, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

40 years ago, there was a young boy named A-Fu from Meishan, Chiayi. He carried dried golden needle mushrooms grown by his father and headed north to pursue his dreams. After a few years, he started a small grocery store on Dihua Street in Taipei. He would exchange seven large boxes of canned goods for a single can of fresh milk. The cardboard boxes used for storing goods served as a crib for his children and a canvas for their doodles. Despite the hardships, honesty was their true treasure.

Handcrafted brown sugar from Alishan’s white sugarcane, Aiyu jelly for cooling down in the summer, and the fragrant aroma of dried goods and nuts roasted to perfection. The pure and simple beauty of mountain produce was passed down through generations.

From the mountains to the city, from around the world to Taiwan, the richness from the mountains warms the hearts and stomachs of people like you and me.

【Key points of transformation】
The old dried goods grocery store gets a fresh makeover, transforming into a Japanese-style cultural and creative shop.

With Alishan brown sugar and Aiyu jelly as their star products, Fushan Store expanded from wholesale to retail. However, their original name couldn’t be trademarked, which was hindering their product expansion. The brand was renamed “Fuzi Shan Zhong,” focusing on the uniqueness of mountain produce, extending the imagery of abundance from the mountains. The shop’s interior was revamped in the style of an old Kyoto store, turning the old grocery into a creative general store.

nameZh: 五色本物(永利百崧食品行)
addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段143號
descriptionZh:
本店家參與老店改造計畫，品牌名稱：五色本物
品牌定位：原色雜糧＆海味老舖
說明：永利百崧專售五榖雜糧類食品及特色海產，品牌定位由此而來
品牌命名：以「五色養生」作為品牌的價值主張。
「五色」是自然概念的延伸，講求天然非加工過的商品顏色；「物有所本」，講求食物的溯源，與土地的連結。品牌命名「五色本物」象徵源取之天然、擁有自然本色的真材食物。
品牌論述：五色養生，物有所本 ─ 五色本物ColorFoods，干貝、蠔乾、扁魚乾、小魚乾、蝦米…，那是阿公小時候的純樸漁村記憶，還有阿姑的手工干貝醬美味無敵。黃豆黑豆紅豆，紅米白米黑糙米長糯米…，產自哪裡，每一樣海產、雜糧都有來歷。白綠黑紅黃裨益肺肝腎心脾，電腦一族多吃紅，缺乏運動補點綠，回歸食材最初的本色，五色搭配均衡健體。迪化街老牌南北貨行永利百崧轉型五色本物，順口養生賞心悅目，找回活力的人生新彩度！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.143, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
The store has participated in the old store transformation project. Brand name: ColorFoods
Brand positioning  
Black grains & old seafood store
Note: Yong Li Bai Song specializes in grain foods and specialty seafood, hence the brand positioning
Brand name
Note: Brand value proposition of “Colors and Macrobiotics” 
“Colors” is an extension of the concept of nature, with natural, non-artificial colors as the product appeal:
“Foods” emphasizes the origin of food and its connection with the land.
The brand name “ColorFoods” symbolizes authentic food derived from natural ingredients with natural colors. 
Brand ideology
Colors, macrobiotics and food - ColorFoods
Scallop, dried oyster, dried flat fish, dried small fish, dried shrimps etc.
Nostalgic memory of the rustic fishing village during grandpa’s childhood,
And the mouthwatering handmade XO sauce from aunty.
Soybean, black bean, adzuki bean, red rice, white rice, black husked rice, sen glutinous rice etc.,
Each seafood ingredient and grain features traceability, regardless of where it is from.
White, green, black, red, yellow nourishes the lungs, liver, kidneys, heart, and spleen. 
Office workers should consume more red colored food, while those lacking exercise should consume more green good.
Returning to the basic colors of food to achieve balanced health.
Old store on Dihua Street Yong Li Bai Song is rebranded as ColorFoods,
Smooth-tasting, macrobiotic and aesthetically pleasing food will endow you with brand new, vibrant lifestyle!

addressZh: 臺北市大同區延平北路二段203號
descriptionZh:
南投松柏坑起家，再爬上阿里山高海拔
陳家三代種茶、作茶、賣茶、說茶
露寒晨曦中看一株株抽芽，冬去春來採收朝霧夕霞
熱火餘溫焙出陣陣芳香，翠玉青心金萱，四季春波蕩漾
從家鄉的綠色山間起飛，茶的氣味不曾迷航
來杯烏龍茶吧，陳家三兄妹合力把最好的奉上
大稻埕寶堂茶行，有一杯蝶米等你來品嚐
然後，我們繼續飛翔~
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 203, Sec. 2, Yanping N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Started out at Song Bo Keng in Nantou, Boton Tea has ascended to high elevations on Alishan
Three generations of the Chen family plants, produces, sells and lives tea
Observing the tea plants sprout in the early morning of the cold winter and harvest the tea in the morning mist or afterglow
With the remnant of the fiery heat emanates the fragrant bouquet of Cuiyu, green tip, and Jinxuan tea, creating a spring-like ambiance in different seasons
Rising from the green mountains of hometown, the scent of the tea is unmistakable
Enjoy a cup of oolong, the Chen siblings have dedicated their lives to serving the best tea
Pay a visit to Boton Tea in Dadaocheng, there is a cup of tea waiting for you
Then, we shall continue flying~

addressEn: No.109, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City

The 160-old house contains the memories of 3 family generations over the last 6 decades

Let us design your Chinese New Year’s gift boxes and betrothal gifts

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段212號
descriptionZh: 中藥堆裡打滾的務實男孩，遇見從小精通廚藝的熱情女孩，迪化街上夫妻協力拼三十餘載。對症更要對味，好藥材也是好食材，誠天下葯食鋪劉老闆精選優質藥材，搭配老闆娘的料理配方，兩人發揮所長合力研究開發。藥燉排骨、四物湯、薑母鴨…，每包藥膳經過嚴謹程序，調配出專屬於「誠天下葯食鋪」的美味配方。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.212, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: When the pragmatic boy who grew up in a traditional Chinese medicine store met the girl with incredible culinary skills, they forged a legacy on Dihua Street that will last more than 3 decades and counting.  Traditional Chinese medicine must be effective and palatable at the same time because good medicinal herbs are also great food ingredients. Medichef’s owner The finest medicinal herbs meticulously handpicked by Mr. Liu are combined with his wife’s culinary skills to develop the remarkable cuisine.   Be it Chinese Herbal Pork Ribs Soup, Four Herbs Soup or Ginger Duck Stew, each sachet of herbal medicine is formulated according to rigorous procedure in order to create Medichef’s unique flavors.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段191號
descriptionZh:
北回歸線走過小漁村，日頭赤炎，海水正藍
六十多年前，阿公的澎玉156漁船滿載首航
澎湖的孩子來到台北大稻埕起家立業
吃慣了新鮮魚獲的嘴，難忘家鄉山海滋味
小卷找來海潮香氣，沙丁現吃煮湯兩相宜
堅果雜糧粒粒飽滿，爽脆無比
從漁村落戶舊時曬穀場，新一代重新揚帆
迪化街一段191號，在大稻埕遇見澎湖灣
挑選各地澎湃山珍海味，讓識貨人乘興而歸
嚐一口產地直達的鮮甜，遙想海上艷陽天
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.191, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

Crossing the Tropic of Cancer through a Small Fishing Village, the Sun Burns Bright, and the Sea is Azure.

Over sixty years ago, Grandfather’s Penghu number 156 fishing boat set sail fully loaded, and a journey began. The children of Penghu arrived in Taipei’s Dadaocheng to start a new life. Having grown up savoring the fresh catch of the sea, they couldn’t forget the flavors of their hometown’s mountains and oceans.

The cuttlefish exudes the aroma of the ocean, while the sardines, whether eaten fresh or in a soup, are equally delightful. The nuts and mixed grains are plump and incredibly crunchy. From a former grain-drying field in the fishing village, the new generation sets sail once again.

Penghu Bay, located at No. 191, Section 1 of Dihua Street, is where shoppers can select various Penghu delicacies and seafood so that discerning customers can return home happily. A taste of the freshness direct from the source, evoking memories of sunny days at sea.

【Key points of transformation】

The Old Dried Goods Store Embarks on a New Journey - Meeting the Penghu Bay in Dadaocheng.

Originally named Cheng Da Hang, the founders, Mr. and Mrs. Chen, came from the fishing village of Huji Islet in Penghu. In 1989, they set up their business on Dihua Street and eventually purchased the current location at No. 191, Section 1 of Dihua Street after several transformations.

In the store, there was a variety of delicacies, but the selection of Penghu products was limited, making it undifferentiated from other dried goods stores. Their primary customers were market vendors, but their business gradually declined.

Through revitalization and guidance, the first-generation owner, Mr. Chen’s father’s fishing boat “JADE BOAT 156,” was combined with the store’s house number to create the brand name “191 JADE BOAT.” The space was designed with the imagery of a boat, and the layout was reorganized to introduce more Penghu products. The brand’s positioning is “Delicacies Brought by the Boat from Penghu Bay,” with the slogan “Abundant Seafood, Returning with a Full Boat,” presenting the maritime imagery, symbolizing that customers leave with their hands full.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區寧夏路54號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 54, Ningxia Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, "Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness". With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: "Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: "people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward & punishment and shared results", Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區長安西路193號
descriptionZh:
陳振芳香舖及陳盈州簡介
專營/傳統沉香手工香、臥香、香環、小盤香等製品，陳振芳香舖創始於西元1910年清宣統二年，創始人陳塗，第二代經營人陳金墇接手開創出一片天，最鼎盛時期製香師傅多達十幾人，師傅徒弟一起吃飯需三張大圓桌，可想當時工廠製香的盛況，現由第三代小兒子陳盈州接手，第四代也已傳承，製香工藝傳承邁下一個世紀。
本舖主要產品為中國傳統手藝，採取手工製作，相當費時費力且產量有限。然而隨著半自動化機器的發展也漸漸利用機器輔助，大大縮短製作工時，並有效提升產量和品質。但是傳統技藝的一貫堅持下仍有絕大部分的步驟必須採用手工製作，以維持傳統製香技術的傳承。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.193, Changan W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Chen Zhen Fang Incense Store and the introduction of Ying-chou Chen
Founded in Year 2 of the Xuantong Period during the Qing Dynasty (1910) by Tu Chen, Chen Zhen Fang Incense Store specializes in traditional handcrafted incense such as incense sticks, coil incense, and mini coil incense etc. After the store was inherited by the second generation proprietor Chin-chang Chen, business flourished and the store hired nearly a dozen incense makers in its heyday, so many that they needed 3 large round tables to enjoy a meal, which is a testament to its booming business. Now in the hands of the third generation proprietor Ying-chou Chen, with the fourth generation in the Chen family currently receiving, preparing him to continue the heritage of incense-making into the next century.  
The store’s products are mainly traditional Chinese handicraft made by hand, thus they are time/labor consuming and limited in quantity. With the advent of semi-automatic machinery, the store has significantly reduced manufacturing time while effectively improved production quantity and quality. However, in order to uphold the consistency of the traditional craft, most of the production process still involves manual labor, so as to continue the heritage of traditional incense-making knowhow.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區民生西路80號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 80, Minsheng W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區民族西路33號
descriptionZh:
五行旅店-台北旅樹，位於圓山捷運站一號出口步行三分鐘，是今年新開幕的的青年旅館。
旅店對面即為花博公園，鄰近捷運站、便利超商，周遭生活機能便利，治安良好，適合學生團體及國際觀光客住宿。
五行旅店以東方元素，人文思想為基礎，整體呈現的是60-70年代的眷村風格， 並結合台北圓山在地歷史文化及資源，期盼能將真正的台北城印象，帶給每位入住台北．旅樹的旅人。
我們期待每一位旅人的來訪，我們將致上最好的服務品質，提供給您像家一樣舒適的住宿環境。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 33, Minzu W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Five Elements Hostel, Taipei is situated at a three-minute walking distance from exit 1 of the MRT Yuanshan Station. It is a youth hostel newly opened this year.

Right across the street from the hostel is the Taipei Expo Park. MRT station and convenience stores are also within reach. The surrounding environment is convenient and safe, suitable for student groups and international tourists.

Five Elements Hostel bases its design in oriental elements and philosophy. The overall style is that of a Military Kindred Village in the 60s and 70s. The local history, culture and resources of the Yuanshan area of Taipei are also incorporated in hopes of presenting an authentic impression of the Taipei City to each visitor who stays at Five Elements Hostel, Taipei.

We look forward to receiving each and every traveler. We will provide you with the best service quality and an accommodation as comfortable as your own home.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區環河北路二段199號1樓
descriptionZh:
豆漿農開在台北不熱鬧但是車流量很大的環河北路上的小小角落，大部分來店裡的人，都是偶遇豆漿農，進來前還要問下有沒有零售，確認後才進來的。
對於願意再三回來購買的客人們，我們表示感謝，如果你還沒來過，有空經過時，也請來嚐嚐看，我們用心煮出來的豆漿
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 199, Sec. 2, Huanhe N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Soy Milk Farmer's Shop is situated at a tiny, not so lively corner of the heavily trafficked Huanhe N. Rd. Most of the people discover the shop by chance. They would even double-check if we do sell retail before entering the shop.

For those customers willing to return for more purchases, we really appreciate your support. If you haven’t been here yet, please stop by at leisure for a taste of the soy milk that we make from our heart and soul.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區重慶北路一段11號
descriptionZh:
戴戴相傳，以帽取勝 ─ 樹德百貨 
花蓮的孩子北漂打拼，一台摩托車，後座一箱前腳一袋，
北台灣夜市騎透透，叫賣手帕起家。樸實無華的農村子弟，轉頭賣起了時尚的帽品，台北後站商圈屹立40年，以帽取勝傳到第二代。
拉菲草帽，經典不敗逆襲炎炎夏季，復古老帽，學院街頭風格輕鬆駕馭，造型動物帽，大人小孩萌趣無敵…帽子大王年年赴韓取經，帽款每季翻新，網紅、批發客、潮男潮女，想找哪款來這裡，一起戴上型格和自信！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 11, Sec. 1, Chongqing N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Shute Department Store Wholesale: a two-generation-old business that prides itself on its wide collection of hats

Decades ago, a young man from Hualien went up north to try his luck at his startup business. With a box of handkerchiefs sitting on the rear seat of his scooter and a bag placed at the leg space,

he traveled around the night markets in Northern Taiwan, peddling his goods along the way. Although he comes from a farmer’s family and has a simple and straightforward personality in nature, he ends up selling fashionable hat products at Taipei Rear Station Shopping District. Still standing strong after 40 years of operation, the business has now passed into the hands of the second generation.

Customers visiting our store may find a variety of hats to choose from, including classic raffia hats that help wearers to stay cool on hot summer days; vintage caps that allow people to switch effortlessly between preppy style and street style; and animal hats that instantly turn grown-ups and children into the cutest creatures on Earth. Every year, we fly to South Korea to observe and find out what the current fashion trend is. In addition, we also renew our products on a seasonal basis. Whether you are Internet celebrities, retailers, or individuals looking for stylish looks, our collection of hats is sure to accommodate your needs and provide you with extra character and confidence while you make your bold fashion statement.

nameZh: 德利泰中藥材互動體驗館
addressZh: 臺北市大同區甘谷街26號1樓
descriptionZh: 50年前，一個彰化田尾的農家小孩，悄悄與中藥解下不解之緣～冬日裡母親燉湯補身，生病時抓藥治病，長大後，窮小子立志擺脫農家宿命，迪化街中藥行當學徒，而後自立門戶。1991年赴原產地中國大陸，克服障礙與艱苦，30年潛心鑽研、提升藥材產製與產業運作模式。天南地北蒐羅優質天然本草，銷售台灣與歐美，採收、加工、儲存、配送，科技運作一條龍，驗農藥去雜質，金屬過濾機制確保安全與品質，獨家標準化的原相工法保存藥材本色與功效。是藥也是養生食療，老祖宗的智慧如何讓更多人明瞭？2019年，德利泰邁向中藥文化新紀元，從原料尋根溯源，進階到藥材知識互動體驗。先德人後利己，願人人身心泰然每一天。德利泰Daily Health
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Daily Health Chinese Herbal Medicine Interactive Learning Museum
addressEn: 1F., No. 26, Gangu St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

Five decades ago, a young child from a farm in Tianwei, Changhua, quietly formed an unbreakable bond with traditional Chinese medicine. Growing up, his mother prepared nourishing soups during the winter and used herbs to treat illnesses. As he matured, the determined young man aimed to break free from the fate of a farming family. He became an apprentice at a Dihua Street traditional Chinese medicine shop and eventually established his own business.

In 1991, he traveled to mainland China, the homeland of traditional Chinese medicine, overcoming various obstacles and hardships. Over 30 years, he dedicated himself to researching and improving herbal production and the industry’s operational models. He sourced high-quality natural herbs from around the world, selling them in Taiwan and Europe and the Americas.

From harvesting and processing to storage and distribution, he implemented advanced technology, ensuring pesticide-free, pure herbs with a metal filtration system that guarantees safety and quality. The exclusive standardized approach preserved the natural characteristics and effectiveness of the herbs.

These herbs served not only as medicine but also as dietary therapy for health. How could he help more people understand the wisdom of our ancestors? In 2019, De Li Tai embarked on a new era of traditional Chinese medicine culture, tracing the origins of raw materials and advancing to interactive herbal knowledge experiences.

With the principle of benefiting others before oneself, they aspire to help everyone achieve a calm body and mind, every day.

【Key points of transformation】

De Li Tai, a major Chinese herbal wholesaler, operates with a B2B (business-to-business) model, serving corporate clients. They cover the entire spectrum from import and export wholesale to manufacturing and herb cultivation with a complete production history. The founder personally developed a set of herbal processing and quality control standards for a science-based operation. With a profound commitment to traditional Chinese medicine, they aim to promote the use of Chinese herbs in modern life and create health value.

In this transformation, the brand is positioned as the “Modern Chinese Medicine Originator,” conveying the ultimate dedication to cultivation, production, processing, and distribution of Chinese herbs. They have introduced the key phrase “Original Methods,” highlighting De Li Tai’s dedication to preserving the natural appearance and efficacy of Chinese herbal materials. The slogan “Good Deeds, Personal Wellness” reinterprets the meaning of the brand name. The store space is transformed into an “Interactive Chinese Herbal Experience Hall,” creating a knowledge-sharing environment for brand interaction with consumers and bridging the gap between traditional Chinese medicine and the public.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區南京西路139號1F
descriptionZh: 1926年，台北大稻埕圓環口，阿祖不小心炒過頭，肉脯意外成了肉脯鬆。溫體後腿豬，紅糟調配提味浸滷，賣多少、做多少，口裡的鮮甜不走調，不摻粉、不過油，單純酥香源自古早。福州老師傅私傳親授，百年來依舊紅紅火火，豐富家家戶戶的餐桌，更是送往迎來的好伴手，舌尖紅騷一世紀，噴香起鍋！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 139, Nanjing W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The story of Chung Hua Hsuan Foods begins in 1926 at Dadaocheng traffic circle in Taipei when our great-grandfather accidentally stir-fried the dried shredded pork for too long, causing it to become pork floss. Over the years, we have been using freshly-cut ham that hasn’t been refrigerated yet as the main ingredient, and marinate the meat in red wine lees for extra flavor. We have also insisted on making our products based on how many we can actually sell, which means we don’t put them in stock for too long. By doing so, we are able to make sure that the freshness and sweetness of the meat would stay uncompromised. Furthermore, we don’t use any powder or fry the meat in oil to give it a crispy mouthfeel. As a matter of fact, the crispiness and aroma derive from a traditional cooking method that was personally handed down by a veteran cook from Fuzhou. Thanks to that method, our century-old business has remained popular ever since and can be found on every household’s dining table, not to mention being bought as gifts for friends and relatives. After standing strong for nearly a century, we will continue to rock every customer’s nose and taste buds with our delicious foods.

addressZh: 台北市大同區民生西路146-1號
descriptionZh: 客家菜、台菜、台式料理、中式餐廳、熱炒
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 146-1, Minsheng W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Great Huda is a place where food-lovers can enjoy delicious Hakka, Hokkien, Taiwanese, Chinese, and stir-fried dishes.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區赤峰街47巷16號2樓
descriptionZh: 「小型獨立書店，人文、社會、文學、影像類書。複合咖啡、點心。free wifi、動物友善、性別友善。」
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 16, Ln. 47, Chifeng St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Books/Café is a small independent bookstore that provides books on topics ranging from culture, society, and literature to photography. There is also a café in the bookstore that offers coffee, desserts, and free Wi-Fi. The environment is pet-friendly and gender-neutral.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區赤峰街47巷3號
descriptionZh: 赤峰街舊稱「打鐵街」，過去為打鐵、五金加工廠聚集地，是台北早期發展區域之一。其中月霞咖啡館前身為汽車零件修理廠，走過70多年歲月的老屋充滿時代記憶，推開門扉，狹長型空間視覺感十足，對老建築情有獨鍾的Alex，完整保留台灣杉木製作屋頂、古典窗花，並修復老磚牆面等，搭配悠揚爵士樂，讓人身心靈都放鬆。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 3, Ln. 47, Chifeng St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Chifeng Street, one of the areas enjoying early development in Taipei, is also known as the “Iron-forging Street” because it used to be the hub for iron forging and hardware processing. Waha Café used to be a car component repair shop in the region. Having walked through seven decades of history, the building is full of memories of the old times. Upon opening the door of the café, customers can feel the strong visual effect created by the long and narrow interior. Alex, who has a passion for old buildings, preserved the roof made of Taiwania cryptomerioides and classic window frames, as well as the repaired old brick walls of the structure, turning the café into a place where people can relax their bodies and minds while in the midst of flowing jazz music.

nameZh:
PICK&COLLECT
手亼口 人文金工
addressZh: 臺北市大同區赤峰街 28-4號
descriptionZh: PICK&COLLECT是一複合式休閒空間，您可以於我們一樓門市逛逛設計師飾品.皮件，或報名參加我們金工.皮革體驗課程，與三五好友聚會體驗活動後再到二三樓咖啡廳享受下午茶或用餐，渡過完美的一天聚會。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 28-4, Chifeng St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Pick & Collect is a recreational space consisting of multiple facilities. You can either look at designer accessories and leather crafts in stores on the first floor or take part in the metal/leather crafting course. After hanging out with friends or finishing the course, you can head to a café on the second or third floor for an afternoon tea or a meal before you call it a day.

nameZh: U&S叔叔與妹妹-話畫創意店
addressZh: 臺北市萬華區隆昌街64號
descriptionZh: U&S叔叔與妹妹插畫工作室角色圖像品牌"赤毛族"，與台灣文具品牌利百代國際實業股份有限公司合作，銷售創意圖像類商品、文具禮品及生活用品等。並辦理在地街區導覽分享活動及各項工作坊，推廣在地美學教育，與群眾互動。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 64, Longchang St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108009 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: With its symbolic characters: the “Chimoz”, the U&S Studio cooperated with Liberty Stationery Corp., a Taiwanese stationery brand, to set up a physical store in Twatutia District of Taipei. The store sells products decorated with creative images, stationery and gifts, and daily goods. It also organizes tours introducing the district and various workshops, in order to promote local aesthetic education and interact with people.

nameZh: 美好提案 The Beauty Concept
addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街1段14巷36號
descriptionZh:
民國62年父親就開始在「布奇ㄚ」迪化街這裡從事紡織事業, 原來是開發訂製的面料交給台灣各大品牌女裝, 再拓展紡織品貿易外銷給國外品牌商。 數年前由於紡織產業外移,許多生產流行面料的配合工廠出走或是收攤, 原來屬於我們這塊流行面料的紡織業榮景不再, 姐姐一直是爸爸的乖女兒，畢業後就承接家業，延續了爸爸經營了30多年的公司。妹妹喜歡彩妝，個性獨立，雖然也進入家業，卻也不放棄最愛的彩妝技能。在2016年姊妹倆與父親積極溝通, 終於在得到爸爸支持後，姐妹倆轉型了公司，成立「美好提案」。 
因為從事紡織貿易, 姊妹倆到過世界許多大城市看展與參展, 了解每季的流行色彩、流行趨勢, 也因此有了給遼闊的視野, 豐富了內涵。 美好提案的發想起源, 主要是希望能夠把所有美好的物品、體驗都能夠融合在日常生活中。 因此, 我們調整並轉型為以販售彩妝品, 好用小物與美容造型服務為主的事業。 目前營業的項目有韓式半永久彩妝， 彩妝品, 美容小物販售，彩妝服務與教學。 在今年年底,我們也將拓展親子裝系列, 我們希望將所學的紡織相關知識能運用在生活上, 這是個很棒的事! 
對於未來的願景, 我們一直以來便從事貿易的工作, 去過許多國家, 希望能將好用的產品帶進來台灣, 可能是一把梳子, 某個好用卻不起眼的小商品, 也藉由流行時尚、流行彩妝、我們提供的服務讓每個人可以變得更有自信, 可以簡單地感受到生活的美好。 這也是「美好提案The Beauty Concept」的由來: → 在大稻埕延續了美好，以歷史為背景的美學空間，期望來的客戶都能安心的享受美好的生活與美的體驗！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 36, Ln. 14, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
In 1973, the father started a textile business on Dihua Street, also known as the “Textile Market.” He used to develop cloth for major women’s clothing brands in Taiwan, but later expanded his business and sold textiles to foreign brands. However, as the textile industry started to move to other foreign countries a few years ago, many factories manufacturing textiles for fashion design also left the country or closed down. The textile industry fell into decay as a result. The big sister had always been the father’s good girl; she inherited the family business immediately after graduation, a company which her father had run for more than three decades. On the other hand, the cosmetics-loving and independent little sister also worked for the company, but she did not give up her expertise in cosmetics. In 2016, the sisters finally obtained support from their father after communicating with him; they transformed the Company into a new business named “The Beauty Concept.”
Thanks to their experience in textile trades, the sisters acquired broad horizons and deep insights from displaying their products or visiting exhibitions in big cities around the world. They also understand the trending color and fashion trend of each season. The Beauty Concept is inspired by the idea of integrating wonderful things and experiences into daily life, which is why the sisters transformed the business and sell useful daily goods and cosmetics service instead. The Company currently provides Korean semi-permanent makeup, cosmetics products, cosmetics goods, and cosmetics services and courses. It also intends to extend its business to parent-child clothing at the end of this year. The sisters hope they can apply their expertise in textile to daily life.
Since the sisters have been trading and been to many countries, they aspire to bring quality products around the world back to Taiwan, whether it is only a comb, or an insignificant but easy-to-use small good. Moreover, they also aspire to help people become more self-confident and enjoy their lives via the Company’s fashion goods and cosmetics products. This aspiration also reflects the story behind “The Beauty Concept”, i.e., to inherit the beauty in Twatutia and enable customers to enjoy their lives and wonderful experiences in this aesthetic place with a historical background.

 

 Reservation required on Saturday and Sunday.
(Events are held irregularly on weekends, it would be grateful to call us beforehand.)

addressZh: 臺北市大同區天水路49號
descriptionZh:
在大稻埕畔陪你喝茶的我們

在地風情
從前的大稻埕是貿易來往相當興盛之地，凡舉南北貨、乾貨、茶、布、藥材等應有盡有。當您蒞臨此地時，您會發現幾乎家家戶戶都是傳統商家，或是當時供資金週轉運用的銀樓。您或許聽過大稻埕，也或多或少知道咱大稻埕的文化，但您是否有過在大稻埕邊與咱老埕人們喝茶聊天憶過去的經驗呢？咱埕畔茶坊(原祥欣茶行)座立於此地近十載，來來往往老埕人們不盡其數，來咱茶坊購茶不時會遇到老埕人們正在店裡吃茶聊天，若想了解咱老埕人們的過去是如何風光，如何錢淹腳目，不妨來走走一起坐著聊天品茶吧。



品茗區

對於茶品
如上所述，這裡是出口重鎮，每戶商號對自己的商品都有自己一個套路，連咱茶坊也有自己的茶路，我們有來自台灣各山頭的輕發酵茶品，有自家烘焙茶品，有出國評鑑的茶品，批發零售皆宜，然而更多的是在地老埕人的人情味。

福壽梨山茶
紅玉紅茶
遠赴歐洲比利時參與國際風味品質評鑑
資訊交流
咱茶坊除了保留在地人情味及茶葉品質外，更重要的是知識傳播，咱茶坊不定時邀請各領域專才蒞臨舉辦小型演講，為追求有效的知識吸收及促進人與人之間交流，咱茶坊採6人小班講座。咱茶坊更要求主講人的資歷及是否有權威單位的認證，以達確保授課資訊的正確性。

大型醫學中心藥師蒞臨演講
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 49, Tianshui Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
Drinking tea with you in Twatutia
The local scenery
Twatutia used to be a hub for trades, where you can find almost everything, ranging from daily goods, dried goods, tea, and textiles to medicine. Stepping into this district, you will find that almost all the households are either traditional stores or jewelry shops that also provide loan services. You might have heard of Twatutia or know a little bit about its culture, but have you ever had the experience of drinking tea and chatting with old people in Twatutia? CHENGPION Tea House (formerly Xiangxin Tea Store) has been here for almost a decade, boasting countless local customers coming and going. Visitors who come to buy tea might come across senior citizens in the district eating and drinking tea here. If you want to know the glorious past of people in Twatutia and how they earned great fortunes, you should pay this place a visit and chat with people here over cups of tea.
Tea-drinking area
In terms of our tea
As mentioned above, Twatutia is a major export city. As every store has its own way of doing business, CHENGPION Tea House acquires its tea through exclusive sources. The shop provides teas that are suitable for wholesale and retail, ranging from light-fermented teas from the mountains in Taiwan and home-roasted teas to teas that have taken part in overseas competitions. However, what the shop presents the most is the friendliness of old Twatutia residents.
Fushou Lishan Tea
Ruby Black Tea
The teas were sent to an international tea competition in Belgium.
Information exchange
Besides preserving the friendly atmosphere in the district and maintaining the good quality of its teas, the shop also emphasizes the dissemination of knowledge. It invites experts from different fields to hold small seminars on an irregular basis, and facilitates the effective acquisition of knowledge and interactions among people; its seminars are limited to a maximum of six people. To ensure the accuracy of the information provided in seminars, the shop examines the qualifications of their speakers first and makes sure that they are certified by prestigious institutions.
Pharmacists from large medical centers hold talks here.

addressZh: 103台北市大同區迪化街一段20號
descriptionZh:
世界唯一，喝得到歷史文化的飲品! 
「 創新與文化美學的結合，來自大稻埕的一杯好茶。」​
以幽默風趣的創新手法，將飲料與在地歷史文化特色及設計美學相互結合，堪稱"一杯飲料就能讓您了解大稻埕!"。是著名的文青網紅系飲品，亦選用大稻埕百年老茶行茶葉籍在地原物料，網友及媒體主持人們一致推薦"台灣最有水準的手搖飲!"
代表飲品:月老奶茶(經月老點頭認證，可占卜愛情)、烏魚子奶蓋烏龍、台灣小種烏龍茶
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 20, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
The only drink in the world that offers a taste of history and culture!
“This is a cup of quality tea that integrates innovation and cultural aesthetics.”
With humorous and innovative approaches, Da Dao Chen incorporates local history, culture, and the aesthetics of design into its drinks, proudly claiming that “customers can understand Twatutia after only having one cup of their drink.” Besides being popular among hipsters and internet celebrities, their drinks are also recommended by netizens and media hosts as the “drinks of the highest quality in Taiwan” because the shop uses teas from local tea shops boasting a century of history.
Star products: Yue Lao milk tea (certified by Yue Lao, or the god of marriage, and which can be used to read the future of your romantic relationship), Oolong tea with milk foam and karasumi topping, and Xiaozhong oolong tea

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段32巷14號2樓
descriptionZh:
「光在金工LIJMA-Light in Jewellery & Metal Art」，品牌精神如同字面上的意思「讓光芒照耀珠寶工藝」，1999年創始的光在金工以高階訂製珠寶為起點，並以琺瑯飾品為首要研究與推廣的項目，堅持每一件作品都以手作精神創作出獨特的設計，在配戴的同時，也能感受到我們用心的祝福。

2018年於大稻埕成立了「珠寶私塾」，在富含深度文化的氛圍中持續創作，我們除了自有品牌設計產品與提供客製訂製服務外，也開設了單日手做輕珠寶課程，歡迎蒞臨光在，讓專業的設計團隊為您提供具質感且適合您的時尚專屬飾品~
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 14, Ln. 32, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan
descriptionEn: LIJMA-Light in Jewellery & Metal Art is a brand which is based on the esthetics of craft art and consists of a group of professionals in jewellery making and designing. Under the leadership of art director Jei-Chih Lu, who completed her full jewellery design and making education in Europe and, also, has profound experiences both on academic and professional fields for nearly twenty years in Taiwan. With the ambition to explore and advance the esthetics of design and metal art, Lijma provides services including variety of systematic professional jewellery design and making courses, commissioned fine jewellery and silver jewellery with excellence in sales and design services.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段222號
descriptionZh:
「烏覓馬」在迪化街持續60年，是一家出售乾貨和雜貨的商店，在祖父時代，開始用自製的油炸大蒜和油炸蔥做生意，現在的店主是三代人。

近年來最受歡迎的產品是健康食品，如黑蒜頭和黑檸檬，煮黑大蒜和雞肉的香湯是台灣人保持身心健康的秘密之一。
如果妳煮黑檸檬茶，酸度和甜味混合在一起，在早上喝活力從妳身體溢出。三代人傳承下來的炒大蒜和油炸蔥，可以說是台灣美食不可或缺的台灣「靈魂」。

「烏覓馬」，也將主力商品-蔥與蒜置入。邀請聰明的消費者以蔥蒜暨黑色養生食品，一起精算、解開健康的密碼。
Omima暗黑系食物藏著美味與養生密碼，輕鬆找回生命活力，像一匹奔馳原野的勁馬!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 222, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Established six decades ago, GarlicSmart is a shop of dry goods and groceries. The first-generation owner started the business by selling homemade stir-fried garlic and deep-fried scallion. Now the shop is run by the third generation.
Health foods like black garlic and black lemon have become popular in recent years. In Taiwan, eating black garlic chicken soup is believed to be one of the ways to stay healthy.
The taste of black lemon tea is a wonderful combination of sweet and sour. Drinking it in the morning will make people full of energy.
The stir-fried garlic and deep-fried scallion, whose recipes have been passed down to the third generation now, are the “soul” of Taiwanese cuisine.
GarlicSmart sells its dark-colored products like garlic and scallion under the brand name Omima, inviting smart consumers to savor healthful dark-colored foods and be filled with great vigor like a galloping mustang!

addressZh: 臺北市大同區西寧北路104號1樓
descriptionZh: 這是一個提供天然香料體驗的自由空間，一百六十多個香料罐，集合來自世界各地的天然香料，帶來前所未遇的嗅覺體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 104, Xining N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

The cardamom trees of the East Indies, fragrant with youthful vitality, red-hot facing heaven pepper, bearing the scorching South American sun, sweet cinnamon dancing in coffee, gazing toward the homeland of Sri Lanka...

A 50-year-old establishment in Dadaocheng, a renowned food store, has transformed into a utopia for spices. They have gathered 160 kinds of spices from Europe, Asia, America, and Africa. From seeds and fruits to roots and leaves, diverse aromas enrich both the dining table and the palate. With quality, quantity, and a wealth of scents, it’s a paradise for chefs and connoisseurs!

【Key points of transformation】

A longstanding food materials store creates a utopia for Eastern and Western spices.

Originally named “Yi Liang Food Store” and later “Yi Chang Industrial,” this 60-year-old establishment was initially located on Dihua Street and later moved to Xining North Road. It has been specializing in wholesale food materials. It is currently operated by the daughter and son-in-law of the family. Recognizing the growing preference in society for natural food products, in recent years, they have reorganized their spice product line and aimed to establish a spice experience center to promote their own brand.

Through the transformation efforts, they have created “UtoPia Spices - Dadaocheng Spice House,” with a brand positioning of “Utopia for Eastern and Western Spices,” symbolizing a spice republic without borders. They use the slogan “Delicious Flavor Elevates Taste” to expand into the retail market. Additionally, they’ve planned spice interactive experiences to attract food enthusiasts and renowned chefs to come and savor the aromas.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區南京西路155巷1號1樓
descriptionZh:
雲想衣裳花想榮── 榮業花邊LaceGlory
1998年，一位台南的囝仔，帶著一卡皮箱，北上打拼白手創業，他從蕾絲布疋起家，與布結緣，也與世界接軌。以父之名創立事業，一路茁壯外銷歐美，掌握蕾絲布料特性，蒙國際時尚大牌垂青。買紗、織布、染色，蕾絲從此千變萬化，從裡到外造型穿搭，起居坐臥也靠它，19世紀維多利亞風演繹當代浪漫童話，柔絲如雲，簇麗似花，不變的親膚優雅，為生活鑲上花邊，一縷縷織就春風年華！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 1, Ln. 155, Nanjing W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
LaceGlory
In 1998, a young man from rural Tainan moved to prosperous northern Taiwan with nothing but a baggage of belongings to start his own business from scratch. He started by producing laces and cloth, whereby he has made not only his fortune, but also his name internationally in this trade. With his expertise in the process, from buying yarn, making fabrics and dying, to producing laces, the owner of LaceGlory has exported to buyers from Europe and the U.S., among which are several international fashion brands. Used not only in clothes, but also home furnishing products, laces are loved for their flowery grace and silky softness. From 19th century Victorian style to modern romantic fashion, LaceGlory helps to add lace to people’s life.
