addressZh: 臺北市大同區重慶北路二段58號
descriptionZh:
林三益的故事要從1917年的福建福州說起，一位小學徒拜師學藝，投身毛筆製作，勤奮打拼多年後，與其他兩位合夥人創立了毛筆專賣店「三益齋」筆莊，意涵益者三友：友直、友諒、友多聞，相互共勉。

“ 選擇最好的材料，提供消費者最好的毛筆 ”

林三益不只是筆墨專家、刷具專家，更是美的專家

不斷進步的道路充滿挑戰，支持著林三益的最大動力，是一心一意對美的堅持與承諾。在大家眼中，林三益是筆墨專家，毛料專家，刷具專家，林三益更期許自己達成美的專家之使命。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 58, Section 2, Chongqing N Rd, Datong District Taipei City
descriptionEn:
The origin of LAMSAMYICK can be traced back to 1917 when a young apprentice studied under the tutelage of his master in Fuzhou, Fujian and devoted himself to ink brush making. After years of hard work, the young apprentice cofounded Sanyizhai, an ink brush specialty store, with two other partners. The name of the store signified "the three friendships which are advantageous: friendship with the upright, friendship with the sincere, and friendship with the man of much observation."
LAMSAMYICK chooses the best materials to fabricate the best ink brushes for its customers.
LAMSAMYICK is an expert not only in ink, ink brushes, and brush-related tools, but also in aesthetics.
The insistence on, and commitment to, beauty are the biggest driving forces helping LAMSAMYICK overcome obstacles challenging its pursuit of improvement. To everyone else, LAMSAMYICK is an expert in ink, ink brushes, brush materials, and brush-related tools. However, LAMSAMYICK aspires to become an expert in aesthetics as well.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段46巷18弄5號2F
descriptionZh: 經營團隊在大稻埕深耕逾25年，專精於服裝打版打樣技術，累計超過30萬款的服飾開發經驗，是台灣紡織成衣產業的重要推手。2015年將二樓的老舊空間翻新，打造品牌【衣戲院】。這裡可看見許多小巧思，像是用洗衣板做成的招牌、燙馬製成的門把、服裝版型充滿樓梯間兩側…處處皆是服裝元素。品牌重要任務是運用服裝的力量帶動文創與在地連結:衣戲院有開設服裝的專業課程及有趣的手作體驗、為文創產業設計服裝並推廣活動，喝茶的茶服、電影服裝...都可以在這裡看到，成為大稻埕在地新興美學。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 5, Aly. 18, Ln. 46, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: The operations team has been working hard in Twatutia for over 25 years, specializing in clothing patternmaking techniques. With a cumulative experience of developing more than 300,000 clothing patterns, the team is an important driver of Taiwan's textile and apparel industry. In 2015, the team renovated the dilapidated second floor and built its own brand, THOSTAR cultural costume. Some ingenious ideas for the brand are its signboard that is made of a washboard, its doorknob that is made of a sleeve board, and a stairway that is filled with clothing patterns. Clothing-related elements can be found everywhere. The important mission of this brand is to build a connection between cultural and creative industries and local industries with the power of costume: THOSTAR culture costume offers professional costume-related courses and fun hands-on experience activities, while designing costume for cultural and creative industries and promoting related events. You can find costume to wear for tea drinking, costume for movie characters, etc. here. This brand embodies the emerging aesthetics of Twatutia.

nameZh: 第一化粧品廠天水門市
addressZh: 臺北市大同區天水路43號1樓
descriptionZh: 第一化粧品承襲第一化工五十年的專業原料知識，創立口碑第一的「de第一化粧品」。從傳統臺北大稻埕商圈的天水路發跡，歷經千辛打造優質適價台灣品牌之路，堅持將「自然‧簡單‧無負擔」的品牌精神落實發揚─「原料自然‧配方簡單‧產品親肌無負擔」；以化粧品原料專家為基礎，堅持台灣自產自銷，並輔以環保可回收包材及舒適無壓的購物環境，所以客戶都能親身體驗專業優質產品與服務所帶來的平價奢華享受。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 43, Tianshuei Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: de Cosmetics has inherited First Chemical Works' 50 years of experience in material science and used this knowledge to create the "de Cosmetic" brand. Started on Tianshui Road in Taipei's traditional Dadaocheng business area, de Cosmetic has gone through many hardships to create a high-quality and economical Taiwan brand. de Cosmetics' brand philosophy is based on "natural, simple, and burden-free." This brand philosophy is realized through the use of natural materials, simple formulas, and products that are good for the body. Developed by cosmetic raw material experts, the brand insists on producing and selling in Taiwan. The brand also promotes the use of environmentally friendly recyclable packaging material and a no-stress purchasing environment so that customers can personally experience the luxury and enjoyment provided by quality products and services.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區延平北路2段68號
descriptionZh: "滿月收涎抓周，成年婚嫁祝福，古早味糕餅註記人生重要時候，壽桃、紅龜、綠豆椪...迎來送往，味美難忘。歲月悠悠1930年至今，屹立大稻埕近百個年頭，糕餅師父從囝子工做到白頭，十字軒依然堅持傳統手作，用情揉捏人間喜樂，用福堆疊廟宇香火 綿密酥鬆脆，福祿壽喜吉，十字生糕，守護傳統，也守護人間敦厚，添福添壽添人情，Ten Cake有禮好拌手"
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 68, Sec. 2, Yanping N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Pastries, peach-shaped birthday cakes, red tortoise cakes, and mung bean pastries are delicious and the perfect food for celebrating one-month-old feasts, anti-drooling ceremonies, one-year-old catch, and weddings. Established in Dadaocheng in 1930 nearly a century ago, Ten Cake pastry masters continue to make traditional, hand-made, thick, crispy, and crunchy pastries to uphold tradition and preserve the honest, sincere atmosphere of the past. Looking for the perfect gift? Come visit Ten Cake!

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段213號
descriptionZh:
致力於環保產品設計以及推廣公平貿易產品理念

twine繭裹設計的產品注重造型，手工，公平貿易和環境友善的概念，結合現代設計與傳統技術，強調自然材質，環保回收的生產方式，並確保所有產品的原創性。

我們相信現代設計和傳統工藝技術可以完美的結合，一各好的設計產品是尊重環境與社會關懷。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 213, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
A firm devoted to designing environmentally friendly products and promoting the concept of fair trade

Twine Fair Trade develops products while focusing on the concepts of designs, hand-made products, fair trade, and environmental protection, combining modern designs and traditional techniques together; emphasizing the use of natural materials; adopting environmentally friendly recycling production methods; and ensuring product originality.

Twine Fair Trade believes that modern designs and traditional techniques can be integrated perfectly. Good design products are ones that respect the environment and social care.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段218號1樓
descriptionZh:
Planedo是世界語中『星球』的意思
這在提醒我們尊重地球上所有的生物物種
並珍惜我們所使用的自然資源
希望透過這個品牌不僅提供優質的機能服飾
還可以減少對環境的負擔
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 218, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Planedo means “planet” in Esperanto, reminding people to respect all living species on the planet and to cherish natural resources they use. Planedo hopes to provide functional, high-quality clothing while reducing the burden on the environment.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區迪化街一段296號
descriptionZh:
建物創建於日治初期約1900年代，自葉家第一代葉寬先生1923年第二手購入，舊時為經營米糧生意，第一進為店舖使用，第二進一樓有土壟間（碾米廠）、穀倉、宴客廳，二、三樓為居住空間，空間機能完整，見證當時中北街傳統碾米產業史之發展，並且逐步成為最大之碾米廠代表。 建物於2000年都市發展局大稻埕歷史風貌特定專用區細部計畫指定為歷史性建築物，2013年完成修復取得使用執照， 2016年登錄為文化局歷史建築。雖經整修，然建築整體仍維 持原有風貌，並保留大部份原有建築材料，包含牆體、樓板等皆留存舊有之木材及磚石構造。

葉晋發商號第四代葉宏圖及五代葉晏廷先生以傳承百年祖業為理念，設立財團法人支持藝術文化與教育發展，透過產業的歷史文化為核心與多元品牌合作，以複合式活動主題 訴說台灣在地人文歷史，串聯現在與未來，為空間帶來創新的生命。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Yeh Jin Fa Rice Story Museum
addressEn: No. 296, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Yeh family at No. 296, Section 1, Dihua Street, used to be the leaders of the "Rice Milling Factory" in Taipei bridgehead—Yeh Kuan, Yeh Ying and his sons. They ran the traditional "Rice Milling Factory" in the late Qing Dynasty, based on the Japanese rule. According to the registration record of the "Household Survey Book", Yeh Kuan was already engaged in the "rice merchant hand-representation" industry and opened a “Jin Chun Rice Milling Factory" with relatives. It is known that Yeh Kuan was already familiar with the operation of the rice valley industry "Rice Milling Factory" when he was young. The project operated is rice milling. After the rice is harvested, it is hulled and hulled with a wind drum to turn it into coarse chaff, and then sieved through a bamboo sieve several times to become "brown rice." The “Jin Fa" industry was one of the important cases of migration from a farm to Dadaocheng during the Japanese rule.

addressZh: 台北市大同區迪化街一段100號  1、2樓
descriptionZh: 新東陽全台首家新型態複合店「迪化100」，以巴洛克風格呈現，結合「Serene Cafe」，還設置新東陽第一間DIY手作教室，可以自己動手製作台灣造型鳳梨酥。新東陽以推動中華美食精緻化，國際化的精神標竿為企業目標，打造”來台必買、出國必帶、台灣特產第一品牌”的企業形象，帶給消費者優質的購物體驗
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1、2F., No. 100, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: This is Hsin Tung Yang's first new combined "Dihua 100" store. The store is done in Baroque style and has a Serene Café. There is also a DIY workshop, which is a first for Hsing Tung Yang, where customers can make their own Taiwan-shaped pineapple cake. Hsing Tung Yang is promoting the refinement of Chinese cuisine, and is using international standards to create its corporate image "The top brand for Taiwan specialties, a must for souvenir or present." The goal is to provide consumers with high quality buying experience.

addressZh: 台北市大同區迪化街一段155號
descriptionZh:
｜選物・輕食・活動｜
 50+ 個透過群眾集資誕生的品牌及商品，從線上走到線下，歡迎來挖寶！
 手沖咖啡茶飲、鮮奶特調、冰淇淋與湯品，每一口都有群眾集資的滋味～
 群眾集資分享會、新品發表體驗會、講座讀書會... 不定時公告，敬請期待！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 155, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
｜Products, light foods, and events｜
Over 50 brands and products that are results of crowdfunding. You are welcome to come and hunt for treasure both online and offline!
Hand-brewed coffees and teas, special milk drinks, ice cream, and soups, each with a flavor that came from crowdfunding~
Crowdfunding sharing sessions, new product launches, book reading and seminars will be announced irregularly. Please wait for further news!

addressZh: 臺北市大同區南京西路18巷6弄8-2號
descriptionZh:
海派泰式創意料理
椰以道地泰式椰子冰淇淋起家,自東南亞引進正宗泰式料理,有別於過往以桌菜為主流的泰式料理餐廳,主打一個人也能享用的泰式定食及南洋鍋物獨創之打拋豬冰花煎餃,將泰式經典口味包入日系/中式煎餃,讓人耳目一新!品牌定位「海派泰式創意料理」,以「海派」一詞傳達椰兄欲傳達之品牌個性,也延續Coco h的命名緣起-不論東南亞還是台灣,朋友間稱兄道弟之親切熱情。同時隱含海洋之聯想,呼應店內營造之海邊椰林風情。品牌定位另求「創意料理」,強化特色及差異性,豎立創意泰式餐點鮮明旗幟。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8-2, Aly. 6, Ln. 18, Nanjing W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Generous and creative Thai-style cuisine 
Coco Brother began as a seller of authentic Thai-style coconut ice cream. The restaurant introduced authentic Thai cuisine from Southeast Asia and used the word "generous" to express its brand feature. No matter whether in Southeast Asia or Taiwan, close friends call each other brothers. The brand's position of "creative cuisine"  emphasizes different flavor combinations and differentiation to set itself apart with creative Thai dishes.

addressZh: 台北市大同區昌吉街51號
descriptionZh:
在地飄香一甲子的好味道，不少台北人從小吃到大的傳統味道。 

台式傳統紅燒鰻湯搭配古早味炒米粉，是老饕的必搭組合。
紅燒鰻湯頭，以中藥熬煮清淡不油膩，
炸的酥香的鰻魚魚肉鮮嫩，口感酥脆，湯喝不夠還可以無限喝到飽！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 51, Changji St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Over 60 years of great traditional taste is what many people in Taipei grew up with.  

Taiwanese style braised eel broth with traditional fried rice noodles is a must-have combination for foodies. 
The braised eel soup is made with Chinese herbs to give it a light and not greasy taste. 
The crispy deep-fried eel is tender on the inside and crispy on the outside, and the unlimited soup is a great bonus!

addressZh: 臺北市文山區指南路三段38巷25之1號
descriptionZh: 為茶做了各式各樣的突破，特別研發了『月光茶』，不含咖啡因、無刺激性，帶有溫潤清淡口味的口感，看山嵐霧起，品嚐獨特茶香。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 25, Ln. 38, Sec. 3, Zhinan Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Nestled in the peaks of Maokong Mountain Muzha, Wutie is a Tea House with plenty of character and guarantees a most authentic tea appreciation experience. The founder of Wutie has developed a number of inventive features for the art of tea appreciation, and developed the yueguang cha (moonlight tea) to address the bitterness and caffeine contents of tea leaves. Yueguang does not contain caffeine and has far-reduced tartness, and instead offers a soothing and refreshing flavor. Wutie welcomes all travelers and tea lovers who wish to gaze upon the rising hills while having a good cup of tea.

addressZh: 臺北市文山區指南路三段38巷14-2號
descriptionZh: 坐落於貓空半山腰，有著美景與如同自然般偌大的空間。除了美景，還可體驗不同茶種的泡茶方式、品嚐茶香，將茶藝的享受帶入生活中。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 14-2, Ln. 38, Sec. 3, Zhinan Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Lytea is a tea house and eatery located high up the Maokong hilltop. Unlike urban establishments, Lytea provide wide spaces infused with the natural atmosphere. Lytea is located on the slopes of Maokong facing the geographical area known as the Taipei Basin, providing the establishment with matchless vista in both day and night. In addition to its wonderful sceneries, Lytea also offers patrons with various tea brews to introduce tea appreciation into their respective lives.

nameZh: 阿義師的大茶壺茶餐廳

descriptionEn: Master A-Yi's Big Teapot Tea Restaurant is located at the peak of Maokong Mountain, providing a vista that includes the entirety of the Great Taipei Basin. We insist on carefully selecting every ingredient and the finest products, highlighting the importance of the main food ingredients while cutting down on garnishes and condiments, allowing patrons to better appreciate the luxurious and rich flavors provided by our culinary offerings. Master A-Yi's Big Teapot is the place to go for a romantic scenery, friendly services, and master-grade cuisine.

descriptionZh: 堅持選用新鮮在地的食材與在地茶農的茶葉品，精心製作與研發貓茶町全系列食品。獨家開創中式的茶品與西式甜點的美麗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 117, Baoyi Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Tea Dessert House (TDH) is based on green terrace fields that convey the owner’s emotional ties with Muzha. Since it was first opened, TDH has upheld the principles of using fresh, local produce and dealing in teas grown in Taiwan as he focuses on perfecting and developing the product catalog offered by TDH. TDH also offers an independently developed Chinese tea complemented by western dessert to offer a wondrous combination of the two.

addressZh: 臺北市文山區興隆路三段60號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 60, Sec. 3, Xinglong Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang started out selling braised pork rice at a roadside stall, and has since adhered to its founding manifesto, Promoting Gourmet Heritage and Pursuing Happiness. With a core mission of promoting Taiwan's gourmet food, Formosa Chang continues to strive for self-improvement and provides safe and delicious food and friendly dining environments, all built on the basis of quality, taste, service and hygiene. In line with its business philosophy: Integrity and Trust, Pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, Sustainable Growth, and its management principles: people-oriented, talents-nurturing, clear reward punishment and shared results, Formosa Chang is committed to implementing its enterprise vision of selling braised pork rice all over the world.

addressZh: 臺北市文山區興隆路三段65號
descriptionZh: 1988年里仁開張，決心要做「該做但還沒有人做的事」。提供以誠信契作支持和鼓勵農友，栽植無農藥化肥的純淨蔬果來友善環境，也尋找願意還原食物本味、恢復環境清靜的淳厚廠商，近年更積極以產品包材減塑支持淨塑。 里仁產品開發堅持自然、健康、平實。主要產品包括有機或轉型農產品、少或無添加物的食品，不含基改成份，以本土有機為優先，支持綠保生態並關懷弱勢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 65, Sec. 3, Xinglong Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Leezen opened for business in 1998 with the determination to do things that should’ve been done but were yet to be done by anyone else. Leezen supports and encourages farmers through providing honest contracts, and it grows untainted fruits and vegetables in an environmentally friendly way without using pesticides and fertilizers. It also searches for genuinely kindhearted companies that are willing to let food have its original taste, and to restore the environment to a clean state. In recent years, Leezen has also been actively supporting plastic elimination by reducing plastic in product packaging. Leezen upholds the principles of "natural, healthy, simple" in product development. Its main products include organic or transformed agricultural products, foods with little or no additives, and no genetically modified ingredients. Priority is given to local organic products to support green environmental conservation and help vulnerable groups.

店沒有華麗的裝潢，只有老闆親切的服務，可口美味的佳餚，還有專屬兒童遊戲區；店裡沒有聘請師傅，所有的菜色都是老闆夫婦親手烹煮的，有著媽媽的味道像回到家的感覺。
清泉廣場是貓空的至高點，視野極佳，天候狀況好時景色更是一級棒，順著前方的山谷望去就是101！

addressZh: 台北市文山區指南路一段9號
descriptionZh:
榨油機轟隆作響，清澈茶油金黃流淌，每一滴都是陽光雨露與山土的自然滋養。鄭家兩代一生一職，誠實專業的製油郎。不混廉價油、不摻香精，謝絕取巧增加出油量，歷經食安風暴檢驗，文山一直有芳。

1971年，來自台中清水的少年郎，帶著父親的期許，北上向同鄉學製油，燥熱柴火邊，大爐手工翻炒，日日照起工。花生油、芝麻油、山東小磨麻油起家，1978年木柵開設三芳製油廠，附近茶農送來苦茶籽、茶葉籽，開啟榨油新篇章。精選種籽分別輕烘焙低溫榨，器具工法繁複多樣，冷壓苦茶油保留微量元素，茶籽油厚實濃香。木柵老街上飄香近半世紀，四季食養。
良油有山芳，願世人長壽健康、子孫滿堂。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 9, Section 1, Zhanzhan Road, Wenshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Accompanying the loud noise of the oil extractor, clear golden tea oil flows out. Each drop is the result of nourishment by sunshine, rain, and earth. Two generations of the Cheng family are dedicated to this work as oil makers. Sumfine does not mix in cheap oils and does not add artificial flavors. We refuse to use tricks to increase the amount of oil we produce, and we proved our quality by overcoming the food safety scandal without harm to our reputation. 

In 1971, a youth from Taichung's Qingshui area carried the hopes of his father up north to learn oil making from his village comrades. Sitting by the hot fire and toasting the ingredients in the large pan was the daily norm. The main products were peanut oil, sesame oil, and Shandong style sesame oil. In 1978, the owner founded the Sumfine oil factory in Muzha because there were many tea tree plantations nearby where tea seeds can be found. This was a new chapter in oil extraction. Carefully selected tea seeds are lightly roasted and oil extracted at low temperatures. This process involves many different types of tools and skills. The resulting cold-pressed tea oil retains its trace elements and the rich tea oil flavor. For nearly half a century, the fragrance of tea oil drifts on Muzha's old street, provided for consumption for all four seasons. 

Sumfine wishes everyone long life and good health, and prosperous families.

addressZh: 台北市文山區景文街121號
descriptionZh:
古藝台菜.豐簡吃開 ── 義興樓 EAT-THING RESTAURANT

二樓古早木門推開,時光倒流回那個風華年代，嚐一口懷念的老牌手路菜~
百年前遇洪，高家抱著僅存的一尊觀音回到景美，從阿祖的麵攤轉身辦桌菜，歷經四代。

豬背油剖成袋，填餡裹粉炸個金黃，金錢蝦餅再現一世紀前江山樓料理風采。
豬腦煎蛋、五香雞捲、蛋酥冬粉湯...，舌尖縈懷，幾近失傳的費工酒家菜，數度躍上米其林國際舞台。

老厝裡吃老台味，可簡單可豐湃，再來一盤小老闆的拿手私房菜，爐灶歲歲款待，一桌桌飽足開懷!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 121, Jingwen St., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Eat-Thing Restaurant - traditional and varied Taiwanese cuisine 

The old wooden doors on the second floor takes you back in time to an era of grace. Go ahead, take a bite of nostalgic food~
In a flood that happened a century ago, the Kao family took their only Guanyin statue and came back to Jingmei. Over four generations, the family went from their great grand parents' noodle stall to the catering business. 

Pork back fat is cut into pockets and stuffed with filling, then battered and fried until it is golden. The golden shrimp pancake is a Kang San Lau dish from the previous century. 
Fried eggs with pork brain, five-spice chicken rolls, egg yolk and glass noodle soup.... These delightful and difficult-to-make restaurant dishes that have been lost have been brought back and are once again on the international Michelin stage. 

The old Taiwanese taste in the alley can be simple or can be extravagant. Have a dish of the owner's specialties. The stove turns out dish after dish, and every table satisfies!

addressZh: 台北市中山區南京東路ㄧ段31巷2號
descriptionZh:
雲彩軒以母親名子裡的雲字命名,代表對家的愛。 今年邁入第20年的雲彩軒，過去經營伴手禮品店， 以繽紛多元的產品，獨特的生活擺設成功抓住年輕人及喜愛生活雜貨的觀光客， 其中尤其深受日本人的喜愛，曾多次接受日本雜誌報導採訪 2020年開始著手品牌形象的重新設計 我們希望跳脫以往中式雜貨禮品的印象 從商品開發和品牌建置起步 打造更貼近生活的形象,傳遞來自台灣的美好 雲彩軒不只是伴手禮品店,而是能點綴你我生活的地方 歷經疫情的休息沉澱，2022年11月，我們在中山區重新出發！ 臨近綠意盎然的公園，明亮自在的空間，伴隨著放鬆的爵士音樂， 身邊圍繞著店主挑選的器皿，服飾，生活擺飾及台灣工藝， 期待提供給大家更多美好的生活提案！
經營理念
發現生活的靈感

永續 自然 工藝

夥伴溫暖親切的問候,帶給消費者自在的購物空間

藉由選物,聯名及商品開發展現台灣多采多姿的繽紛生活提案

addressZh: 台北市大同區迪化街一段190號
descriptionZh: 民國39年(西元1950年)，李水土爺爺在大稻埕，以雜貨店起家。戰後，當日本離開台灣時，水土爺爺從日本人手中接下了『大春煉皂』，開展肥皂生產和銷售事業，並矢志以誠信經營，將理念發揚光大。目前已經傳承到第三代手中，這中間歷經七十年，孩子們謹守著爺爺的囑咐，始終不忘本的秉持「與土地共存」的做人做事原則。2016年，「大春煉皂」願發揚水土爺爺的初衷，並將這份祝福的心意傳送給更多人，『大春煉皂』這名號的標誌，皆承續了水土爺爺意志與精神；所謂的『煉』，就是用心琢磨每塊肥皂，最簡單也最純粹，對人對地皆友善，永續、共生、共存
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 190, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
【Brand story】

In the year 1950, in Taipei’s Dadaocheng, Mr. Li Shuitu took over the Tai Chun Soap Factory from the Japanese. He produced soap made from plant oils and extracts, free from harmful ingredients. A bar of “Black Snow Soap” was used from head to toe, holding memories of Dadaocheng’s grandparents.

Over the decades, Tai Chun soap found its way from Taiwanese households into hotels and inns. It continued its tradition of being eco-friendly, not causing pollution like chemical detergents. The soap suds flowed into rivers, where they were naturally broken down by microorganisms.

Protecting the environment and living harmoniously with the land – these were the teachings of Mr. Li Shuitu, passed down through three generations without being forgotten. After a century, Tai Chun Soap returned to its place of origin to continue making soap, doing good for people, respecting nature, and benefiting the community. As the old saying goes, “The earth’s evergreen pines and the changing seasons of red laurels and sweet osmanthus bring a long-lasting fragrance.” Just like the cherished kindness of Mr. Li, these blessings are transformed into gifts and shared with the world.Top of FormBottom of Form

【Key points of transformation】

Mr. Li Shuitu started his journey in Dadaocheng with a grocery store. In 1950, he took over the Tai Chun Soap Factory from the Japanese and began producing soap free from harmful ingredients, using plant oils and extracts. A bar of “Black Snow Soap” was used from head to toe, holding cherished memories of Dadaocheng’s grandparents.

Over the decades, Tai Chun Soap transitioned from Taiwanese households to hotels and inns, continuing its tradition of being eco-friendly and causing no pollution from chemical detergents. It promoted environmental protection and a harmonious coexistence between people and the land, guided by Mr. Li Shuitu’s principles, which have been passed down through three generations. After a century, Tai Chun Soap returned to its place of origin, where they continued their soap-making journey, respecting nature, and benefiting the community. Their motto is “The earth’s evergreen pines bring longevity, and the changing seasons of red laurels and sweet osmanthus bring a profusion of fragrance,” a reflection of Mr. Li’s cherished benevolence, which they now convey as a blessing to others.

addressZh: 台北市南港區富康街26號
descriptionZh:
由創辦人陳美華老師為起首，2013年10月於台北市南港區富康街26號開設門市「魚籃書坊」，除有各類書籍、文創產品等展售之外，也有餐飲、場地租借的服務，更是主要的活動推廣中心。期間開辦多種讀書會及課程，從社會、人文、宗教、思想等各面向，帶領群眾豐富心靈、增長智慧。魚籃書坊創始者陳美華老師本著人本與創新的精神，希望發揚南港地區的文化氣息與人文精神，期許魚籃書坊成為南港在地最獨具一格之文創領先品牌，並對提升人文氣質積極貢獻。

    魚籃書坊希望關照每一寸在地，愛惜每一處資產，在快速變動的時潮中，珍惜空間裡的記憶庫藏，與寶貴的文史做最貼近的撫觸。推展人與聚落、人與環境、人與自然的共生與和諧，秉承「吾道不孤，德必有鄰」的信念支持，立志在都會區別樹一幟，獨運匠心賦予群聚空間曼荼羅式的功能展現，必能吸引有志同道薈萃雲集，推廣各式多樣的沙龍團聚，打造深耕在地的心靈盛宴，串聯芳鄰散播書香，拂送樂讀與舒活的美善淳風，薰沐一期一會的終身學習氛圍，陶養出紛呈的富康生活，交織群我策勵的里仁為美。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 26, Fukang Street, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Founded by Chen Mei-hua in October 2013 and located at No. 26, Fukang St., Nangang Dist., Taipei, the “Yulan Bookshop” offers products and services such as books, cultural and creative merchandise, food, beverages, and venue rental. The bookshop is also a major activity promotion center, organizing various reading clubs and classes that enrich people’s minds and increase their wisdom using the aspects of society, human culture, religions, and ideologies. Chen, who upholds the spirit of humanism and innovation, hopes to carry forward the cultural atmosphere and humanistic spirit of Nangang. She hopes to transform the Yulan Bookshop into a unique and leading cultural and creative brand in Nangang, actively contributing to the improvement of its human culture.

 

The Yulan Bookshop cherishes and hopes to preserve all of its precious resources, memories, literature, and history in today’s fast-changing world. It promotes the symbiosis and harmony between people and villages, people and the environment, and people and nature, adhering to the belief that “one who has virtues will never be alone” and being determined to create a unique place in the city. Its carefully planned mandala-style endeavors will undoubtedly attract like-minded people. Additionally, it will continue to promote various gatherings, organize events that enrich people’s minds, work with neighborhood communities to spread the knowledge taught in books, and foster a pleasant atmosphere of happy reading and living. The atmosphere of lifelong learning will better people’s lives and encourage each other to better themselves.

addressZh: 台北市中正區重慶南路三段2號
descriptionZh:
為呼應公民團體對於台北市內辦公空間的訴求，市政府經過長期尋覓和評估，找到了荒廢已久的老舊宿舍，在眾多夥伴的號召與市府內部協調之下，北一女中將此棟大樓正式撥交給社會局，作為未來非營利組織的辦公空間使用。

經歷繁瑣的整修工程、內部裝修與招商，台北 NPO 聚落於 2019 年正式落成在豐厚歷史文化的城南地區，提供給 20 組以上的團隊進駐，並致力於建立開放與自由的社群空間，並藉由組織間頻繁的交流與互動，讓社會影響力更加擴大！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Section 3, Chongqing S Rd, Zhongzheng District, Taipei City, 100
descriptionEn:
To respond to citizen groups’ demands for office space in Taipei, the Taipei City Government has been performing searches and evaluations, ultimately discovering an old dormitory that had been abandoned for quite some time. With the assistance from many individuals and coordination between internal members of the Taipei City Government, the city government facilitated Taipei First Girls High School officially transferring the building to the Department of Social Welfare (Taipei City Government) to be used as an office space for non-profit organizations in the future.

 

After intricate renovation, interior decoration, and business invitation endeavors, the Taipei NPO Hub, located south of the historical Taipei City Walls, was officially opened in 2019. The hub contains an open, free community space enough to hold more than 20 organizations, enabling them to engage in frequent communication and interactions to expand their social influence.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區內江街55巷24號1樓
descriptionZh:
「PAR.T」帕特拉拉彩虹好物店，名稱源自於英文part的「部份」之意，希望傳遞彩虹族群同屬於社會一份子，而非異族的概念。
由圈內人精選豐富拉子選品，包括束胸、男女中性內褲、彩虹小物、百合文藝書籍、情趣用品等，並提撥企業盈餘回饋於平權團體，期盼讓每個人都生活在自然、自在、自信的日子裡。
「PAR.T」邀請大家一起來店同歡，一起「party」！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 24, Lane 55, Neijiang St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn:
PAR.TLALA was inspired by the English word “part,” hoping to convey the concept that the LGTBQ group is also a part of society.

PAR.TLALA offers products carefully chosen by celebrities, such as breast-binding materials, unisex underwear, small LGTBQ items, art and literature books, and sex toys. A portion of the profits generated by the store is given back to equal rights groups, hoping to allow everyone to live in a natural, comfortable, and confident environment.

PAR.TLALA invites everyone to come to the store, have fun, and party!

addressZh: 台北市信義區信義路四段415-3號
descriptionZh:
BUNA是衣索比亞語「豆」的意思，至今衣索比亞家庭都還維持著傳統的社交模式，用「咖啡」凝聚家人、朋友的情感，從炒焙、研磨到烹煮，長達3個小時繁複的工序都象徵莊重的儀式感，
第一杯Abol說著祝福
第二杯Tona話語家常
第三杯Beraka分享喜悅
我們愛上這種悠閒、純真的生活方式，順著衣索比亞語命名為BUNA，希望能將這熱情待客的精神傳承下去
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 415-3, Section 4, Xinyi Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
BUNA is Ethiopian for “beans.” Today, Ethiopian families still maintain their traditional social custom, using “coffee” to bring their families and friends together. The 3-hour-coffee preparation process includes coffee roasting, grinding, and cooking, symbolizing a solemn sense of ceremony.

For the first cup, Abol says his blessings.

For the second cup, Tona talks about daily matters.

For the third cup, Beraka shares her joy.

We love this leisurely and innocent lifestyle, and named our still CAF’E after being inspired by the Ethiopian language, hoping to pass on the spirit of hospitality.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區漢口街2段20巷11號2樓
descriptionZh: Ellie創作學院成立於2009年，為滿足手藝專業同伴們的需求，提供手藝材料、書籍及創作教學等服務。也陸續引進各項日本各種最新的師資課程有甜點黏土.麵包黏土.UV飾品.法式布盒.瓷器彩繪.威尼斯琉璃.玻璃拼貼.藝術印染等各種補同的體驗課程。目前全台數百位認證師資，若你想要了解更多，歡迎您加入我們。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 108, Taipei City, Wanhua District, Lane 20, Section 2, Hankou St, NO.11,2F
descriptionEn: Established in 2009, we, the Ellie Creative Academy, provide products and services such as handicraft materials, books, and creative teaching lessons to meet the needs of our fellow craftsmen. Additionally, we introduce the latest teacher courses taught in Japan such as dessert clay, bread clay, UV jewelry, cartonnage kit, porcelain painting, Venetian glass, glass collage, and art printing and dyeing courses. We have now issued certificates to hundreds of teachers in Taiwan. If you wish to know more, come join us today.

addressZh: 台北市大同區赤峰街41巷7號
descriptionZh: 春秋書店，坐落於台北市大同區的赤峰街，也是過去老台北俗稱的「打鐵街」。書店主要經營藝術文哲、社科心理、攝影電影等相關主題書籍，不定時提供課程、講座，備有咖啡和茶、閱讀座區。我們期許自己是一家書店，像一家書店，不只是一家書店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7, Lane 41, Chifeng St, Datong District, Taipei City, 103
descriptionEn: Located along Chifeng St., Datong Dist., Taipei, Athena Book Store primarily sells art, philosophy, social science, psychology, photography, and film-related books and organizes courses and lectures periodically. It offers coffee, tea, and a reading area to become a bookstore that is more than just a bookstore.

addressZh: 台北市中正區中山南路21號
descriptionZh: 中正紀念堂自民國69年開堂，為名觀光景點有建築獨特性且為國定古蹟，園區又擁有豐富多元的生態景觀，亦是民眾休憩參觀的熱門場所，每年國內外遊參觀人次眾多。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 21, Zhongshan S Rd, Zhongzheng District, Taipei City, 100
descriptionEn: Opened in 1969, the Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall is a famous tourist attraction and a national historic site with unique architecture. The memorial hall also has a rich and diverse ecological landscape, and is a popular place for people to rest and visit, attracting numerous domestic and foreign tourists every year.

addressZh: 台北市松山區富錦街三七六號二樓
descriptionZh:
臺灣唯一的卡片店 在民生社區為大家服務。提供一萬多款的卡片與明信片，讓您在數位時代，仍可以自由自在地以書寫來溝通，分享您的幸福與喜悅，傳遞您的想法與祝福。讓書寫的文字與圖像以有質感的方式被掌握與珍惜。
我思文創同時提供書寫/著色工具，及寬敞的空間，讓您得以悠閒地將心裡最真切的想法，記錄在卡片當中，分享給關心您的人與您所關心的人。
我思位在公園旁的邊間二樓，寬敞的空間，明亮的採光，保留每扇窗的綠色窗景，讓您瞬間脫離台北的塵囂，靜心緩和地思考溝通的議題，搭配上精選的義大利咖啡，在京都松榮堂線香優雅的薰香中，讓您舒緩放鬆地寫下心裡的話。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F, No. 376, Fu-Jin Street, Sung-Sang Dist., Taipei City, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
Located in the Minsheng community, Words Studio is the only card shop in Taiwan offering more than 10,000 types of cards and postcards, allowing customers to still be able to communicate, share their joy, and convey their thoughts and blessings in writing in today’s digital age, while preserving and cherishing tangible words and images.

Words Studio also provides writing/coloring tools and a spacious environment for its customers to leisurely record their most sincere thoughts in cards and share them with their loved ones.

Words Studio is located on the second floor of a building next to a park. The spacious environment, bright lighting, and green window views of the store allow its customers to escape from the hustle and bustle of Taipei in order to think and communicate issues calmly. Write down your thoughts while enjoying Italian coffee and the elegant aroma of Kyoto Shoyeido incense here today.

addressZh: 台北市士林區忠誠路一段171巷10弄4號1樓
descriptionZh:
樂學創客教室是位於士林區的STEAM實踐家，帶著孩子們透過動手操作的方式，認識數學、物理、機械、電學、程式邏輯等知識，跨領域的學習、活潑的教學，深受家長與孩子們的喜愛，初次上課都可以先預約試上看看，玩中學帶給孩子們快樂與自信，主動學習讓家長放心又輕鬆。
目前課程有樂高、桌遊、無人機、程式編輯等。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 111, Taipei City, Shilin District, Alley 10, Lane 171, Section 1, Zhongcheng Rd, No.4,1F
descriptionEn:
Enjoy Learning is a STEAM “practitioner” located in Shilin District that teaches children disciplines such as mathematics, physics, mechanics, electrical science, and program logic through hands-on activities. Its interdisciplinary learning and lively teaching styles are well-received by children and their parents alike. A free trial class is available upon appointment, where parents will see their children reveling in happiness and developing confidence while playing. The active learning process will make parents feel relieved and relaxed.

Classes that are currently available include Lego, tabletop games, drones, and programming.

addressZh: 台北市文山區指南路 3 段 38 巷 33-5 號正對面 ( 找茶屋)
descriptionZh: 『貓空找茶屋』以漸層坡度打造山間玻璃屋， 露天沙發座位通透視野能俯瞰整個台北市景， 台北101清晰矗立眼前，又與陽明山遙遙相望; 提供傳統式品茗及精緻茶點和改良家常菜。親子，家人，朋友聚餐首選之地
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 33, Ln. 38, Sec. 3, Zhinan Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Red Wood House provides patrons with a chance to savor fresh organic produce grown by the owner as well as seasonal changes and landscapes. Diners can also enjoy intricate courses with the soft, ambient lighting, creating a relaxed dining environment like one provided by a comfortable courtyard in a country home.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區內湖路一段360巷2號
descriptionZh: 當傳統中菜遇上美式料理的氛圍，「飯BAR」徹底顛覆所有人對中式料理的既定印象，新穎與經典的碰撞下，最具吸引力、最活潑的中菜料理飯BAR的目標將是為中式料理改變面貌，從五感體驗中去顛覆，讓中式餐廳也能有輕鬆及現代感的氛圍，同時將老菜新譯做更不同的菜餚包裝。 在台灣現今，吃中式料理的年齡層很明顯的斷層，大多數的消費者對中餐的既定印象是油膩與大菜，而有多少業主能為這群斷層年輕人設計屬於他們的料理,服務及空間。 當然我更相信許多的長輩他們可能對於些老菜系，老餐廳的氛圍與味道已經感到乏味。 而在眾多人的引頸企盼之下，飯BAR的新式中餐廳面貌於2014年誕生，透過各菜系融合，東材西想，老新共治的概念確實引發了許多的報章雜誌，媒體爭相採訪，而的確飯BAR的品牌定位讓許多年輕人喜好，進而也帶家中的長輩們一起來體驗這新型態的中式餐廳。 飯BAR讓許多人吃得起老闆菜，而這不只單單分享料理，而是有趣,顛覆,與時俱進的環境， 這些想法需要繼續實踐與延續，往後讓我們為台灣餐飲再盡一點力，讓台灣餐飲能與世界潮流接軌，為台灣餐飲感到榮耀。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Lane 360, Section 1, Neihu Road, Neihu District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “FUN BAR CLASSIC” completely changes people’s perception of Chinese cuisine by uniting traditional Chinese cuisine and American cuisine together. The combination of novel and classic elements gives birth to interesting Chinese cuisine. The goals of FUN BAR CLASSIC are to revolutionize Chinese cuisine, to have its customers experience such changes through their five senses, and to imbue Chinese restaurants with a relaxed and modern atmosphere. Today, there is a clear gap in the age group of people eating Chinese food in Taiwan as most consumers’ impressions of Chinese food are those that are greasy and in overly large portions, and the needs of young people who wish to have different types of Chinese food, services, and dining space have not been satisfied. Believing that many seniors are hoping for a change in traditional Chinese cuisine and age-old dining space, the owner of FUN BAR CLASSIC opened it in 2014. The fusion of Eastern and Western as well as old and new culinary concepts have caught the attention of countless media such as newspapers and magazines, which interview the restaurant one after another. The brand positioning of FUN BAR CLASSIC is favored by many young people, who subsequently bring their older family members to visit this novel-type Chinese restaurant. FUN BAR CLASSIC allows its customers to enjoy traditionally expensive dishes at affordable prices and shares with its customers Chinese food and interesting, “constantly updated” Chinese food and environment. The restaurant believes that such ideas need to be practiced and passed on to contribute to and honor the Taiwanese food and beverage industry, and allow it to connect with world trends.

addressZh: 台北市松山區八德路三段155巷10號1樓
descriptionZh: Meerkat75 Café - 75度獴是一家採預約制的狐獴主題餐廳，馬卡龍色系的裝潢風格、狐獴的互動體驗及美味的無國界料理，讓顧客感受不一樣的2小時用餐體驗，用餐時段11:30～13:30，14:00～16:00，16:30～18:30，19:00～21:00，歡迎線上預約用餐
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 10, Lane 155, Section 3, Bade Rd, Songshan District, Taipei City, 105
descriptionEn: Meerkat75 Café is a meerkat-themed restaurant where customers are required to make reservations prior to their visits. Its macaron-colored decoration styles, “interactive meerkat experience,” and delicious “borderless” cuisine will give its customers a wholly different 2-hour dining experience. Available dining time is 11:30~13:30, 14:00~16:00, 16:30~18:30, and 19:00~21:00, and online reservations are welcome.

addressZh: 台北市文山區景興路193號
descriptionZh:
全台首創結合雜誌圖書館和咖啡廳的文青空間，是餐飲、聚會、休憩、同時也是可供工作或會議的活動空間。
在這裡，你可以點一杯咖啡，沉浸在濃濃的咖啡香，閱讀著來自世界各地，近千本的雜誌，享受著一切美好的事物，在此發生...
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 193, Jingxing Rd, Wenshan District, Taipei City, 116
descriptionEn:
CBC SPACE CAFE is Taiwan’s first-ever hipster space that combines a magazine library and a coffee shop together. It is also a place for dining, gatherings, rest, work, and meetings.

Here, customers can order a cup of coffee and immerse themselves in the strong coffee aroma as they read magazines (this café has nearly a thousand magazines) published by publishers from all over the world and enjoy the wonderful things that life has to offer.

addressZh: 台北市大安區建國南路二段151巷30號
descriptionZh:
充滿著活力的夢想，想讓家人、朋友、小孩還有更多的人吃到好吃又美味的麵包，使用天然酵母、低溫發酵、老麵製作、嚴選天然奶油讓麵包、蛋糕、餅乾，
吃起來無負擔，讓每一位客人都能感受到老闆的用心、與滿滿的幸福感❤️
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 30, Lane 151, Section 2, Jianguo S Rd, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn:
No + Water Bakehouse wishes to let its customers of all ages eat delicious, appetizing bread; and uses natural yeast, low-temperature fermentation methods, sourdough, and carefully selected natural butter to make bread, cakes, and biscuits.

The bakehouse offers healthy food and its customers will be able to feel the dedication of its storeowner, bringing them a sense of happiness. ❤

addressZh: 台北市萬華區大理街7號1樓
descriptionZh:
...............【關於-原生態NatureWorld】..................

西元Nov.2010年,原生態期許更多人在消費的同時也注意到自己與環境的美好共存。創辦人周彥志 覺得這個世界最美好的樣子就是原生態。這是一間園藝起家的公司,透過實體與網路通路的結合,我們努力的融入人們的生活圈裡，現在除了植栽,花藝,香氛,更結合了心靈成長元素,期許散播更多的光和愛。2021結合農業於屏東高樹再創全新品牌原生態大地,落實與環境共好同時引導人們察覺生命的奧秘,同時培養專業老師,打造更多元的服務與產銷,原生態給您的將是從生命源頭綻放的喜悅與療癒。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7, Dali St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn:
[About NatureWorld]
November 2010 – NatureWorld hoped that as people make purchases, they can also coexist with their beautiful environment. Founder Chou Yen-Chih feels that the world is most beautiful when it is in its original form. This is a landscaping company that combines internet channels with a physical location. We work hard to integrate into people’s living circles. In addition to planting, flower arrangements, and fragrances, we combined spiritual growth elements in the hope of spreading more light and love. In 2021, we added agriculture, and created the brand new NatureWorld Studio in Gaoshu, Pingtung to realize coexistence with nature while guiding people to observe the mysteries of life. At the same time, we are cultivating professional teachers and creating diversified services and products. NatureWorld gives you joy and healing that comes from the source of life.

addressZh: 台北市松山區民生東路四段５５巷３弄七弄一號一樓
descriptionZh:
Gold 來自於 "A Heart of Gold” ，
擁有一顆高貴善良的心
9 在數字中代表著無私奉獻、大愛、高尚、
智慧、浪漫、想像豐富與真誠~
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

addressZh: 台北市萬華區漢口街二段121號1樓
descriptionZh:
下班隨手作，由一群熱愛生活與創作的設計師聚集而成，我們所追求的是下班後對於美的生活，我們決定將更多對於我們生活與美學的熱愛分享出去。

我們以手作教學延伸對體驗生活的日情，設計師們的創意發想與不同手作老師的巧手研發商品，我們創造了 17 類，超過 60 種的手作課程，與獨樹一格的手作設計商品。讓第一次接觸手作的你/妳，也能輕鬆自在地揮灑創意，挖掘深埋在自身的藝術細胞。

下班隨手作，手作的成就豐富你生活的每一刻。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 121, Section 2, Hankou St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn:
Afterwork Handiwork was created by a group of designers that love life and creation. What we pursue is a beautiful life after work. Thus, we decided to share our passion for life and beauty. 

We use handicraft teaching to express our daily life experiences. Based on the designers’ creativity and work of different handicraft teachers, we have developed over 60 handwork classes in 17 categories where you can make unique handmade design products. Even those who are doing handicrafts for the first time can easily and freely express their creativity and discover artistic talents deep within them. 

Afterwork Handiwork will help you enrich every moment of your life.

addressZh: 台北市士林區中山北路5段527號2樓
descriptionZh:
誠如我們工作室的名稱「豆子創意」手作空間，我們相信每個人的腦海中都會有許多不同的創意發想，這些創意發想就如同微小的豆子一般，而我們想要透過手作的方式，讓這些創意發想成為各式各樣的驚嘆號，為我們的生活增添更多豐富的元素與色彩。
我們的工作室自2012年開始，以木器彩繪和蝶古巴特手作教室的方式經營，一面創作、一面規劃個人與團體的手作課程，之後我們開始拓展各種不同領域的手作項目，像手縫皮革、金屬錫雕、瓷器彩繪拼貼、uv膠飾品、蠟燭香氛索拉花系列......，希望把不同材質與技巧的手作相互結合，能夠創造出更多不同的火花。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 111, Taipei City, Shilin District, Section 5, Zhongshan N Rd, No.527,2F
descriptionEn:
As stated in our name, YF Handmade Studio, we believe that everyone has different creative ideas in their minds. These creative thoughts are like beans, and we want to use handicrafts to cultivate these creative ideas into all kinds of surprises and add rich elements and colors to our lives. 
We started our studio in 2012 with wood paintings and decoupage. We created works and planned individual and group handwork classes. Later, we expanded into other fields like leather craft, metal work, ceramics, UV resin accessories, candle fragrances, and sola flowers.... We hope to combine different materials and handicrafts to create more innovation.

addressZh: 台北市文山區辛亥路四段166巷17號1樓
descriptionZh: 這裡是位於文山區的陶藝工作室，我們提供手捏陶與手拉坏的體驗與長期課程，讓學員從零開始學習自己動手做獨一無二的器皿。我們也提供場域給需要設備與原料的陶藝家，可以在這裡自由創作與練習。我們期望能將陶藝這項技藝推廣出去，讓大家知道這是一個友善易上手且能有效陶冶心性的創作媒材。

花磚甜點手作室是位於天母巷弄內的可麗露專賣店，備有多種口味和季節限定可麗露，以職人精神和用心的食材製作，口感外酥內軟，顛覆您對於可麗露的想像。歡迎您一起與我們細細品嚐。

一張織布、一把地毯槍、五彩繽紛的毛線

在997 STUDIO
人人都可以製作屬於自己的「藝術裝飾」

A piece of cloth, a tufting gun, colorful thread, and a great creative time…this is tufting! 
At 997 STUDIO
Everyone can make their own artistic decoration. 
We will teach you how to use a tufting gun and different colored thread on a cloth.

Don’t worry, you don’t need any handicraft experience!
We will take you step-by-step through this therapeutic and relaxing process. 
Gain satisfaction through the making of your own rug. 
#TuftyourownRug DIY creative rug

nameZh: GUMGUM Beer & Wings 雞翅啤酒吧-信義本店
addressZh: 台北市信義區光復南路473巷11弄38號
descriptionZh:
GUMGUM Beer & Wings雞翅啤酒吧，由五位來自科技業的大叔共同創辦， 2017年初夏，在信義區一隅悄悄誕生。
GUMGUM主打多樣美味的吮指炸雞翅、無國界創意料理以及本土精釀啤酒，結合在地、異國食材研發出高達十五種口味的獨家雞翅料理，甚至曾被國外知名旅遊網站BigTravel評選為「亞洲第二好吃雞翅」以及「台北最好吃的雞翅餐廳」！
GUM在英文中就是“口香糖”的意思
在這裡 你可以和好友見面、和情人約會、和家人相聚
盡情說笑 大口吃喝
和每個在乎的人黏在一起
GUMGUM也代表著無拘無束、自在灑脫的生活態度
用叼著一根菸，小解的那瞬間
找回自己最自在放鬆的一刻
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 38, Alley 11, Lane 473, Guangfu S Rd, Xinyi District, Taipei City, 110
descriptionEn:
GUMGUM Beer & Wings was created by five gentlemen from the tech industry. Born in the early summer of 2017 in Xinyi District, GUMGUM specializes in a great variety of delicious, finger-sucking good chicken wings, creative international cuisine, and locally brewed beers. By combining local and international ingredients, GUMGUM created 15 flavors of chicken wings, and was named by BigTravel as “Asia’s second best tasting chicken wings” and “Taipei’s best tasting chicken wing restaurant!” 
GUM means chewing gum in English. Here, you can meet your friends, have a date with your lover, and have family gatherings. 
You can eat, drink, and laugh to your heart’s content, and stick to any one that you care for. 
GUMGUM represents an unrestrained, free, and easy lifestyle. 
Rediscover your most relaxing moment with a cigarette in your mouth and a drink in your hand.

使食用者在品嚐美味的堅果時  能在營養、新鮮、口感三方面取得平衡

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No.201, Sec. 2, Shipai Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Situated in Banqiao, Royal House has a history of 20 years. Using local fresh beef in Taiwan and premium beef from New Zealand and Australia, as well as made to order deep-fried pork chops and chicken drumsticks weighing at least 300g, the restaurant has endowed common foods such as beef noodles, pork chop noodles (rice), and chicken drumstick noodles (rice) with different enjoyments. Besides utilizing only the freshest ingredients, the broth is stewed using an ancient recipe. The health-oriented recipe does not involve adding any MSG or artificial spices. Each seemingly ordinary dish is the culmination of skillful control of flame, seasoning, and time. The customer-oriented management philosophy of the restaurant means that abundant love, patience, and attention to detail is infused into the cuisine. The owner’s persistence in freshness, health, and MSG-free, burden-free cooking allows each patron to appreciate the warm hospitality as if they are dining at home.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區長春街12號
descriptionZh: 戲咖啡是由文化影劇系校友們一起創造出來的空間，如電影場景般的美軍宿舍區，在我們的努力下恢復成記憶中的樣子，讓大家都能走入這個時空禁區。我們是一間充滿故事與溫馨的小咖啡廳，同時也是寵物友善的餐廳，想聆聽美軍宿舍得老故事，歡迎來戲咖啡走走～

descriptionEn: Cine Café is a space created by a group of Chinese Cultural University’s Department of Theatre Arts schoolmates. The movie set, American military barrack space, was recreated to trigger our memories so that people can return to that space and time. We are a small pet-friendly coffee shop full of stories and warmth. If you want to listen to stories of old American army barracks, come and visit us at Cine Café!

nameZh: Saturn Landing Turkish Coffee 客家公園店
addressZh: 台北市中正區汀州路三段2號客家主題公園文化中心一樓
descriptionZh:
我們立志增添東亞咖啡文化多樣性，前往土耳其深度考察，呈現出以銅壺萃煮的各式傳統土耳其咖啡、水果炸彈般酸香厚實的精品土耳其咖啡，以及果香飽滿的壺萃過濾咖啡，引領壺萃咖啡文藝復興。 品飲土耳其咖啡請搭配土耳其甜點！我們研發適合亞洲品飲美學的土耳其甜鹹點，為你呈現一場土耳其咖啡甜點饗宴。
在客家公園店，我們嚴選客莊食材，研發客莊桔醬氣泡冰羅馬、桔醬冰拿鐵、客莊擂茶土耳其咖啡、桔醬生乳酪、桔醬磅蛋糕等主題品項，歡迎品嚐！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Saturn Landing Turkish Coffee – Hakka Cultural Park branch
addressEn: No. 2, Section 3, Tingzhou Rd, Zhongzheng District, Taipei City, 100050
descriptionEn:
We set out to create diversity in East Asia’s coffee culture so we set out to Turkey for a field study. Copper pots are used to brew different types of traditional Turkish coffees, boutique Turkish coffee with a rich and acidic fruit flavor, and filtered coffee with fruit fragrance. Saturn Landing Turkish Coffee is leading a revival in pot-brewed coffee. Turkish coffee tastings must be matched with Turkish desserts! We have developed sweet and savory Turkish desserts suitable for Asia’s drinking aesthetics so that we may present you with a Turkish coffee and dessert banquet! 
At the Hakka Cultural Park branch, we use specially selected Hakka ingredients to develop Hakka orange sauce-flavor sparkling ice Roman, orange sauce latte, Hakka leicha Turkish coffee, orange sauce cheese, and orange sauce pound cakes for you to try!

addressZh: 台北市大安區通化街28巷2號
descriptionZh:
【瘋桌遊大安店】熱情歡迎您！
您是否迷戀桌上遊戲的魅力？那麼，瘋桌遊大安店絕對是您的遊戲天堂！
我們是一家位於台北市大安區的桌遊專賣店，致力於為您打造最愉快的遊戲體驗。無論您是桌遊初學者還是資深玩家，我們都能滿足您的需求和期待。
在瘋桌遊大安店，您將找到各種精彩、多樣的桌上遊戲，從經典的策略遊戲到創新的角色扮演遊戲，應有盡有！我們的遊戲庫充滿著受歡迎的遊戲，讓您和朋友們盡情享受遊戲的樂趣。
無論是家庭聚會、朋友聚會還是團隊建設，我們都為您提供舒適和溫馨的遊戲環境。您可以在我們的店內輕鬆享受遊戲，與朋友們互動，共同創造美好的回憶。
此外，我們擁有熱情而專業的遊戲導師，他們樂於解答問題、提供遊戲指導，讓您更快上手並深入了解遊戲的精髓。
無論您是桌遊愛好者還是尋找優質遊戲場所的人，瘋桌遊大安店都是您的不二之選！快來一起加入我們，享受愉快的桌上遊戲時光吧！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Lane 28, Tonghua St, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn:
[Phantasia – Da’an Branch] wholeheartedly welcomes you! 
Are you in love with board games? Then Phantasia Da’an is your game paradise! 
We are a board game specialty shop located in Taipei’s Da’an District that is dedicated to creating the most enjoyable gaming experience for you. No matter whether you are a board game beginner or advanced game player, we can meet your needs and expectations. 
At Phantasia – Da’an Branch, you can find all types of exciting board games, from classic strategy games to innovative role-playing games! Our game inventory is full of popular games so you and your friends can be free to enjoy the fun. 
We can provide you with the most comfortable and warm gaming environment for all your family and friend gatherings and for team building events. You can enjoy games in our shop while you interact with friends to create beautiful memories. 
In addition, we have passionate and professional game teachers who will answer all your questions and provide instructions so that you can understand and get into the game quickly. 
No matter if you are a board game lover or just looking for a quality gaming site, Phantasia – Da’an Branch is your top choice! Come and join us for a great board gaming time!

nameZh: GUMGUM Not Only Beer & Wings 雞翅啤酒吧-內科店
addressZh: 台北市內湖區基湖路3巷68號
descriptionZh:
GUMGUM Beer & Wings雞翅啤酒吧，由五位來自科技業的大叔共同創辦， 2017年初夏，在信義區一隅悄悄誕生。
GUMGUM主打多樣美味的吮指炸雞翅、無國界創意料理以及本土精釀啤酒，結合在地、異國食材研發出高達十五種口味的獨家雞翅料理，甚至曾被國外知名旅遊網站BigTravel評選為「亞洲第二好吃雞翅」以及「台北最好吃的雞翅餐廳」！
GUM在英文中就是“口香糖”的意思
在這裡 你可以和好友見面、和情人約會、和家人相聚
盡情說笑 大口吃喝
和每個在乎的人黏在一起
GUMGUM也代表著無拘無束、自在灑脫的生活態度
用叼著一根菸，小解的那瞬間
找回自己最自在放鬆的一刻
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 68, Lane 3, Jihu Rd, Neihu District, Taipei City, 11492
descriptionEn:
GUMGUM Beer & Wings was created by five gentlemen from the tech industry. Born in the early summer of 2017 in Xinyi District, GUMGUM specializes in a great variety of delicious, finger-sucking good chicken wings, creative international cuisine, and locally brewed beers. By combining local and international ingredients, GUMGUM created 15 flavors of chicken wings, and was named by BigTravel as “Asia’s second best tasting chicken wings” and “Taipei’s best tasting chicken wing restaurant!” 
GUM means chewing gum in English. Here, you can meet your friends, have a date with your lover, and have family gatherings. 
You can eat, drink, and laugh to your heart’s content, and stick to any one that you care for. 
GUMGUM represents an unrestrained, free, and easy lifestyle. 
Rediscover your most relaxing moment with a cigarette in your mouth and a drink in your hand.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區民和街81巷11號1樓
descriptionZh:
我們以一種『分享』的概念，
分享來自各個年代的Vintage商品
讓進來這裡的客人先認識商品本質，
從而對於商品產生興趣並發現其價值，
我們並不會主導他們走向某種風格，
反而讓大家自己嘗試並發掘出更多的可能性。
衣著也是一種語言，來自每一個個體
『如何讓顧客的人生更豐富』是我們的服務的第一要點。
『我們不迎合當季消耗的時尚，
我們品嚐永不落俗套的經典，
我們自創獨家的美麗，
我們要在過去‧現在‧未來都與你同行。』
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 11, Lane 81, Minhe St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn:
We use a “sharing” concept 
To share vintage products from different eras 
So that customers who come here can first know the quality of the products. 
This way, they can have an interest in the products and discover their value. 
We do not direct them towards a certain style. 
Rather, we let them try and discover more possibilities. 
Clothing is a type of language that comes from each individual. 
Our top service guideline is “how to enrich the customers’ lives.”
“We do not welcome seasonal consumer fashion. 
We engage in classics that never go out of style. 
We create our own unique beauty. 
We want to be with you in the past, in the present, and in the future.”

We are a warm coffee shop with an industrial style and great desserts, and you are welcome to come and try our dishes!

addressZh: 台北市大安區敦化南路一段187巷58號1樓
descriptionZh: 歡迎光臨VII！最新是一家專注於提供最新歐美街頭流行女裝服飾的店家。我們店內的衣著風格多樣，涵蓋了從時尚搭配到休閒街頭風格的各種選擇，讓您能夠盡情展現自己的獨特魅力。無論是追求個性、追求時尚潮流還是尋找獨特的服飾，我們都能滿足您的需求。請蒞臨我們的店鋪，讓我們為您帶來一場愉快的時尚購物體驗！

We have a great selection of clothing styles, from fashionable to leisure street wear so that you can freely display your own unique charm. No matter if you are pursuing individualism, fashion, or a unique style, we can satisfy your need! descriptionZh:
我們走遍台灣南北 尋尋覓蜜
跟隨著養蜂人的腳步逐花而居
感動著看著蜂群們奮力振翅
懷著對大自然百分百的敬意期盼著收成

在這裡   您可以感受的到我們對自家產品的用心
從原料的選擇、製作的工法到對包裝的細節

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 9, Lane 52, Lane 553, Section 4, Zhongxiao E Rd, Xinyi District, Taipei City, 110
descriptionEn:
We travel across Taiwan in search of honey. 
Following the beekeepers’ steps in pursue of flowers. 
Watching the bees working so hard moved us. 
Respecting nature and anticipating the harvest. 
Finally, years of sweat is turned into golden honey. 
Here, you can feel the care that we put into our products. 
We pay attention to every detail, from the selection of the raw material to the work process and packaging. 
All of this is to deliver the sincerity of Ms. Gardener and small farmers to you. 
Every bite is a taste of happiness.

addressZh: 台北市大安區復興南路一段253巷10號1樓
descriptionZh: Plants 於 2016 年 5 月創立，是台灣第一家提供植物性、無麩質、全食物飲食的餐廳，致力於推廣植物性全食物飲食，進而讓大眾了解如何從食、衣、住、行、育、樂之中做選擇，活出有意識的生活。人類可以透過飲食模式改變來創造更好的地球環境，我們期待與地球公民一起成長、一起努力、一起透過美好的植物性飲食，推動永續的社會運動，發揮每個人的社會影響力。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 10, Lane 253, Section 1, Fuxing S Rd, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn: Plants was created in May 2016 as Taiwan’s first vegetarian, gluten-free, whole foods restaurant. We work to promote vegetable whole foods so that people will know how to make choices in foods, clothing, lodging, traveling, education, and leisure. This way, people can have an aware life. Humans can use their food choices to create a better environment. We look forward to growing and working together with global citizens, and using great vegetable-based foods to promote sustainable social movement so that everyone can have social influence.

addressZh: 台北市大安區建國南路二段79巷12號
descriptionZh: "MissGreen綠蔬蔬這一路走來，我們的三大堅持： #01 我們比你更在意你的健康。 We care more for your Health. ■ 其實蔬食可以很美味，更可以滿足營養均衡的需求！ 現代人的健康問題層出不窮，細數那些「生病的動物」「食品不安全」「馬甲線」在MissGreen我們保證絕對天然，無添加！ #02 始終...保持善良。 Love all kinds. ■ 成就他人，成就自己！ 保持愛和善良，將善良傳遞給他人。 相由心生，美不單單只是外表，更是一個善良又強大的內心。在MissGreen我們將用有意識的消費形成一股善良的力量。 #03 堅持可持續發展。 Leveraging a Balance. ■ 時尚不單代表時代，更代表人類對於永續的覺醒與美好祈願。 隨著越來越多的人出品地球生態的紀錄片，「綠色」、「永續」、「環保」這些概念頻繁被提出，不僅我們把持初衷，並承諾將永續放在每一個MissGreen綠蔬蔬的設計中。 . . . 綠蔬蔬從2014年起頭的艱難，到如今只因為…我們把持 「真」「善」「和」「美 」 Be Your Own Hero! ■ 用消費去愛我們的家，讓善舉形成一個口耳相傳，屬於你我為未來努力的故事。 只要世界上還有一個人在愛動物、愛地球、默默付出著…MissGreen綠蔬蔬將一直與你同在。 MissGreen綠蔬蔬創始人 Vivian
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 12, Ln. 79, Sec. 2, Jianguo S. Rd., Da'an Dist., Taipei City 106 , Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
“Since its creation, Miss Green has insisted on three things. #01: We care more for your Health. ■ Actually, vegetables can be delicious and can also satisfy your nutritional needs! Modern humans have a lot of health problems. This can be attributed to sick animals, unsafe foods, and the pursuit of firm abs. At Miss Green, we guarantee that everything is natural without additives! #02: Always be kind. ■ Let others achieve what they wish, and achieve what you wish yourself! Maintain love and kindness and pass this kindness to others. Born from the heart, beauty is not just outer appearance, but also a strong inner kindness. At Miss Green, we use conscious purchases to form a kind strength. #03: Leveraging a Balance. ■ Fashion does not only represent an era, but also represent people’s sustainable awareness and beautiful wishes. As more and more people produce ecology documentaries, “green,” “sustainable,” and “environmentally friendly” concepts will be frequently mentioned. We not only put our original intentions, but also our sustainable commitment, into every Miss Green design. Since Ms. Green’s difficult start in 2014, we have become what we are today because we insist on “authenticity,” “kindness,” “harmony,” and “beauty.” Be Your Own Hero! ■ Use purchases to love our home. Let kindness be passed down. Become a story where you and I work towards a better future. As long as there is one person in the world who loves animals, loves the earth, and gives silently, Miss Green will be with you. 
Miss Green creator, Vivian

nameZh: 地下街軟體世界 一店

We also provide pre-order services, game demos, and trial play for fellow gamers. We also provide information and professional consultation in all matters related to gaming. If you like gaming, you’ll be able to find it at Game Mall! Come and see what you can get!

addressZh: 台北市萬華區成都路163號
descriptionZh: 台北漫步旅店西門館前身就是間老旅店，由來自香港的老闆林維源重新改裝為青年旅館。 雖是青年旅館，除了混合床位外也有獨立客房，讓喜歡多一點隱私的旅客，住房時也可以同時享受青年旅館的公共空間。 旅店一樓採用工業風設計，簡約中帶有個性。 一踏入旅店，挑高設計加上整層打通，光是交誼廳就讓人覺得這已經超越了青年旅店該有的格局。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 163, Chengdu Rd, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn: The predecessor of Meander Taipei Hostel in Ximending was an old hotel that was renovated by the owner, Mr. Lin Weiyuan, from Hong Kong, into a youth hostel. Although it is a youth hostel, in addition to mixed dormitories, there are also private rooms available, allowing travelers who prefer a bit more privacy to enjoy both the accommodations and the communal spaces of a youth hostel. The first floor of the inn features an industrial design, simple yet with character. Upon entering the inn, the high ceilings and open layout, especially the common area, give the impression that it has already transcended the layout of a typical youth hostel.

addressZh: 台北市中正區羅斯福路三段244巷10弄19號
descriptionZh:
這是一家充滿愛花者的咖啡廳同時也是寵物友善餐廳，一對姐妹從澳洲回來，希望把自己吃到的好口味及美麗的環境分享給每一位熱愛美食的你！常常會有手作甜點/餐點推出，推薦的菜色有洋蔥牛肉乳酪法棍還有超美味的燻鮭魚酪梨可頌早午餐，來杯溫暖的咖啡，美味的餐點，開始這美好的一天！
下午茶最新推出讓人幸福滿滿的肉桂捲系列，肉桂控一定要試試，還有好多當日手作甜點，配上暖暖的咖啡，瞬間幸福爆表！絕對值得您親自體驗❤️
闆娘喜歡花草，也喜歡小動物，幸運的話來店用餐可以見到店狗Henry亨利與 Hemy嘿美喲（他們是2歲與4歲的臘腸狗）❤️❤️
敬請多加利用電話預約
或臉書私訊預約唷！
（Google上無法直接預約，謝謝）
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 19, Alley 10, Lane 244, Section 3, Roosevelt Rd, Zhongzheng District, Taipei City, 100
descriptionEn:
This is a café filled with love for flowers and also a pet-friendly restaurant. Two sisters returned from Australia with the hope of sharing the great flavors they experienced and the beautiful environment with all the food lovers out there! They often introduce homemade desserts and dishes. Recommended items include the onion beef cheese baguette and the incredibly delicious smoked salmon avocado croissant brunch. Enjoy a warm cup of coffee and delicious meals to start your day beautifully!
The latest addition to our menu is the delightful cinnamon roll series, a must-try for cinnamon lovers. There are also many daily homemade desserts to pair with a warm cup of coffee, delivering an instant burst of happiness! It’s definitely worth experiencing in person. ❤️
The owner loves plants and small animals. If you’re lucky, you might get to meet the shop’s dogs, Henry and Hemy (they are 2 and 4-year-old Dachshunds). ❤️❤️
Please make reservations by phone or through Facebook private messages. (You cannot book directly through Google, thank you!)

addressZh: 台北市大同區延平北路一段69巷2號
descriptionZh:
小石子商行成立於2002年，走過這十多年，我們深信，
原始而繽紛的材質美感，是天然石飾品和其他飾品最大的不同，
來自大地的每一顆寶石都擁有獨一無二的個性和紋理；
而每一位手創人也都有引人入勝巧思和對待。
我們相信這家小店的存在能結合兩者，
陪伴更多人體會簡單的快樂，感受手創的幸福！
[營業項目]
天然石專門店 串珠材料 手作課程
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: NO.2 Lane 69, Yenping North Road, Taipei Taiwan
descriptionEn:
Heybeads was established in 2002, and over these past ten plus years, we firmly believe that the original and vibrant beauty of natural materials is the biggest difference between natural stone jewelry and other accessories. Each gemstone from the earth possesses a unique personality and texture, just as every artisan has captivating craftsmanship and dedication.
We believe that the existence of this small shop can bring these two aspects together, accompanying more people in experiencing the simple joy and happiness of handmade creations!
[Business Services] Specialty Store for Natural Stones, Bead Materials, Handcraft Courses
