Gofe Workshop (Happy Delicious Workshop)
"Dedicated to Life, Creating Life"
"Just as a grain of wheat falling into the soil will produce more wheat," enabling people with disabilities to be self-sufficient is the goal that Gofe Workshop strives for! Since 2016, we have successfully assisted nearly eight individuals with disabilities in gaining proper work attitudes, cultivating good life habits, acquiring excellent job skills, and successfully integrating into society through Gofe Workshop.
In addition to our social responsibility, we commit ourselves to bringing joy and satisfaction to consumers through our professional pastries. With your continued attention and support, sheltered employees can find their own place in the world, and the products they craft at Gofe Workshop not only reflect their dedication but also satisfy your taste buds.
Gofe Workshop relies on your support. By choosing Gofe, you affirm the potential of sheltered employees. Together, let's create more opportunities for happiness!
Your attention and support can help them find a sky of their own!!!

addressZh: 台北市文山區指南路2段62號1樓(左側)
descriptionZh: 我們很高興在政大商圈的門檻上為您打開一扇甜蜜的門。位於政治大學校門口旁，我們的店鋪就在這裡等待您的光臨。 覓糖的「七彩粉粿」是一種由紅薯粉熬製的美食，它的口感軟嫩且帶有Q彈的感覺，讓人回味無窮。我們為您添加了抹茶、芝麻、桂花、玫瑰、椰漿、黑糖、山梔子等七種色彩，讓您在品嚐的同時，也能感受到彩虹般的心情。 我們的品牌秉持「天然、健康、親民的價格」的精神，以創新的現代元素，傳承台灣傳統歷史人文的滋味。我們創新研發了黑糖、芝麻、玫瑰、抹茶、椰子、桂花等現代口味的七彩粉粿，將兒時懷舊的古早味與時尚潮流的高顏值完美結合，成為冰品市場的獨家新寵兒。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Mi Tang - Wenshan National Chengchi University Store
addressEn: 116, Taipei City, Wenshan District, Section 2, Zhinan Rd, NO.62,1F
descriptionEn: We are thrilled to open a sweet gateway in the bustling area near National Chengchi University. Our shop, located right by the university gate, awaits your visit. "Rainbow Rice Cakes" from Mi Tang are crafted using sweet potato flour, offering a soft, chewy texture that delights the senses. We've infused them with seven delightful colors: matcha, sesame, osmanthus, rose, coconut milk, brown sugar, and gardenia, ensuring each bite brings a spectrum of flavors and a burst of joy. Our brand embraces the values of "natural, healthy, and affordable," blending innovative modern elements with Taiwan's rich cultural heritage. With flavors like brown sugar, sesame, rose, matcha, coconut, and osmanthus, our Rainbow Rice Cakes are a unique favorite in the dessert market, bridging nostalgic tastes with contemporary appeal.

addressZh: 台北市松山區復興北路33號
descriptionZh:
departure 總公司以生產配件代工30年著名，全球各大精品行李箱 85% 的配件都是出自此 OEM 團隊，為了使旅人能以最合理的價格擁有一只高品質的行李箱，成立了《departure 旅行趣》這個的品牌，將以『感恩、熱誠、創新、誠信、服務』的信念，持續創新商品與提供更優質的服務。

堅持「第一」
無論是商務、旅行或休閒系列，每個 departure 箱包從零件製作、研發、設計，皆須經過百道以上的手感工序，以確保產品的耐用與堅固性。除此之外，所有的產品出廠前皆必須通過拉鍊、拉桿、落地、振盪、跑步及滾輪六大測試；每款行李箱皆擁有至少三項專利設計。希望每一只行李箱在旅行中能成為旅人的好幫手，完美每一段旅程。

秉持著時尚精品的服務，每只 departure 的行李箱皆擁有五年的免費維修服務，提供消費者最直接的回覆及迅速的服務，讓您買的放心，用的安心。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 33, Fuxing N Rd, Songshan District, Taipei City, 105
descriptionEn:
Departure, renowned for 30 years in OEM production of accessories, supplies 85% of components for significant luxury luggage brands globally. To offer travelers high-quality luggage at reasonable prices, the brand "departure" was established. Guided by the values of gratitude, enthusiasm, innovation, integrity, and service, it continues to innovate products and provide superior service.
Committed to being "first," whether for business, travel, or leisure series, each departure suitcase undergoes over a hundred meticulous processes from component production, research and development, and design, ensuring durability and robustness. Additionally, all products undergo rigorous testing, including zipper, handle, drop, vibration, running, and wheel tests before leaving the factory. Each suitcase boasts at least three patented designs, aiming to be every traveler's reliable companion throughout their journey.
Embodying a commitment to fashionable boutique service, every departure suitcase includes a five-year free repair service, offering consumers direct responses and swift service, ensuring peace of mind in both purchase and usage.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區文德路86號1樓
descriptionZh:
一九九二年日本橫濱排隊買蛋糕的人潮，開啓

了烘焙夢的大門。



 『把簡單做到最好』是我們企業的經營理念，

對於『品質』的堅持，刻劃著初心的歷史。



 至今，追求『品質』的路我們持續走著，足跡

踏遍日本城鄉，探訪百年菓鋪老店，細細體會日

本文化的精髓，越是深究，對簡單的材料能表現

不凡而永恆的『加壽手以羅』越是著迷。



 在飄著木頭香日式老房子裏，品著茶，吃著加

壽手以羅，味自慢的究恢精神，更加昇華而融合

；這一刻，獨享已是一種可惜，如此的美好就該

與您分享！



 五百多個日子裏的沉浸研究，一生懸命，一本

初衷，懷著感恩回饋的心，加壽手以羅結合日式

茶的「初心菓寮」於是誕生…
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 86, Wende Rd, Neihu District, Taipei City, 114
descriptionEn:
In 1992, the crowd lining up for cakes in Yokohama, Japan, marked the beginning of a baking dream.
"Our motto is 'making simplicity the best,'" embodies the essence of our enterprise, with an unwavering commitment to quality that defines our founding spirit.
To this day, we continue our pursuit of quality, traversing cities and towns across Japan, visiting century-old confectionery stores, and profoundly appreciating the essence of Japanese culture. The more we delve, the more fascinated we become by the extraordinary and timeless potential of simple ingredients in "Castella."
In a Japanese-style old house filled with the aroma of wood, savoring tea, and enjoying Castella, we elevate the spirit of taste satisfaction and integration. This moment of exclusive enjoyment is regrettable alone; such beauty should be shared with you!
After more than 500 days of immersion in research, a lifetime of dedication, and a core belief of gratitude, Castella combined with Japanese tea, "Shoshin," was born...

"Caoly Tea Shop" carries on a three-generation legacy of tea craftsmanship. The first generation excelled in tea tasting and selecting fine teas.

addressZh: 台北市北投區中山路26號
descriptionZh:
北投位於大台北地區近郊，是台灣著名的溫泉勝地之一，擁有豐富的溫泉資源和美麗的山水環境。
北投馥悅溫泉酒店地理位置優越，步行至北投溫泉博物館5至8分鐘；至捷運新北投站約10至15分鐘；至台北市區或松山機場車程約40分鐘。酒店遠離塵囂，讓您可以一邊沐浴於自然山川風光之中，一邊盡情享受溫泉的恩賜。
北投馥悅溫泉酒店具有歐洲建築元素，散發出典雅氛圍。客房設計寬敞舒適，每間客房都有大浴池，讓您在舒適的環境中度過愉快的時光。
北投馥悅溫泉酒店提供完善的服務－包含無線網路、行李寄放、代客叫車、機場接送、行程規劃與建議等，讓您無需在住宿上花費多餘的預算，而能盡情享受旅遊的樂趣。不管您來自哪個國家，都能感受我們自然、熱情，如好友般的接待與服務。
無論您是來北投尋找放鬆的時光，還是享受豪華的度假體驗，北投馥悅溫泉酒店都能滿足您的各種需求，為您帶來一段難忘的北投之旅。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 26, Zhongshan Rd, Beitou District, Taipei City, 112
descriptionEn:
Beitou, located in the suburbs of the Greater Taipei area, is one of Taiwan's famous hot spring destinations. It boasts abundant hot spring resources and beautiful mountain and water scenery.
Grand Pleasure Spring Hotel is ideally located, a 5 to 8-minute walk to the Beitou Hot Spring Museum, about a 10 to 15-minute walk to the MRT Xinbeitou Station, and around a 40-minute drive to downtown Taipei or Songshan Airport. Located away from the hustle and bustle, the hotel allows you to bathe in the natural mountain scenery while thoroughly enjoying the benefits of the hot springs. By offering comprehensive services, you can enjoy your trip without spending extra on accommodation. Whether visiting Beitou for a relaxing time or a luxurious vacation experience, Grand Pleasure Spring Hotel can meet all your needs, bringing you an unforgettable trip to Beitou.

客人從這家酒店步行 15 分鐘即可抵達熱鬧的微風中心和太平洋崇光百貨。 距台北松山機場僅10分鐘車程，距桃園國際機場1小時車程。 可應要求提供收費的機場班車服務。
空調客房配有柔軟的 Sealy 床墊、冰箱、沏茶/咖啡設施和有線電視。 私人浴室配有浴室用品和吹風機。

descriptionEn:
Urtrip Hotel, located in Taipei, offers modern accommodations with free Wi-Fi. It is just a 10-minute drive from Taipei Songshan Airport and an hour from Taoyuan International Airport. Airport shuttle services are available upon request for an additional fee.
The air-conditioned rooms feature soft Sealy mattresses, a refrigerator, tea/coffee-making facilities, and cable TV. The private bathrooms come with toiletries and a hairdryer. The hotel also offers laundry and dry cleaning services, and guests can use the self-service laundry machines for free. The on-site tour desk provides ticketing and car rental services.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區港墘路127巷16弄9號
descriptionZh:
我們是在內湖科學園區裡的咖啡館，捷運文湖線港墘站2號出口走路6分鐘可到，或是西湖圖書館(湖光教會)公車站。

溫馨小店裡提供咖啡豆販售，咖啡、茶飲與當日甜點，有舒適的環境。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

Just a 6-minute walk from Exit 2 of the MRT Wenhu Line's Gangqian Station, you can reach us via the Taipei Public Library Xihu Branch (Taiwan Grace Christian Gospel Assembly) bus stop. Our warm little shop offers coffee beans for sale, coffee, tea, and daily desserts, all in a comfortable environment.

addressZh: 台北市大安區延吉街70巷5弄3號1樓
descriptionZh:
「舞良麵」在2014年夏天創立於宜蘭縣頭城鎮，2021年遷店至台北東區。以追求創新而獨特且優良品質為核心，擴大「麵」的界限及想像，舞出好滋味。
最初的開始，是由一對來自台北的情侶，當時相交5年的兩人不時思考人生下半場，一次友人介紹來到宜蘭頭城，初見龜山島及廣闊海岸線的美景衝擊心靈，直覺的明白島內移民人生即將展開。
 「舞良麵」的開始都未經精算。租到草創原址時快夏天，所以賣涼麵。因為省成本、求效率，所以壁面貼報紙，客用桌椅用學校淘汰的課桌椅，設備多數用二手品。也因為是這樣開始，店內使用漂流木、廢棄木棧板做佈置，營運上產生的廚餘做堆肥，供應二樓花臺造景植物的養分，來延續資源回收再利用的精神，環保議題亦是「舞良麵」重要的理念核心之一。
選擇以「涼麵」開始，是避免和在地店家做惡性競爭，在關係經營上會減少阻力外，也容易將獨特性凸顯出來。為了加強獨特性，便以各國特色為主，每款涼麵的醬汁皆量身訂做，食材配料考究自該國飲食習慣，並捨棄一般涼麵慣用的油麵，以「日本素麵」及「義大利細麵」取代再加以冰鎮，口感上顯得清涼爽口且Q彈滑溜。
「舞」的諧音和台語的有（ㄨ）為同音，意在傳達這裡有涼麵。此外，涼麵是大眾心目中強烈既定印象的平民小吃，而「舞」字形上是有質感的，代表「舞涼麵」能跳脫思維，賦予涼麵新生命和可能性。跳舞是開心、快樂的，就像最初創作出這些餐點或店內佈置的過程。更重要的，是「舞涼麵」由兩個人構成，雙人舞遠比單人舞來的精彩可期，缺一不可。
在宜蘭頭城開業的七年多，很幸運的受到不少人的喜愛，期間接受許多雜誌及電視媒體的採訪，「舞涼麵」在宜蘭也成為小有知名度的品牌。
2020年底決定遷店至台北東區。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 106, Taipei City, Da’an District, Alley 5, Lane 70, Yanji St, No.3,1F
descriptionEn: Dancing Noodles was founded in the summer of 2014 in Toucheng Township, Yilan County, and relocated to eastern district of Taipei in 2021. Centered on the pursuit of innovation, uniqueness, and superior quality, the restaurant aims to expand the boundaries and imagination of noodles, creating delightful flavors. Each cold noodle dish features custom-made sauces inspired by different countries to enhance its distinctiveness. The ingredients are carefully selected based on the culinary traditions of each country. Instead of the usual oily noodles, "Dancing Noodles" uses Japanese somen and Italian capellini, which are then chilled, resulting in a refreshing, chewy, and smooth texture.

addressZh: 台北市士林區延平北路五段31號1樓
descriptionZh:
我們的緣起
「溫暖強力的後盾」
從事護理相關工作多年的三姐妹,深切體會病人需求, 有感家屬辛勞,更眼見一群不眠不休的醫療團隊在背後 默默付出努力,想起兒時母親細心熬煮的滴雞精,奠定健康的穩定基礎,盼能將這份溫暖味道分享給大家,成為辛苦朋友的強力後盾。
我們的信念
「追求極致健康本味」
秉持「追求極致健康本味」的品牌信念,從雞隻嚴選到製程,每一個細節毫不妥協。
為了讓需要營養補充需求的病人、家屬和醫護人員, 用心做出最優質的滴雞精,讓大家安心飲用,守護每一位朋友的健康。
我們的專業
「用心傾力打造的好味道」
家中長年從事畜牧養雞的背景是我們挑選優良雞隻、控管品質的關鍵。
用嚴選台灣雞隻,遵循古法精製16小時嚴謹的慢火細燉及一道道繁複程序所打造的滴雞精,是「雞極本味」的堅持也是我們的專業。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 111, Taipei City, Shilin District, Section 5, Yanping N Rd, NO.31,1F
descriptionEn:
Our Origin
"A Warm and Strong Support"
After years of working in nursing, the three sisters deeply understand the needs of patients and the silent efforts of medical teams. Remembering the chicken essence soup their mother used to make meticulously during their childhood, they hope to share this warm taste with everyone, becoming strong supporters of hardworking friends.
Our Belief
"Pursuing Ultimate Health and Pure Flavor"
Every detail is uncompromised, from the careful selection of chickens to the meticulous production process. We dedicate ourselves to creating the highest quality chicken essence to safeguard the health of every friend.
Our Expertise
"Heartfelt Creation of Good Taste"
We meticulously select Taiwanese chickens and follow traditional methods to produce chicken essence through a rigorous 16-hour slow simmering process and intricate procedures. This commitment to quality is the hallmark of "Chi Chi Choice" and represents our dedication and expertise.

We offer a variety of goose meat-based dishes paired with rice, noodles, seasonal vegetables, and other main courses and side dishes, creating a vibrant dining experience. Our consistently friendly approach ensures you can enjoy authentic and delicious meals at an affordable price, which is guaranteed to satisfy you thoroughly!

addressZh: 台北市南港區中南街50號1樓

肉桂捲，十足的香氣，足夠濕潤的麵體，微酥內層再配上濃郁甜度適中的淋醬。微嗆辣的口感絕對要推薦給大家。

Our canelé stands out with its crisp, aromatic crust and soft, chewy center, creating a memorable taste experience.
We also offer a variety of pound cake flavors to suit your preferences.
Plus, our beautifully designed packaging makes these treats an excellent gift choice!

addressZh: 台北市文山區新光路一段50號
descriptionZh: 2020年，Mr. Light 輕食先生成立於政大校園，從外送餐盒起家，同年8月在新光路上開設第一間店。 我們相信健康的食物可以兼具美味，秉持著「新鮮健康、方便快速、顧客至上」三大價值，為台灣餐食環境帶來正向影響力。 如果你也熱愛健康生活，支持健康飲食，那你也是Mr. Light 輕食先生的一份子

descriptionEn: In 2020, Mr. Light was established on the NCCU campus, starting with delivery meal boxes. In August of the same year, the first store opened on Xingguang Road. We believe that healthy food can also be delicious, and we adhere to three core values: "fresh and healthy, convenient and fast, customer first." Our goal is to bring a positive impact to Taiwan's food environment. If you also love a healthy lifestyle and support healthy eating, then you are a part of Mr. Light.

addressZh: 台北市文山區指南路3段38巷33-7號一樓
descriptionZh: 位於台北市貓空山上的山上咖啡，提供您一個遠離城市喧囂的寧靜角落。無論是晨間的清新空氣，還是夜晚的繁星點點，這裡都是您放鬆心靈的理想之地。我們的營業時間為平日早上10點至晚上11點，假日則延長至凌晨2點，讓您在任何時刻都能享受美味的咖啡與甜點。店內設計融合自然元素與現代風格，提供舒適的座位與溫馨的氛圍。無論是獨自一人享受閱讀時光，還是與朋友聚會聊天，山上咖啡都是您的最佳選擇。歡迎來到山上咖啡，體驗一段美好的時光。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 33, Ln. 38, Sec. 3, Zhinan Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Red Wood House provides patrons with a chance to savor fresh organic produce grown by the owner as well as seasonal changes and landscapes. Diners can also enjoy intricate courses with the soft, ambient lighting, creating a relaxed dining environment like one provided by a comfortable courtyard in a country home.

addressZh: 台北市士林區中正路235巷44號
descriptionZh:
胡思二手書店成立於2002年。自開店以來，秉持著「人文、環保、知識再生」的理念，將各類二手書籍悉心修補、整理，再透過實體和網路書店為她們尋找新的主人，讓書中無形的知識得以世代傳承，同時減少紙張耗費與友善環境。

我們珍視每一本書的價值、重視人與人之間的良好互動，期待愛書人在胡思找到更多閱讀的記憶和尋寶的樂趣！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 44, Ln. 235, Zhongzheng Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Whose Books, founded in 2002, has consistently embraced the philosophy of 'Humanity, Environmental Protection, Knowledge Renewal.' We meticulously repair and organize a wide range of secondhand books, offering them new homes through our physical and online bookstores. This approach ensures that the knowledge contained within these books is passed down through generations, helps reduce paper consumption, and supports environmental sustainability.

We value every book and the positive connections it fosters between people. We eagerly anticipate that book lovers will discover new reading experiences and the joy of treasure hunting at Whose Books!

addressZh: 台北市南港區南港路2段13號
descriptionZh:
Hands在這裡想做的是透過設計讓工藝與生活取得平衡，把美好的手做技藝從生活中找回來，找回生活最初的單純與樸質。
南港瓶蓋工廠經過整修，以瓶蓋工廠台北製造所面貌重新開放，將歷史場景中的製造轉化為手創，透過設計為園區注入養份，以編織手法相互串連空間，成為日常交流的平台與互動場所。
Taipei CREALife NEXUS 台北創生活聚落 TCN 的成立是我們致力於推動工業設計發展、培育創意經濟的具體行動。這個聚落將成為青創、新創及文創的台灣品牌的重要據點，為他們提供品牌營銷輔導、促進交流和舉辦各類活動的平台。我們相信，美是生活的重要元素，而 #TCN 將成為推廣生活美學和傳承文化的重要場所。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 13, Sec. 2, Nangang Rd., Nangang Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Hands strive to harmonize craftsmanship and daily life through design, restoring the beauty of handmade skills and rediscovering the simplicity and authenticity of everyday living.

The Nangang Bottle Cap Factory has been renovated and reopened as POPOP Taipei. This transformation repurposes historical manufacturing scenes into handcrafted creations. The space is revitalized through thoughtful design, linking different areas and serving as a platform for daily interactions and community engagement.

The launch of Taipei CREALife NEXUS (TCN) demonstrates our dedication to advancing industrial design and fostering the creative economy. This hub will become a pivotal center for Taiwan's emerging and innovative brands, offering support for brand marketing, facilitating networking, and hosting various events. We believe that beauty is a vital part of life, and #TCN will play a significant role in promoting aesthetic living and preserving cultural heritage.

addressZh: 台北市士林區文林路310號
descriptionZh:
「 堅持30年，只為一碗好麵 」
天東86牛肉麵是天母在地經營30年的老店，前身是間沒有名字的傳統老店。後來經第二代接手後，加入現代化的創新元素以及堅持與努力不懈的經營，慢慢成為天母地區小有名氣的牛肉麵店。
因老店前身位於天母東路86號，因此正名為《天東86牛肉麵》
天東86牛肉麵，目前在士林區文林路及信義區永吉路各有一家分店
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Tien Tung 86 Beef Noodles - Shilin Restaurant
addressEn: No. 310, Wenlin Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
30 Years of Dedication to Perfecting a Bowl of Noodles

Tien Tung 86 Beef Noodles has been a beloved fixture in Tianmu for 30 years. What started as an unassuming traditional shop without a name evolved under the second generation’s leadership, blending modern innovation with relentless dedication to become a well-known beef noodle restaurant in Tianmu.

"Tien Tung 86 Beef Noodles" reflects the original location at No. 86, Tianmu East Road.

Today, Tien Tung 86 Beef Noodles operates branches on Wenlin Road in the Shilin District and Yongji Road in the Xinyi District.

addressZh: 台北市中正區信義路二段17巷10號
descriptionZh: 氛圍放鬆的小店，用心製作的氮氣冷萃咖啡,清爽又順口甘甜, ,坐在路傍,放鬆一下~~很特別的氮氣咖啡，出發前可以先預約喔。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 10, Lane 17, Section 2, Xinyi Rd, Zhongzheng District, Taipei City, 100
descriptionEn: N2 Coffee Bike is a unique reverse-riding tricycle café that started in the Yongkang shopping district and now has two branches in Dongmen and Minsheng East Road. We specialize in crafting nitrogen cold brew coffee using freshly roasted beans meticulously cold-extracted over 42 hours. By infusing nitrogen into the coffee, we create a silky, creamy drink. When the coffee is served through a beer tap system, the release of nitrogen enhances the aroma and natural oils. Initially, the brew takes on a milk tea-like hue, and as it's poured, a mesmerizing, snow-like gradient appears, culminating in a thick, velvety foam atop the cup. This process elevates the coffee's fruity, creamy notes, creating a luxuriously smooth beverage with subtle sweetness, gentle floral undertones, and minimal bitterness. Due to its intricate preparation, nitrogen cold brew is a rarity at large chain cafés. At N2 Coffee Bike, we are committed to innovating new nitrogen-infused cold brews, ensuring every customer experiences the quality and care we pour into every cup.

addressZh: 台北市大安區永康街75巷32號1樓
descriptionZh: 尼泊爾夫與台灣妻共同創立的尼泊爾特色商品小店，2021 於永康商圈開設實體 店面，主要販售音療樂器、香、唐卡及圍巾披肩配件…等手工藝產品，店內許多 古玩藝品出自尼泊爾當地技藝高超的工匠之手，蘊含深厚信仰與風土民情，傳 承數百年的文化工藝於其中。 品牌以尼泊爾一位古早聖人為名，期許自己像祂一樣愛著尼泊爾這片土地，店 主夫妻親自走訪選品上游廠商嚴格控管品質及製作環境，僅親選能感動自身的 商品，尤其是音療樂器類如頌缽、銅鑼、鈴，看過、摸過、聽過，才能下手，讓 娜姆尼成為尼泊爾文化的散播者。 綜上所述，品牌定位「尼泊爾心感手工藝」特以中性的「心感」一詞表述娜姆 尼涵納心靈療癒與信仰文化之藝品，連同音療專業服務，傳達需用心感受之價 值，為使用者帶來心靈的安慰，賞心也悅目。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 32, Lane 75, Yongkang St, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn: Ne Muni Arts & Crafts is a charming shop founded by a Nepalese husband and his Taiwanese wife, bringing the essence of Nepalese culture to Taiwan. Established in 2021 in the Yongkang shopping district, the shop offers a unique selection of handmade products, including sound therapy instruments, incense, thangkas, scarves, and shawls. Many of these artisanal items are crafted by highly skilled Nepalese artisans and infused with deep spiritual significance and local traditions. The owners personally source each product, ensuring high-quality craftsmanship and ethical production. Ne Muni serves as a cultural ambassador for Nepal, with its brand identity centered around "Heartfelt Nepalese Handicrafts." The term "heartfelt" reflects the products' spiritual and cultural depth, offering visual delight and a sense of inner calm to those who appreciate them.

nameZh: 美觀園 台北城老舖烹派日料
addressZh: 台北市萬華區峨嵋街36號1樓
descriptionZh: 美觀園創始人張民瓊先生日治時期肄業於林學堂畢業後，於民國十三年回國任職於鐵路局，服務於北部基隆與台北。為籌資向舊柳屋廚具交涉，學得一手高超工夫。後因日幣無法折換回臺，遂棄職返家，於五四年北港房屋全部改建新式三層樓，並大力張羅置辦一切，將銷售擴展到五鄉區，頗具成績。創始人張民瓊先生逝世後，其孫張卯力接手經營。美觀園迄今六十年歷史，無論景物如何變遷，秉持優良服務，並傳承老鋪之傳統文化。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 36, Emei St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn: Mei Guan Yuan was founded by Mr. Min-Chiung Chang, who studied at a forestry school during the Japanese occupation. After returning to Taiwan in 1924, he worked for the Railway Department, serving in Keelung and Taipei. He negotiated with the old Yanagiya kitchenware store to raise funds and acquire exceptional skills. Later, due to difficulties converting Japanese yen back to Taiwan currency, he left his job and returned home. In 1965, he rebuilt the family’s property in Beigang into a modern three-story building and expanded the business to five neighboring towns, achieving remarkable success. After Mr. Min-Chiung Chang’s passing, his grandson Mao-Li Chang took over the business. Mei Guan Yuan has been in operation for over sixty years, maintaining its commitment to excellent service and upholding the traditional values of the original establishment despite the changing times.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區西園路一段236號一樓
descriptionZh:
歡迎光臨mine mine cafe☕️
以好的品質為初衷
本店提供舒適輕鬆的用餐環境
讓您放慢腳步，好好享用每一餐
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 108, Taipei City, Wanhua District, Section 1, Xiyuan Rd,No, 236.1F
descriptionEn:
Welcome to Mine Mine Cafe☕️ 
Our focus is on providing top-quality food in a cozy, laid-back setting. Relax, take your time, and enjoy every bite.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區貴陽街二段202號
descriptionZh:
日治時期從蕨餅改良的台日混血甜點。
用蕃薯粉加水，加熱不斷攪拌，直至黏稠狀，放涼後切塊冰鎮出Q度。
細緻的沾粉使用麵粉乾炒、過篩、拌糖後方能使用。
涼粉伯（辜明雄）1960開始推攤搖鈴在萬華大街小巷販售，2010二代接手，2017移至貴陽店面現址。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 202, Section 2, Guiyang St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn: This unique dessert, a blend of Japanese and Taiwanese flavors, evolved from traditional warabi mochi during the Japanese colonial era. It is made by mixing sweet potato starch with water and heating it while stirring until it thickens; it’s then cooled, cut into pieces, and chilled for a perfect chewy texture. The finely crafted coating powder is prepared with dry-roasting flour, sifted, and mixed with sugar. "Sweet Potato Jelly" began selling this treat from a pushcart in the streets of Wanhua in 1960, drawing in customers with the sound of his bell. In 2010, the second generation took over, and by 2017, the business had settled into its current storefront on Guiyang Street.

addressZh: 台北市士林區天母東路50巷20-10號
descriptionZh: 專業經營普洱茶,線上商品超過200種,專業經營老鐵壺,老銀壺,茶道具,給您最完整的普洱茶.老鐵壺,銀壺資訊,所有的商品皆保證真品,可全然的放心購買.
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 111, Taipei City, Shilin District, Lane 50, Tianmu E Rd, No.20-10
descriptionEn: We specialize in Pu-erh tea, featuring over 200 online products, a wide range of vintage iron and silver teapots, and tea accessories. We are committed to offering the most complete and reliable information on Pu-erh tea, iron teapots, and silver teapots. We guarantee that every item is authentic, allowing you to shop with total peace of mind.

addressZh: 台北市文山區溪口街89號
descriptionZh:
景美在地傳承三代之傳統糕餅舖,專賣祭祀用的壽桃、麵龜和刈包·有獨立店
面,也在鄰近傳統市場擺攤販售。第二代老間改良傳統,以製作麵包的功夫結
合鮮奶·賦予手撕饅頭、壽桃和刈包獨特的層次口感·為了堅持品質和支持本
地小農·富家僅使用鮮奶,而非市售奶粉、保久乳,提升了產品的獨特賣點·深
受喜愛和認可·除了使用在地小農鮮乳,對其他食材也講究用心,桂圓蛋糕特
選台南東山的土窯古法烘焙龍眼乾;新開發的紅麹發糕,不以傳統染色方式製
作。使用麹原料增加營養價值;許多商品改以海藻糖製作,呼應時下減糖、低糖
之健康風潮。
老餅舖與時俱進,數十年來不斷改良革新,提升食材品質與口味,即使賣的是
傳統祭祀糕餅·卻與現代消費意識接軌,以優質食材兼顧美味與健康,滿足不
吃祭祀供品的新客群,品牌定位「進化式美味傳統糕點」由此而來。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 89, Jingwen Street, Wenshan District, Taipei City 11672
descriptionEn: A heritage pastry shop in Jingmei, passed down through three generations, specializing in traditional ceremonial treats like longevity peach, tortoise buns, and gua bao. Alongside its standalone store, the shop also sets up stalls at local traditional markets. The second generation brought innovation by updating classic recipes, using trehalose in many products to cater to modern preferences for reduced and low-sugar options. Over the years, the shop has consistently refined its offerings, enhancing ingredient quality and flavor to create a balance of deliciousness and health. This evolution has drawn in a new customer base, leading to the brand’s identity of “Evolved Traditional Pastries.”

addressZh: 台北市大安區溫州街7號1樓
descriptionZh: TERRA，在拉丁文中意即大地，蘊含溫暖踏實、飽富生命力的能量。為了探索可可的富麗風味，表徵土地原貌與自然惠賜的土然因而誕生，堅持 bean to bar 的製作過程，以親自挑選原豆進行烘焙、親手研製調溫作巧克力磚為基礎，打造全臺最多產區的 bean to bar 巧克力品牌。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7, Wenzhou St, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn: TERRA, derived from the Latin word for "earth," reflects nature's warmth, stability, and vitality. Inspired by the desire to uncover the luxurious flavors of cacao, TERRA was founded to celebrate the raw beauty of the land and nature’s bounty. With a steadfast commitment to the bean-to-bar process, the brand carefully selects roasts and handcrafts each chocolate bar from raw beans. TERRA has become Taiwan’s premier bean-to-bar chocolate brand, known for offering the most diverse range of cacao origins.

addressZh: 台北市中山區吉林路319號
descriptionZh: 祖傳三代的大鼎豬血湯，第一代從台北昌吉街豬屠口發跡，第二代長子帶領著 7 個 子女傳承家族獨門手藝口味。招牌豬血滑嫩似豆腐，每天半夜送來的新鮮豬血現切 現煮，並以秘製配方大骨熬湯底，有「天然紅豆腐」的封號。除了招牌的豬血湯， 另有豐富多樣的主食餐點，控腳輪飯、滷肉飯、新竹炒米粉.... ，精選自台灣在地 食材，為深具特色的古早味小吃。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 319, Jilin Rd, Zhongshan District, Taipei City, 104
descriptionEn: Da Ding Cuisine, a family heirloom spanning three generations, began in the first generation at a pig slaughterhouse on Changji Street in Taipei. The eldest son of the second generation leads the way in passing down the family's unique culinary skills and flavors to his seven children. Their signature pig's blood soup is as smooth as tofu, made from freshly cut pig's blood delivered every night, cooked immediately, and served with a secret recipe broth made from large bones, earning the title of "natural red tofu." In addition to the signature pig's blood soup, they offer a wide variety of main dishes, including pig's trotter rice, braised pork rice, and Hsinchu fried rice noodles, all carefully selected from local Taiwanese ingredients, providing a distinctive taste of traditional snacks.

addressZh: 台北市大安區安和路一段127巷6號
descriptionZh:
創辦人母親說過：
「幸福要有一道缺口，才能讓幸福感流向他人」，
一口咬下餅乾的缺口，讓MYRA圓滿每個幸福的時刻。
MYRA無論是達克瓦茲、暖餅乾或沙布列鐵盒餅乾等產品，
皆大量採用台灣食材如鐵觀音茶、土鳳梨、桂花、麵茶與龍眼，
並融入精緻擠花手法，讓台灣四季之美綻放在眼前與舌尖。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 6 , Lane 127, Section 1, Anhe Rd, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn: The founder's mother once said, "Happiness needs a crack to let the feeling flow to others." A bite out of the cookie creates a perfect moment of happiness with MYRA. Whether it's their dacquoise, soft cookies, or sablé cookies in tin boxes, MYRA extensively uses Taiwanese ingredients such as Tieguanyin tea, sweet pineapples, osmanthus, flour tea, and longan, incorporating delicate piping techniques to showcase the beauty of Taiwan's seasons right before your eyes and on your palate.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區昆明街278號1樓
descriptionZh:
萬華昆明街上，一大清早天未亮，
得嘉媽媽洗手進廚房， 一鍋原豆清洗打漿，豆漿煮沸放涼。
她的美味起手式，從這裡開始...
紫薯炊煮熬泥，三明治營養有顏值; 
牛肉排厚工拍打，練就口感與肉汁;
義麵的紅醬白醬，都要調配細緻~
不捨女兒外食，現成加工品哪有自做好吃?
從傳統早餐起家，堅持手做食材好品質。 
20 多種產品自製，20 多年如一日，
媽媽的手作早午餐，女兒同心堅持，
一餡一醬一飲，守護每一天的味覺之始。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 278, Kunming St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn:
On Kunming Street in Wanhua, early in the morning before dawn, Mama Dejia washes her hands and heads into the kitchen. She starts by rinsing and grinding a pot of raw soybeans, then boiling and cooling the soy milk. This is where her delicious journey begins. She cooks and purees purple sweet potatoes, creating nutritious and visually appealing sandwiches. The beef patties are thick and tender, crafted to enhance texture and juiciness. Both the red and white sauces for the pasta are meticulously blended. Not wanting her daughter to eat out, she believes nothing beats the taste of homemade food.

Starting with traditional breakfasts, she insists on using high-quality ingredients. With over 20 homemade products, she has dedicated over 20 years to perfecting her craft. Mama's handmade brunches and her daughter's unwavering commitment protect the essence of taste every day, ensuring that each filling, sauce, and drink brings joy and satisfaction.

addressZh: 台北市大同區寧夏路22-9號
descriptionZh:
一家台灣味路邊攤小吃不斷迭代進化，
1951，李煙陣於雙連市場以麵線攤起家，
1996，二代李秀男寧夏路賣鞋多年後回歸父業加入臭豆腐，
1998，當上里長，帶動攤商投入夜市改造，生意通達。
2005，三代李啟榮辭外商返家，啟動臭豆腐創意研發，
以父親20年的里長伯為招牌，設店面開始企業化。
包括原本的油炸與麻辣，創造出臭豆腐六種吃法，
清蒸、水煮不在話下；還融味餛飩、抄手、金沙。
臭豆腐種類、配料、刀工、醬汁…，吃法不同各有所搭。
破布子口味現點現蒸入味軟嫩，炸三寶香酥口感佳。
麻辣鴨血臭豆腐獨門四鍋湯頭，任選不辣與小中大辣；
台式炸臭豆腐非基改黃豆，酥脆出鍋經典昇華。
香酥嫩麻辣脆，一次到味；臭豆腐全集，只此一家。
三代盡心耕耘不懈，造就前總統口中的「夭壽好呷」。
國宴級平實價，2024改名李掌伯，品牌造起來再進化!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 22-9, Ningxia Rd, Datong District, Taipei City, 103
descriptionEn:
A Taiwanese street food stall continuously evolves, featuring the father's signature dish, Li Zhang Bo, as it transitions into a more business-oriented model. Focused initially on deep-fried and spicy dishes, they have created six ways to enjoy stinky tofu, including steaming and boiling. They've also incorporated flavors from wontons, dumplings, and a golden sand sauce. The variety of stinky tofu, toppings, cutting techniques, and sauces allow for different pairings and experiences.

The freshly made and steamed soft stinky tofu is tender and flavorful, while the crispy three-treasure dish offers an excellent texture. The spicy duck blood stinky tofu features a unique four-broth selection, allowing customers to choose from not spicy, mild, medium, or spicy. The Taiwanese deep-fried stinky tofu is made from non-GMO soybeans, resulting in a crispy, classic dish that has been elevated to perfection. With a delightful combination of crunchiness and spiciness, this is the ultimate destination for stinky tofu enthusiasts—there's no other place like it.

addressZh: 台北市大安區新生南路三段86巷15號
descriptionZh: 香園祖傳三代的好味道，沙茶牛肉乾麵是本店招牌，現涮牛肉片加上特製細麵，爽脆的有機豆芽再加上自製研磨花生粉，帶勁滋味傳香一甲子
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 15, Lane 86, Section 3, Xinsheng S Rd, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn: Zhi Xiang Yuan, a family-owned establishment with a rich heritage spanning three generations, is known for its signature shacha beef dry noodles. Freshly sliced beef is cooked to order and paired with special fine noodles, complemented by crisp organic bean sprouts and homemade ground peanut powder. This combination delivers a robust and aromatic flavor cherished for sixty years.

addressZh: 台北市文山區指南路二段56號2樓
descriptionZh: 隱身在政大旁邊的小咖啡廳，當你踏上階梯前往小公寓的時候，你會找到一個屬於自己的小角落，享受屬於自己的休閒時光！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F, No. 56, Section 2, Zhinan Rd, Wenshan District, Taipei City, 116
descriptionEn: Nestled beside National Chengchi University, this small café offers a hidden gem. As you step up the stairs to the cozy apartment, you’ll discover a little corner that's all your own, perfect for savoring your leisure time!

addressZh: 台北市大安區和平東路二段118巷37號
descriptionZh:
烘焙師的大航海餐桌

5百多年來，貝倫塔屹立在里斯本港口，

見證著大航海時代的開場，船帆四海征拓。

文化藝術、貨物食物與香料，八方交流融合。

繞過半個地球，熱愛烘焙的呂宗原回台創業，

左手擀麵棍與烤箱，右手煎鏟與燉鍋，

跨國食材與廚藝的巧思融合，就是核心主軸。



台灣鳳梨內餡塞進法國麵包，披薩滿溢法式味道，

銅鑼燒其實是蛋糕，老饕必點德國脆皮豬腳，

牛排讓位，威靈頓雞腿排翻味英倫經典，

蛤蠣義大利麵拌炒麻辣小卷，台義妙搭麻香味鮮。

和平東路靜巷公園邊，有一家餐廳與麵包店，

跟著烘焙師兼主廚轉動舵輪出航，

貝倫坊邀您，舌尖揚帆，一口融四方!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 37, Lane 118, Section 2, Heping E Rd, Da’an District, Taipei City, 106
descriptionEn:
The great maritime dining table of a baker stands as a testament to over 500 years of history, with the Belém Tower enduring at the Lisbon harbor, witnessing the dawn of the Age of Exploration. After traveling halfway around the globe, the baking enthusiast Zong-Yuan Lu returned to Taiwan to start a business, wielding a rolling pin and an oven in one hand and a spatula and a pot in the other. The core concept is the fusion of international ingredients and culinary creativity.

In this unique blend, Taiwanese pineapple filling is tucked into French bread, pizzas burst with French flavors, and clam pasta is stir-fried with spicy squid, showcasing a delightful combination of Taiwanese and Italian tastes. Next to a tranquil park, there’s a restaurant and bakery near Heping East Road, where you can embark on a journey with the baker-turned-chef at the helm. Belém Bakery & Eatery invites you to sail with your taste buds and savor a world of flavors in every bite!

addressZh: 台北市大同區重慶北路一段1號2樓
descriptionZh:
Let’s Do Sake! ─ 獨樂

隱於台北車站旁大樓的2樓，

來這喝一杯，平易卻與眾不同，

窗外車水馬龍，而你在另一個時空。



每支酒都有清楚身世，經過反覆試喝。

獨家鹽麴料理佐清酒，天生對味的組合。

雞肉胡椒燒、味噌蛋黃漬、胡桃小女子…

哪支酒合適？桌邊推薦來自專業清酒老師。



眾人相聚暢飲、一人何妨小酌？

清酒之樂樂如何？獨樂眾樂兼得。

可冰飲、可溫熱，酒與人，冷暖各有風格，

生活的旨味不在他方，請來清酒師的究味食樂場。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 103, Taipei City, Datong District, Section 1, Chongqing N Rd, No,1,2F
descriptionEn:
Let’s Do Sake! — DoSake Bistro

Tucked away on the second floor of a building next to Taipei Station, this bistro offers a unique yet accessible drinking experience. Outside, the hustle and bustle of traffic continues, but inside, you find yourself in a different realm. Each sake has a clear origin, meticulously selected through repeated tastings. The exclusive shio koji dishes paired with sake create a naturally harmonious combination. From peppered chicken to miso-marinated egg yolk and walnut snacks, which sake will you choose? Recommendations from professional sake experts are available right at your table.

Whether gathering with friends for a lively drink or enjoying a solo sip, the joy of sake is yours to explore. You can enjoy it chilled or warmed, with each option offering its style. The essence of life’s flavors isn’t found elsewhere; it’s in the tasting room curated by the sake master.

addressZh: 台北市中山區長安東路二段131之4號
descriptionZh:
惜味有鄰，佳焙安心 ── 凱樂烘焙

1968，在長安東路以傳統台式麵包起家，

每天清晨，絡繹買早餐的客人像走自家灶咖。

而後歐式、日式麵包還有各種糕點，不停精益研發，

一心要讓厝邊客、莘莘學子吃得安穩開心，

食材講究，口味創新，幾十年來各種比賽常勝軍。

卵香牛軋糖&卵香牛軋餅是秘方招牌點心，

堅持新鮮紅殼蛋費時現打，綿香軟Q不黏牙，

老少都愛，內行觀光客伴手禮掃貨必達。

勤奮惜味一甲子年華，凱樂烘焙一直抵佳。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 131-4, ChangAn East Rd Section 2, Zhongshan District, Taipei City, 10491
descriptionEn:
Cherishing Flavors, Baking with Care — Carol Bakery
Established in 1968 on Chang'an East Road, Carol Bakery began with traditional Taiwanese bread. Every morning, a steady stream of customers stops by for breakfast as if visiting their kitchen. Over the years, the bakery expanded its offerings to include European and Japanese breads and a variety of pastries, continuously innovating to ensure that local neighbors and diligent students enjoy stable and happy meals. With a focus on high-quality ingredients and creative flavors, Carol Bakery has been a consistent champion in various competitions for decades.

Their signature snacks, egg-flavored nougat and egg-flavored nougat cookies, are made with a secret recipe, insisting on using freshly cracked red-shelled eggs for a delightful, soft, non-sticky texture that appeals to all ages. These treats are a must-have for savvy tourists looking for local souvenirs. With over sixty years of dedication to quality and flavor, Carol Bakery continues to rise above the rest.

addressZh: 台北市士林區天母東路8巷25之1號
descriptionZh:
彌月呷饗賀，平日吃更樂~皇鼎油飯

從木雕師傅改行領了廚師執照，

李富榮繼承基隆阿嬤70年的好手藝，

天母傳統市場裡，20載雕琢出油飯的特色紋理。



以稀有關山圓糯米取代長糯米，不會胃脹氣；

檜木桶日日蒸出糯米香氣，吸走多餘水氣；

黑麻油老薑爆香，拌炒香菇、後腿肉、蝦米，

倒入特熬的雞骨高湯，米酒提味、油蔥撒下去，

阿嬤的秘方醬汁告成，趁熱均勻攪拌蒸熟米飯。

大顆飽滿粒粒分明，濃濃麻油雞酒香滿溢。

來店即時享用、宅配隨時解饞，更是饗賀彌月禮。

呷一口皇鼎的桶蒸油飯，秒回阿嬤年代味覺記憶。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 25-1, Lane 8, Tianmu E Rd, Shilin District, Taipei City, 111
descriptionEn:
"Celebrating a Full Month, Enjoying Every Day — Huang Ding Glutinous Oil Rice

Fu-Rong Lee, who transitioned from a woodcarver to a certified chef, inherited his grandmother’s 70 years of culinary expertise from Keelung. For the past 20 years at the Tianmu Traditional Market, he has honed the unique texture of his glutinous oil rice. By using rare Guanshan round glutinous rice instead of long glutinous rice, the dish avoids causing bloating. The rice is steamed daily in cypress wood barrels, which draw out excess moisture while infusing it with a delightful aroma.

With black sesame oil and ginger sautéed to perfection, Lee adds shiitake mushrooms, pork leg, and dried shrimp, then pours in a specially brewed chicken bone broth. Rice wine enhances the flavor, and crispy shallots are sprinkled on top. The secret sauce passed down from his grandmother is mixed evenly into the hot, steamed rice. The result is a bowl of plump, distinct grains overflowing with the rich aroma of sesame oil and chicken.

Enjoy it immediately in-store, have it delivered to satisfy cravings anytime, or gift it as a special full-month celebration treat. A bite of Huang Ding Glutinous Oil Rice instantly transports you to the nostalgic flavors of your grandmother’s era."

addressZh: 臺北市中山區錦州街199號1樓
descriptionZh: 大普美創立於1972年，是由具有一甲子糕餅製作功夫的老師傅何進興先生與妻子陳碧女女士親自創立。憑著一股對糕餅製作的熱情與紮實技術及研究精神，堅持終其一生在糕餅業努力。並將歐、美、日等國的烘焙技術融入、改良並研發新產品，讓傳統糕餅迎合現代口味。大普美堅持使用頂級與有品質保證之原料，儘管台灣發生多次食品安全重大事件，如餿水油、病死豬與毒奶粉事件等，對店面的生意影響仍微乎其微，深獲顧客信賴。第二代老闆何承璋先生，頂著台大食品科學博士的光環並擁有營養師執照，放棄教職工作返家接手老店，不斷研發改良，為傳統糕餅注入新生命與活力。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 199, Jinzhou St, Zhongshan District, Taipei City, 10491
descriptionEn:
Ta Pu Mei Bakery was founded in 1972 by Master Chin-Shing He, who boasts over sixty years of pastry-making expertise. His wife, Bi-Nu Chen, is a testament to his dedication and craftsmanship. With a passion for baking, solid techniques, and a spirit of research, they committed their lives to the pastry industry. They have incorporated, refined, and developed new products using baking techniques from Europe, the U.S., and Japan, ensuring that traditional pastries meet modern tastes.

Ta Pu Mei insists on using only top-quality and guaranteed ingredients. Despite several major food safety incidents in Taiwan, such as the use of recycled cooking oil, the scandal of diseased pigs, and toxic milk powder, the bakery has remained largely unaffected, earning the trust of its customers. The second-generation owner, Cheng-Zhang He, who holds a PhD in Food Science from National Taiwan University and is a licensed nutritionist, left his teaching position to take over the family business. He continuously develops and innovates, breathing new life and vitality into traditional pastries.

addressZh: 台北市中正區忠孝東路二段40號一樓
descriptionZh:
《台式定食 & 創意家常菜 》
北漂青年在北部定居的房子叫什麼名字呢？
「北棲邸家」
不要被老闆幽默的店名笑倒，北棲邸家就是從高雄來台北棲息的老闆，以離鄉背井的心情在台北開店，讓遊子們有個像家棲食的場所。
每種食材都是特別精選，老闆高雄家海水生態養殖的虱目魚和台灣大白蝦，選自花蓮富里黑糙米飯、台灣各地的綠色好食材，享受低油少鹽的創意台式家常美味、健康滿分的原形食物料理，在這繁忙的城市中藉由食物熟悉的味道傳遞家的溫度。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 100, Taipei City, Zhongzheng District, Section 2, Zhongxiao E Rd, No,40,1F
descriptionEn:
Taiwanese Set Meals & Creative Home Cooking

What do we call the houses where young people from the north settle in? “North House.”

Don’t let the owner’s humorous name fool you—North House is run by an owner from Kaohsiung who has come to Taipei to create a home away from home for wanderers. Each ingredient is meticulously selected, featuring fish and shrimp from his family's marine ecological farm in Kaohsiung, Hualien Fuli black rice, and fresh, green ingredients from across Taiwan.

Here, you can savor low-oil, low-sodium creative Taiwanese home-cooked dishes made from whole foods, allowing you to enjoy the comforting flavors of home amidst the hustle and bustle of the city.

addressZh: 台北市大同區長安西路196號
descriptionZh:
四代傳承工藝傘家~雨洋工坊
1945二戰末，台灣第一間洋傘專賣店誕生，
從家庭代工到專業產製外銷日本，被磨出赫赫傘功，
曾身歷雨傘王國巔峰，「建興洋傘」以匠心撐出光榮。
老師傅的木製三角板，持續裁出傘形優美立體感，
縫製細緻，日規堅持，嚴選布料骨材耐用又耐看。
昔日商標威名老虎牌，第四代改名「雨洋工坊」，
擋雨遮陽，工藝美傘的功能與花色百百款。
輕巧好攜巴掌傘、瞬間可收三秒傘、隔熱降溫傘下涼、
快乾傘水滴頃刻退散、聽話傘不爆衝反回彈…，
單色優雅、花色時髦，對應各種場合男女老少；
收放自如、晴雨皆酷，總有一把讓你心滿意足。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 103, Taipei City, Datong District, Chang'an W Rd, No,196,2F
descriptionEn:
Four Generations of Craftsmanship Umbrella Makers — Yu Yang Workshop

In 1945, at the end of World War II, Taiwan's first specialty umbrella store was born. Starting as a family-operated workshop, it evolved into a professional manufacturer exporting to Japan, gaining a reputation for exceptional umbrella craftsmanship. Known as "Jian Xing Umbrella," it achieved the pinnacle of the umbrella kingdom, showcasing artisanal pride.
The master craftsman's wooden triangular templates continue to cut out beautifully shaped, three-dimensional umbrellas with meticulous stitching and adherence to Japanese standards. They select durable and aesthetically pleasing fabrics and frames. Formerly renowned under the Tiger brand, the fourth generation has rebranded as "Radiant Handmade."
With umbrellas that shield from rain and sun, the workshop offers a plethora of styles and designs. Choose from lightweight pocket umbrellas, quick-deploy umbrellas that close in three seconds, heat-insulating umbrellas for a cool shade, quick-dry umbrellas that repel water instantly, and flexible umbrellas that bounce back instead of breaking. Available in elegant solid colors or trendy patterns, there's something for everyone, regardless of age or occasion. These umbrellas are easy to handle, stylish in any weather, and sure to satisfy your needs!

addressZh: 台北市萬華區三水街71之1號
descriptionZh: 『 菜漆麵匠 』原 永恆製麵，位於萬華東三水街市場內，在地傳承50多年手工製麵店，每天堅持以傳統製麵機現做麵條，有陽春麵、油麵、拉麵及水餃皮。而其中引人注目的，便是五顏六色的彩色拉麵，色彩都是用心研發調配下，以蔬菜或水果煮出來的，天然又健康，兼顧美觀與美味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 71-1, Sanshui St, Wanhua District, Taipei City, 108
descriptionEn:
VegeNoodler, originally "Eternal Noodle Shop," has been a beloved local hand-made noodle shop in Wanhua for over 50 years. Located within the East Sanshui Street Market, VegeNoodler prepares fresh noodles daily using traditional noodle-making machines. It offers a variety of options, including plain noodles, oil noodles, ramen, and dumpling skins.

What stands out the most is their vibrant, colorful ramen, crafted from a thoughtful blend of vegetables and fruits to create natural hues. This dedication ensures that the noodles are visually appealing but also healthy and delicious.

descriptionZh: 團購很多，會議價的團購主也多，但懂食品、成份的不多。您在乎食安，我懂食品。以任職食品公司研發20年的經驗，為您找尋好的食品。龍青食品商行找的都是版主服務過/拜訪過或了解過的廠商，為您把關，產品並不見得很多，但都是把關過的，歡迎加入，讓我們為您服務

At Long Ching Food Trade, I have personally worked with, visited, or thoroughly vetted every supplier. While our product selection may not be extensive, every item has passed strict quality checks. We warmly invite you to join us and let us provide you with trustworthy products.

nameZh: 坐坐吧(西門紅樓限定店)
addressZh: 台北市萬華區成都路10號
descriptionZh:
「坐坐吧」位於台北市西門町商圈內；百年古蹟「西門紅樓」一樓，為各國旅客必造訪之觀光勝地。
「來坐坐吧!」不僅是品牌名稱，更代表台灣人熱情好客的友善精神。我們以潮流現代、幽默有趣的設計風格塑造空間氛圍；以有溫度的招呼及熱忱服務客人，傳達具有人情味的品牌核心理念。
「坐坐吧」嚴選高品質配方豆，提供顧客精品咖啡、茶飲、甜點，結合在地特色與創新研發能力，秉持「食驗」精神，從菜單設計到餐具挑選，展現獨特風格，持續推陳出新，給顧客美好的生活體驗。
「來坐坐吧享用一杯好咖啡」是我們努力的目標，也是我們想傳遞的生活理念。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 10, Chengdu Rd., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108
descriptionEn:
Zuozuobar is located in Taipei’s Ximending shopping district, on the first floor of the century-old Red House, a popular destination for international visitors.
The name, with its literal Chinese meaning of "come sit down,"  represents not only the brand but also Taiwan's welcoming and hospitable spirit.
The space features a modern, playful design. Warm greetings and attentive service reflect the brand’s focus on human connection.
Premium coffee beans are carefully selected to offer specialty coffee, tea, and desserts, combining local flavors with innovative creations.
Driven by a spirit of culinary experimentation, the brand expresses its unique menu design and tableware selection style, continuously introducing new offerings to enhance the customer experience.
"Come sit down and enjoy a great cup of coffee" defines both Zuozuobar's goal and lifestyle concept.

Good Time Coffee — Bade Store: A cozy café set in a renovated old house, offering a warm and charming atmosphere.

From dawn to dusk, through every season, we embrace a life we love.

addressZh: 台北市士林區文林路762號1樓
descriptionZh:
✦ Brillante pâtisserie
「Brillante」在法文中代表著「閃耀光芒」，也期盼來到 Brillante pâtisserie 的每一位食客們，都可以享受到令人眼睛為之一亮的甜點。
✦ 關於主廚｜陳星緯 Allen Chen
在法國 8 年的期間，奪下了數項世界大賽冠軍及獎項的主廚陳星緯，更曾擔任 MOF 法國最佳工匠 Yann BRYS 的副主廚。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1 F., No. 762, Wenlin Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111
descriptionEn:
✦ Brillante Pâtisserie
In French, “brillante” means “radiant,” we aim for every guest at Brillante Pâtisserie to experience desserts that sparkle with brilliance.

✦ About the Chef | Allen Chen
Chef Allen Chen spent eight years honing his craft in France, earning numerous world championship titles and awards. He also served as sous chef under MOF pastry master Yann Brys, one of France’s finest artisans.

addressZh: 台北市中正區延平南路51號1樓
descriptionZh:
做出「代表台灣的健康好酒」是賀木堂酒業成立的初衷，選用茶葉、花卉與水果等台灣本土農產品原料，採獨家技術三次精餾萃取植物香氣和精華，層層過濾去除製酒中產生的甲醇、高分子醛類等雜質，做出「不頭痛、不酒臭、不宿醉」並散發天然香氣的優質好酒。
賀木堂將茶融入酒中，讓品飲者藉由賀木堂的酒，感受數千年來歷史情感的堆疊與技藝的傳承。以千年傳統為基底，創新文化做調配，讓愛酒人以細嚐慢飲方式品味茶酒，如同品味人生的藝術，打造華人專屬的新品酒文化。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1 F., No. 51, Yanping S. Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100
descriptionEn:
Hometown Liquor Corporation was founded with the vision of creating “Taiwan’s signature healthy liquor.” We select local ingredients such as tea leaves, flowers, and fruits and use an exclusive triple distillation process to capture the pure essence and aroma of botanicals. Each batch is carefully filtered to remove methanol, complex aldehydes, and other impurities, resulting in a refined spirit that is smooth, fragrant, and free from headaches, harsh odors, or hangovers.
Through the art of blending tea with liquor, Hometown Liquor offers a taste of centuries-old tradition and craftsmanship in every sip. Grounded in ancient heritage and reimagined with modern creativity, we invite connoisseurs to enjoy our tea-infused spirits slowly and thoughtfully — an experience that reflects the artistry of life itself and a new chapter in liquor culture designed for the Chinese-speaking world.

addressZh: 台北市大同區承德路二段91巷30號

藝術與美食的完美交融

addressEn: No. 8, Ln. 41, Chifeng St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103
descriptionEn:
Siang Apato – Since 2007
Crafting comfort for your home with care.
Specializing in premium bedding, pillows, comforters, and lifestyle accessories, Siang Apato has always stayed true to one belief: turning the dream of a beautiful home into reality, with a sense of ritual and warmth in everyday living.
Everyone has a unique vision of home. With a 95% customer repurchase rate, we’re proud to help you shape a space that truly reflects who you are.
Every fabric undergoes strict quality testing.
Every stitch, anti-pilling finish, and non-toxic certification is our standard.
We care about all the details you care about even more.
Because at Siang Apato, we believe home is something we nurture together, with heart.

nameZh: QUEEN JOCELYN 賈思琳輕珠寶
addressZh: 台北市松山區民生東路四段54號8樓805室
descriptionZh:
Queen Jocelyn，源自台灣的輕奢珠寶品牌，自2008年起就從台灣開始用細緻的珠寶工藝讓國際看到台灣的珠寶創作。
懷抱著讓世界看見台灣的夢想，Queen Jocelyn花了很長的時間在國際上站穩腳步並且拓展與世界接軌的通路。
在國際道路上努力的同時，我們也積極拓展在台灣本地的能見度，將我們在國際的經驗扎根於此。2021年6月，受到國際級專業精品鑑賞水準-涵碧樓的肯定，入駐日月潭涵碧樓精品店。
Queen Jocelyn更是友善地球、使用有FSC認證之環保包裝，讓輕珠寶符合當代流行的 “經濟時尚”浪潮，讓珠寶飾品不再遙不可及，而是能走入女人每天的生活、妝點妳每個有獨特意義的場合。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: Rm. 805, 8 F., No. 54, Sec. 4, Minsheng E. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105
descriptionEn:
Since 2008, Queen Jocelyn has showcased Taiwan's exquisite jewelry craftsmanship to the world, bringing international attention to Taiwan's jewelry artistry.
Driven by a dream to make Taiwan shine on the global stage, Queen Jocelyn has dedicated years to establishing a strong international presence and expanding global distribution channels.
While striving internationally, we have also actively expanded our presence in Taiwan, rooting our global experiences locally.
In June 2021, we gained recognition from The Lalu, the internationally renowned luxury standard, by securing a place in its boutique at Sun Moon Lake.
Queen Jocelyn is even more earth-friendly, using FSC-certified eco-friendly packaging to make light jewelry in line with the contemporary trend of "economic fashion." Jewelry is no longer out of reach, but can enter women's daily lives and decorate every unique occasion.

addressZh: 台北市文山區指南路三段34巷53-2號
descriptionZh:
張迺妙茶師是第一位引進鐵觀音茶於木柵地區種植的人，使貓空自1895年起成為台灣最大的鐵觀音茶產地。
身為張迺妙茶師的後代，我們在這裡規劃了紀念館，不僅致力於茶文化的推廣，更與各地的茶農合作，提供多樣的台灣茶。
本館提供華語、英語、台語及粵語服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Tea Master Chang Nai-Miao Memorial Hall
addressEn: No. 53-2, Ln. 34, Sec. 3, Zhinan Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116
descriptionEn:
Tea Master Chang Nai-Miao is the pioneer of the Taiwanese Tiekuanyin Tea plantation. He introduced it to Muzha, where we are located, in 1895, making it the largest plantation of Tiekuanyin Tea in Taiwan ever since.
As the descendants of the Tea Master, we devote ourselves to preserving and promoting the knowledge of teas and tea culture. We also cooperate with farmers from all over Taiwan to provide a variety of high-quality Taiwanese teas.
Our services are available in Mandarin, English, Taiwanese, and Cantonese.

nameZh: 植健身 Fit plant gym 敦南店 Dun Nan
addressZh: 台北市大安區敦化南路二段59號
descriptionZh:
如果您想尋找一家交通方便又好訓練的台北市健身房，那沒有比植健身更合適的選擇了。
位於市區內最便利繁華的地段，卻又遠離喧囂，使用最頂級的健身器材並提供Wi-Fi、淋浴、免治馬桶、免費密碼置物櫃、飲水機以及休息區，你可以在植健身完成所有的訓練。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Fit Plant Gym Dun Nan Gym
addressEn: No. 59, Sec. 2, Dunhua S. Rd., Da'an Dist., Taipei City 106
descriptionEn:
Fit Plant Gym is the perfect choice if you're searching for a gym in Taipei that combines convenience with quality training.
Nestled in one of the city’s most central and accessible locations—yet tucked away from the noise— Fit Plant Gym offers a premium workout experience with top-of-the-line equipment. Enjoy full amenities including Wi-Fi, showers, bidet toilets, free secure lockers, a water station, and a cozy lounge. Everything you need for a complete and comfortable workout is right here.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區文德路210巷30弄42號
descriptionZh:
日子很甜小故事 
內湖最療癒的雪花冰！
我們是多元複合餐廳 適合親子, 朋友, 毛小孩
since 2018,08,05 闆娘在2019春天 從老公那邊接手重練
精神是讓小甜甜們的夏天冬天都要很甜
療癒大家辛苦的生活 希望在這邊都能休息到充電到
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 42, Aly. 30, Ln. 210, Wende Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114
descriptionEn:
Ice Sugar Day – A Sweet Little Story
Neihu’s most heartwarming snowflake ice awaits you!
We’re more than just a dessert shop—a cozy, multi-purpose café perfect for families, friends, and furry companions.
Since opening on August 5, 2018, our story took a new turn in the spring of 2019 when the owner lovingly took over from her husband, determined to start fresh and make sweetness a year-round experience.
At Ice Sugar Day, we believe every season should be sweet. Whether it’s summer or winter, we’re here to bring comfort, joy, and a little escape from life’s hustle, so you can relax, recharge, and leave with a smile.

addressZh: 台北市南港區三重路66號
descriptionZh:
肌轉運動 提供一對一私人教練課程、小班制團體課程、中高齡到府肌力訓練課程、企業運動訓練課程，
專注於提供來自不同運動背景的人員多元創新的運動課程。
更特別打造舒適的第三空間，讓運動融入工作與生活 更長久且愉快的執行
；全正職的健身教練，需經三個月培訓才能上線教學，保障學生訓練品質並避免運動傷害、
共同製作運動訓練計畫與紀錄、提供能整合生活的運動建議。
打造初學者運動社群，透過團體訓練與活動，強化個人對於運動的動力與社交互動！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 66, Sanchong Rd., Nangang Dist., Taipei City 115
descriptionEn:
Fitness Studio offers a wide range of training programs, including one-on-one personal training, small group classes, in-home strength training for older adults, and customized corporate fitness sessions. We focus on providing diverse, innovative workouts tailored to individuals from all athletic backgrounds.
We’ve created a welcoming “third space” that blends comfort with motivation, helping you make fitness a natural, enjoyable part of your daily routine.
Our coaches are full-time professionals who undergo three months of intensive training before leading sessions. This ensures high-quality instruction, injury prevention, and personalized support. We work closely with each client to develop training plans, track progress, and offer lifestyle-integrated fitness advice.
For beginners, we foster a supportive fitness community through group workouts and interactive events, boosting motivation, accountability, and connection throughout your fitness journey.

addressZh: 台北市士林區天母東路11號
descriptionZh:
「鬍鬚張魯肉飯」創立於1960年，秉持『傳統美食，追求幸福』的創業初衷，從路邊攤創起，以發揚台灣美食文化為職志，
不斷的做中學，以品質、口味、服務、衛生為基礎，提供安全美味的產品，整潔親切的用餐環境與氛圍的餐廳。
　　鬍鬚張以「誠信篤實」、「追求卓越」、「顧客滿意」、「永續成長」為經營理念，
以「以人為本」、「人才培育」、「賞罰分明」、「成果分享」為管理原則，
並致力於『將魯肉飯販賣到全世界都知道』的企業願景實踐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 11, Tianmu E. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111
descriptionEn:
Founded in 1960, Formosa Chang began as a humble street-side stall with a simple mission: to bring happiness through traditional Taiwanese cuisine. Driven by this spirit, we’ve dedicated ourselves to promoting Taiwan’s rich food culture—learning through doing, and upholding the highest standards of quality, flavor, service, and hygiene.
We strive to offer delicious and safe food in a clean, welcoming dining environment that feels familiar and comforting.
Our business philosophy is grounded in Integrity and Trust, the pursuit of Excellence, Customer Satisfaction, and Sustainable Growth.
Our management principles focus on people-first values, talent development, clear accountability, and shared success.
With a clear vision, we are committed to bringing braised pork rice to the global stage so that the world knows and loves this iconic taste of Taiwan.

nameZh: 小船故事館|桌遊咖啡廳
addressZh: 台北市萬華區漢中街205號三樓
descriptionZh: 一間結合地方故事的複合式桌遊店，特殊的地理位置將國父來台時的住所，以及西本願寺這兩個地點，做成台灣歷史的時間節點，從日治時代一路到民主時代，將館內的區域藉由空間營造，打造完整的台灣時代鏈，希望通過這樣的空間，讓大家藉由遊戲、環境脫離現實煩惱，短暫的沈浸其中。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 3 F., No. 205, Hanzhong St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108
descriptionEn: A hybrid board game café woven with local history, this unique space draws inspiration from its exceptional location. It was once home to the Father of the Nation during his visit to Taiwan, near the historic Nishi Hongan Temple. These landmarks serve as time markers, anchoring the space in Taiwan’s journey from the Japanese colonial period to the era of democracy.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區文湖街79號
descriptionZh:
HOME顧名思義就是-家的意思。希望客人來到我們這邊可以感受到像家一樣的感覺，因為闆娘也是三寶媽咪，也希望客人的小孩來到home都能感受像家的溫馨舒適且餐點有添加幸福的口感。
HOME除了用餐外，我們還提供以下包場服務：性別派對、滿月宴、收涎儀式、抓周活動、慶生派對、同學會、畢業歡送會、謝師宴、公司聚餐、尾牙聚會、朋友聚會、粉絲見面會、殺青趴、慶功宴、求婚派對、新婚趴踢、壽宴
你的一生HOME都幫你包辦了
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 79, Wenhu St., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114
descriptionEn: Each area of the venue is carefully designed to recreate different chapters of Taiwan’s past, forming a vivid timeline through spatial storytelling. The goal is to offer visitors a temporary escape from everyday worries—immersing them in a world where history, play, and imagination come together.

nameZh: 馬友友印度廚房內湖店
addressZh: 台北市內湖區成功路四段203號
descriptionZh:
在馬友友印度廚房內湖店享用來自南北印度美食,包括純素食、蔬食、耆那教和清真美食。

我們的座右銘是“口味第一,服務友善”用餐環境寬敞、明亮舒適且充滿異國情調。

捷運內湖站2號出站右轉沿著成功路步行1分鐘或大湖公園站2 號出站左轉沿著成功路步行5分鐘。」
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn:
At Mayur Indian Kitchen Neihu Restaurant, enjoy a rich selection of North and South Indian cuisine, including authentic vegan, vegetarian, Jain, and Halal dishes.
Our motto is “Flavor First, Service with a Smile.”
Dine in a spacious, bright, and comfortable setting filled with the charm of Indian culture.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區瑞光路513巷32號1樓
descriptionZh:
頤坊皮藝是全球皮革工藝用品的領導者，以出色的台灣製造和卓越的聲譽為傲，提供屢獲殊榮的產品和服務。
我們每天在全球為客戶提供最優質的皮革工藝用品和服務，並以此為榮。
我們銷售的產品線包含皮革、手工具、皮革機器與配件、印花皮雕工具、工藝材料與材料包、各種五金配件、皮革染料等等，您可在全球100多個國家/地區所銷售的數十萬件商品中，找到頤坊皮藝的創新產品。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 32, Lane 513, Ruiguang Road, Neihu District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Ivan Leathercraft is a global leader in leathercraft supplies, proudly rooted in outstanding Taiwanese manufacturing and an exceptional reputation. We take pride in providing award-winning products and services to customers worldwide every day.
Our product range includes leather, hand tools, machines and accessories, stamping and carving tools, craft materials and kits, a wide variety of hardware, leather dyes, and more. With hundreds of thousands of innovative products available in over 100 countries and regions, Ivan Leathercraft is a trusted name in the global leathercraft industry.

nameZh: 老井極上燒肉 台北信義店
addressZh: 台北市信義區松仁路101號B1
descriptionZh:
考古資料記載距今150萬年前，周口店升起了華人的第一把火，用火炙烤食物經一代代的演化，從那把火起源，展開華人對燒肉的探索之旅。
 從第一把火，到顧客嘴裡的那一口，老井的每開一次火，追求如何讓燒肉的美味再一次進步，沒有終點保持前進，探索燒肉的無限可能，老井燒肉台灣味的燒肉。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: B1, No. 101, Songren Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Archaeological records show that the first fire lit by the Chinese people dates back 1.5 million years ago in Zhoukoudian, marking the beginning of cooking food with fire. From that origin, generations have carried forward the evolution of flame-grilled cuisine, embarking on a journey of discovery in Chinese barbecue.
From that first flame to every bite our customers take, each fire lit at Gokujo Yakiniku is driven by a relentless pursuit of elevating barbecue taste. With no end in sight, we continue to push forward, exploring the limitless possibilities of yakiniku—barbecue with a distinct Taiwanese flavor.

addressZh: 台北市大安區忠孝東路四段46號
descriptionZh: 1949年林火樹先生 建立了「全祥茶莊股份有限公司」，是「最早」經營兩岸茶葉貿易的茶莊。作為台灣製茶界的標竿，全祥茶莊的香片、龍井以及高山烏龍茶是台灣各個時期政要的心頭好，也是作為台灣的一張名片.餽贈給各國友人的首選茶。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 46, Section 4, Zhongxiao East Road, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: In 1949, Mr. Huo-Shu Lin founded Chuan Hsiang Export Co., Ltd., making it the "first" tea company to engage in cross-strait tea trade. As a benchmark in Taiwan’s tea industry, Chuan-Shang’s jasmine tea, Longjing, and high-mountain oolong have long been favored by Taiwan’s political leaders across generations. These teas have also become a signature of Taiwan, often chosen as premium gifts for international guests.

nameZh: 來好 LAI HAO 西門分店
addressZh: 台北市萬華區西寧南路169號
descriptionZh: 要買紀念品、伴手禮想來想去還是買了鳳梨酥？別再煩惱了 到來好吧!我們為您精選來自台灣各地的文創禮品、創意禮物。不管你要買生日禮物、交換禮物，情人節禮物，還是中秋送禮，新年送禮，在這邊都可以找到不同風格與價位的禮品。來好，你在台北買文創禮品首選店家。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 169, Xining South Road, Wanhua District
descriptionEn:
Do you still end up buying pineapple cakes when looking for souvenirs or gifts? Stop stressing—come to Lai Ho!
We’ve curated many cultural and creative gifts from all over Taiwan. Whether it’s a birthday present, gift exchange, Valentine’s Day surprise, or a Mid-Autumn or Lunar New Year gift, you’ll find options in every style and price range.
Lai Hao is your top destination in Taipei for unique and thoughtful cultural gifts.

addressZh: 台北市南港區忠孝東路六段85號1樓
descriptionZh: 「阿一蔬果」是一家從內湖737巷傳統市場起家的蔬果專賣店，其堅持提供新鮮、高品質的蔬果，逐漸贏得顧客信賴。隨著業務擴展，之後又在南港開設旗艦店，並開通了網路銷售平台，讓顧客能方便地購買最新鮮的蔬果。該店以提供健康、安心的水果和蔬菜為宗旨，並強調貼心服務與精緻進口／本地水果禮盒，成為本地消費者信賴的選擇。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: A-Yi Fruits and Vegetables - Nangang Flagship Store
addressEn: No. 85, Section 6, Zhongxiao East Road, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
A-Yi Fruits and Vegetables is a specialty store for fresh produce that began in the traditional market on Lane 737, Neihu. Committed to offering fresh, high-quality fruits and vegetables, the shop gradually earned the trust of its customers. As the business expanded, a flagship store was opened in Nangang. An online shopping platform was launched, making it easy for customers to access the freshest produce.
Dedicated to providing healthy and safe fruits and vegetables, A-Yi Fruit and Vegetables is also known for its attentive service and beautifully curated gift boxes featuring imported and local fruits, making it a trusted choice for local shoppers.

addressZh: 台北市南港區興中路68巷6號
descriptionZh: 老先覺成立於2009年希望以平價火鍋美食的先知先覺,成為全台唯一講究好湯頭的『麻辣個人鍋領導品牌』！老先覺在全台已有超過120間以上門市,秉持著用心做好每一鍋的信念,以平價為特色的個人麻辣鍋領導品牌！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Old God Kung Food Hot Pot Restaurant - Nangnag Xingzhong Restaurant
addressEn: No. 6, Lane 68, Xingzhong Road, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Founded in 2009, Old God Kung Food Hot Pot Restaurant set out to become the prophetic pioneer of affordable hot pot cuisine in Taiwan, striving to be the island’s leading brand for flavorful individual spicy hot pots.
With over 120 locations across Taiwan, Old God remains committed to crafting every pot carefully, earning its reputation as the go-to brand for personal hot pots that combine great taste and great value.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區東湖路119巷4號
descriptionZh:
東湖在地經營近四十年 
販售獨特風味的涼麵、及冬季限定的紅油抄手、麻醬炒手、乾拌麵。

nameZh: 謀魚蝦也蠔南港直營店
addressZh: 台北市南港區興中路40號
descriptionZh: 南港興中路不能錯過的浮誇系美食──謀魚蝦也蠔南港店！融合異國風味與台式口感，招牌火山龍骨、臭酸魚、痛風鍋、生蠔等，每道都吸睛又美味，好吃又好拍！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 40, Xingzhong Road, Nangang District, Taipei City, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
A must-try extravagant dining spot on Xingzhong Road in Nangang—Spicyfish - Nangang Company-Operated Restaurant!
Blending exotic flavors with a Taiwanese twist, their eye-catching and mouthwatering signature dishes, such as the Volcano Pork Bone Soup, Fermented Sour Fish, Gout Hot Pot, and Fresh Oysters, are as delicious as they are Instagram-worthy.

addressZh: 台北市北投區大度路三段296巷39號
descriptionZh:
爐鍋咖啡2004年創業於關渡，2011年在大稻埕小藝埕開設第一家分店，目前台灣國內共有三家分店。
爐鍋咖啡致力於精品咖啡烘焙，將台灣特有的精緻咖啡文化介紹給從世界各地來的客人。
在爐鍋咖啡，你可以盡情翺遊在世界咖啡產區莊園的奇妙的單品世界裡。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 39, Lane 296, Section 3, Dadu Road, Beitou District, Taipei City 112, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
Founded in 2004 in Guandu, Luguo Café opened its first branch in 2011 at Art Yard in Dadaocheng. Today, it operates three locations across Taiwan.
Luguo Café is dedicated to specialty coffee roasting, introducing Taiwan’s refined coffee culture to guests worldwide.
Here, you can fully immerse yourself in the fascinating world of single-origin coffees from estates across global coffee-producing regions.

nameZh: VIVACE 薇瓦琪義式餐酒館
addressZh: 台北市北投區光明路2巷9號1樓
descriptionZh: VIVACE原取自於義大利文"熱情 活潑"​希望每位來這裡用餐的朋友們，不會有任何拘束，敞開心胸與我們交流，也可以給予建議，在這裏我們提供溫馨舒適的用餐環境，不管是獨自清閒、情侶約會、家庭/朋友聚會、下班後小酌、企業包場 我們都歡迎你(妳)們的到來。我們會用心去製作每一到料理，讓來的客人吃的安心且放心。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 9, Lane 2, Guangming Road, Beitou District, Taipei City 112, Taiwan
descriptionEn:
VIVACE, derived from the Italian words for “passionate” and “lively,” is a place where we hope every guest can dine without restraint—opening up, sharing, and even offering suggestions.
We provide a warm and comfortable dining environment, whether you’re enjoying a peaceful solo meal, on a date, gathering with family or friends, unwinding with a drink after work, or hosting a corporate event. Everyone is welcome.
We craft each dish with care and dedication to ensure that every guest can dine with peace of mind and full confidence.

addressZh: 台北市北投區溫泉路105號
descriptionZh: 「曲水會館」是位於北投區的溫泉旅店，取蘭亭集序「曲水流觴」之意，以「大正浪漫」為設計主軸，日式建築搭配和洋並置的裝修家具，實木窗櫺與和式庭園輝映全場，處處可見日本名家美術作品，展現1920年代上流社會「脫亞入歐」的生活型態。會館內設有白磺溫泉套房、日歸溫泉湯屋、葡萄酒咖啡廳「麝香」以及專注於美食、旅遊和影像領域的「旅人書房」。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 105, Wenquan Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Kyokusui Hotspring Hotel, nestled in the heart of Taipei's Beitou District, is a refined hot spring retreat inspired by the elegant imagery of "floating wine cups along winding streams" from the "Orchid Pavilion Preface." Embracing the charm of the Taisho Roman style, the hotel blends traditional Japanese architecture with Western-style furnishings. Solid wood lattice windows and serene Japanese gardens create a harmonious ambiance. In contrast, carefully curated artworks by renowned Japanese artists evoke the lifestyle of the sophisticated elite in 1920s Japan—a time when Eastern traditions met Western refinement. The hotel features luxurious white sulfur hot spring suites, private daytime hot spring rooms, and the wine-inspired café "Muscat." It also houses the Traveler's Library, a curated space devoted to culinary arts, travel, and visual culture, offering guests a rich and immersive experience that goes far beyond relaxation.

addressZh: 台北市大同區承德路三段267號9樓
descriptionZh:
檜山坊｜從台灣檜木出發，將台灣森林香氛帶到每個人家中
檜山坊創辦人勇哥，為了照顧罹癌且患有慢性肺炎的父親，帶他往返烏來與太平山，尋找清新空氣與森林芬多精。在蓊鬱山林間，一個天然、簡單的念頭誕生了。2012年，勇哥創立檜山坊，堅持用最自然的方式，把森林帶給每一個人。
檜山坊專注於檜木香氛，使用「二次精餾萃取技術」完整保留檜木的天然精華，有效去除雜質，淬煉出純淨、溫潤的檜木精油，並以檜木精油為主，開發一系列洗沐用品、肌膚保養、香氛擴香等產品，提供您最頂級的台灣檜木精油並期望將整座森林的芬芳送至您手中，陪伴日常每刻。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 9F, No. 267, Section 3, Chengde Road, Datong District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Kuai Shan Fang | From Taiwan’s Hinoki Forests to Your Home
Founded in 2012, Kuai Shan Fang was born from a son’s love and devotion. In caring for his father, who was battling cancer and chronic pneumonia, founder Yung took him on journeys between Wulai and Taipingshan in search of clean air and healing forest phytoncides. Surrounded by towering trees and fresh mountain air, a simple yet powerful idea emerged: to share the calming essence of Taiwan’s forests with others.
At Kuai Shan Fang, we specialize in hinoki wood aromatics. Through a meticulous double distillation process, we preserve the natural essence of hinoki while removing impurities, producing pure, gentle essential oils. These oils are the foundation of our premium product line, which includes bath and body care, skincare, and fragrance diffusers.
Our mission is to deliver the serene fragrance of Taiwan’s forests into your hands, infusing your daily life with peace, purity, and the quiet beauty of nature.

nameZh: 九日咖啡 自家烘焙 北車店
addressZh: 台北市中正區青島西路11號
descriptionZh:
關於九日咖啡
#為什麼叫【九日咖啡】
九日咖啡烘焙於2005年，取意為我們的創店義豆需要經過9天的養豆期，完整的風味，讓我們的顧客提供。蘊藏式含堅持初衷的理念。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 11, Qingdao West Road, Zhongzheng District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
About 9 Days Coffee
Why “9 Days Coffee”?
Established in 2005, 9 Days Coffee is named after the essential 9-day resting period our very first batch of beans underwent—a process that allows the flavors to mature and reach their peak fully. This name embodies our founding philosophy: a commitment to patience, quality, and delivering the finest coffee experience to every customer.

nameZh: 全統西點麵包【德行西路店】
addressZh: 台北市士林區德行西路70號
descriptionZh: 全統西點麵包深耕士林、天母近 40 年，擁有三家分店，陪伴無數人成長，是許多人記憶中的美味。主廚陳星緯（Allen）曾任職多家五星級飯店，並遠赴法國學藝，榮獲多項國際甜點大獎，與 MOF 主廚 Yann Brys 共同開店。返台後接手家業，融合台式老麵包與法式甜點元素，讓全統以全新風貌持續傳遞熟悉卻又驚喜的經典滋味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Chuan Tung Bakery & Confectionery Shop (Dexing W. Road Shop)
addressEn: No. 70, Dexing West Road, Shilin District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Chuan Tung Bakery & Confectionery Shop has been a cherished presence in the Shilin and Tianmu neighborhoods for nearly four decades, with three locations that have accompanied generations and become a treasured part of many people’s memories.
At the helm is Head Chef Allen Chen, whose career spans roles in prestigious five-star hotels and advanced training in France. A winner of multiple international pastry awards, Allen also co-founded a shop with MOF Chef Yann Brys. After returning to Taiwan to take over the family business, he infused Chuan Tung’s traditional Taiwanese breads with the artistry of French pâtisserie—bringing a fresh new look to the brand while continuing to share classic flavors that feel both nostalgic and full of delightful surprises.

nameZh: HWC 黑沃咖啡｜台北南港店
addressZh: 台北市南港區南港路一段152-3號
descriptionZh: 黑沃咖啡南港店宛如都市中的一片綠洲，為繁忙生活注入一絲悠閒與品味。店內空間溫馨靜謐，充滿咖啡香氣，營造出舒適自在的氛圍。嚴選世界各地優質生豆，搭配專業烘焙技術，無論是義式濃縮、手沖單品，還是創意特調，都能展現咖啡的多元風味。店內亦提供甜點與輕食，無論是約會、洽公或獨處時光，都是理想選擇。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: HWC Roasters (HWC COFFEE) | Taipei Nangang Store
addressEn: No. 152-3, Section 1, Nangang Road, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: HWC Roasters Taipei Nangang Store is a serene urban retreat that infuses busy city life with a sense of leisure and refinement. The cozy, tranquil interior is filled with the inviting aroma of freshly brewed coffee, creating a space where guests can truly relax. Sourcing premium beans from around the world, expertly roasted to perfection, the café showcases a broad spectrum of flavors—from rich, full-bodied espressos and delicate hand-pour brews to imaginative signature creations. A selection of desserts and light meals makes it the perfect choice for a date, a business meeting, or simply some quiet time alone.

With more than a decade of history, it remains a favorite among students and office workers alike.

addressZh: 台北市大同區迪化街一段69號
descriptionZh: 「御華生」深耕迪化街逾 20 年，以精品粥糜、即食濃燕窩與高品質堅果聞名，致力成為精華食材滋補專家。2021 年開設「埕米峰」體驗門市，提供舒適內用空間，讓顧客品味傳統與創新融合的滋補美味。秉持嚴選原料、親切服務、實在經營的理念，無論節慶或日常，「埕米峰Ｘ御華生」皆用心傳遞健康與文化的深厚底蘊。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Cheng Mi Feng x Yu Ha Sheng
addressEn: No. 69, Section 1, Dihua Street, Datong District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Yu Ha Sheng has been a trusted name on Dihua Street for over 20 years, celebrated for its premium congee, ready-to-eat concentrated bird's nest, and top-quality nuts. Known for its expertise in crafting nourishing delicacies, the brand opened "Cheng Mi Feng" in 2021—an experiential store featuring a welcoming dine-in area where guests can savor the fusion of tradition and innovation. Staying true to its principles of carefully selected ingredients, warm service, and honest operations, "Cheng Mi Feng × Yu Ha Sheng" is dedicated to sharing the richness of health, heritage, and culture for both festive occasions and everyday enjoyment.

descriptionEn:
Nestled in a quiet lane off Dihua Street, Cookies Hitpeople Handmade Bakery handcrafts every cookie with care, using only natural ingredients to deliver honest, wholesome goodness. Guided by its commitment to health, safety, and craftsmanship, the shop offers tasting sessions for baby and wedding gift sets, as well as a complimentary weekend tea service for guests.

Its excellence has been recognized with numerous awards, including the Silver Medal at the 2024 National Rice & Red Bean Baking Competition, the Gold Medal at the 2023 Taiwan Baking Skills Competition, and multiple national championship honors.

addressZh: 台北市士林區通河街167號1樓
descriptionZh: 【亞飛髮型設計】是一間深耕社區多年的在地髮廊，以親切服務與專業手藝深受街坊鄰居喜愛。老闆娘手藝俐落、經驗豐富，無論是剪髮、造型還是溝通風格需求都讓人感到安心。店內環境溫馨舒適，價格平實，是許多街坊從小到大的御用髮廊。想找一間放心又有溫度的好店，就來亞飛坐坐吧！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 167, Tonghe Street, Shilin District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Ya Fei Hair Design is a long-standing local salon beloved for its friendly service and expert skills. The owner’s precise technique and years of experience make every haircut, style, and consultation a comfortable and reassuring experience. With a welcoming atmosphere and fair prices, it has been the trusted choice for generations in the neighborhood. For a haircut with both warmth and quality, Ya Fei is the place to be.

addressZh: 台北市大安區辛亥路一段52號1樓
descriptionZh: 皇藝擁有40年廣告招牌設計製作經驗，從創意發想到精準執行，打造最吸睛、最有質感的品牌門面。服務涵蓋展場設計、大圖輸出、商業空間與平面設計，並提供帆布廣告、LED招牌、霓虹燈、鈦金字等多元媒材應用，滿足各種需求。無論新店開幕或品牌改造，皇藝以創新、高效與品質兼具的整合服務，助您在第一眼就留下深刻印象！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Art King Advertisement Production Co., Ltd.
addressEn: 1F, No. 52, Section 1, Xinhai Road, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Art King Advertisement Production Co., Ltd. brings over 40 years of expertise in signage and advertising, delivering striking and refined brand visuals from creative concept to precise execution. Its services span exhibition design, large-format printing, commercial space planning, and graphic design, with versatile media options including canvas banners, LED signs, neon lighting, and titanium lettering. Whether launching a new store or rebranding an established business, Art King provides innovative, efficient, and high-quality integrated solutions designed to leave a powerful first impression.

addressZh: 台北市大安區光復南路290巷43號1樓
descriptionZh: 露特巧克力是台灣第一家立陶宛巧克力專賣店，店內販售招牌莓果系列巧克力(草莓巧克力、蔓越莓巧克力、櫻桃巧克力、燈籠果巧克力、藍莓黑巧克力)，還有100%無糖、96%、85%、75%經典黑巧克力、杏仁果巧克力、咖啡豆巧克力、與巧克力禮盒等多達60種不同風味巧克力，在這裡你可以找到自己喜歡的巧克力，更可以吃多少買多少喔! 歡迎來參觀選購!!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 43, Lane 290, Guangfu South Road, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Ruta Taiwan is the country’s first specialty store for Lithuanian chocolate, offering an impressive selection of over 60 varieties. Its signature berry collection features strawberry, cranberry, cherry, golden berry, and blueberry dark chocolates, alongside 100% sugar-free, 96%, 85%, and 75% classic dark chocolates, almond chocolates, coffee bean chocolates, and elegant gift boxes. Customers can purchase as much or as little as they like, making it easy to indulge in their favorites. Visitors are warmly invited to explore and sample the range of products.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區成都路81號4樓
descriptionZh: 是一家專門提供蒙古風味燒烤的餐廳
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 4F, No. 81, Chengdu Road, Wanhua District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Taipei DGB Mongolian Bar B.Q. is dedicated to serving authentic Mongolian-style barbecue, delivering bold flavors and a distinctive dining experience.

nameZh: 阿薄郎台式小酒館-忠孝店
addressZh: 台北市大安區忠孝東路四段177號2樓之2
descriptionZh:
1970 年代的台灣阿郎
1970 年代萬華東園市場製皮技術傳承
厚度 0.5mm 的餃子薄皮技術
薄皮餃子 + 經典辣滷 + 台式燒串 + 多元酒類
體驗台灣美好的味道
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Uncle A-Bo-Lang Taiwan Bistro, Zhongxiao Restaurant
addressEn: 2F-2, No. 177, Section 4, Zhongxiao East Road, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Uncle A-Bo-Lang Taiwan Bistro captures the spirit and flavor of 1970s Taiwan, rooted in the dumpling-skin craft of Wanhua’s Dongyuan Market. Its ultra-thin 0.5 mm dumpling wrappers are the perfect complement to signature spicy braised dishes, Taiwanese skewers, and a wide variety of beverages—offering guests an authentic and memorable taste of Taiwan’s culinary heritage.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區西園路一段69號
descriptionZh: 創立於民國 39 年的「一肥仔麵店」，是萬華飄香數十載的老字號，現由第四代孫亦德接手經營。傳承經典紅糟肉、蘿蔔排骨湯與豬油拌飯等古早味，同時融入甜點創意，推出人氣豆腐蛋糕與創新青草茶鳳梨酥。亦德以烘焙專長為傳統注入新生命，結合在地文化，讓老麵店成為認識萬華風味的全新窗口。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 69, Section 1, Xiyuan Road, Wanhua District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Founded in 1950, Yi Fat Noodles has been a culinary landmark in Wanhua for generations and is now led by fourth-generation owner Yi-De Sun. Staying true to its roots, the shop continues to serve classic favorites like red yeast pork, radish pork rib soup, and lard rice, while introducing creative twists such as the popular tofu cake and herbal tea pineapple cake. With a background in baking, Yi-De blends tradition with innovation, transforming the family noodle shop into a fresh and inviting gateway to the authentic flavors of Wanhua.

addressZh: 台北市士林區天母西路3號1樓之37
descriptionZh:
1999年炸雞大獅以餐車型式創立品牌，
台式炸雞風味出發，首創SHAKE創意，融合台式熱炒風味，引領 ”手搖式炸雞”的風潮；
運用各種獨家醬料，透過SHAKE動作手搖拌勻，打造全新台式炸鷄動感和口味的超FUN升級體驗!
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 37, 1F, No. 3, Tianmu West Road, Shilin District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Launched in 1999 as a food truck, Fried Chicken Master started with the bold taste of Taiwanese-style fried chicken and became the pioneer of the SHAKE concept—combining local stir-fry flavors with crispy fried chicken. By tossing freshly fried pieces with exclusive sauces through a lively shaking process, the brand delivers a fun, flavorful, and interactive dining experience that takes Taiwanese fried chicken to the next level.

addressZh: 台北市文山區新光路一段167號1樓
descriptionZh:
烘焙是一門藝術，是麵粉、酵母、糖⋯多種元素和愛的融合。在烘焙中，每一個步驟都需要細心呵護，每一個環節都需要精心掌控。
運用當地當令食材每日現烤提供新鮮的美味，為生活加一點甜，為味蕾增添一抹微笑。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 167, Section 1, Xinguang Road, Wenshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Baking is an art—a fusion of flour, yeast, sugar, and love. Every stage calls for careful attention and precise control. By baking fresh each day with seasonal, locally sourced ingredients, we create treats that bring a touch of sweetness to life and a smile to every taste bud.

addressZh: 台北市文山區新光路一段44號
descriptionZh:
臨近政大店內販售咖啡、茶飲
自己做的甜點自己種的蔬菜
（老闆之前跟農會租地當過小農，有時提供農友當天現採蔬果）
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 44, Section 1, Xinguang Road, Wenshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Just steps from National Chengchi University, Roundful Café offers coffee, tea, and house-made desserts, along with vegetables grown by the owner himself. Having once leased farmland through the local farmers’ association, the owner continues to source freshly picked produce from fellow farmers, bringing an authentic farm-to-table experience to the café.

addressZh: 台北市松山區饒河街133號3樓
descriptionZh: 坐落於火車鐵路及捷運的重大樞紐 想去遠處郊遊踏青或是鄰近商圈逛街都很方便 同時這裡位於台灣腳踏車環島一號站旁 是環島旅程中的理想休憩地點，提供舒適的住宿環境 讓您在長途騎行後得到充分放鬆 提供專用的腳踏車停放架子 保障您的愛車安全 如有問題需要詢問請加官方LINE :@stepinn
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 3F, No. 133, Raohe Street, Songshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Located at the major hub to railway and MRT with easy access to outing in the country side or shopping at nearby business districts. Additionally, it is next to Cycling Route No.1 in Taiwan and is an ideal location to take a break during your trip cycling around Taiwan. Step Inn provides comfortable accommodation to help you fully relax after long-distance cycling. Bicycle rack is available here to protect the safety of your bicycle. Please send your inquiry through our official LINE account: @stepinn.

addressZh: 台北市松山區南京東路五段97號

addressZh: 台北市松山區南京東路五段123巷1號2樓
descriptionZh: 小巨蛋、台北體育場直線距離1.4KM 適合看演唱會和參加運動賽事健兒們下榻的好去處 預約訂房可透過私訊粉絲團、加入LINE ID @jiizu

nameZh: 好事成雙煎餅果子 東湖店
addressZh: 台北市內湖區康樂街20巷49號1樓
descriptionZh: 好事成雙煎餅果子東湖店，以傳統手工煎餅果子為招牌，提供新鮮、美味的街頭小吃。店內使用高品質食材，搭配特製醬料，口感酥脆，讓人一試成主顧。無論是早晨忙碌的上班族或是午後的小聚，這裡都是理想的輕食選擇，帶給你滿滿的幸福感！

descriptionEn: Good Things Always Come in Pairs Crepe - Donghu Store focuses on traditional handmade crepe and provides fresh and delicious street food. High-quality food ingredients are used with house-made sauce. The crispy texture brings lots of royal customers. Whether you are rushing to work in the morning or looking for something for afternoon tea, it is an ideal selection for light meal and will make you feel extremely happy!

addressZh: 台北市內湖區東湖路43巷10號

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 10, Ln. 43, Donghu Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The characteristic of Curry House Bonka is its rich and thick Japanese curry. It uses fresh food ingredients and house-made curry sauce to create unique taste and multi-layered flavor. No matter it is classic beef, pork chop, or chicken curry, each mouthful provides you rich sauce, tender meat texture, and leaves a great aftertaste.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區內湖路二段388號

我們從民國89年開始營業到現在，

14.30-16.40 為休息時間
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）

descriptionEn:
"We have been in business from 2000. With a history more than 20 years, we have developed from a street stall to a diner here on Lane 291.
We have a break during the business hours from 14:30 to 16:40."
