To reflect the brand’s geographical characteristics, its interior design aims to deliver local stories. It has easy access for transportation, shopping, food, and exhibitions.

addressZh: 台北市大安區通安街27巷1號
descriptionZh: 美味的麵食料理，主打檸檬手撕雞涼麵酸甜醬汁
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 1, Ln. 27, Tong’an St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: It provides delicious noodle dishes, and signature dish is cold noodles with shredded chick in sweet and sour sauce.

addressZh: 台北市大安區通安街80號1樓
descriptionZh: 位於台北市大安區通安街80號1樓的翟記牛肉麵，店內乾淨舒適寬敞，1、2樓皆有冷氣雅座讓您放鬆心情享受美食，店內提供汽水飲料免費暢飲，餐點以北方麵食類為主，分別為湯、乾麵、手工水餃、捲餅、滷味小菜。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 80, Tong’an St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Located on 1F., No. 80, Tong'an St., Da'an Dist., Taipei City, Jaijei Beef Noodle Soup is clean, cozy and spacious. No matter if it's the first floor or the second floor, air conditioning is equipped so that you can relax and enjoy the food. We offer free flow of soft drinks and focus on northern noodle dishes, including soup, dry noodles, hand-made dumplings, wrap, and marinated small dishes.

nameZh: Grab a Bite 幸福提食
addressZh: 台北市大安區通化街150號
descriptionZh: 「Grab a Bite 幸福提食」是一家位於台北市大安區的早午餐專賣店，店內提供多樣化的早午餐、義大利麵、沙拉和甜點，深受顧客喜愛。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 150, Tonghua St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: “Grab a Bite” is a brunch café at Da’an District in Taipei City. It offers diverse dishes of brunch, spaghetti, salad and dessert and is highly favored by customers.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區東湖路119巷4號
descriptionZh: 「貴李季島灰」位於台北內湖，是人氣手工豆花店，主打炙燒豆花，外層焦脆、內裡滑嫩，口感獨特如烤布蕾。店內提供多種配料，溫馨的氛圍與創新甜點，使它成為台北甜點迷的熱門去處。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Hu Zih ( Jia Sing Sichuan Cold Noodles )
addressEn: No. 4, Lane 119, Donghu Road, Neihu District, Taipei City 114, Taiwan
descriptionEn: Locally rooted in Donghu for nearly 40 years, this eatery is known for its uniquely flavored cold noodles and seasonal winter specials such as spicy wontons in chili oil, sesame wontons, and dry-mixed noodles.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區東湖路113巷3弄3號1樓
descriptionZh: 餉義饗廚坊位於台北內湖，以平價高質感的義式料理聞名。主打多款義大利麵與燉飯，人氣菜色如蒜香雞肉麵、奶油松露野菇燉飯，口感細緻不乾柴。餐點選擇多元，是聚餐與日常用餐的好選擇。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 3, Aly. 3, Ln. 113, Donghu Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: THINKING PASTA is located in Neihu, Taipei, and is famous for its high quality and affordable Italian dishes. Its signature dishes are spaghetti and risotto, and popular dishes include Garlic Chicken Spaghetti and Creamy Truffle Mushroom Risotto. It offers a variety of choices and is a good choice for gathering and daily dining.

addressZh: 台北市松山區敦化北路222巷34號一樓
descriptionZh: 以法文Pique Nique野餐命名，二店座落於松山區，繼續為您提供新鮮美味的義式咖啡、義大利麵、燉飯等義式料理，給您高貴不貴的優質美食。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 34, Ln. 222, Dunhua N. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: It is named with picnic in French, Pique Nique. Pique Nique II is located at Songshan District to provide fresh and delicious Italian dishes, including espresso, spaghetti and risotto. It offers customers delicious food that is high quality but not expensive.

addressZh: 台北市中山區中山北路二段115巷33號1樓
descriptionZh: 澳氏咖啡位於台北中山區，以澳洲風情為主題，店內充滿袋鼠、無尾熊與地圖路牌等裝飾，氛圍輕鬆自在。特色飲品有香醇順口的 Flat White 與創意藍精靈拿鐵，餐點則有澳洲肉派、萊明頓蛋糕等經典美味。提供 Wi-Fi 與插座，適合聚會、辦公，也是感受澳洲氛圍的好去處。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 33, Ln. 115, Sec. 2, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Aussie Café is located at Zhongshan District in Taipei City. It is themed with Australian culture and is full of decoration of kangaroo, koala, map and road sign, providing easy-going vibe. Its signature drinks include mellow and smooth Flat White and creative Smurf Latte as well as classic dishes, Australian Meat Pie and Lamington, as menu choices. Wi-Fi and charging sockets are available here. It is suitable for gathering and office work as well as a good place to experience Australian vibe.

addressZh: 台北市中山區松江路313巷22號1樓
descriptionZh: 「川麻子」是一家主打麻辣風味的台灣小吃店，特色菜色包括涼麵、麻辣鴨血和臭豆腐。涼麵口感爽滑，麻辣醬料香氣十足；麻辣鴨血則以獨特的香氣和辣味吸引食客；臭豆腐外酥內嫩，搭配特製醬料，風味獨特。店內氛圍熱鬧，適合與朋友共享美食。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 22, Lane 313, Songjiang Road, Zhongshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Chuan Ma Zi” is a Taiwanese eatery that focuses on spicy flavor. The signature dishes include cold noodles, spicy duck maroon jelly, and stinky tofu. The texture of cold noodles is refreshing and smooth, spicy sauce smells amazing, spicy duck maroon jelly attract customers with its unique aroma and spicy flavor, and stinky tofu is crispy outside and tender inside serving with specially-made sauce to create unique flavor. The store is buzzing and suitable for food sharing with friends.

addressZh: 台北市中山區錦州街416號
descriptionZh:
從2005年至今
提供的是優質的咖啡
和一顆誠摯的心
支持永續環保愛地球
真心的享受當下在做的事
並將這些美好帶回生活
這就是旅沐的咖啡夢......
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 416, Jinzhou St., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Since 2005, we offer quality coffee and a sincere heart in serving. 
We fully support sustainability, environmental protection, and love for Earth.
We truly enjoy what we are doing at the moment and bring the joy back to life. It is the dream of Coffee Remus......

addressZh: 台北市內湖區成功路四段362號
descriptionZh: 我們是位於台北內湖的可朗烘焙坊，由來自台東知名法式餐廳的烘焙主廚領軍，嚴選進口麵粉，搭以各地時令食材，用心為大家揉製出美味且無添加的各式特色麵包。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 362, Sec. 4, Chenggong Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: CRUMB CO. located in Neihu, Taipei, is led by a pastry chef from a famous Fresh restaurant in Taitung. The chef strictly selects imported flour and uses local seasonal ingredients to make a variety of delicious and additive-free bread attentively for customers.

addressZh: 台北市松山區慶城街18號
descriptionZh: 本店為全球第210家分店，位於台北市慶城街18號，Hooters Taipei和全球超過450家的HOOTERS一樣都提供美味可口的海鮮、三明治、沙拉及「舉世聞名」的辣雞翅，更重要的是我們還提供一個歡樂的用餐環境。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 18, Qingcheng St., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: It is the 210th branch store globally and is located at No. 18, Qingcheng Street, Taipei City. The same as the other 450 HOOTERS all over the world, Hooters Taipei provides delicious and flavorful seafood, sandwich, salad, and “world-famous” spicy chicken wings. More importantly, we provide a lively dining atmosphere.

addressZh: 台北市中山區民生東路二段93巷2號
descriptionZh:
#分享生活每一個愜意時刻
『微醺便好，遠離塵囂，享受當下。』 暫別都市裡的繁忙 偶爾單身一人走進來品酒 或是一群三五好友聚在一塊 讓我們此時此刻忘卻所有煩惱 在這裡享受微醺的美好。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Ln. 93, Sec. 2, Minsheng E. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
#Sharing each relaxing moment in life
“Just get tipsy, escape and relax, live for the moment”. Leave the bustling city behind and walk in alone sometimes to savor every sip of the wine or hang out with your friends. Right at the moment, let’s cast away all the troubles and enjoy loveliness of getting a little tipsy.

addressZh: 台北市信義區松仁路58號14樓
descriptionZh: Hooters Taipei和全球超過450家的HOOTERS一樣都提供美味可口的海鮮、三明治、沙拉及「舉世聞名」的辣雞翅，更重要的是我們還提供一個歡樂的用餐環境。於2019年12月盛大開幕的信義店位於遠百信義A13的14F，為全球最高，並擁有可以近距離觀看101與最美夕陽的戶外露台，信義店已然成為台北市最新最夯的打卡朝聖地標。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 14F., No. 58, Songren Rd., Xinyi Dist., Taipei City 110, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The same as the more than 450 HOOTERS stores all over the world, Hooters Taipei provides delicious and tasty seafood, sandwich, salad, and “world-famous” spicy chicken wings. More importantly, we also offer a cheerful dining experience. Xinyi Store that had a grand opening in December 2019 is located on the 14th floor in Far Eastern Department Stores Xinyi A13 Building. It is the highest in the world and has an outdoor terrace to appreciate 101 Building and the most beautiful sunset up close and personal. Xinyi Store has become the latest most popular social media check-in landmark in Taipei City.

addressZh: 台北市松山區南京東路四段52巷8號1樓
descriptionZh: CS Brekkie 主打原型食材結合法式主廚研製醬料，打造兼具營養與美感的早午餐拼盤。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 8, Ln. 52, Sec. 4, Nanjing E. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: CS Brekkie’s main feature is the combination of whole food with special sauce from the French chef to create brunch platter that focuses on both nutrition and aesthetics.

addressZh: 台北市松山區八德路三段12巷5弄17號1樓
descriptionZh: 「小朝日和」取名來自「小日子」、「朝氣」、「風和日麗」字詞的組合而成，LOGO的設計概念取自早晨第一道窗戶進來的微光，提醒大家要起床吃早餐開啟全新美好的一天，吃早餐，原來可以這麼有儀式感。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 17, Aly. 5, Ln. 12, Sec. 3, Bade Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: “Days are Good Days” is named after the ideas of “simple days”, “good spirits”, and “sunny and breezy”. The design of its LOGO is inspired by the first morning glow from the window to remind everyone it’s time to get up for breakfast and start a whole-new wonderful day. Eating breakfast can be a special occasion.

addressZh: 台北市松山區八德路三段12巷5弄30號1樓
descriptionZh: 堅持使用新鮮食材，不過度調味，保留食物原始味道，呈現給你。早午餐、咖啡、自製甜點。小巨蛋早午餐，南京東路美食，WiFi，插座。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 30, Aly. 5, Ln. 12, Sec. 3, Bade Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: We insist in using fresh ingredients without over seasoning to retain the original taste and flavor of food for our customers. Brunch, coffee and homemade dessert. Brunch near Taipei Arena, delicious food on Nanjing East Road, WiFi and socket.

addressZh: 台北市大安區溫州街66號
descriptionZh: 璞豆情寄扇形三孔濾杯，鍾愛水粉比 1:13的比例,用"甜感手沖"方式萃取我們的單品。喜歡在黑咖啡中尋甘甜味,讓味蕾尋細緻的咖啡層次與厚度。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 66, Wenzhou St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Poodle has a soft spot for cone-shaped dripper and prefers to brew single origin coffee by “pouring over” for sweetness in the ratio of water and power in 1:13. We love the mellow flavor in black coffee and the taste of delicate layers and richness of coffee.

addressZh: 台北市士林區德行東路144號
descriptionZh: 金日・飾物成詩，品味成光。位於台北天母，傳承二代，誠信經營50餘載。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 144, Dexing E. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Golden Sun uses jewelry to write poems exclusive to you and to shines your taste radiantly. It is located in Tianmu, Taipei. The business has been passed to the second generation to continue the business integrity more than 50 years.

addressZh: 台北市大安區忠孝東路四段170巷5弄22號
descriptionZh:
精品咖啡日常化
乾淨｜香甜｜圓潤の咖啡
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 22, Aly. 5, Ln. 170, Sec. 4, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Specialty coffee goes mainstream.
Clean｜Mellow｜Full-bodied coffee

addressZh: 台北市大同區民生西路352號
descriptionZh: 本公司自1988年成立於迪化商圈，位於民生西路上的名店，秉誠信經營、童叟無欺、服務至上等宗旨，堅持選用新鮮食材，不使用劣質原料。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 352, Minsheng W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: It was established at Dihua Commercial Area in 1988 and is a famous store located on Minsheng West Road. We carry business principles of integrity, honest with all, and service first and insist in using fresh food ingredients and refusing poor quality materials.

addressZh: 台北市大安區仁愛路四段345巷4弄31號
descriptionZh: 東華川府重慶老火鍋源自火鍋的發源地山城重慶，湯底麻辣鮮香不上火，讓無辣不歡的食客吃到最正宗的火鍋！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 31, Aly. 4, Ln. 345, Sec. 4, Ren’ai Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Donghua Chuanfu Chongqing Hot Pot is from the origin place of hot pot in Chongqing, the mountain city. The broth base is spicy, fresh and savory without generating excess heat in your body. It provides experience of the most authentic hot pot for spicy food lovers!

nameZh: ABV Bar & Kitchen 加勒比海餐酒館
addressZh: 台北市大安區敦化南路一段233巷61號
descriptionZh: ABV 世界精釀啤酒餐廳打造【加勒比海餐酒館】：以香料為魂，融合加勒比與拉丁美洲經典風味。主打海鮮蔬菜與濃郁辛香，搭配酸甜帶辣沾醬。從牙買加烤肉、古巴三明治與燉肉、南方卡郡到墨西哥料理，再延伸智利、秘魯、阿根廷，呈現多元層次。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 61, Ln. 233, Sec. 1, Dunhua S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: “Caribbean Bistro” under the Group of ABV Bar & Kitchen: Spices are regarded as the soul of cuisine to blend in with classic Caribbean and Latin America flavor. It is famous for seafood, vegetables and richness & spices matching with sweet and sour chili sauce. From Jamaican BBQ, Cuban Sandwich & Stew, southern county and Mexican cooking to Chile, Peru and Argentina with presentation of multi-layers flavor.

nameZh: ABV Bar & Kitchen 美式餐酒館
addressZh: 台北市大安區敦化南路一段236巷16號
descriptionZh: ABV 世界精釀啤酒餐廳打造【美式餐酒館】，以老美國淘金年代為靈感，粗獷豪邁的美式精神貫穿料理與空間。料理兩大主軸：一是美式烤肉BBQ，串聯各州風味，從原木偏甜、田納西威士忌到卡羅萊那辣味一應俱全；二是具故事性的鄉村菜餚，凝聚移民文化與百年飲食記憶。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 16, Ln. 236, Sec. 1, Dunhua S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: “American Diner” under the Group of ABV Bar & Kitchen is inspired by the old American gold rush era to present wild and woolly American spirits in the cuisine and interior design. There are two main categories of cuisine. One is American BBQ, which combines different flavor from each state from original sweetness, Tennessee whiskey to Carolina pepper. The other is country-style dishes that tell stories, which recall immigrant culture and century-old food memories.

addressZh: 台北市大同區重慶北路一段15巷3號1F
descriptionZh: 轉角金工是一家融合傳統與創意的金工工作室，專注手工銀飾、客製化戒指與首飾設計。店內以溫暖木質與工業風格佈置，提供金工體驗課程，讓顧客親手打造獨一無二的作品。無論婚戒、禮物或個人飾品，都能感受職人精神與細膩工藝。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 3, Ln. 15, Sec. 1, Chongqing N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: T-Point Metal Art is a metal studio that combines tradition with creativity. It focuses on handmade silver jewelry, customized rings, and jewelry design. The store is decorated in warm wooden and industrial style. Experiential courses of mental works are provided here for customers to create unique works in person. The craftsmanship and exquisite workmanship are shown in every detail of wedding rings, gifts or personal accessories.

addressZh: 台北市信義區基隆路一段147巷34-2號
descriptionZh: 每一顆都是手工用心包製而成，皮薄餡多、飽滿多汁，嚐一口便能感受到家的溫暖。選用新鮮食材，堅持不添加多餘調味，讓食材本味呈現。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 34-2, Ln. 147, Sec. 1, Keelung Rd., Xinyi Dist., Taipei City 110, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Each dumpling is hand-made with attention to details; thin-skinned, generous filling, plump and juicy. You will feel the warm of home just have a small bite. Fresh food ingredients are used with no excessive seasoning to present the original taste of the ingredients.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區峨眉街7號
descriptionZh:
來自香港，最專業、齊全的文具和TOMICA商店！
提供：辦公室用品、臺灣特色文具、玩具、大宗採購等服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7, Emei St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
“From Hong Kong, it is the most professional store with complete selection of stationery and TOMICA!
We offer office supplies, specialty stationery & toys in Taiwan, and the service of bulk purchasing.”

nameZh: ABV Bar & Kitchen 日式居酒館
addressZh: 台北市中山區中山北路二段39巷16-2號
descriptionZh: ABV日式居酒館，以昭和懷舊氛圍為靈感，融合和洋兼併的設計，帶來溫暖且充滿生命力的用餐體驗。料理中最具震撼的是「稻草燒」，以稻草烈焰瞬間炙燒鮮魚，交織稻香與生熟口感。串物、炸物、蒸物、烤物與各式下酒菜齊聚，每一道都令人難忘。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 16-2, Ln. 39, Sec. 2, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City 104, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: ABV Bar & Kitchen- Izakaya is inspired by the nostalgic vibe of the Shōwa era. It is designed in the combination of Japanese and western styles to create a heart-warming and energetic dining experience. The most stunning dish is “Warayaki”, which cooks fresh fish over a straw fire, leaving with rice aroma and mixed texture of raw and cooked. There are lots of other dishes which are deliciously memorable, including skewer, deep-fried food, steamed dishes, grills, and various finger food and snacks.

nameZh: ABV Bar & Kitchen 南洋餐酒館
addressZh: 台北市大安區光復南路280巷39號
descriptionZh: ABV 南洋餐酒館主打東南亞多國料理，以酸、辣、鹹為基礎，融入甜與微苦，搭配香茅、檸檬葉、南薑、羅望子等香料，堆疊出熱帶獨有風味。從泰國、越南、印尼、新加坡、馬來西亞到菲律賓、柬埔寨，主廚團隊實地取經，將道地美食帶回台灣。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: ABV Bar & Kitchen- Southeast Asian Restaurant & Bar
addressEn: No. 39, Ln. 280, Guangfu S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: ABV Bar & Kitchen- Southeast Asian Restaurant & Bar offers cuisines from countries in Southeast Asia. The dishes are based on flavors of sour, spicy and savory with a balance of sweet and slightly bitter notes. Besides, spices like lemon grass, lime leaves, galangal and tamarind are used to create layers of unique tropical flavor. From Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, Singapore, Malaysia to Philippines and Cambodia, our chef visits each place in person with the team to bring authentic cuisine back to Taiwan.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區昆明街92-1號3樓
descriptionZh: ABV 串串啤酒館位於台北西門町，融合重慶麻辣串串火鍋與精釀啤酒文化，營業至凌晨3點，是宵夜族的首選。店內提供多達六種鍋底選擇，並以自助式串串方式呈現，顧客可自由選取食材，價格親民，串串最低僅15元起。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 3F., No. 92-1, Kunming St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: ABV Hotpot Skewers is located in Ximending, Taipei. It integrates the culture of spicy skewer hot pot in Chongqing with the culture of craft beer. The business is open until 3 am, and it is the first choice for late-night snack lovers. A total of six broth bases are provided for customers to choose, and the food ingredients are presented in skewers for self-service of customers. It is affordable and good value, and the lowest price for skewers is NT$15 each.

addressZh: 台北市大安區金山南路二段85巷7-4號
descriptionZh: 我們是販售羅馬式手工窯烤披薩，薄皮脆片餅皮，每日自製麵皮以低溫冷藏方式和手桿現點現做，歡迎喜歡薄皮披薩來嘗試。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 7-4, Ln. 85, Sec. 2, Jinshan S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: We sell wood-fired Roman-style pizza with thin and crispy crust. We make the curst every day in the storage of low temperature for handmade pizza upon order. We welcome all those who like pizza with thin crust.

nameZh: 關於烘焙 吐司研究所
addressZh: 台北市士林區得行東路182號
descriptionZh: 「關於」源自關公之名，承載信念與誠意。堅持優質原料每日手作，吐司與奶油捲最能展現功夫。以誠信待食材，以義氣待顧客，專注研發不藏拙，每一口皆是堅持與用心。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 182, Dexing E. Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: “Guanyu” is originally from the name of Guan Gong. It carries our belief and good faith. We insist on quality ingredients and handmade every day. Bread and butter roll are the best demonstration for that. Handling ingredients honestly and treating customers faithfully, we focus on product development and being true to ourselves. Our persistence and dedication is hidden in every detail of  what we offer.

addressZh: 台北市大同區迪化街一段217號
descriptionZh: 陳家糧舍，為迪化街30幾年老店，販售各式特色果乾、乾貨、辛香料、榖粉穀物、養生茶及台灣茶葉等，以"來自「家」最純粹溫暖的愛"之經營理念，反映在所有販售出去的南北雜貨上，因而在南北貨界打出一片天，後由二代接手轉型傳承，在蝦皮、momo、酷澎等電商平台亦有卓越成績及知名度。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 218, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: Planedo means “planet” in Esperanto, reminding people to respect all living species on the planet and to cherish natural resources they use. Planedo hopes to provide functional, high-quality clothing while reducing the burden on the environment.

addressZh: 台北市文山區興隆路一段283號
descriptionZh: 谷家四神湯，以草本與湯品對話，用天然食材熬製暖胃湯頭。每碗四神湯都挾著傳承的誠意與手工細火，材實料鮮而不濁；搭配古早刈包與熱騰便當，是都市裡的一抹溫暖慰藉。走進來，喝一口，就像回到舊時光裡的家。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 283, Sec. 1, Xinglong Rd., Wenshan Dist., Taipei City 116, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Gu's Four Herbs Soup blends herbs into soup, using natural ingredients to make stomach-warming  broth. Each bowl of Four Herbs Soup demonstrates the inherited good faith and skills of simmering with quality and fresh ingredients in clear soup base. Matching it with traditional Gua Bao and hot boxed meal, it is a heartwarming comfort in the city. Step in and have a sip, and you will feel like you are back home in the old times.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區三水街71之2號
descriptionZh:
東牧天雞｜天飼良雞，美味有秘
台東放牧土雞，每日現殺，清水煮50分鐘抹鹽，不用鹽水雞。雞翅、雞腳、豆干滷味細膩，甘醇醬汁當天販售。1968年創立，傳承至今，循古法堅持鮮美肉質，就在萬華東山水市場。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 71-2, Sanshui St., Wanhua Dist., Taipei City 108, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Dawn Chicken｜free-range quality chicken, secret to deliciousness
Free-range chickens in Taitung that are freshly butchered every day and cooked in clear water for 50 minutes before rubbing salt on. We never use boiled salty chicken. Braised chicken wings, chicken feet and bean curd are with delicate flavor. The mellow sauce is only sold freshly on  the day. We were established in 1968 and is still in business today. We follow the traditional approach and insist on delicious fresh quality, and you can find us right here in Wanhua Dongsanshui Street Market.

addressZh: 台北市大同區迪化街一段337號1樓
descriptionZh:
味香魚丸｜傳承一甲子
1961年創立於迪化街，阿公手擂魚漿捏魚丸，魚漿與樹薯粉比例7:3，新鮮扎實。甜不辣、福州丸、肉羹等手工美味，傳至第三代。老店臨街三代堅持手作，2025品牌轉身「食連動」，香氣四溢，食指大動。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 337, Sec. 1, Dihua St., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn:
Shiliandong fish balls｜a legacy spanning six decades
It was established at Dihua Street in 1961. Grandpa pounded fish paste manually to make fish balls. The ratio of fish paste to tapioca flour is 7 to 3 to create a fresh and solid texture. Hand-made delicacies, like tempura, Fuzhou fish ball and meat thick soup, have been passed down to the third generation. The old store on the street insists on handmade for three generations. In 2025, the brand was transformed to “Food Connection”, delicious smell and appetizing.

addressZh: 台北市大安區延吉街131巷27號1樓
descriptionZh: 豆町村燒肉耗時三年籌備，從肉品挑選到醬汁研發層層把關，完整展現日本職人精神。「豆町」意為閩南語「到丁」，以人為本，傳達聚餐美好氛圍。提供桌邊代烤服務、精緻套餐與私房料理，限量浮誇美食錯過可惜。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F., No. 27, Ln. 131, Yanji St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: It took three years for the preparation of Doutingchun Barbecue Restaurant. From the selection of meat to the development of sauce, we perform strict monitoring to completely present he Japanese spirit of craftsmanship. “Douting” means “getting together” in Taiwanese. Centered on people, we deliver good atmosphere for dining together. We provided at-the-table BBQ service, exquisite set meal, and private kitchen cuisine. The limited extravagant food is too good to miss.

nameZh: 私房小廚-杏仁茶、銀杏茶專門店
addressZh: 台北市大安區永康街6號
descriptionZh: 1992年創立，採冷凍乾燥技術，堅果粉與凍乾水果純天然無添加，保留營養與原香。歷經起伏磨練出韌性，2001年開發蔬果真空急凍系列。2025年永康街旗艦店啟用，「私房小廚」更名「果真有杏」，讓天然堅果與水果的幸福味道瞬間封存，歡迎品嚐。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 6, Yongkang St., Da’an Dist., Taipei City 106, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Established in 1992, we use the technology of freeze drying.  We insist on pure nut flour and freeze-dried fruit with no additives to preserve the nutritional value and natural aroma. After ups and downs, we developed resilience. In 2001, we developed vacuum and frozen vegetables and fruits. In 2025, our flagship store in Yongkang Street was open to public. “Private House” was renamed “Guozhen Youxing” to instantly preserve the taste of happiness of natural nuts and fruits. Welcome to try the taste.

nameZh: 激安の食事酒場（市府二號店)
addressZh: 台北市信義區基隆路一段147巷5弄1號1樓
descriptionZh: 激安將日本居酒屋氛圍帶到台北，引領放題暢飲風潮。創意料理、熱炒、串燒、鍋物與各式酒水喝到飽，琳瑯滿目滿足味蕾。提供舒適包廂，適合企業團體包場、尾牙或春酒活動，用心料理讓每位賓客都津津樂道。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 1, Alley 5, Lane 147, Section 1, Keelung Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Bargain-Priced Izakaya brings the atmosphere of Japanese dining bar to Taipei and leads the trend of all-you-can-drink. We provide creative cuisine, stir fry, skewer, hot pot, and all-you-can-drink drinks; the variety of choices satisfy your tastebuds as well as cozy private rooms for enterprises, groups, end-of-year party or spring feast. Our dedication on cooking is what makes our customers talk with great enthusiasm.

nameZh: 激安&色酒（吉烹敦南三號店)
addressZh: 台北市大安區敦化南路一段160巷47號1樓
descriptionZh:
讓我們帶領您，一同從激安の吉烹酒場，再進入色酒Yakitori&draft～
我們是店中店的類型，創意料理、熱炒、串燒、鍋物與各式喝到飽酒類飲品，並備有舒適包廂，歡迎企業團體包場尾牙春酒活動喔！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 47, Lane 160, Section 1, Dunhua South Road, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Let us take you to Yakitori & Draft from Bargain-Priced Yakitori Sakaba~
We run it as store-in-store, providing creative cuisine, stir fry, skewer, hotpot, and various all-you-can-drink drinks. Besides, we have comfy private rooms to welcome enterprises and groups for their end-of-year party and spring feast here!

addressZh: 台北市大安區敦化南路一段190巷40號1樓
descriptionZh: 玖酒井食事町位於台北東區，適合好友、家庭或公司聚餐。擁有舒適日式氛圍，提供精緻居酒料理、一夜干、壽司刺身及各式日式酒水放題。老闆將東京人氣「飲み放題」設備空運來台，自家手作冷食、串燒與鍋物料理，聚餐與包場活動首選。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 40, Lane 190, Section 1, Dunhua South Road, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Jiujiujing Izakaya is located in East District, Taipei and is suitable for good friends, family or company colleagues to gather together for a meal. We have cozy Japanese atmosphere here and provide gourmet izakaya dishes, semi-dried fish, sushi, sashimi, and various Japanese all-you-can-drink drinks. The owner transported the popular “self-service drink” equipment in Tokyo to Taiwan and prepares handmade cold snack, skewer and hotpot in store. It is your first choice for dining parties and private events.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區大理街131號1樓
descriptionZh: 咖啡帶由行動三輪咖啡車起步，落腳萬華龍山寺商圈，藍白簡約小店充滿溫馨氛圍。提供手沖咖啡與特調茶飲，深受旅客與在地喜愛。店內展示攝影作品，並舉辦咖啡與街拍分享會，結合興趣與夢想，讓每位來客都能品味咖啡，也感受萬華的獨特魅力。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 131, Dali Street, Wanhua District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: The Coffee Belt started as a mobile coffee cart and settled down in Wanhua Longshan Temple Commercial Area. The simple blue and white store is welcoming. It provides pour over coffee and signature tea drinks and is very popular among tourists and locals. We exhibit photographic works in the store as well as hold coffee and street snaps sharing sessions to combine our interest with our dream. We hope each of our guest enjoy coffee and experience the unique charm of Wanhua.

addressZh: 台北市大安區延吉街137巷19號1樓
descriptionZh: 茶山謎路Mount Mystery，源自海拔2100公尺山巔的茶園，茶農以勇氣與汗水攀登，只取茶葉精華。1983年創立銘裕茶行，二代2025年接棒，從鹿谷、杉林溪、魚池到梨山，堅持信念攀登至善茶境。每一次沖茶，氤氳著人情與茶香，迷人滋味藏在雲深不知處。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 19, Lane 137, Yanji Street, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Mount Mystery is originated from a tea plantation on a mountain peak at an altitude of 2100 meters. The tea farmers climb to the peak with courage and covering in sweat to only pick the essence of tea leaves. In 1983, we established Ming Yu Tea Shop and passed it to the second generation in 2025. From Lugu, Shanlinxi, Yuchi to Lishan, we insist on our belief and climb to the supreme tea scenic spot. When making tea every time, you will be surrounded by human emotion and tea fragrance. The charming taste is from somewhere deep in the cloud.

addressZh: 台北市內湖區民權東路六段78號1樓
descriptionZh: 圓葉肉羹源自台北老圓環，創辦人葉老闆師承名店老師傅，2016自創品牌。嚴選溫體黑豬後腿肉現宰手工製作，搭配鮮甜扁魚湯頭，黑豬滷肉飯、蛋酥滷白菜經典三件組。2025換上新招牌，承載職人初心，一碗羹湯滿溢台灣老味道。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 78, Section 6, Minquan East Road, Neihu District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Yuanye Rougeng is originally from Old Taipei Circle. The founder, Mr. Yeh, was a disciple of a chef in a famous store  and established a private brand in 2016. Fresh pork leg of black pigs is used for handmade dishes; it is suggested to go for the classic three dishes, including fresh dried flounder broth, black-pig braised pork rice and Chinese cabbage stew with egg floss. In 2025, a new signboard was put on to carry the original intent of craftsmanship. A bowl of thick soup that is full of traditional Taiwanese flavor.

nameZh: 東湖歐香藝術蛋糕有限公司
addressZh: 台北市內湖區東湖路39號
descriptionZh: 位於台北內湖，專注西點、麵包與小西點製作。秉持精緻烘焙理念，將高品質蛋糕帶給每位顧客，讓生日或節日增添幸福滋味。產品涵蓋各式生日蛋糕、麵包與小西點，並獲瑞士蓮巧克力肯定，堅持美味與品質並重。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Donghu Ouxiang Art Cake Co., Ltd.
addressEn: No. 39, Donghu Rd., Neihu Dist., Taipei City 114, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Located in Neihu, Taipei, we focus on making pastry, bread and finger cookies. Carrying the concept of artisan baking, we present high-quality cakes to our customers to add the sense of joy to birthday or celebration. We provided various birthday cakes, bread and finger cookies. Besides, we are recognized by Lindt Chocolate for our insistence on both flavor and quality.

addressZh: 台北市萬華區中華路一段122號-1
descriptionZh:
在千家一面的手搖茶市場，「珍珠之王」堅持走一條不妥協的極致路線——
我們不只是做「好喝」的奶茶，而是做「喝得出工藝與尊榮感」的珍珠奶茶。
從挑選每一片茶葉，到設定每一道調製參數，再到琢磨珍珠在口中的回彈節奏，每一口都是對品質的執著。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 122, Section 1, Zhonghua Road, Wanhua District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
In the market of bubble tea shops, “King of Pearls” insists on a route of perfection with no compromise ——
We not only make “nice” milk tea but also bubble tea that “contains craftsmanship and sense of pride”.
From selection of each tea leaf, setup parameters for each process, to consideration of the level of chewy and bouncy of  tapioca balls in the mouth, each detail shows our commitment to quality.

addressZh: 台北市信義區忠孝東路五段372巷27弄75-2號
descriptionZh: 隱身在台北街頭的【品豐小食】，由曾在鼎泰豐磨鍊多年的師傅親手掌杓，將「鼎式功夫」帶到日常小館。從一碗雞油乾拌菜肉餛飩到經典的排骨蛋炒飯，都能吃出那股熟悉的鑊氣與細膩的火候。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 75-2, Alley 27, Lane 372, Section 5, Zhongxiao East Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Pinfeng Snacks” hidden on a street in Taipei has a chef that worked many years in  Din Tai Fung to bring “DTF skills” to a daily diner. You can find familiar breath of the wok and fine control of heat from a bowl of vegetable & pork wantons tossed in well-seasoned chicken sauce or classic fried rice with pork chop & eggs.

nameZh: 小滿手炒糖刨冰 豆花 飲品
addressZh: 台北市信義區虎林街132巷5-2號
descriptionZh:
想吃碗剛剛好的甜？來【小滿冰品】就對了！
店家自炒糖水，甜度拿捏得剛剛好，不會膩口；配料選擇超多，每一口都能搭配出不同驚喜。份量實在，吃完清涼又飽足，完全大滿足\
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Xiaomanshou Shaved Ice with Stir-fry Sugar, Tofu Pudding and Drinks
addressEn: No. 5-2, Lane 132, Hulin Street, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Wanna a bowl of perfect sweetness? Just come to “Xiaoman Shaved Ice”!
With homemade stir-fry sugar syrup, we control the sweetness precisely, not too rich or heavy. We provide a good selection of toppings to ensure different surprises brought to each mouthful. Each bowl is in good portion to make you feel refreshed; total satisfaction.

nameZh: 告乃翁 CallingBar 自家烘焙咖啡店
addressZh: 台北市信義區虎林街132巷15號
descriptionZh:
是一家不限時、提供插座的自家烘焙咖啡廳，
白天供應手沖咖啡與甜點，夜晚變身質感調酒吧。由親切夫妻經營，空間採明亮木質調設計，適合工作、聚會與約會。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 15, Lane 132, Hulin Street, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
It is a café serving home baking, providing sockets but  with no time restrictions.
In the daytime, we serve pour-over coffee and desserts; in the evening, the café is transformed to a quality cocktail bar. It is run by a friendly couple. The interior design is bright in a woody tone; it is suitable for working, gathering and dating.

addressZh: 台北市信義區虎林街132巷78號
descriptionZh:
點餐像寫考卷一樣有趣的店家!
專賣義式料理
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 78, Lane 132, Hulin Street, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
A fun store that makes ordering food like writing on exam paper!
Specialized in Italian dishes.

nameZh: FeelGood Inc. Fog / 迷霧啡爾
addressZh: 台北市信義區虎林街132巷75號1F
descriptionZh:
概念取自London Fog
同時懷抱著對溫哥華距離9,568公里的思念，也是對當初創立London Fog的Buckwheat Café致敬
遠在另端的蘇格蘭則稱之為溫哥華之霧
倫敦的大霧世界知名，而人生有時就像身處在伸手不見五指的迷霧裡。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 75, Lane 132, Hulin Street, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
It is inspired by London Fog.
At the same time, it embraces the yearning to Vancouver, which is 9,568 kilometers away as well as pays tribute to Buckwheat Café, that established London Fog in the beginning.
Scotland that is far aways in the other side is called Vancouver Fog.
The thick fog in London is well known all over the world; sometimes, life is like how we are in the pitch-dark fog.

addressZh: 台北市南港區昆陽街157巷19號1F
descriptionZh: 老闆娘親切又熱情，服務讓人覺得很貼心；餐點份量十足，菜量多到超滿足；再加上乾淨舒適的環境，用餐起來格外安心。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 19, Lane 157, Kunyang Street, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: The landlady is friendly and enthusiastic, providing thoughtful services. The meal is in sufficient portion with vegetables more than enough. Besides, it provides a clean and cozy dining environment, making customers feel at ease here.

addressZh: 台北市北投區石牌路二段68巷1號
descriptionZh:
自家烘焙咖啡館
精品手沖
手作甜點
早午餐、午晚餐
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 1, Lane 68, Section 2, Shipai Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
Home-baking cafe
Specialty pour-over coffee
Handmade desserts
Brunch and late lunch & supper

addressZh: 台北市北投區義理街21號
descriptionZh: 慈心緣健康烘焙以天然食材製作各式素食、奶素麵包，堅持無添加、少油少糖，讓每一口都吃得安心健康，感受純粹美味與溫暖用心。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 21, Yili Street, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: TzuHsinYuan Bakery uses natural and healthy ingredients to make various  vegetarian and dairy-free bread. We insist on no additives, less oil and less sugar to ensure healthy diet and ensure customers experience pure taste and our dedication.

addressZh: 台北市北投區石牌路一段166巷33號
descriptionZh:
無肉但是有靈魂的美式新美食!!!
#戶外空間/#室內用餐區/#台北素食餐廳
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 33, Lane 166, Section 1, Shipai Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
New American dishes with no meat but with soul!!!
#Pet friendly/#Outdoor space/#Indoor dining area/#Vegetarian Restaurant in Taipei

addressZh: 台北市北投區石牌路二段68巷2號
descriptionZh: 港式小餐館✖健康輕食✖創新料理
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Lane 68, Section 2, Shipai Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Hong Kong Cuisine ✖Health Light Meal✖ Creative Dishes

nameZh: 維格餅家西門武昌門市
addressZh: 台北市萬華區武昌街二段8號
descriptionZh: 「維格餅家」創立於1992年，以傳承中式糕餅文化為使命，融合傳統與創新，研發符合現代健康概念的精緻糕點。嚴選頂級原料與法國發酵無水奶油烘焙，口感香醇細緻，深受國內外顧客喜愛，成為台灣糕餅代表品牌。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8, Section 2, Wuchang Street, Wanhua District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Vigor Kobo” was founded in 1992. It carries a mission of preserving Chinese pastry culture  and combines tradition with innovation to develop fine pastries that meet the concept of modern health. We strictly select top-quality ingredients and French cultured anhydrous milk fat for baking to achieve rich and smooth texture. Our products are very popular among domestic and overseas customers, and we become a representative brand of Taiwan pastries.

nameZh: 維格餅家西門成都門市
addressZh: 台北市萬華區成都路3號
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 3, Chengdu Road, Wanhua District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Vigor Kobo” was founded in 1992. It carries a mission of preserving Chinese pastry culture  and combines tradition with innovation to develop fine pastries that meet the concept of modern health. We strictly select top-quality ingredients and French cultured anhydrous milk fat for baking to achieve rich and smooth texture. Our products are very popular among domestic and overseas customers, and we become a representative brand of Taiwan pastries.

nameZh: 維格餅家西門西寧門市
addressZh: 台北市萬華區西寧南路113號
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 113, Xining South Road, Wanhua District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Vigor Kobo” was founded in 1992. It carries a mission of preserving Chinese pastry culture  and combines tradition with innovation to develop fine pastries that meet the concept of modern health. We strictly select top-quality ingredients and French cultured anhydrous milk fat for baking to achieve rich and smooth texture. Our products are very popular among domestic and overseas customers, and we become a representative brand of Taiwan pastries.

addressZh: 台北市大安區永康街13巷2-1號
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2-1, Lane 13, Yongkang Street, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Vigor Kobo” was founded in 1992. It carries a mission of preserving Chinese pastry culture  and combines tradition with innovation to develop fine pastries that meet the concept of modern health. We strictly select top-quality ingredients and French cultured anhydrous milk fat for baking to achieve rich and smooth texture. Our products are very popular among domestic and overseas customers, and we become a representative brand of Taiwan pastries.

addressZh: 台北市中山區松江路485號
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 485, Songjiang Road, Zhongshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Vigor Kobo” was founded in 1992. It carries a mission of preserving Chinese pastry culture  and combines tradition with innovation to develop fine pastries that meet the concept of modern health. We strictly select top-quality ingredients and French cultured anhydrous milk fat for baking to achieve rich and smooth texture. Our products are very popular among domestic and overseas customers, and we become a representative brand of Taiwan pastries.

addressZh: 台北市信義區忠孝東路四段553巷52弄5號1樓
descriptionZh: 創辦人出生於1980年代，對港劇、港式茶餐廳與港味有童年記憶，創立此店是為了「在餐桌上找回家的味道」。想用港式飲食、懷舊氛圍與現代設計融合，讓人不只是吃到食物，而是感受到情感與記憶。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 5, Lane 52, Lane 553, Section 4, Zhongxiao East Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: The founder was born in 1980s and has profound childhood memories towards Hong Kong drama, Hong Kong-style café, and Hong Kong flavor. The purpose of the café is to “find the home flavor at the table”. With the combination of Hong Kong dishes, nostalgic vibe and modern design, customers not only enjoy delicious food but also experience affection and memories.

addressZh: 台北市信義區忠孝東路四段553巷46弄4號1
descriptionZh: SHUFFLE Brunch & Bar 結合白天早午餐與夜晚酒吧氛圍，提供多元餐點、甜品與調酒，空間舒適並具包場功能，是信義區兼具休閒與聚會的特色餐飲場域。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 4, Lane 46, Lane 553, Section 4, Zhongxiao East Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: SHUFFLE Brunch & Bar  combines the atmosphere of brunch in the daytime and bar in the evening to provide various dishes, desserts and cocktails. We have cozy space and private rooms and provide featured dining space for leisure and gathering parties in Xinyi District.

nameZh: ORINGO林果良品 台北松菸店
addressZh: 台北市信義區忠孝東路四段553巷46弄9號1樓
descriptionZh: ORINGO 林果良品-台北松菸店是一家以「鞋匠師傅工作與生活場域」為靈感打造的手工鞋旗艦門市。店內空間寬敞舒適、歐式風格濃厚，結合 Premium 手工鞋、女鞋系列、紳士配件與展演空間，提供完整鞋款選擇與深度品牌體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 9, Lane 46, Lane 553, Section 4, Zhongxiao East Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: ORINGO- Taipei Songshan Store is a handmade shoe flagship store that is inspired by the idea of “working and living space for shoemakers”. It has a specious space in the store with rich design of European style. We combines premium handmade shoes, lady’s shoes, and gentleman accessories with exhibition space to provide complete models for shoe selection and in-depth brand experience.

addressZh: 台北市北投區中央北路四段450號1樓
descriptionZh: 茉兒書局是一家位於台北北投關渡的多元複合式書店，由布克斯島有限公司經營。店內提供暢銷書、藝術書與參考書，並結合豐富的紙品、文具禮品、美術材料與手作DIY系列。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 450, Section 4, Central North Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Moore Bookstore is a multi-functional bookstore located at Guandu Beitou in Taipei and is run by Books Island Company. The bookstore provides best-seller books, art books and reference books as well as abundant types of paper, stationery & gifts, art materials, and DIY series.

addressZh: 台北市北投區中央北路四段519號
descriptionZh: 木漾 MU YOUNG 是位於台北市北投區的鮮果飲品店，主打新鮮水果調飲，店址在中央北路四段519號。產品以水果風味為核心，氣氛輕鬆，是在地人與水果飲品愛好者的好選擇。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 519, Section 4, Central North Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: MU YOUNG is a fresh fruit juice shop located in Beitou District, Taipei City and focuses on fresh fruit-infused drinks. Its address is No. 519, Sec. 4, Zhongyang North Road. The main product is based on fruity flavor, and it has a cozy environment here. It is a good choice for locals and those who love fruity drinks.

addressZh: 台北市信義區忠孝東路五段353號
descriptionZh: 18 DIX-HUIT Pâtisserie由藍帶主廚Stephanie創立，融合法式優雅與日式職人精神，堅持以頂級原料製作精緻甜點。以「法式鳳梨酥」榮獲比利時iTQi最高三星獎，致力以美味傳遞幸福與正能量。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 353, Sec. 5, Zhongxiao E. Rd., Xinyi Dist., Taipei City 110, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: 18 DIX-HUIT Pâtisserie was established by Le Cordon Bleu Chef, Stephanie, who integrates French elegance with Japanese craftsmanship and insists on top-quality ingredients on exquisite desserts. The “French Pineapple Cake” she developed received iTQi Superior Taste Award with 3 stars in Belgium, and she is devoted to deliver happiness and positive vibes with delicious flavor.

addressZh: 台北市松山區復興北路313巷39號一樓
descriptionZh: 位於台北市松山區復興北路313巷39號，以自家直火烘焙精品豆為主打，提供手沖、義式、氣泡水與甜點，是兼具舒適氛圍與烘豆工坊特色的獨立咖啡店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 39, Lane 313, Fuxing North Road, Songshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Located at No. 39, Ln. 313, Fuxing N. Rd., Songshan Dist., Taipei City, our signature is house-roasted specialty beans. We provide pour-over coffee, Italian coffee, sparkling water and desserts as an independent coffee shop that is with both cozy atmosphere and bean-roasting workshop.

addressZh: 台北市大安區麗水街2-1號2樓
descriptionZh: 我們有兩隻可愛親人的小貓 我們有健康不過度調味的餐點 我們有好喝又好看的立體貓咪拉花飲品 我們有舒適又明亮的用餐空間 我們有親切又溫暖的桌邊服務 讓我們對您好一點，來找我們玩吧(｡･ω･｡)
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F, No. 2-1, Lishui Street, Da'an District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: We have two cute and affectionate kittens, we have healthy and not overly seasoned meal, we serve coffee with latte art of 3D kitten that is nice to drink and pretty, we have cozy and bright dining space, and we have friendly and welcoming table service. Let us be nice to you and come play with us. (｡･ω･｡)

addressZh: 台北市松山區延壽街85號
descriptionZh: 坐落於台北市松山區延壽街85號，是在地人氣甜品店，主打手工豆花、黑糖剉冰與多樣自選甜湯，招牌為新鮮無糖豆漿底與經典古早味配料組合。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 85, Yanshou St., Songshan Dist., Taipei City 105, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Located at No. 85, Yanshou St., Songshan Dist., Taipei City, we are a popular dessert shop locally. Our features are tofu pudding, black sugar shaved ice, and various choose-your-own dessert soup. Our signature is the combination of fresh sugar-free soybean base with classic traditional toppings.

addressZh: 台北市松山區新東街6巷4號
descriptionZh: 藏匿在民生社區巷弄裡的日式串燒小店，提供多種串燒、刺身、烤物與小酌選擇，環境寬敞舒適且無低消、無服務費，適合三五好友下班後聚會暢聊。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 4, Lane 6, Xindong Street, Songshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: A small Japanese yakitori restaurant hidden at the alley in Minsheng Community, providing various skewers, sashimi, grilled food, and drinks. It has a specious and cozy environment with no requirement on minimum order and no service fee. It is a good place for friends to gather together for a chat after work.

nameZh: 優格米電玩民生三民店
addressZh: 台北市松山區三民路113巷3號1樓
descriptionZh: 位於台北市松山區三民路巷內，專營各類遊戲主機、遊戲片與周邊配件，並提供主機維修與改殼服務。店內亦接受遊戲預購，是在地玩家交流與選購電玩的便利據點。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Yougemi Video Game- Mingsheng Sanmin Store
addressEn: 1F, No. 3, Lane 113, Sanmin Road, Songshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: It is located at a lane on Sanmin Road in Songshan District, Taipei City and specialized in various game console, game disc, and accessories. We also provide services of maintenance and casing modification on game console. In the store, we are open for pre-order of games and is a convenient place for local players to exchange experience of and purchase video games.

addressZh: 台北市松山區三民路110巷2號
descriptionZh: 雲鳳麵館以手工麵食聞名，湯頭鮮美、口味多樣，招牌紅油抄手麵、酸辣麵與牛肉麵都深受喜愛。無論堂食或外帶，每一口都能感受到濃郁香氣與用心，帶給你道地的台式麵食美味體驗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Lane 110, Sanmin Road, Songshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Yunfeng Noodle Restaurant is famous for its handmade noodles in fresh broth and a variety of flavor selection. The signature red oil wonton noodles, sour & spicy noodles and beef noodles are well loved by customers. No matter dining in or taking away, customers will be able to feel the rich aroma and our dedication on every mouthful of noodles. We aim to bring you the most authentic experience of Taiwanese noodles.

nameZh: Gam ve Gam 玲酒選物
addressZh: 台北市松山區延壽街123號
descriptionZh: Gam ve Gam 玲酒選物讓你在輕鬆氛圍中品味地中海美酒與美食，從橄欖油、抹醬到精釀啤酒，全都是精挑細選。結合台灣小農有機好物，每一口都享受生活的美好與獨特品味。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 123, Yanshou Street, Songshan District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Gam ve Gam creates a cozy vibe for you to enjoy Mediterranean wine and cuisine. From olive oil, spread to craft beer, they are all carefully selected. With combination of organic produces from small farmers in Taiwan, we ensure customers enjoy the beauty of life and unique taste on every bite and every sip of food and wine.

addressZh: 台北市南港區東新街116-2號
descriptionZh: 這家店主打 「豆漿豆花」，可自由選擇兩種配料。最驚喜的是——在甜點店裡，第一次吃到真正 沒有糖水調味 的配料，保留了食材本身的原味與營養，健康度滿分。豆花入口即化、香濃滑順，與無糖豆漿的清爽相得益彰。整體來說是一家讓人放心享用、又不失美味的豆花店，推薦給喜歡健康甜品的朋友。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Alan's Homemade Healthy Tofu Pudding and Hot & Cold Drinks
addressEn: No. 116-2, Dongxin Street, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: The store’s key promotion is “tofu pudding served in soybean milk”, and customers can choose two toppings on it. The most surprising thins is to eat topping without any sugar syrup in the dessert shop for the first time. The original flavor and nutrient of the ingredients are retained, which is perfect for health. Tofu pudding melts immediately in the mouth and is rich and smooth; matching with sugar-free soybean milk, they bring out the best in each other. In a whole, it is a tofu pudding shop that people can rest assured when eating but the food never loses the original flavor. It is specially recommended to those who love healthy desserts.

addressZh: 台北市南港區玉成街52巷1號1樓
descriptionZh: 精品咖啡小店｜環境舒適又專業
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 1, Lane 52, Yucheng Street, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: A small shop for specialty coffee｜Providing cozy and professional environment

addressZh: 台北市南港區東新街116-3號
descriptionZh: 南港甜點天花板｜皮皮千層蛋糕 說到南港必吃甜點，皮皮千層蛋糕絕對榜上有名！一走進店裡，櫥窗櫃整整齊齊擺滿各式千層蛋糕，視覺直接先被收服，每一塊都在說：「快來吃我！」
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Alan's Homemade Healthy Tofu Pudding and Hot & Cold Drinks
addressEn: No. 116-2, Dongxin Street, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: The store’s key promotion is “tofu pudding served in soybean milk”, and customers can choose two toppings on it. The most surprising thins is to eat topping without any sugar syrup in the dessert shop for the first time. The original flavor and nutrient of the ingredients are retained, which is perfect for health. Tofu pudding melts immediately in the mouth and is rich and smooth; matching with sugar-free soybean milk, they bring out the best in each other. In a whole, it is a tofu pudding shop that people can rest assured when eating but the food never loses the original flavor. It is specially recommended to those who love healthy desserts.

nameZh: 三軍總醫院北投分院附設庇護工場-向陽心苑
addressZh: 台北市北投區中心街1號
descriptionZh: 位於北投幽靜的半山腰，於1998年被指定為台北市定古蹟。向陽心苑為身心障礙者庇護工場，在這裡有院區導覽、溫泉足湯、體驗穿浴衣、親子手作、寫祈福繪馬等活動。希望大家盡情遊玩的同時，也能支持身心障礙者就業！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Sheltered Workshop in the Beitou Branch of the Tri Service General Hospital- The Garden of Spirits
addressEn: No. 1, Center Street, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: It is located at a quiet hillside in Beitou. It was appointed as Taipei Municipal Historic Site in 1998. The Garden of Spirits is a sheltered workshop for people with disabilities. We hold different activities here, including site guided tour, hot spring foot bath, yukata experience, family craft, and ema for prayer. We hope while everyone enjoy a good time here, they also support employment for people with disabilities!

addressZh: 台北市北投區中山路28-1號
descriptionZh: 北投茶色位於臺北市北投區中山路28-1號，地熱谷入口處的泡沫紅茶小店。除招牌飲品外，也提供滷味、米血糕、甜不辣等銅板小吃，以及最有特色的辣味溏心蛋，是遊客與溫泉旅人品味在地美食的好去處。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 28-1, Zhongshan Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Beitou Chase is located at No. 28-1, Zhongshan Rd., Beitou Dist., Taipei City; it is a small bubble tea shop by the entrance of Thermal Valley. Other than the signature drinks, we also provide snacks like  lu wei, blood pudding, and tempura as well as the most famous spicy soft-boiled egg. It is a good place for tourists and hot spring lovers to taste delicious local food.

addressZh: 台北市北投區中山路30-10號
descriptionZh: 地熱谷小舖庇護工場位於新北投地熱谷公園內，是台灣首間觀光型庇護工場，由三軍總醫院北投分院與北市庇護工場共同經營，提供紀念品販售、咖啡飲品與溫泉觀光指引等服務，並培訓身心障礙者取得職場技能。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Sheltered Workshop in the Thermal Valley Store
addressEn: No. 30-10, Zhongshan Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Sheltered  Workshop in the Thermal Valley Store is located at Thermal Valley Park in Xinbeitou. It is the first tourist-oriented sheltered workshop in Taiwan and is run by the Beitou Branch of the Tri Service General Hospital and Taipei City Sheltered Workshop together. It sells souvenir, coffee, and drinks as well as provides services of hot spring and tourist information and training to people with disabilities to obtain skills required for workplace.

addressZh: 台北市北投區育仁路8巷7號1樓
descriptionZh: 隱身北投巷弄的日系復古小店，木質空間溫馨舒適，提供手沖咖啡與多款甜點。早晨就能進店享受咖啡香，是散步後休憩的好去處。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 7, Lane 8, Yuren Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: A Japanese retro small shop hidden in the alley in Beitou with welcoming and cozy wooden interior. It provides pour-over coffee and various desserts. It is ready to serve coffee in the morning and is a good place to take a break after a walk.

nameZh: 男子漢拉麵食堂-北投店
addressZh: 台北市北投區育仁路56號
descriptionZh: 男子漢拉麵食堂-北投店主打台式拉麵，湯頭濃郁、配料豐富，招牌豚骨叉燒與蒜味豚骨拉麵深受喜愛。舒適用餐環境，無論朋友聚餐或獨自享受，都能感受濃醇美味與滿滿飽足感。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 56, Yuren Road, Beitou District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Manly Ramen Dining- Beitou Store promotes Taiwanese ramen. It is with rich broth and abundant toppings; the signature barbecue pork ramen and garlic pork ramen are the most popular. We have a cozy dining environment, and you can enjoy the rich flavor and  full satisfaction no matter you dine with your friends or come alone.

addressZh: 台北市大同區民生西路210號1樓
descriptionZh: 冰霖古早味創立24年，堅持「品質、服務、衛生」三大理念，以天然黃豆與自製黑糖手工熬製豆花，傳遞老闆的感恩與真心。招牌芋頭芋圓豆花深受喜愛，店內環境溫馨舒適，是體驗老台北古早味的甜品名店。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 210, Minsheng West Road, Datong District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: Binling was established 24 years ago. We insist on three concepts, “quality”, “service”, and “health”. Natural soybeans and homemade brown sugar are used to make tofu pudding to deliver the owner’s gratitude and sincerity. Signature tofu pudding served with taro and taro balls is the most popular. We provide a welcoming and cozy environment in the store and is a famous dessert shop for traditional old Taipei flavor.

nameZh: 鶺鴒葡萄酒窖 Wagtail wine cellar
addressZh: 台北市南港區園區街6之7號1樓
descriptionZh: 位於南港的【鶺鴒葡萄酒窖 Wagtail wine cellar】就是與朋友小聚、卸下疲憊的最佳去處。店內提供各式精選葡萄酒與獨家威士忌，無論是想品味酒香還是小酌聊天，都能滿足你的需求。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 6-7, Yuanyuan Street, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: “Wagtail Wine Cellar” located in Nangang is the best place to gather together with friends and get rid of tiredness. We provide various selected wine and exclusive whisky in the store. No matter whether you want to taste wine or have a chat while drinking, we can satisfy your demands here.

addressZh: 台北市南港區新民街74號1樓
descriptionZh: JIATE呷茶手搖飲以台灣茶文化為核心，推出手沖茶、單品茶與水果調茶等五大系列，用一杯茶傳遞團聚溫度，品味台灣人日常的美好時光。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 74, Xinmin Street, Nangang District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: JJIATE Hand-Shaken Drink focuses on the tea culture in Taiwan to launch five series, including pour-over tea, single origin tea, and fruit tea. A cup of tea can deliver the warmth of getting together to experience simple moments that people in Taiwan enjoy every day.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區羅斯福路2段14號1樓
descriptionZh: 更令人驚喜的是，這裡的夥伴們親切又熱情，讓每一位來訪的顧客都感受到賓至如歸的氛圍。無論平日或假日，這裡都能帶來美好愉快的時光，絕對值得一試！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 1F, No. 14, Section 2, Roosevelt Road, Zhongzheng District, Taipei City
descriptionEn:
A basket, a plate, a bowl, deliciousness comes from being picky and patient ─Su-Hang Snack Shop


Half a century ago, near Taipei Station, my grandfather set up a stall to recreate the delicacies of
his hometown: xiaolongbao (small steamed buns), steamed dumplings, and crab shell roe.
These meticulously crafted dishes filled the streets of Taipei with the aroma of Jiangnan.
Over the past 50 years, the flavors of Jiangnan have been passed down through generations,
meticulously preserved by my father and mother, meticulously upholding the techniques and
aesthetics of Jiangsu and Zhejiang cuisine. The thin, folded and pinched wrapper, the 18-fold xiaolongbao,
requires both skill and attention. The hind leg filling, enhanced with chicken bone broth, is a challenging process, a test of skill and finesse.
He personally dissected the crab and extracted the roe to ensure a rich, fresh, and sweet flavor, never slacking off, no matter how tiring or exhausting.
A seemingly simple steamed bun, a plate of fried rice, and a bowl of soup—the Jiangzhe specialties live up to their reputation, born of daily meticulous care and patience.


"There is heaven above and Suzhou and Hangzhou below" - Suzhou and Hangzhou on the tip of your tongue are as delicious as heaven.

source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 3rd Floor, No. 463, Guangfu South Road, Xinyi District, Taipei City
descriptionEn: The GrowCubes are crafted from agricultural waste materials, such as rice bran, straw, and corn stalks, effectively reducing waste while unlocking the potential of these natural byproducts. For instance, incorporating rice husks results in a lighter, more breathable material. Designed to be water-soluble, GrowCubes can be easily dissolved when no longer in use. Add water and pour the mixture into the soil, where it becomes a valuable resource for future plant growth. From raw material sourcing to end-of-life disposal, GrowCubes embody a commitment to sustainability and circular, eco-friendly practices.

addressZh: 台北市信義區信義路四段413-1號
descriptionZh: 鄰近捷運台北101/世貿站，是一間結合工藝、生活與咖啡的創意空間。店內以柔和木質與植栽佈置，氛圍溫馨放鬆，提供皮革飾品手作課程、藝術展覽與甜點飲品，也開放包場與活動租借，適合喜歡手作與美感生活的客人。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
