descriptionEn: Adjacent to Taipei 101/World Trade Center MRT Station, the studio is a creative space combining craftsmanship, lifestyle, and coffee. The interior features soft wooden elements and plant arrangements, creating a warm and relaxing atmosphere, offering leather accessory handcraft courses, art exhibitions, and desserts and beverages. This space is also open for full venue booking and event rentals, suitable for customers who appreciate handcrafts and aesthetic living.

addressZh: 臺東縣長濱鄉三間村水母丁1之4號
descriptionZh:
[八仙洞遊客中心]位於兼具地質景觀與史前遺址的八仙洞，位在台東縣長濱鄉一座面海的峭壁上，有自然形成的十數個海蝕洞穴。這些洞穴原在海面，現在卻散布於150公尺高的山壁上，這是因為在東海岸地殼陸升的過程中，海浪沖蝕岩壁較鬆軟的部份而成。八仙洞目前設有步道通往各個海蝕洞穴，其中最大的洞穴是靈岩洞；離地面最高的是崑崙洞，高度有130公尺，其他還有乾元洞、朝宸洞、海雷洞、潮音洞、永安洞、水簾洞等。由於洞穴多被佔用開闢神壇，因此洞穴名多帶有宗教色彩。
八仙洞也是一處重要史前遺址，曾發現非常豐富的舊石器時代先陶文化，經命名為「長濱文化」，這是迄今所知臺灣最古老的史前文化遺址，深具重要性，而被列為國家一級古蹟。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 1-4, Shuimuding, Changbin Township, Taitung County 962, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Baxian Cave Visitor Center is located at Baxian Cave with geological sights and pre-historic sites. It is located on a cliff, with tens of naturally corroded sea caves, facing the sea in Changbin Township of Taitung County. These caves were originally at water level, but they are now scattered on a cliff face 150 meters high. It is due to the waves corroding the softer parts of the rock face during the process of the rising of crust in the eastern coastal regions. Bashian Caves currently has trails leading to all sea caves. Out of which, Lingyan Cave is the biggest; Kunlun Cave is the highest, being 130 meters high; and others include Chienyuan Cave, Joucheng Cave, Hailay Cave, Chaoyin Cave, Yongan Cave, and Shuilian Cave. Most caves were occupied by altars, so the caves have quite a religious atmosphere. Bashian Caves is also a integral pre-historic site. A rich pre-cermaic culture from the Paleolithic Age was once discovered here, named "Changbin Culture." It is the oldest pre-historic cultural site known to date in Taiwan. It has been listed as a Grade I National Historic Site due to its importance.

nameZh: 八卦山脈生態遊客中心(灰面鵟鷹主題館)
addressZh: 彰化市卦山路13-7號
descriptionZh: 「八卦山脈生態遊客中心」位於八卦山風景區北邊，鄰近八卦山大佛，是全國第一座以灰面鵟鷹生態為示主題的遊客中心，並提供八卦山風景區旅遊相關資訊。本場館內部包括灰面鵟鷹主題展示區、文創作展示區、八卦山風景區步道及自行車道介紹、猛禽介紹區、小型劇場、地方特產展示區等。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 13-7, Guashan Rd., Changhua City, Changhua County 500, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Baguashan Ecological Visitor Center is located to the north of the Tri-Mountain Buddha Landscape, near the Eight Trigram Mountains Buddhas. It is the first grey-faced buzzard ecology-themed visitor center in Taiwan, providing tourism info near the Eight Trigram Mountains Buddha Landscape. The visitor center offers a grey-faced buzzard exhibition area, cultural and creative exhibition area, Eight Trigram Mountains Buddha Landscape trails and cycling route info, birds of prey info area, small theater, and local souvenir exhibition area.

addressZh: 臺東縣成功鎮三仙里基翬路87號
descriptionZh: 三仙台全島面積約22公頃，最高點約海拔77公尺，四周珊瑚礁環繞，地質屬都巒山層。由安山岩礫石與凝灰岩組成的火山集塊岩，在強烈風化、海蝕作用下，形成海蝕溝、壺穴、海蝕柱、海蝕凹壁、隧道型海蝕門等地形。三仙台原是一處岬角，因海水侵蝕成為離岸島。早期這裡為阿美族人養羊的地方，故Pisirian(阿美族語，意為養羊的地方)。島上3座巨大岩峰，傳說呂洞賓、李鐵拐、何仙姑曾登臨其上，三台因而得名。橫跨海岸及三仙台島的八拱橋，有如長龍臥波，呼應「八仙過海」的傳奇。島上有天工巧的海蝕地景，以及珍貴的濱海植物。晨昏時刻，漁船在定置漁場作業的景像，更豐富了三仙台的海岸風畫。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 87, Jihui Rd., Chenggong Township, Taitung County 961, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The island of Sanxiantai has an area of 22 hectares, and has an altitude of 77 meters at the highest point. It is surrounded by coral reefs on all four sides. Its geography belongs to the Tuluanshan Formation family. It is a volcanic agglomerate comprised of andesite gravels and tuff. Weathering and sea erosions formed sea grooves, potholes, stacks, sea notches, and tunnel-shaped sea arches. sea erosion Sanxiantai was originally a headland, which only became an island after severe sea erosion. Initially, the Amis tribe raised their sheep here; hence the name Pisirian (Amis: place to raise sheep). There are 3 great rock peaks on the island. Legend says Lü Dongbin, Li Tieguai, and He Xian'gu once climbed up. This is how it got its name. The 8 Arched Bridge bridging the coast and Sanxiantai Island is like a dragon lying on the waves, corresponding to the legend of "The Eight Immortals Crossing the Sea." There are magnificent sea erosion landscape and precious coastal plants on the island. At twilight, the scene of fishing boats on the sea in their daily routine even more so enriched the coastal scenery of Sanxiantai.

nameZh: 三芝遊客中心及名人文物館
addressZh: 新北市三芝區埔坪里埔頭坑164-2號
descriptionZh: 三芝遊客中心位於群山環繞的山坡地上，全區視野遼闊，除了提供遊客舒適寬敞的休憩空間，也可進行遊諮詢、展場介紹與資料索取，方便又多元。主體建築仿唐代建築設計，色調古樸優雅，展現十足融合典與現代的特殊品味。名人文物館裡展示三芝四位名人的生平貢獻，有台灣首位醫學博士—杜聰明、台灣首位國際作曲家—江也、第一位直選總統—李登輝、政治先鋒—傳奇人物盧修一，藉著他們的生平故事，讓遊客了解更多關三芝的佳話美談，藉由名人文物館的氣息薰陶，享受心靈洗滌，擁有嶄新的知性遊憩方式。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 164-2, Putoukeng, Sanzhi Dist., New Taipei City 252, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Sanzhi Visitor Center is located on a hill surrounded by mountains. The site offers a wide view, providing the visitors with a comfortable and spacious leisure space. It also provides inquiry services, exhibition info, and info leaflets. It is diverse and convenient. The main building mimics the architectural design from the Tang Dynasty with a traditional and elegant color scheme. It fully exhibits a special taste of both modern and classical. The Gallery exhibits the contributions of 4 famous persons of Sanzhi: The first medical doctor, Du Congming; the first international composer, Jiang Ye; the first publicaly-elected president, Li Denghui; and the legendary politician, Lu Xiuyi. Their life stories help to illustrate the stories of Sanzhi. The visitors here are granted an enlightening and soul-cleansing leisure time in the Gallery's elegant atmosphere.

addressZh: 屏東縣東港鎮大潭路169號
descriptionZh: 大鵬灣遊客中心為交通部觀光局大鵬灣國家風景區管理處所設置，主要提供轄區及周邊景點簡介摺頁及遊諮詢（包含食、宿、遊、購、行資訊），遊客中心內設置有漂書站、親子廁所、哺乳室、簡介影片簡廳…等等，主要服務人員由管理處志工輪值，除團體預約導覽解說及觀賞簡介影片服務外，遊客中心內有小螢幕隨時播放簡介影片供遊客觀賞。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 169, Datan Rd., Donggang Township, Pingtung County 928, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Dapeng Bay Visitor Center is established by Dapeng Bay National Scenic Area Administration Division of the Tourism Bureau, The Ministry of Transportation and Communications. It primarily provides tourist attraction leaflets and tourism inquiry services of the surrounding areas and areas within its jurisdiction (including food, accommodations, travel, shopping, transportation). There are also book-crossing stations, family washroom, breast-feeding room, and video showrooms in the Visitor Center. It is staffed by volunteers from the Administration Division. Other than offering guided tours for group reservations and video-showing, the Visitor Center also has small screens showing info videos at all times.

addressZh: 臺東市松江路一段500號
descriptionZh:
小野柳位於富岡漁港北方的海域，是東部海岸最南端的風景據點，因為地形和岩石在種類上，與北關的野柳外貌相似，因此被稱為「小野柳」。
此地巨大的珊瑚礁群曲折迷離，岩上並有蔓榕生長，景觀十分特殊。
彷彿配合海的律動和藍天的變化，形成驚人的自然景觀，是賞奇岩、坐臥沉思、觀海聽浪、賞魚戲水、看寄居蟹玩耍的好去處！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 500, Sec. 1, Songjiang Rd., Taitung City, Taitung County 950, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Xiaoyeliu is located on the sea north to Fugang Fishery Harbor, and the southernmost scenic spot on the eastern coast. Its geographical composition and rock type are similar to that of Yehliu of Beiguan, hence the name "Xiaoyeliu." There are great coral reefs in this area with ficus growing on top of rocks. They are quite a unique sight to behold. Magnificent natural sceneries formed as if in accordance with the sways of the sea and the changes of the sky. It is a great place to view wondrous rocks, contemplate, listen to the sea, play with water, and enjoy the view of hermit crabs!

nameZh: 新太平洋一號店 奚卜蘭遊客中心
addressZh: 花蓮縣豐濱鄉靜浦村8-1號
descriptionZh: 太平洋左邊的心，東海岸右邊的家。 秀姑巒溪流向大海的終點，新太平洋美學面向世界的起點。新太平洋 the NEW Pacific Style / 是面向大海，面向世界。一種源於山與海的生活態度和美學。雅比斯團隊在東海岸的實體據點，引領旅人認識與走入部落，和東海岸做朋友！傳布部落的自我發聲，被更多人看見。這是夢想坐落在東海岸的家，全台首創的共創式遊客服務中心、人與人的交流平台。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: The New Pacific 1 - Xipulan Visitor Center
addressEn: No. 8-1, Jingpu, Fengbin Township, Hualien County 977, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The heart at the left of the Pacific Ocean; the home at the right of the eastern coast. Xiuguluan River flows toward the end of the sea; new Pacific Ocean aesthetics face toward the beginning of the world. New Pacific Ocean, the NEW Pacific Style / To face the sea and the world. Originates from the living attitudes and aesthetics of the mountains and the sea. Jabez's physical stronghold on the eastern coast, leading the travelers to understand and enter the tribes, becoming friends with the eastern coast! Convey the tribe's self-voice to be seen by more people. This is the home dream lands on the eastern coast. The first co-created Visitor Center in Taiwan, the exchange platform from person to person.

addressZh: 新北市石門區德茂里下員坑33-6號
descriptionZh: 位於白沙灣入口旁的北海岸及觀音山國家風景區管理處，設有白沙灣遊客中心，於2002年正式成立，為灣第11處國家風景區。整體建築不同於一般的設計規劃，建築層次與緩和的斜坡串連，將停車場、廣場沙灘的活動相互融合，減低建築高度視覺，提供屋頂草地與平台的活動空間，改善人與地景及建築的傳二元關係，讓建築像大樹岩石一樣融入地景，造型極具生態理念。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 33-6, Xiayuankeng, Shimen Dist., New Taipei City 253, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Baisha Bay Visitor Center of The North Coast and Guanyinshan National Scenic Area Administration Division is located to the side of the entrance to Baisha Bay. It was established in 2002 as the 11th national scenic area of the bay. The entire structure is different from regular design planning. The buliding's levels and easing slopes in series, fusing the activities of the parking lot and plaza beach, reducing the visual height of the building. It provides a rooftop lawn and platform activity space, improving the transmission of binary relationship between man, landscape, and architecture. It allows the building to merge into the landscape like tree rocks; the appearance exhibits ecological ideals.

nameZh: 伊達邵管理站暨遊客中心
addressZh: 南投縣魚池鄉日月村文化街127號
descriptionZh: 伊達邵遊客中心位於日月潭伊達邵碼頭旁，日月潭搭船遊湖必經之地，船型建築的外觀成為日月潭另一美麗焦點，服務中心內提供日月潭影片介紹、日月潭電子套票、導覽摺頁、互動式導覽機等各項資訊與務設施，並提供旅遊諮詢與休憩服務，期待您的造訪。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 127, Wenhua St., Yuchi Township, Nantou County 555, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Ita Thao Visitor Center is located beside the Ita Thao Wharf in Sun Moon Lake, on the way to take boats on the Sun Moon Lake. Its boat-shaped building has become another beautiful landmark of Sun Moon Lake. The Visitor Center provides Sun Moon Lake info videos, e-ticket sets, tour info leaflets, interactive tour machines, and other info and facilities, as well as inquiry and leisure services for the guests. We look forward to serving you.

nameZh: 日月潭國家風景區管理處暨向山遊客中心
addressZh: 南投縣魚池鄉水社村中山路599號
descriptionZh: 向山遊客中心位處台21線水社隧道附近，前棟為辦公處所，後棟則為遊客中心。遊客中心展場包含「水沙連-產業館」、「日昇月恆-藝廊」、「潭情日月-自然人文館」及「多媒體影音播放室」等；其中「業館」網羅了大日月潭地區的陶藝、紙藝、工藝、酒類、紅茶及農特產等特色產業，並提供產業資訊及遊諮詢，「藝廊」以潭區附近工藝名家作品展為主題，「多媒體影音播放室」則有3D立體多媒體簡介，給遊客意想不到的影音震撼，期待您的造訪。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Sun Moon Lake National Scenic Area Administration
addressEn: No. 599, Zhongshan Rd., Yuchi Township, Nantou County 555, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: No. 599, Zhongshan Rd., Yuchi Township, Nantou County 555, Taiwan (R.O.C.)

addressZh: 花蓮縣瑞穗鄉中山路三段215號
descriptionZh: 秀姑巒溪全長約104公里，為台灣東部最大之河川。喜愛玩水的大小朋友，請到此體驗驚險刺激的泛舟活動，泛舟全長約24公里，沿途有壯闊的峽谷以及林業景觀欣賞，更有豐富的鳥類(愛鳥者天堂)、魚群種類繁息，彷彿生態寶庫一樣。有如其名的激流、險灘考驗大家同舟的團隊精神及鬥志。遊客中心外觀仿自原住民傳統建築，外廣場巨大的守護神雕像保護著過往的旅客。有著偌大的大廳可供到訪的遊客們怡然歇息，後方還有涼亭可一邊泡茶聊天一邊眺望秀姑巒溪河道風景。親切的服務人員提供你旅途上的建議及解說，加上俱全的介紹地圖文宣，化解你心中所有疑問。喜歡為自己買一點紀念的你，有精美的原住民部落T恤、花東秀麗的明信片及帽子、筆記本等選擇，也有紀念章可以蓋下足跡。有多樣的花草樹木，可以租借一台腳踏車，悠閒輕騎享受大自然芬多香、鄉間田園風光。明亮的遊客中心還提供充足飲用水、影片播放、哺乳室等各種方便服務。歡迎大家進來坐坐！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 215, Sec. 3, Zhongshan Rd., Ruisui Township, Hualien County 978, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Xiuguluan River has a total length of 104 km. It is the largest river in eastern Taiwan. Adults and children who love playing with water, please come to this place to experience the thrilling rafting activities. The rafting has a total length of 24 km. On the way, there are magnificent gorges, and forestry sceneries to enjoy, as well as a wealth of birds (paradise for bird-lovers), and fish species, as if a ecological treasure cove. The water torrents and rapids true to its name are challenges of everyone's teamwork and willpower. The appearance of the visitor center mimics the traditional buildings of the aboriginal people. The gigantic guardian statue on the plaza protects the past travelers. The huge main hall provides a resting spot for visitors; the kiosk at the back, so the visitors can enjoy a cup of tea and chat a little while enjoying the sceneries of Xiuguluan River. Kind and considerate service personnel provides you with recommendations and explanations for your journey, as well as comprehensive introductions to the map and texts to dissolve all the questions in your heart. For people who likes to buy themselves some memorials, there are exquisite aboriginal tribal T-shirts, beautiful Hualien postcards and hats, notebooks, and other options, as well as stamps to imprint your footprint. There is a diversity of flowers and trees. Rent a bike, ride in leisure to enjoy the fragrant phytoncides of Mother Nature, and the countryside sceneries. The bright visitor center also provides a sufficient amount of drinking water, video-playing, breast-feeding rooms, and other kind of convenient services. Welcome and enjoy!

nameZh: 車埕管理站暨遊客中心
addressZh: 南投縣水里鄉車埕村民權巷127號
descriptionZh: 本位於鐵道文化廣場前，遊客中心建築全棟以日式建築規格並使用檜木打造，提供旅途需要幫忙之遊客處短暫休息放鬆的場所，內部進駐富有轄內豐富知識的專業人員為您提供相關的本地旅遊諮詢服務訪。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 127, Minquan Ln., Shuili Township, Nantou County 553, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Originally located before the Railway Cultural Plaza, the building of the visitor center adopts a Japanese style, and is built with cypress wood. It provides guests that require help on their journey with a place to rest. Knowledgeable profressionals are stationed here to provide you with relevant local tourism inquiry services.

addressZh: 南投縣名間鄉名松路二段181號
descriptionZh: 八卦山風景區北起大肚溪，南抵濁水溪，東側為南投盆地，西臨彰化平原，面積約22,000公頃，範圍涵彰化縣的彰化市、花壇鄉、大村鄉、芬園鄉、員林市、社頭鄉、田中鎮、二水鄉及南投縣的南投市、名鄉等10鄉鎮市，成南北狹長地形，全區劃分為八卦山、百果山、松柏嶺三大遊憩系統。松柏嶺遊客中心位於139乙線9.5k處，提供八卦山各遊憩資源及景點特色介紹，並有自行車體驗及多媒體片導覽欣賞等服務。松柏嶺為著名茶產區，因此遊客中心除了展示製茶的歷史、種類及過程外，還設有藝文化展示空間，讓遊客一同體驗茶文化。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 181, Sec. 2, Mingsong Rd., Mingjian Township, Nantou County 551, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Eight Trigram Mountains Buddha Landscape extends from Dadu River in the north, to Zhoshui River in the south, with Nantou Basin on the east, and Changhua Plateau on the west. It has an area of 22,000 hectares, encompassing Changhua City of Changhua County, Huatan Township, Dacun Township, Fenyuan Township, Yuanlin City, Shetou Township, Tianzhong Township, Eshui Township, Nantou City of Nantou County, and Ming Township. It stretches south and northwards in a long and narrow shape. The entire area is divided into Baguashan, Baiguoshan, and Songboling. Songboling Visitor Center is located at 9.5k point on County Highway 139. It provides info on leisure resources and featured scenic spots, as well as cycling experience and multimedia video tours. Songboling is renowned for its tea production; therefore, the visitor center also exhibits the history of tea-making, types and processes, on top of an artistic cultural exhibition area to let the visitors experience the culture together.

addressZh: 花蓮縣壽豐鄉鹽寮村大坑5號
descriptionZh:
花蓮遊客中心是本風景區最北端的服務據點，座落於花蓮縣壽豐鄉台11線公路南下8公里的山坡上，視野遼闊，是遠眺太平洋的絕佳點。中心內部設有介紹全區自然、人文資源及東部海岸沿線旅遊據點的展示室及可容納81人的多媒體簡報室，遊客在開始遊覽本區之前，可以在此諮詢相關的旅遊資訊。
遊客中心側旁的水塘山坡復育鐵砲百合花，四月至五月底百合盛開時沿著周邊景觀步道，縱覽花海在微風中搖曳波動，如詩如歌般令人滿心歡喜。
由遊客中心往北可到海岸山脈北界所在的嶺頂岬，在此可一覽花蓮溪與太平洋交會，所激起的「洄瀾」美景，是以花蓮港昔日又名「洄瀾港」。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 5, Dakeng, Shoufeng Township, Hualien County 974, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Hualien Visitor Center is the northernmost service location of this scenic area, located on the hill, 8km on Provincial Highway 11 in Shoufeng Township of Hualien County. It has a broad view, and is a great place to gaze out at the Pacific Ocean. There is an exhibition room that introduces the natural and cultural resources, and tourism info along the eastern coast, as well as a multimedia conference room that can accommodate up to 81 people. Before heading out on a tour in this area, the guests can check up on the relevant info here. The Shuitang Hill on the side of the visitor center cultivates Easter lilies. From April to the end of May, when the lilies bloom, follow the scenic route to see the sea of flowers swaying in the breeze; it is as joyful as a sonnet. Head north from the visitor center to reach Lingdingjia where the northern boundary of Haian Range is. There, you can see the spectacular view of whirling waves created by Hualien River merging with the Pacific Ocean. It is also the reason why Hualien was known as Whirling Wave Pier in the past.

addressZh: 新北市金山區磺港路171-2號
descriptionZh: 金山遊客中心位於金山獅頭山海濱公園之入口，是健行獅頭山、賞燭臺雙嶼必經之處，假日期間遊客絡不絕，除了鄰近的金山獅頭山登山步道，可以鍛鍊體魄、保持身心健康。金山遊客中心的地利之便以及心和善的服務人員可提供您豐富充實的遊樂資訊，相信是您遊旅金山時最佳的旅遊小幫手，讓您的旅程加盡興舒暢。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 171-2, Huanggang Rd., Jinshan Dist., New Taipei City 208, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Jinshan Visitor Center is located at the entrance to Jinshan Shitoushan Park, on the hiking trail to Shitoushan and Shutaishangfeng. It's highly populated by tourists during weekends. Other than the nearby Jinshan Shitoushan hiking trail, visitors can train their physique and maintain a physical and psychological health. Jinshan Visitor Center's convenience and kind service personnel can provide you with a wealth of recreational info. They are your best helpers while touring Jinshan to make your journeys even more pleasurable.

addressZh: 宜蘭縣蘇澳鎮江夏路85號
descriptionZh: 南方澳遊客中心依山傍水並緊鄰香火鼎盛南方澳進安宮，整體建築係以「綠建築」為設計目標，規劃為個具有機能活化與環境融合、善用天然資源而達到節能減碳效果的現代親和空間，館內展示以漁村與漁業文化的各項元素進行設計，展現南方澳在地的特色。內容包含東北角暨宜蘭海岸的自然生態、海洋文遊憩景點及蘇澳、南方澳地區的旅遊資訊等，讓民眾能夠深入瞭解蘇澳地區的濕地生態、漁村文化、冷及海鮮美食等豐富多樣的遊憩資源，體驗宜蘭的美麗與感動。這個能與山海共呼吸的綠建築遊客中心，已成為南方澳地區的入口意象及新地標，並為地方文化推廣平台。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 85, Jiangxia Rd., Su’ao Township, Yilan County 270, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Nanfangou Visitor Center sits by the mountain and river, and is right next to the Jinan Temple, which has a lot of worshipers. The overall building adopts a design goal of a "green architecture," in making a modern friendly space that is function-activating, blends in with the environment, utilizes natural resources, thus saving energy and reducing carbon emissions. It exhibits fishing village and fishery culture's various elements in conducting the designs to demonstrate the local features of Nanfangou. The contents include Northeast Coast and Yiland Coastal natural ecology, ocean tourism scenic spots, and tourism info on Suao and Nanfangou, enabling the general public to understand the wetland ecology, fishery culture, coldness, seafood, and a variety of recreational resources of the Suao area in depth. This green visitor center that breathes with the mountains and oceans has become the entrance imagery and new landmark of the Nanfangou region; it also promotes platform for the local culture.

addressZh: 連江縣南竿鄉仁愛村95-2號
descriptionZh: 南竿遊客中心提供馬祖相關影片觀賞、觀光諮詢、摺頁索取等服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 95-2, Ren’ai Vil., Nangan Township, Lienchiang County 209, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Nangan Visitor Center provides Matsu-related video-viewing, tourism inquiry services, leaflets, and other services.

addressZh: 高雄市美濃區獅山里竹門路14-2號
descriptionZh: 本園區位於高雄市美濃區擁有3公頃多綠地，草木扶疏、綠蔭成林、環境清幽，適合婚宴、喜慶、聚會之想場所;並提供住宿、會議、餐飲之服務。亦可預約 DIY 戶外教學活動(紙傘彩繪、新丁板、擂茶等項目)及多元化場地(可露營及各項戶外活動)、蝴蝶生態區(探訪蝴蝶一生的奧秘)，體驗輕鬆自在之樂活時光。另園區於104年由茂林國家風景區管理處提報為交通部觀光局i-center旅遊服務體系第4層級之借問站，提遊客友善旅遊諮詢及多項貼心服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 14-2, Zhumen, Meinong Dist., Kaohsiung City 843, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Park is located in Meinong District of Kaohsiung City with 3 hectares of lawn. It has vegetation and forests, and the serene environment is ideal for weddings, celebrations, and gatherings. It also provides accommodations, meetings, meals, and other services. Guests can also reserve DIY outdoor educational activities (paining paper umbrellas, xindingban, lei cha, and other options), a diversified location (for camping and other outdoor events), and the butterfly ecological area (visit the mystery of a butterfly's life), experiencing a relaxing and LOHAS time. Additionally, the Park was submitted by Maolin National Scenic Area Administration Division in 2015 as a Level 4 Info Center in the i-center tourism service system from the Tourism Bureau, Ministry of Transportation and Communications.

nameZh: 埔里管理站暨遊客中心
addressZh: 南投縣埔里鎮中山路四段191號
descriptionZh:
為提升埔里、魚池遊憩系統的觀光旅遊品質，交通部觀光局日月潭國家風景區管理處於國道6號下愛蘭交流道的台14線道路旁，設立埔里遊客中心，以提供遊客便利、友善的觀光遊憩諮詢服務，方便遊客進入日月潭埔里或清境農場前之北端服務樞紐。
亮眼的建築外觀勢為台14線的美麗新焦點，配合節能減碳政策已取得綠建築標章，營造出具國際水準的觀光旅遊服務品質。而服務中心提供的i系統服務台、好行轉運、智慧旅遊、在地產業等資訊與服務設施，除了為來往的國內外遊客提供完善、便利且優質的觀光遊憩諮詢及旅運服務之外，同時也將扮演連結日月潭美景與埔里生態產業間的重要角色。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 191, Sec. 4, Zhongshan Rd., Puli Township, Nantou County 545, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: In order to improve Puli and Yushi's tourism quality in the recreational system, the Sun Moon Lake National Scenic Area Administration of the Tourism Bureau of the Ministry of Transportation and Communications established the Puli Visitor Center besides Provincial Highway 14 by Ailan Interchange on National Freeway 6 to provide the tourists with a convenient and friendly tourism inquiry service for the ease of the visitors to enter the northern service hub before Sun Moon Lake, Puli, or Qingjing Farm. The eye-catching building's appearance is the new beautiful focus of Provincial Highway 14. In correspondence with the energy saving and carbon reduction policies, it has obtained the Green Building Label, creating an international-standard tourism service quality. The i-system service counter, Taiwan Trip transfer, smart travel, local industry info, services and facilities provided by the visitor center, in addition to provide comprehensive, convenient, and premium tourism inquiry services and transfer services for both domestic and international visitors, they will also play the integral role of linking the sceneries of Sun Moon Lake and Puli's ecological industries.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區至善路2段221號
descriptionZh: 至2016年底，邁入開館91週年的國立故宮博物院，已發展成為一座國際級現代化的博物館，不僅持續提研究與推廣的能量，同時也勠力於藏品徵集，目前總數近70萬件，為全球首屈一指的華夏文物典藏重鎮近年來，故宮更全力推動數位典藏國家型科技計畫，讓院藏文物透過數位科技產生新穎的面貌，不僅使示更為活潑，也在文化創意產業上扮演了新世紀博物館創新價值的多元角色。未來的國立故宮博物院，將以南北兩院區共同營運，繼續以文化教育為核心，以世界為高度，以臺灣為地，向全球發聲。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 221, Sec. 2, Zhishan Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The end of 2016 marks the 91 years of service for the National Palace Museum. It has since become a international-standard modern museum. It does not only continue to provide the energy for researches and promotions, it also commits to collecting items. Currently there are almost 700,000 items in the collection, making it the top museum in Chinese relics. In recent years, the National Palace Museum has been committed to promoting the National Digital Archives Program, creating an new face for the collections via digital technology. This not only enlivens the museum, but also makes it the diversified role of an innovative value for an new-era museum in the Cultural and Creative Industries. In the future, the National Palace Museum will have both northern and southern branches in operation. It will continue to adopt cultural education as its core principle, and speak to the globe, at the height of the world, from the basis of Taiwan.

nameZh: 國立故宮博物院南部院區
addressZh: 嘉義縣太保市故宮大道888號
descriptionZh:
為「平衡南北‧文化均富」，帶動臺灣中南 部地區的文化、教育、社會、經濟發展，民國93年12月15日行政院核定在嘉義縣太保市設置國立故宮博物院南部院區，定位為「亞洲藝術文化博物館」。
國立故宮博物院之北部院區與南部院區，兩者位階平行，相輔相成，期實現南北文化雙星雙亮點，達成藝術均富的理念。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 888, Gugong Blvd., Taibao City, Chiayi County 612, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: In order to "balance the south and north, equalize cultural wealth" and motivate the local culture, education, society, economic development in central and southern regions. On December 15th, 2004, the Executive Yuan approved to establish the National Palace Museum Southern Branch in Taibao City of Chiayi County, and positioned it to be a "Asian Cultural Art Museum." The Southern and Northern Branches of the National Palace Museum are equal in position that supports each other in order to realize the ideal of "two attractions at the south and north, equally wealthy in art."

addressZh: 臺北市中正區襄陽路2號
descriptionZh: 國立臺灣博物館成立於1908年，是臺灣現存歷史最悠久的自然史博物館。建築樣式採仿文藝復興時期古臘多立克式，其壯碩的建築形態與優美的古典雕塑工藝，是臺灣近代難得一見的建築瑰寶。1998年經內部評定為「國定古蹟」。臺博館見證百年來臺灣自然與人文的演變，累積藏品逾11萬件，包括臺灣最珍的動、植物與地質學標本，以及最精華的民族與人類學文物，是民眾深入認識臺灣的櫥窗。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 2, Xiangyang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The National Taiwan Museum was founded in 1908, and is the oldest Museum of Natural History in Taiwan to date. Its architectural adopts the ancient Greek Doric structure from the renaissance period. Its magnificent architectural style and elegant classical statue crafts is a rare treasure in recent years in Taiwan. It has been granted the status of a "national historic site" internally in 1998. The Taiwan Museum stood witness to the changes in natural and cultural in Taiwan, and has over 110,000 items in its collection, including Taiwan's most precious animal, plant, and geological samples, as well as the most essential ethnic anthropological artifacts. It is the window for the general public to get to know Taiwan in depth.

nameZh: 國立臺灣博物館古生物館
addressZh: 臺北市中正區襄陽路25號
descriptionZh: 國立臺灣博物館土銀展示館落成於1933（昭和8）年，前身為日本勸業銀行臺北支店（分行），現為臺北市定古蹟。館內因展出特暴龍、迅掠龍、三角龍及翼龍等多種恐龍標本而有「恐龍博物館」之稱，長期以來廣受兒喜愛。展區從寒武紀的三葉蟲、泥盆紀的魚類、中生代的恐龍、新生代的哺乳動物等各種化石紀錄，揭地球生命演化的奧秘。另展出金庫、早期的銀行帳冊、土地實物債券、金融事務機器等難得一見的珍貴融文物史料。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: 2F., No. 25, Xiangyang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Are you a dinosaur lover? Do you find the mysteries of the ancient creatures incredible? Do you want to explore more of this fantastic world? Then come to the only restaurant in Taiwan where you can be close and dine with the dinosaurs! Come and see the dinosaur evolution display and learn about the evolution of Earth for the past 460 billion years. If you like to explore the mysteries of earth and its ancient creatures, don't miss this unique dining environment.

nameZh: 國立臺灣博物館南門館
addressZh: 臺北市中正區南昌路一段1號
descriptionZh: 國立臺灣博物館南門園區為國定古蹟，前身為「臺灣總督府專賣局臺北南門工場」，創建於1899年，為製造及試驗樟腦、鴉片等兩大專賣品的重要生產基地。園區內有多處古蹟修復及遺構現地展示，另設有適親子共學的兒童探索室、介紹食品安全的新農有機樂活玩特展、不定期推出的動植物標本微型展等，搭各種有趣的體驗與教學活動，十分適合親子同行。每週六定期舉辦田裡有腳印市集，提供具「綠保標章認證的農產給關心地球環境的你。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 1, Sec. 1, Nanchang Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Taiwan Museum Nanmen Park is a national historic site. It was formerly the "Taiwan Sotokufu Mansard Taipei Nanmen Factory," constructed in 1899. It was the base of operation for the production and testing of camphor and opium. There are many monuments in repair and relics on display, as well as family-friendly children exploration room, the New Farmer's Organic LOHAS Exhibition that introduces food safety, irregular animal and plant micro samples, as well as many other fun experiences and educational activities ideal for families. A Footprint in the Farmland Market is held is regularly on every Saturday, providing agricultural products with Green Label certifications for people who cares about the Earth.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區南海路47號
descriptionZh: 國立臺灣藝術教育館(以下稱本館)設立於1957年，為我國首座公立藝術館，也是唯一以推動「藝術教育」核心業務的政府機構。館務以「人與藝術」的關係為中心理念，配合教育部政策，推動學校藝術教育扎工作，並結合各界共同推展美感教育，期在潛移默化中，達到全民「藝術生活化、生活藝術化」的目標。本館位於具有自然與人文特色的南海學園園區，包含南海劇場、南海書院2大建築體，是藝術發表、學習培育創意人才重要的園地。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 47, Nanhai Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The National Taiwan Arts Education Center is founded in 1957, and was the first public museum in Taiwan, as well as the only government agency with promoting "artistic education" as its core policy. Its central principle focuses the relationship between "man and art". In correspondence with policies of the Ministry of Education, it promotes the Art Education Sting efforts in schools, and promotes aesthetics education in collaboration with various industries. It expects to subtly achieve the goal of "art in life, life as art." It is located on the campus of Nanhai Academy, rich in natural and cultural features, which includes Nanhai Theater and Nanhai Library. It is an important ground to exhibit art, and learn how to cultivate creative talents.

addressZh: 臺中市和平區福壽路14號
descriptionZh: 梨山文物陳列館成立於民國60年，座落於梨山往福壽山農場方向，主要展示中橫開拓歷史、原住民族泰文化及梨山地區自然生態。梨山文物陳列館每日開放時間為上午9點到下午5點，歡迎遊客預約導覽參觀。陳列館分為上下兩層，一樓右側為「橫貫公路開發史紀念館」，這裡記載中橫築路的英雄事蹟以及當年鑿橫貫公路的艱辛歷史；左側為「中橫地質地形館」，描繪有關太魯閣至谷關之間的生態。二樓則有居於梨山地區的原住民族─泰雅族的文化展示區及傳統建築。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 14, Fushou Rd., Heping Dist., Taichung City 424, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Lishan Artifac Museum was founded in 1971, located in Lishan toward the Fushoushan farm. It primarily exhibits the pioneering history of the central area, The Atayal aboriginal culture, and the natural ecology of the Lishan area. Lishan Artifact Museum opens daily from 9AM to 5PM. Guests can make reservations for a guided tour. There are two floors to the museum. On the right of the first floor is the "Central Cross-Island Highway Pioneering History Memorial Hall," which keeps a record of the feats and histories of the construction of the highway. On the left is the "Central Cross-Island Highway Geography and Topography Hall," which depicts the ecology from Taroko to Guguan. The second floor exhibits the culture and traditional buildings of the Atayal tribe-the aboriginal tribe living in the Lishan area.

addressZh: 臺中市和平區梨山里中正路91-2號
descriptionZh:
梨山遊客中心的前身是梨山賓館附屬的「清心閣」，原本是作為販售飲料、底片與紀念品的地方，現在改建為梨山遊客中心。遊客中心外觀為紅瓦中式建築，與旁邊的梨山賓館相互呼應。
遊客中心提供梨山風景區的旅遊資訊、景點介紹、泰雅服飾體驗、簡易醫療服務、交通路況查詢、旅客見反應等服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 91-2, Zhongzheng Rd., Heping Dist., Taichung City 424, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Lishan Visitor Center is the former Qinxinge (House of Clear Heart) as part of the Lishan Hotel, originally for sales of beverages, camera films and souvenirs, now renovated as a visitor center. The exterior of Lishan Visitor Center is built with red tiles as a Chinese-style architecture, in echo with the adjacent Lishan Hotel. Lishan Visitor Center offers such services as tourist information, attraction introductions, Atayal clothing try-on, simple medical services, traffic updates, visitor feedbacks and so on.

addressZh: 臺東縣成功鎮信義里新村路25號
descriptionZh: 都歷遊客中心設有五大區，分別為阿美區、海洋區、景觀區、互動體驗區、自行車道區；阿美區擺設了阿美族傳統文物及服飾，且還有AR互動體驗牆，可現場學習阿美族舞蹈喔；海洋區介紹東海岸常見生態及沿岸地形；景觀區介紹東海岸歷史人文、自然生態、旅遊景點、地質景觀；互動體驗區，設置了多媒體互驗，非常適合親子互動喔；自行車道區則介紹史前文化及賞鯨、衝浪的小短片；都歷遊客中心是一處教於樂的場所，歡迎各位前來觀賞。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 25, Xincun Rd., Chenggong Township, Taitung County 961, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Douli Visitor Center consists of five major areas: the Amis area, the ocean area, the scenic area, the interactive experiential area, the cycling area. In the Amis area are traditional Amis artifacts and costumes, plus the AR interactive wall where one can learn Amis dances on the spot. The ocean area gives introduction on the East Coast ecology and geographic terrains along the coast. The scenic area introduces the East Coast history and humanity, nature & ecology, tourist attractions, terrain/landscapes. The interactive area is installed with interactive multimedia, highly suitable for parent-child interaction. The cycling area offers videos on prehistoric culture, whale watching and surfing. Douli Visitor Center is both an educational and recreational place. All are welcome.

addressZh: 新北市萬里區野柳里港東路167-1號
descriptionZh: 野柳地質公園，是來到萬里必訪的國際知名景點，全世界很難找到如此奇美的地景，因為海水侵蝕與岩石風化等影響，讓海邊變成地質教室和奇石樂園，風化石、風蝕溝、風蝕崖、孔穴，狹長的岬角，隨處走走，都有驚奇的發現。野柳遊客中心位於野柳地質公園旁，提供民眾服務諮詢及摺頁索取，及多媒體服務還有販售相關紀念品及飲料，供民眾稍作休息。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 167-1, Gangdong, Wanli Dist., New Taipei City 207, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Yehliu Geopark is a must-visit internationally renowned tourist attraction in Wanli. Its wondrous landscape is unparalleled in the world. The impact of sea erosion and rock weathering turns the coastline into a terrain classroom and peculiar rocks haven. On a casual walk, one can easily chance upon striking discoveries such as weathered rocks, wind-eroded dike, wind-eroded cliff, caves, and elongated capes. Yehliu Visitor Center is situated next to the Yehliu Geopark and provides the public with information service, handouts, multimedia service, and sells souvenirs and refreshments. It’s also a place where visitors can take a breather.

nameZh: 新太源藝術工坊花紙文化館
addressZh: 新北市鶯歌區建國路600號
descriptionZh: 新太源從事陶瓷與玻璃轉寫印刷迄今50餘年，2004年投入陶藝創作市場，成立「新太源藝術工坊」，以積多年的厚實技術訴說原創題材，系列作品中往往得見在地特色，及多層次的溫潤美感。除了耕耘台灣更將觸角伸到歐美，並有計劃地結合在地豐富產業資源，推展文化觀光，致力讓陶藝創作的美善風華，進每戶人家。藝術創作的價值，往往不僅是藝術品的本身，更深刻的是與觀賞者的默默交流，平淡無奇蘊含千言萬語，生命一瞬深刻領略的美好感動。一只杯墊、一組杯組，轉型後的新太源，在生活用品的用底子裡添加藝術創作，讓不管是啜飲品嚐或是裝飾陳列間，都多了一份用心生活的怡然滋味。是經濟部中小企業處輔導之優良廠商，並將本公司定位為【新北市鶯歌鎮陶瓷特色產業】，同時也是中民國總統府及外交部致贈外賓之指定禮盒製造商。並於2014年通過新北市產品文化館-新太源藝術工坊花產業文化館。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: Shin Tay Yuan Art Floral Printing Cultural Hall
addressEn: No. 600, Jianguo Rd., Yingge Dist., New Taipei City 239, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: It’s been 50 plus years Shin Tay Yuan Art Floral Printing Cultural Hall was first engaged in pottery, glass and then printing. In 2004, they entered the pottery creation market and set up Shin Tay Yuan Art Workshop, exploring original themes with solid techniques accumulated over many years. In their series of works one can often see localized characteristics and multi-layered beauty and warmth. To cultivate in Taiwan and extend towards the US and Europe, and to systematically incorporate rich local industry resources, we are engaged in promoting cultural tourism and devoted to bringing the beauty and magnificence of ceramic creation into every household. The value of artistic creation often does not lie in the art work itself but, on a deeper level, in the tacit exchange with the viewer. What appears to be plain and basic may contain an entire universe, and there an insight into compelling beauty and truth can register in a flickering moment. In a coaster or a set of cups or other everyday objects, you can see marks of artistic creation by the transformed Shin Tay Yuan. Whether it is for savoring, tasting or for showcasing and decoration, extra attention is given to mindful living and to enjoying the flavors of life as they are. Shin Tay Yuan is an outstanding company receiving assistance & guidance from the Small and Medium Enterprise Administration of the Ministry of Economic Affairs and is positioned as part of the “New Taipei City Yingge Township Ceramics Specialty Industry”, as well as being the gift-pack manufacturer designated by the ROC Presidential Office and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for overseas dignitaries. In 2014, it was passed that Shin Tay Yuan became the Shin Tay Yuan Art Floral Printing Cultural Hall, listed as part of the New Taipei City Commodity Cultural Hall.

nameZh: 新北市立十三行博物館
addressZh: 新北市八里區博物館路200號
descriptionZh: 十三行博物館是北臺灣第一間考古博物館，除了文物展示解說，二樓常設展設有全國首創的兒童考古體室以及完整呈現八里從當代到史前時代的自然環境生態和文化歷史的超逼真實境體驗;此外，來到十三行不容錯過「海中奧秘-水下考古展暨水下考古虛擬實境(VR)」，全長14公尺的3D立體海底隧道、水下考古家的工作室和VR虛擬實境水下考古探險，精采、刺激一整天。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: New Taipei City Shihsanhang Museum of Archaeology
addressEn: No. 200, Museum Rd., Bali Dist., New Taipei City 249, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Shihsanhang Museum of Archaeology was the first archaeological museum in northern Taiwan. In addition to the artefact display & introduction, the Museum features the nation’s unprecedented children’s archeological experiential room as its permanent exhibition on the second floor, as well as the extremely life-like virtual-reality re-presentation of Bali’s complete natural ecology and culture & history from the prehistoric era to the contemporary period. Visitors to the Museum shall not miss out the “Marine Mystery: underwater archeology exhibition and VR simulation of underwater archeology”, featuring a 14-meter 3D submarine tunnel, underwater archeologist studio and VR simulation of underwater archeological exploration. It promises to be a fabulous day full of exciting thrills.

nameZh: 新北市立淡水古蹟博物館
addressZh: 新北市淡水區中正路一段6巷32-2號(郵遞區號:251015)
descriptionZh: 臺灣之窗，世界之門的淡水，是全臺灣文化資產高密度的地方，新北市立淡水古蹟博物館負責管理淡水區有形與無形文化資產，這些珍貴的建築與工藝記錄著自大航海時代以來臺灣與世界的連結，也見證了臺灣政治、經濟、文化等多元歷史。漫步在紅毛城為主的古建築群中，能感受到濃濃的異國風情，是中遊客必到訪之處。目前由博物館管理並對外開放參觀景點包括紅毛城、小白宮、滬尾礮臺、淡水海關碼園區、得忌利士洋行、藝術工坊、多田榮吉故居、滬水一方與程氏古厝等9處景點。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: New Taipei City Tamsui Historical Museum
addressEn: No. 1, Ln. 28, Zhongzheng Rd., Tamsui Dist., New Taipei City 251, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Tamsui, being the window of Taiwan and the door of the world, is a place in Taiwan with highest density of cultural heritage. New Taipei City Tamsui Historical Museum is in charge of managing tangible and intangible cultural assets in the Tamsui district. These precious architectures and craftsmanship record Taiwan’s link with the world since the Great Voyage era, as well as bearing witness to Taiwan’s diverse history in politics, economy and culture. Taking a stroll in the Fort San Domingo-centered ancient building cluster, one can feel an exotic ambience permeating in the air. This is a must-visit attraction for Chinese tourists. Currently 9 tourist attractions managed by the Museum and open to the public include the Fort San Domingo, Tamsui Customs Officer's Residence (Little White House ), Hobe Port, the Tamsui Customs Wharf, Douglas Lapraik & Co, the former residence of Tamsui street head Tada Eikichi, Tamsui Plaza and Cheng Family Abode.

addressZh: 新北市瑞芳區金光路8號
descriptionZh: 黃金博物館為國內第一座以生態博物館為理念的博物館，自2004年11月開館以來，本館一直以「生態博館」的理念，戮力於資源永續經營、生態旅遊，同時結合社區力量，盼能將金瓜石、水湳洞地區珍貴的然生態、礦業遺址、景觀風貌、歷史記憶及人文資產進行妥善的保存。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 8, Jinguang Rd., Ruifang Dist., New Taipei City 224, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Gold Museum is Taiwan’s first museum planned as an eco-museum. Since its inauguration in November 2004, the Museum has adhered to the ideal of an eco-museum, devoted to sustainable management of resources, ecotourism, while working in conjunction with the community hoping to properly preserve precious nature/ecology, mining relics, landscapes, historical memories and cultural heritage in Jinguashi and Shuinandong.

nameZh: 新北市立鶯歌陶瓷博物館
addressZh: 新北市鶯歌區文化路200號
descriptionZh: 新北市立鶯歌陶瓷博物館為臺灣第一座陶瓷主題博物館，記錄臺灣陶瓷文化、展現鶯歌陶瓷特色。透過覽了解台灣陶瓷發展的故事以及國際陶藝與當代陶藝之美。館內設有陶藝研習室及兒童體驗室，可親手體驗創作的樂趣。在戶外的陶瓷藝術園區、三鶯藝術村，開民眾互動體驗，除展覽之外，規劃示範區，展現傳統製陶技法及國際陶藝家駐村創作，讓民眾擁有難忘陶瓷旅程。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: New Taipei City Yingge Ceramics Museum
addressEn: No. 200, Wenhua Rd., Yingge Dist., New Taipei City 239, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: New Taipei City Yingge Ceramics Museum is Taiwan’s first ceramics-themed museum, records Taiwan’s ceramics culture and showcases Yingge ceramics characteristics. The guided tours tell stories of Taiwan’s ceramics development, as well as the beauty of international ceramic art and contemporary ceramic art. The Museum offers a ceramic studio and a children’s hands-on workshop for everyone to experience the pleasure of creation. The outdoor Ceramics Park and Sanying Art Village are open for interactive experience. Besides the exhibitions, a demonstration area is in place to showcase traditional ceramic artistry and creations by international ceramic artists in order for the visitors to enjoy an unforgettable trip of ceramics.

addressZh: 臺東縣綠島鄉南寮村298號
descriptionZh:
綠島遊客中心位於綠島機場前方，是遊覽綠島的第一站。內部設有展示室及多媒體簡報室，詳細介紹綠島的豐富生態和景觀，海底世界也盡收錄其中，美不勝收。遊客在遊覽之前，先到遊客中心稍作停留，將可獲得許多寶貴的資訊。

抵達綠島的遊客，務必前往綠島遊客中心參觀並取得各類旅遊資訊，也是展開多采多姿綠島之旅的第一站。

綠島遊客中心服務台提供給遊客旅遊的諮詢服務及免費簡訊，並設有展覽室，專門介紹綠島地理形成的過程、朝日溫泉的形成原理、並介紹綠島的保育植物生態、動物生態和海底生態等等，如水芫花、梅花鹿、椰子蟹和正在成長的珊瑚群種。

中心內還有綠島人文歷史簡介和文物展覽室，展出綠島人文、地理、珊瑚礁魚類、動植物、旅遊據點等自然及人文資訊，多媒體簡報室播放著15分鐘的綠島簡介影片。

服務台並販售和綠島相關的出版品與紀念品，為遊客留下到此一遊的回憶和紀念。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 298, Nanliao, Ludao Township, Taitung County 951, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Green Island Visitor Center, located in the front of the Green Island Airport, is the first stop in one’s tour of Green Island. The Center has a showcase room and multimedia briefing room explaining in detail Green Island’s rich ecology and landscapes, plus the world under the sea, all dazzling and enticing. Before beginning the tour, visitors can have a short stay in the Visitor Center for the wide range of precious information available there. Visitors, upon arrival, be sure to visit the Green Island Visitor Center and pick up all sorts of travel information, as it’s the first stop in one’s fantastically colorful tour of Green Island. Green Island Visitor Center’s information desk offers visitors travel consultation service and free information. The center is installed with a display room specifically for the introduction on the formation process of Green Island terrains, the formation theory behind the Zhouri Hot Spring and on the conservation of flora and fauna ecology and benthic ecology, e.g., Reef Pemphis, Coconut Crabs, and growing coral cluster species. Also in the Center is a display room for Green Island’s cultural, historical introduction and artifacts, showcasing the local culture, geography, coral reef fish species, flora and fauna, and travel destinations, plus a 15-minute video in the multimedia briefing room on Green Island. At the information desk, publications and souvenirs can be purchased for the preservation of memories and remembrance.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區延平南路98號
descriptionZh: 臺北市中山堂前稱「臺北公會堂」，建築落成於1936 年，整體設計恢弘典雅，為當時為大型公民活動及藝文展演的最佳舞台。1992年由內政部指定為「二級古蹟」；1997年因文化資產保存法的修正，被列為「定古蹟」。雖歷經80年的歷史，中山堂仍繼續綻放熱情與活力，中正廳、光復廳兩大表演廳每年有高達40場的演出，如電影節、藝術節、傳統藝術季、爵士音樂節等皆在此舉行。除了表演藝術之外，中山堂目也開放2樓堡壘廳、3樓臺北書院及4樓劇場咖啡，各自以不同的空間氛圍形塑場地特色，不定期舉辦講座課程及展覽吸引民眾參與，成為大小朋友寓教於樂、兼具教育與休閒之場館。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 98, Yanping S. Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The construction of the Taipei City Public Auditorium, later renamed as Taipei Zhongshan Hall, was completed in 1936 with an overall magnificent, classic and elegant design, serving as an ideal stage for large-scaled civil activities and art & cultural performances at the time. In 1992, it was designated by the Ministry of the Interior as a Class-Two Historical Site, and in 1997 was listed as Municipality-designated Ancient Monument, based on the amended Cultural Heritage Preservation Act. With a history of 80 years, Taipei Zhongshan Hall is still exuding passion and vitality. Every year, the Zhongzheng Auditorium and the Guangfu Auditorium still host up to 40 performances from the likes of the Film Festival, Art Festival, Traditional Art Festival and Jazz Music Festival. Besides being a venue for performance art, the Zhongshan Hall has now also opened up its Fortress Auditorium on the 2nd floor, Taipei Academy on the 3rd floor and Theatre café on the 4th floor, each with unique ambience formed by the spatial characteristics. Seminars, courses and exhibitions are being held aperiodically and attract the participation of the general public. The Zhongshan Hall has become an educational, recreational venue for both adults and children alike.

nameZh: 臺北市立天文科學教育館
addressZh: 臺北市士林區基河路363號
descriptionZh: 臺北市立天文科學教育館所有空間與動線設備，皆考慮了遊憩與停留需求，各處均有服務設施，堪稱是座兼具休閒性、娛樂性與教育等多重特色的現代天文科學教育建築。尤其全天域劇院，更是一座直徑 35 ，外表面被覆金黃色鋁錐面板的圓頂式建築，藉由聲、光、電化等儀器設備，帶給民眾親臨實境的臨感。歡迎各位蒞臨天文館，一同悠遊星海，領略天文之美。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 363, Jihe Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: All the space and line of movement within the Taipei Astronomical Museum has taken into consideration of the need for leisure and pauses. Built in with services and amenities in various spots, the Museum is said to be a modern astronomical science education architecture encompassing multiple features in leisure, entertainment and education. In particularly, its all-dimensional theatre is a dome-shaped architecture measuring 35meters in diameter, covered by golden aluminum cone panels on the exterior. It is hoped to bring to visitors a sense of immediacy via the audio, lighting and electric instruments and equipment. All and sundry are welcome to the Taipei Astronomical Museum to embark on a trip of the milky way and to glimpse into the beauty of the astronomy.

addressZh: 臺北市士林區承德路5段55號
descriptionZh: 臺北市立兒童新樂園前身為位於圓山的臺北市立兒童育樂中心，在95年4月11日兒童育樂中心全園區納入定遺址範圍，因所處地理位置受航高、文化資產保存法、水利法等諸多限制，於原址進行開發、更新及運等受到相當大的影響及限制。 為改善與突破此一侷限，96年10月市府規劃於士林區興建臺北市立兒童新樂園(約5公頃)，與鄰近的臺北立天文館、國立科學教育館、美崙公園、雙溪水域整體規劃，並將「建構臺北兒童新樂園」納入市政白書工作重點，期許打造一座兼具教育、休閒遊憩與文化功能的都會型親子休閒園地，提供市民戶外活動新選擇。 兒童新樂園於103年完工後委由臺北捷運公司營運管理，負責兒童新樂園之經營管理與保管維護事項，以附屬事業規劃、出租及經營管理等業務。 基地北側為基河路臨雙溪，東側為基河路臨美崙公園，南側為士商路臨科學教育館，西側為承德路且預有未來銜接社子輕軌的連接處。附近有天文館、科學教育館、美崙公園以及河濱公園，讓民眾除了可以用臺北兒童新樂園區內的各項遊樂設備外，更可以讓活動動線延伸，創造出一個多元化的享受教育及大然的兒童新樂園，竭誠歡迎前往享受美麗的幸福時光。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 55, Sec. 5, Chengde Rd., Shilin Dist., Taipei City 111, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Taipei Children’s Amusement Park is formerly the Taipei Children's Recreation Center located in Yuanshan. The entire place was categorized as a national archeological site on April 11, 2006. As its geographic location is constrained by height restriction on the flight path, Cultural Heritage Preservation Act and the Water Act, the development, renovation and management of the original site were all met with huge impact and restrictions. To improve and overcome these restrictions, in October 2007, the Taipei City Government developed plans to build the Taipei Children’s Amusement Park in the Shilin District (about 5 hectares), in conjunction with the overall planning of the nearby Taipei Astronomical Museum, the National Taiwan Science Education Center, Meilun Park and the Shuangxi waterways. “The Taipei Children’s Amusement Park Construction” was listed as key priority on the municipal Whitepaper aiming to create an urban parent-child recreational space encompassing educational, leisure & recreational, cultural functions to offer the city residents a new option for outdoor activities. Upon completion of the Park in 2014, the Taipei Rapid Transit Corporation was commissioned for its operation, in charge of its management, maintenance, as well as the planning, renting and management of its auxiliary businesses. The north of the foundation site is the Qihe Road bordering the Xuansi, with the Qihe Road on the east bordering the Meilun Highway, and the Shishang Road on the south bordering the National Taiwan Science Education Center, and with the Chengde Road on the west and later to be planned as a depot to connect with the future Shezi Light Rail Transit. In close proximity to the Taipei Astronomical Museum, the National Taiwan Science Education Center, Meilun Park and the Riverside Park, the Taipei Children’s Amusement Park allows the general public access to not only the various amusement facilities within the Park, but also diversified possibilities for activities that extend to include both education, recreation and nature. All are welcome to the Park for a beautiful and blissful time.

addressZh: 臺北市中正區仁愛路一段17號
descriptionZh: 臺北市青少年發展處以12歲至24歲之青少年為主要服務對象，提供營隊課程、藝文展演、休閒育樂及場租借等服務，營隊課程包括創客教育、服務學習、壯遊體驗、生涯探索、主題工作坊與各種營隊，1樓展區及5樓藝文沙龍不定期展出教育學習與社團成果，地下1、2樓直排輪場及9樓攀岩場可購票進場體驗運，1樓大廳及戶外廣場、3樓臺北演藝廳、4樓舞蹈教室、5樓流行廣場及藝文沙龍、6樓國際會議廳及研室、8樓Live Band體驗中心均可外借辦理活動，9樓創新學習基地辦理創客教育課程，另2樓為臺北市青年涯發展中心提供就業諮詢與媒合服務、3樓為臺北市中正親子館提供幼兒與家人共遊、共學及共享平台，有1樓大廳咖啡簡餐、地下1樓中式餐飲、地下室停車場等周邊服務設施。活動細節及場館租借請逕至官查詢http://www.tcyd.gov.taipei/。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 17, Sec. 1, Ren’ai Rd., Zhongzheng Dist., Taipei City 100, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Taipei City Youth Development Office mainly serves the youth aged between 12 and 24, offering camps, courses, art & cultural performances, leisure & recreation and space rental. The camp/courses include Maker education, service & learning, experiential & adventure, career exploration, themed workshops and all kinds of camps. The exhibition area on Floor 1 and the Youth Art and Culture Salon on Floor 5 hold irregular showings on educational learning and club showcases. One can also buy tickets for admission to the Inline Skating Rink on Basement 1 & 2 and the Rock Climbing Gym on Floor 9. Rental spaces are also available for events organization on the Floor 1 lobby and the outdoor plaza, Floor 3 Taipei Performance Hall, Floor 4 Dance Studio, Floor 5 Pop Plaza, Floor 6 International Conference Hall and Meeting Room, and Floor 8 Live Band Experience Center. In addition, Taipei Youth Career Development Center on Floor 2 provides employment consultation and matching service. The Taipei Zhongzheng Parent-Child Center on Floor 3 offers a co-travelling, co-learning, co-sharing platform for children and families. There are peripheral services and facilities such as coffee and light meals on the Floor 1 lobby, Chinese-style cuisine on Basement 1 and parking on Basement 3 & 4. For event details and space rental, please go to the official website: http://www.tcyd.gov.taipei/

addressZh: 臺北市大同區長安西路39號
descriptionZh: 台北當代藝術館自2001年開館後，前七年由市政府委託民間企業家組成的「當代藝術基金會」統籌營運，基金會董事和歷任館長、館員們同心合力，陸續辦理了許多精采絕倫的當代藝術展覽，除了致力推動台灣與國際藝壇的對話，也用心開拓民眾的美感品味和文化視野。2008年1月1日起，為期七年的「公辦民營」合約結束，台北當代藝術館轉由台北市文化基金會接手營運。新的經營團隊除了延續之前的營運理念和方向，也進一步匯聚海內外的關注，結合官方有限資源與民間贊助力量，媒合多元文化和跨界創意。除了扮演國際當代藝術展覽的重要據點，和彰顯台灣當代藝術成果的焦點櫥窗，當代館始終自我期許的三個目標：一是推動多元風貌的藝術創作與展覽，二是著眼於激發民眾的新觀點和新思維，三是提供當代城市發展源源不絕的創意與活力。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 39, Chang’an W. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City 103, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Since its inauguration in 2001, Museum of Contemporary Art, Taipei, had been managed and operated by the Contemporary Art Foundation comprised of private-sector enterprises commissioned by the Taipei City Government for the first 7 years. The concerted efforts and teamwork amongst the Foundation’s board directors and Museum directors and staffs had on and off organized a slew of outstanding contemporary art exhibitions. Besides its commitment in promoting dialogues between Taiwan and the international art scenes, the Museum is also devoted to expanding the public’s aesthetic tastes and cultural visions. Starting from January 1 2008, the BOT contract that lasted 7 years ended. Taipei Cultural Foundation took over the operation and management of the Museum. The new managerial team has continued with its predecessor’s management ideals and directions, while further congealing domestic and overseas attention in combining the limited governmental resources and the private sponsorships and bridging diverse cultures and cross-sector creativity. Besides playing an important role in organizing international contemporary art exhibitions and serving as a spotlight showcase to highlight Taiwan’s contemporary art, the Museum has always hoped to fulfill the three objectives: I, to promote diverse artistic creations and exhibitions; II, to focus on stimulating the public for new perspectives and new thinking; III, to provide the development of contemporary cities with endless creativity and vitality.

nameZh: 臺灣魯凱族產業發展協會
addressZh: 屏東縣霧臺鄉好茶村古茶柏安街17巷5號
descriptionZh:
禮納里一好茶部落，是為當時莫拉克風災受災居民所建置的永久屋家園。有台灣普羅旺斯的別名，有一群年輕人回到部落投入產業重生的工作，以陪伴老人、培育部落人才、延續文化產業的方式，發展出多元、創新的產業及就業機會，吸引喜歡漫遊、體驗原住民文化的國內外旅人到訪。部落可預約體驗接待家庭生活、會議展場空間、餐飲服務、原味 DIY、皇室祈福及部落文化導覽行程。
另協會於104年由茂林國家風景區管理處提報為交通部觀光局i-center旅遊服務體系第4層級之借問站，提供遊客友善旅遊諮詢及多項貼心服務。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 5, Ln. 17, Guchabo’an St., Wutai Township, Pingtung County 902, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: The Linali Great Tea Settlement was built as permanent housing for the displaced residents affected by Typhoon Morakot. Referred to as Taiwan’s Province, the Association sees a return of young people back to the settlement to engage in works of industry renewal. The Association has developed a diverse and innovative industry and employment opportunities via such approaches as engaging with the elderlies, nourishing talents in the settlements, extending the cultural industry, while attracting domestic and overseas visitors that are fond of roaming & travelling and experiencing Aboriginal culture. Available for booking are experiential home-stay, conference & meeting rooms, dining service, DIP sampling, Royal blessing and guided tour of the settlement culture. The Association was in 2015 submitted by the Maolin National Scenic Area Management Office to serve as the “Information Station” under the Tier-4 i-Center Travel Service System of the Ministry of Transportation and Communications’ Tourism Bureau. As an “Information Station”, the Association offers tourists friendly travel consultation and various friendly services.

addressZh: 嘉義縣番路鄉觸口村車埕51號
descriptionZh: 交通部觀光局在民國90年為因應日漸成熟之旅遊風潮與國內旅遊市場的廣大需求，基於帶動大阿里山地區的觀光發展及資源保育需要，奉成立「阿里山國家風景區管理處」，專責執行觀光事業規劃建設與經營管理工作，俾以服務大阿里山地區之遊客人潮，並希望能藉由遊憩品質提升，協助地方觀光產業的蓬勃發展。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 51, Checheng, Fanlu Township, Chiayi County 602, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: In 2001, Ministry of Transportation and Communications’ Tourism Bureau established the Alison National Scenic Area Management Office in response to the increasingly mature travel trends and huge demand in the domestic tourism market and in order to stimulate the tourism development and conserve resources in the great Alisan area. Its primary responsibility is to execute the tourism planning & construction, as well as its management and operation, so as to serve the tourists in the aforementioned area and hopefully to assist the local tourism to flourish by way of upgrading the leisure & recreational quality.

addressZh: 新北市五股區凌雲路三段130號
descriptionZh:
位在凌雲路三段的觀音山遊客中心，紅瓦白牆的建築外觀，環抱在綠意蔥蔥的群山間，益顯得清麗脫俗，內部則展示觀音山旅遊資源、登山步道系統，以及觀音山史前人文活動暨周邊出土的遺址與史前陶器。
為緬懷觀音山的採石歲月，服務中心旁規劃了一座石雕公園。園中並委託石雕家王秀杞先生創作「龍的傳人」的巨型石雕作品。其係由整塊觀音石切割雕刻後結合而成，高10公尺，直徑1.5公尺，各層雕刻主題各有不同，包括有台灣景觀、風景名勝、民俗技藝等，成為為觀音山的精神地標。當您來到這裡，不妨停下腳步欣賞一下用觀音山石表現出來的質樸美感。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 130, Sec. 3, Lingyun Rd., Wugu Dist., New Taipei City 248, Taiwan (R.O.C.)
descriptionEn: Located on the Section 3 of Lingyun Road, the Guanyingshan Visitor Center features red tiles and white walls for its architectural exterior. Surrounded by clusters of lush green mountains, the Center appears all the more unique and graceful. Guanyingshan tourist information is displayed in the Center, along with hiking trails and Guangyingshan pre-historic cultural activities, archeological sites and pre-historic pottery pieces excavated in the surrounding. In remembrance of the Quanyingshan quarrying era, a stone sculpture park is planned and attached to the Visitor Center. The Park has commissioned the artist, Mr. Wang Xiuji, to create a huge stone column named, “Descendant of the Dragon”. The column is made up with Guanyin stones, cut, sculpted then joined together, measuring 10 meters in height and 1.5 meters in diameter. Each layer of the sculpture features a different theme, including Taiwan landscapes, scenic attractions, folk arts & crafts. The column is now the spiritual landmark of Guanyingshan. On your visit here, be sure to slow down and admire the rustic and demure beauty as expressed by Guanyingshan stones.

nameZh: 國立臺灣博物館鐵道部園區
addressZh: 台北市大同區延平北路一段2號
descriptionZh: 國定古蹟臺灣總督府鐵道部位於忠孝西路、塔城街、鄭州路、延平北路間，屬交通部臺灣鐵路管理局管轄。1885年臺灣巡撫劉銘傳聘請英國與德國顧問，於淡水河碼頭內建造機器局，組裝槍砲彈藥及鑄造貨幣，內有鎔鐵所、鍛工場等。1895年日本軍方接收機器局，改為臺北兵器修理所，製造並修理陸軍所管兵器，可製造彈丸、信管、小銃丸及藥筴、船舶、鐵道鐵橋等，之後改稱為臺灣砲兵工廠，1900年由陸軍省移交鐵道部，同年改為臺北工場。1908年臺灣西部縱貫鐵路開通，鐵路交通運量與車輛維修需求大增，1909年臺北工場向東擴張，新建車輛修理工場、塗工場。1915年起拆除基地南邊原有建物，1918年新建鐵道部廳舍，與臺北工場並存，成為南廳舍、北工廠配置，直到1934年臺北工場搬遷至松山（今國定古蹟臺北機廠）為止，街廓內原有將近四十棟建物，歷經2005年興建捷運以及2013古蹟修復拆除不保存者，目前尚餘十棟，其中包含八處法定文化資產。
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
nameEn: National Taiwan Museum Railway Department Park
addressEn: No. 2, Sec. 1, Yanping N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn: The National Taiwan Museum's Railway Department Park is located between Zhongxiao W. Rd., Tacheng St., Zhengzhou Rd., and Yanping N. Rd.; it is under the jurisdiction of the Taiwan Railways Administration.

addressZh: 臺北市大同區重慶北路三段335巷40號
descriptionZh:
小紅厝月經博物館坐落於臺北市大同區的菜市場中，在 2022 年 6 月開幕，是目前全球唯一一座以「月經」為主題的實體博物館，同時也是小紅帽的日常服務據點。博物館內除了有全球藝術家特展、常設多元月經主題展覽、跨世代身體記憶、多元月經教育展品，還會不定期舉辦月經教育工作坊、行動講座、議題沙龍，並且敞開大門，免費開放所有民眾前來參觀。

小紅厝中有許多從身體樣態出發的作品，以真實經驗為主體的故事，從認識器官的本體，緩緩走回我們都曾住過的第一個家——子宮。在這裡，我們希望以生命作為軸線，陪伴著每一個在此落腳的旅人，回到源頭，再次認識自己，學習擁抱多元。​
​
未來在小紅厝，也將會有與全球各界的藝術家合作的「主題特展」、「教育工作坊」、「行動講座」和「議題沙龍」，誠摯邀請你，無論年紀、性別、有沒有月經，都做伙來小紅厝坐坐！
source: 友善店家清冊（繁體中文）
addressEn: No. 40, Ln. 335, Sec. 3, Chongqing N. Rd., Datong Dist., Taipei City
descriptionEn:
The Red House Period Museum is situated in Taipei Datong District's traditional market. Opened in June 2022, it is the only menstrual period-theme museum in the world. The museum also serves as the business service location for With Red. The museum not only has exhibitions from artists around the world, but also has regular period-themed exhibitions, cross-generation body memory, diverse menstrual education products, and occasional period-themed education workshops, action seminars, and theme-salons. The Red House is free for all visitors. 

The Red House has many body-themed works based on real life experience and stories. Get to know the organs, and slowly trace back to our very first home, the uterus. Here, we hope to use life as the theme, and accompany every visitor that comes here to trace their origins, to get reacquainted with themselves, and to learn how to embrace diversity. ​
​
In the future, the Red House will cooperate with artists from around the globe in themed exhibits, education workshops, action seminars, and theme-salons. We cordially invite you to come and visit the Red House, regardless of your age, gender, or whether you have periods or not!
